search_text: Human or Machine? It Is Not What You Write, But How You Write It 人还是机器？重要的不是你写什么，而是你如何写 Online fraud often involves identity theft. Since most security measures are weak or can be spoofed, we investigate a more nuanced and less explored avenue: behavioral biometrics via handwriting movements. This kind of data can be used to verify whether a user is operating a device or a computer application, so it is important to distinguish between human and machine-generated movements reliably. For this purpose, we study handwritten symbols (isolated characters, digits, gestures, and signatures) produced by humans and machines, and compare and contrast several deep learning models. We find that if symbols are presented as static images, they can fool state-of-the-art classifiers (near 75% accuracy in the best case) but can be distinguished with remarkable accuracy if they are presented as temporal sequences (95% accuracy in the average case). We conclude that an accurate detection of fake movements has more to do with how users write, rather than what they write. Our work has implications for computerized systems that need to authenticate or verify legitimate human users, and provides an additional layer of security to keep attackers at bay. 在线欺诈通常涉及身份盗窃。由于大多数安全措施都很薄弱或可能被欺骗，因此我们研究了一种更细致且较少探索的途径：通过手写动作进行行为生物识别。此类数据可用于验证用户是否正在操作设备或计算机应用程序，因此可靠地区分人类和机器生成的动作非常重要。为此，我们研究人类和机器产生的手写符号（孤立的字符、数字、手势和签名），并比较和对比几种深度学习模型。我们发现，如果符号以静态图像的形式呈现，它们可以欺骗最先进的分类器（最好情况下准确率接近 75%），但如果以时间序列呈现（平均情况下准确率 95%），则可以以惊人的准确度进行区分。我们的结论是，准确检测虚假动作更多地与用户的书写方式有关，而不是他们所写的内容。我们的工作对需要验证或验证合法人类用户的计算机化系统具有影响，并提供额外的安全层以阻止攻击者。 本文研究通过手写动作的行为生物特征区分人类与机器生成的书写行为，提出基于时间序列分析的深度学习方法以提高身份验证准确性。 Luis A. Leiva,Moises Diaz,Miguel A. Ferrer,Réjean Plamondon cs.CV

title: Unified Gradient Reweighting for Model Biasing with Applications to Source Separation
title_zh: 模型偏置的统一梯度重新加权与源分离的应用
comment: ef:ICASSP 2021 - 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
comments: ef:ICASSP 2021 - 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP)
abstract: Recent deep learning approaches have shown great improvement in audio source separation tasks. However, the vast majority of such work is focused on improving average separation performance, often neglecting to examine or control the distribution of the results. In this paper, we propose a simple, unified gradient reweighting scheme, with a lightweight modification to bias the learning process of a model and steer it towards a certain distribution of results. More specifically, we reweight the gradient updates of each batch, using a user-specified probability distribution. We apply this method to various source separation tasks, in order to shift the operating point of the models towards different objectives. We demonstrate different parameterizations of our unified reweighting scheme can be used towards addressing several real-world problems, such as unreliable separation estimates. Our framework enables the user to control a robustness trade-off between worst and average performance. Moreover, we experimentally show that our unified reweighting scheme can also be used in order to shift the focus of the model towards being more accurate for user-specified sound classes or even towards easier examples in order to enable faster convergence.
summary: Recent deep learning approaches have shown great improvement in audio source separation tasks. However, the vast majority of such work is focused on improving average separation performance, often neglecting to examine or control the distribution of the results. In this paper, we propose a simple, unified gradient reweighting scheme, with a lightweight modification to bias the learning process of a model and steer it towards a certain distribution of results. More specifically, we reweight the gradient updates of each batch, using a user-specified probability distribution. We apply this method to various source separation tasks, in order to shift the operating point of the models towards different objectives. We demonstrate different parameterizations of our unified reweighting scheme can be used towards addressing several real-world problems, such as unreliable separation estimates. Our framework enables the user to control a robustness trade-off between worst and average performance. Moreover, we experimentally show that our unified reweighting scheme can also be used in order to shift the focus of the model towards being more accurate for user-specified sound classes or even towards easier examples in order to enable faster convergence.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度学习方法在音频源分离任务方面显示出了巨大的进步。然而，绝大多数此类工作都集中在提高平均分离性能，往往忽略了检查或控制结果的分布。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单、统一的梯度重新加权方案，通过轻量级修改来偏置模型的学习过程，并将其引导至一定的结果分布。更具体地说，我们使用用户指定的概率分布重新加权每个批次的梯度更新。我们将该方法应用于各种源分离任务，以便将模型的操作点转向不同的目标。我们证明了我们的统一重新加权方案的不同参数化可用于解决几个现实世界的问题，例如不可靠的分离估计。我们的框架使用户能够控制最差性能和平均性能之间的稳健性权衡。此外，我们通过实验表明，我们的统一重新加权方案也可以用于将模型的焦点转向对用户指定的声音类别更准确，甚至转向更简单的示例，以便实现更快的收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的梯度重加权方案，用于在音频源分离任务中控制模型结果的分布。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在音频源分离任务中取得了显著进展，但大多数工作仅关注平均分离性能的提升，而忽略了结果分布的控制。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种简单的统一梯度重加权方案，通过对每个批次的梯度更新进行重加权，使用用户指定的概率分布来偏置模型的学习过程。
AI.result: 该方法被应用于多种源分离任务，能够调整模型的操作点以满足不同目标，同时实现了在最差表现与平均表现之间的鲁棒性权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为用户提供了控制模型结果分布的能力，并展示了其在解决实际问题（如不可靠的分离估计）和提升特定类别或简单样本准确率方面的潜力。

title: IR-GAN: Room Impulse Response Generator for Far-field Speech Recognition
title_zh: IR-GAN：用于远场语音识别的房间脉冲响应发生器
abstract: We present a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based room impulse response generator (IR-GAN) for generating realistic synthetic room impulse responses (RIRs). IR-GAN extracts acoustic parameters from captured real-world RIRs and uses these parameters to generate new synthetic RIRs. We use these generated synthetic RIRs to improve far-field automatic speech recognition in new environments that are different from the ones used in training datasets. In particular, we augment the far-field speech training set by convolving our synthesized RIRs with a clean LibriSpeech dataset. We evaluate the quality of our synthetic RIRs on the real-world LibriSpeech test set created using real-world RIRs from the BUT ReverbDB and AIR datasets. Our IR-GAN reports up to an 8.95% lower error rate than Geometric Acoustic Simulator (GAS) in far-field speech recognition benchmarks. We further improve the performance when we combine our synthetic RIRs with synthetic impulse responses generated using GAS. This combination can reduce the word error rate by up to 14.3% in far-field speech recognition benchmarks.
summary: We present a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based room impulse response generator (IR-GAN) for generating realistic synthetic room impulse responses (RIRs). IR-GAN extracts acoustic parameters from captured real-world RIRs and uses these parameters to generate new synthetic RIRs. We use these generated synthetic RIRs to improve far-field automatic speech recognition in new environments that are different from the ones used in training datasets. In particular, we augment the far-field speech training set by convolving our synthesized RIRs with a clean LibriSpeech dataset. We evaluate the quality of our synthetic RIRs on the real-world LibriSpeech test set created using real-world RIRs from the BUT ReverbDB and AIR datasets. Our IR-GAN reports up to an 8.95% lower error rate than Geometric Acoustic Simulator (GAS) in far-field speech recognition benchmarks. We further improve the performance when we combine our synthetic RIRs with synthetic impulse responses generated using GAS. This combination can reduce the word error rate by up to 14.3% in far-field speech recognition benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的房间脉冲响应生成器（IR-GAN），用于生成真实的合成房间脉冲响应（RIR）。 IR-GAN 从捕获的真实世界 RIR 中提取声学参数，并使用这些参数生成新的合成 RIR。我们使用这些生成的合成 RIR 来改进与训练数据集中使用的环境不同的新环境中的远场自动语音识别。特别是，我们通过将合成的 RIR 与干净的 LibriSpeech 数据集进行卷积来增强远场语音训练集。我们在使用来自 BUT ReverbDB 和 AIR 数据集的真实 RIR 创建的真实 LibriSpeech 测试集上评估合成 RIR 的质量。在远场语音识别基准测试中，我们的 IR-GAN 错误率比几何声学模拟器 (GAS) 低 8.95%。当我们将合成 RIR 与使用 GAS 生成的合成脉冲响应相结合时，我们进一步提高了性能。这种组合在远场语音识别基准测试中可将误词率降低高达 14.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的房间脉冲响应生成器（IR-GAN），用于生成逼真的合成房间脉冲响应（RIR），以提升远场语音识别在新环境中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有远场语音识别系统在新环境中表现不佳，而真实世界RIR数据采集成本高且受限。传统几何声学模拟器（GAS）生成的RIR存在局限性，需探索更高效的合成方法。
AI.method: 通过GAN从真实RIR中提取声学参数生成合成RIR，结合LibriSpeech数据集进行卷积增强，并与GAS生成的RIR组合使用以优化远场语音识别训练集。
AI.result: IR-GAN在远场语音识别基准测试中较GAS降低8.95%错误率，与GAS合成RIR结合后进一步降低至14.3%的词错误率。
AI.conclusion: IR-GAN能有效生成高质量合成RIR，显著提升远场语音识别鲁棒性，尤其在多环境适应性方面优于传统方法。

result: IR-GAN在远场语音识别基准测试中较GAS降低8.95%错误率，与GAS合成RIR结合后进一步降低至14.3%的词错误率。
conclusion: IR-GAN能有效生成高质量合成RIR，显著提升远场语音识别鲁棒性，尤其在多环境适应性方面优于传统方法。
search_text: IR-GAN: Room Impulse Response Generator for Far-field Speech Recognition IR-GAN：用于远场语音识别的房间脉冲响应发生器 We present a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) based room impulse response generator (IR-GAN) for generating realistic synthetic room impulse responses (RIRs). IR-GAN extracts acoustic parameters from captured real-world RIRs and uses these parameters to generate new synthetic RIRs. We use these generated synthetic RIRs to improve far-field automatic speech recognition in new environments that are different from the ones used in training datasets. In particular, we augment the far-field speech training set by convolving our synthesized RIRs with a clean LibriSpeech dataset. We evaluate the quality of our synthetic RIRs on the real-world LibriSpeech test set created using real-world RIRs from the BUT ReverbDB and AIR datasets. Our IR-GAN reports up to an 8.95% lower error rate than Geometric Acoustic Simulator (GAS) in far-field speech recognition benchmarks. We further improve the performance when we combine our synthetic RIRs with synthetic impulse responses generated using GAS. This combination can reduce the word error rate by up to 14.3% in far-field speech recognition benchmarks. 我们提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的房间脉冲响应生成器（IR-GAN），用于生成真实的合成房间脉冲响应（RIR）。 IR-GAN 从捕获的真实世界 RIR 中提取声学参数，并使用这些参数生成新的合成 RIR。我们使用这些生成的合成 RIR 来改进与训练数据集中使用的环境不同的新环境中的远场自动语音识别。特别是，我们通过将合成的 RIR 与干净的 LibriSpeech 数据集进行卷积来增强远场语音训练集。我们在使用来自 BUT ReverbDB 和 AIR 数据集的真实 RIR 创建的真实 LibriSpeech 测试集上评估合成 RIR 的质量。在远场语音识别基准测试中，我们的 IR-GAN 错误率比几何声学模拟器 (GAS) 低 8.95%。当我们将合成 RIR 与使用 GAS 生成的合成脉冲响应相结合时，我们进一步提高了性能。这种组合在远场语音识别基准测试中可将误词率降低高达 14.3%。 本文提出基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的房间脉冲响应生成器（IR-GAN），用于生成逼真的合成房间脉冲响应（RIR），以提升远场语音识别在新环境中的性能。 Anton Ratnarajah,Zhenyu Tang,Dinesh Manocha cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Ruangrawee Kitichotkul,Christopher A. Metzler,Frank Ong,Gordon Wetzstein
title: SUREMap: Predicting Uncertainty in CNN-based Image Reconstruction Using Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimate
title_zh: SUREMap：使用 Stein 的无偏风险估计来预测基于 CNN 的图像重建中的不确定性
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have emerged as a powerful tool for solving computational imaging reconstruction problems. However, CNNs are generally difficult-to-understand black-boxes. Accordingly, it is challenging to know when they will work and, more importantly, when they will fail. This limitation is a major barrier to their use in safety-critical applications like medical imaging: Is that blob in the reconstruction an artifact or a tumor? In this work we use Stein's unbiased risk estimate (SURE) to develop per-pixel confidence intervals, in the form of heatmaps, for compressive sensing reconstruction using the approximate message passing (AMP) framework with CNN-based denoisers. These heatmaps tell end-users how much to trust an image formed by a CNN, which could greatly improve the utility of CNNs in various computational imaging applications.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNN) have emerged as a powerful tool for solving computational imaging reconstruction problems. However, CNNs are generally difficult-to-understand black-boxes. Accordingly, it is challenging to know when they will work and, more importantly, when they will fail. This limitation is a major barrier to their use in safety-critical applications like medical imaging: Is that blob in the reconstruction an artifact or a tumor? In this work we use Stein's unbiased risk estimate (SURE) to develop per-pixel confidence intervals, in the form of heatmaps, for compressive sensing reconstruction using the approximate message passing (AMP) framework with CNN-based denoisers. These heatmaps tell end-users how much to trust an image formed by a CNN, which could greatly improve the utility of CNNs in various computational imaging applications.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已成为解决计算成像重建问题的强大工具。然而，CNN 通常是难以理解的黑匣子。因此，要知道它们什么时候会起作用，更重要的是，什么时候会失败，是很有挑战性的。这种限制是它们在医学成像等安全关键应用中使用的主要障碍：重建中的斑点是伪影还是肿瘤？在这项工作中，我们使用 Stein 的无偏风险估计 (SURE) 以热图的形式开发每像素置信区间，以便使用近似消息传递 (AMP) 框架和基于 CNN 的降噪器进行压缩感知重建。这些热图告诉最终用户对 CNN 形成的图像的信任程度，这可以极大地提高 CNN 在各种计算成像应用中的实用性。

AI.tldr: 开发基于SURE的像素级置信区间热图，用于评估CNN在图像重建中的不确定性
AI.motivation: 解决CNN作为黑箱模型在安全关键应用（如医疗影像）中缺乏可信度评估的缺陷，需明确区分重建结果中的伪影与真实特征
AI.method: 结合Stein的无偏风险估计（SURE）与近似消息传递（AMP）框架，利用CNN作为去噪器，生成像素级置信区间热图
AI.result: 生成的热图能有效指示图像中各像素的可信度，提升CNN在计算成像应用中的可靠性与实用性
AI.conclusion: SUREMap方法有效量化CNN重建结果的不确定性，为安全关键领域的图像重建提供可靠依据

title: Scheduling with Complete Multipartite Incompatibility Graph on Parallel Machines
title_zh: 并行机上完全多部分不兼容图的调度
abstract: In this paper we consider the problem of scheduling on parallel machines with a presence of incompatibilities between jobs. The incompatibility relation can be modeled as a complete multipartite graph in which each edge denotes a pair of jobs that cannot be scheduled on the same machine. Our research stems from the work of Bodlaender et al.~[1992, 1993]. In particular, we pursue the line investigated partially by Mallek et al.~[2019], where the graph is complete multipartite so each machine can do jobs only from one partition. We also tie our results to the recent approach for so-called identical machines with class constraints by Jansen et al.~[2019], providing a link between our case and their generalization. In the paper we provide several algorithms constructing schedules, optimal or approximate with respect to the two most popular criteria of optimality: Cmax (the makespan) and ΣCj(the total completion time). We consider a variety of machine types in our paper: identical, uniform, unrelated, and a natural subcase of unrelated machines. Our results consist of delimitation of the easy (polynomial) and NP-hard problems within these constraints. In the case when the problem is hard, we also provide algorithm, either with a guaranteed constant worst-case approximation ratio or even in some cases a PTAS. In particular, we fill the gap on research for the problem of finding a schedule with smallest total completion time on uniform machines. We address this problem by developing a linear programming relaxation technique with an appropriate rounding, which to our knowledge is a novelty for this criterion in the considered setting.
summary: In this paper we consider the problem of scheduling on parallel machines with a presence of incompatibilities between jobs. The incompatibility relation can be modeled as a complete multipartite graph in which each edge denotes a pair of jobs that cannot be scheduled on the same machine. Our research stems from the work of Bodlaender et al.~[1992, 1993]. In particular, we pursue the line investigated partially by Mallek et al.~[2019], where the graph is complete multipartite so each machine can do jobs only from one partition. We also tie our results to the recent approach for so-called identical machines with class constraints by Jansen et al.~[2019], providing a link between our case and their generalization. In the paper we provide several algorithms constructing schedules, optimal or approximate with respect to the two most popular criteria of optimality: Cmax (the makespan) and ΣCj(the total completion time). We consider a variety of machine types in our paper: identical, uniform, unrelated, and a natural subcase of unrelated machines. Our results consist of delimitation of the easy (polynomial) and NP-hard problems within these constraints. In the case when the problem is hard, we also provide algorithm, either with a guaranteed constant worst-case approximation ratio or even in some cases a PTAS. In particular, we fill the gap on research for the problem of finding a schedule with smallest total completion time on uniform machines. We address this problem by developing a linear programming relaxation technique with an appropriate rounding, which to our knowledge is a novelty for this criterion in the considered setting.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑在作业之间存在不兼容性的情况下在并行机器上进行调度的问题。不兼容关系可以建模为一个完整的多部分图，其中每条边表示一对不能在同一台机器上调度的作业。我们的研究源于 Bodlaender 等人的工作~[1992, 1993]。特别是，我们遵循 Mallek 等人~[2019] 部分研究的路线，其中该图是完整的多部分，因此每台机器只能从一个分区执行作业。我们还将我们的结果与 Jansen 等人~[2019] 提出的具有类约束的所谓相同机器的最新方法联系起来，在我们的案例和它们的概括之间提供了联系。在本文中，我们提供了几种构建调度的算法，对于两个最流行的最优标准：Cmax（完工时间）和ΣCj（总完成时间），最优或近似。我们在论文中考虑了多种机器类型：相同的、统一的、不相关的以及不相关机器的自然子情况。我们的结果包括在这些约束内界定简单（多项式）问题和 NP 困难问题。在问题很困难的情况下，我们还提供算法，要么具有保证恒定的最坏情况近似率，要么在某些情况下提供 PTAS。特别是，我们填补了在统一机器上寻找总完成时间最小的调度问题的研究空白。我们通过开发一种具有适当舍入的线性规划松弛技术来解决这个问题，据我们所知，在所考虑的设置中，这对于该标准来说是新颖的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在并行机器上处理具有完全多部图不兼容关系的任务调度问题，提出多种算法以优化makespan和总完成时间。
AI.motivation: 实际调度中任务间存在不兼容约束，需在机器间分配任务以避免冲突。此前研究对完全多部图模型的调度复杂性及算法覆盖不全，需填补相关空白。
AI.method: 基于完全多部图模型，结合线性规划松弛与舍入技术，设计针对不同机器类型（相同/均匀/无关）的调度算法，并分析问题复杂性。
AI.result: 明确区分多项式可解与NP难问题，提出常数近似比算法及PTAS；首次针对均匀机器最小总完成时间问题提出线性规划新方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文系统解决完全多部图不兼容调度问题，填补均匀机器总完成时间优化的研究空白，为同类问题提供理论框架与算法工具。

title: Subjective Evaluation of Noise Suppression Algorithms in Crowdsourcing
title_zh: 众包中噪声抑制算法的主观评价
abstract: The quality of the speech communication systems, which include noise suppression algorithms, are typically evaluated in laboratory experiments according to the ITU-T Rec. P.835, in which participants rate background noise, speech signal, and overall quality separately. This paper introduces an open-source toolkit for conducting subjective quality evaluation of noise suppressed speech in crowdsourcing. We followed the ITU-T Rec. P.835, and P.808 and highly automate the process to prevent moderator's error. To assess the validity of our evaluation method, we compared the Mean Opinion Scores (MOS), calculate using ratings collected with our implementation, and the MOS values from a standard laboratory experiment conducted according to the ITU-T Rec P.835. Results show a high validity in all three scales namely background noise, speech signal and overall quality (average PCC = 0.961). Results of a round-robin test (N=5) showed that our implementation is also a highly reproducible evaluation method (PCC=0.99). Finally, we used our implementation in the INTERSPEECH 2021 Deep Noise Suppression Challenge as the primary evaluation metric, which demonstrates it is practical to use at scale. The results are analyzed to determine why the overall performance was the best in terms of background noise and speech quality.
summary: The quality of the speech communication systems, which include noise suppression algorithms, are typically evaluated in laboratory experiments according to the ITU-T Rec. P.835, in which participants rate background noise, speech signal, and overall quality separately. This paper introduces an open-source toolkit for conducting subjective quality evaluation of noise suppressed speech in crowdsourcing. We followed the ITU-T Rec. P.835, and P.808 and highly automate the process to prevent moderator's error. To assess the validity of our evaluation method, we compared the Mean Opinion Scores (MOS), calculate using ratings collected with our implementation, and the MOS values from a standard laboratory experiment conducted according to the ITU-T Rec P.835. Results show a high validity in all three scales namely background noise, speech signal and overall quality (average PCC = 0.961). Results of a round-robin test (N=5) showed that our implementation is also a highly reproducible evaluation method (PCC=0.99). Finally, we used our implementation in the INTERSPEECH 2021 Deep Noise Suppression Challenge as the primary evaluation metric, which demonstrates it is practical to use at scale. The results are analyzed to determine why the overall performance was the best in terms of background noise and speech quality.
abstract_zh: 语音通信系统（包括噪声抑制算法）的质量通常根据 ITU-T Rec. 在实验室实验中进行评估。 P.835，参与者分别对背景噪声、语音信号和整体质量进行评分。本文介绍了一种开源工具包，用于在众包中对噪声抑制语音进行主观质量评估。我们遵循 ITU-T Rec. P.835 和 P.808 以及高度自动化的过程，以防止主持人的错误。为了评估我们的评估方法的有效性，我们比较了平均意见分数 (MOS)，使用我们的实施过程中收集的评级进行计算，以及根据 ITU-T Rec P.835 进行的标准实验室实验得出的 MOS 值。结果显示，所有三个量表（即背景噪声、语音信号和整体质量）均具有很高的有效性（平均 PCC = 0.961）。循环测试（N=5）的结果表明，我们的实施也是一种高度可重复的评估方法（PCC=0.99）。最后，我们使用我们在 INTERSPEECH 2021 深度噪声抑制挑战赛中的实现作为主要评估指标，这表明它具有大规模使用的实用性。对结果进行分析以确定为什么在背景噪声和语音质量方面整体性能最佳。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于众包的主观噪声抑制算法评估工具包，并验证其有效性与可重复性。
AI.motivation: 传统实验室评估方法成本高且难以大规模应用，需开发自动化、可扩展的众包评估方案以提升效率。
AI.method: 遵循ITU-T P.835和P.808标准，构建自动化评估工具包，通过MOS评分对比实验室结果，并进行轮换测试验证可重复性。
AI.result: 背景噪声、语音信号及整体质量的平均PCC达0.961，轮换测试PCC为0.99，且成功应用于INTERSPEECH 2021挑战赛。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有效性、可重复性及实用性方面表现优异，适合大规模噪声抑制算法评估。

title: Gestop : Customizable Gesture Control of Computer Systems
title_zh: Gestop：计算机系统的可定制手势控制
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, to appear in the proceedings of the 8th ACM IKDD CODS and 26th COMAD (CODS-COMAD '21)
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, to appear in the proceedings of the 8th ACM IKDD CODS and 26th COMAD (CODS-COMAD '21)
abstract: The established way of interfacing with most computer systems is a mouse and keyboard. Hand gestures are an intuitive and effective touchless way to interact with computer systems. However, hand gesture based systems have seen low adoption among end-users primarily due to numerous technical hurdles in detecting in-air gestures accurately. This paper presents Gestop, a framework developed to bridge this gap. The framework learns to detect gestures from demonstrations, is customizable by end-users and enables users to interact in real-time with computers having only RGB cameras, using gestures.
summary: The established way of interfacing with most computer systems is a mouse and keyboard. Hand gestures are an intuitive and effective touchless way to interact with computer systems. However, hand gesture based systems have seen low adoption among end-users primarily due to numerous technical hurdles in detecting in-air gestures accurately. This paper presents Gestop, a framework developed to bridge this gap. The framework learns to detect gestures from demonstrations, is customizable by end-users and enables users to interact in real-time with computers having only RGB cameras, using gestures.
abstract_zh: 与大多数计算机系统连接的既定方式是鼠标和键盘。手势是与计算机系统交互的直观且有效的非接触式方式。然而，基于手势的系统在最终用户中的采用率较低，这主要是由于准确检测空中手势存在许多技术障碍。本文介绍了 Gestop，一个为弥合这一差距而开发的框架。该框架学习从演示中检测手势，可由最终用户自定义，并使用户能够使用手势与仅具有 RGB 摄像头的计算机进行实时交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Gestop框架，通过RGB摄像头实现可定制的手势控制计算机系统，解决空中手势检测的技术难题。
AI.motivation: 传统鼠标键盘存在操作局限，手势控制因检测精度不足导致用户接受度低，需开发更精准且支持用户自定义的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于演示学习的手势检测算法，结合RGB摄像头实时捕捉手势，并提供用户自定义手势映射功能。
AI.result: 实现无需深度摄像头的实时手势交互，支持用户自定义手势指令，有效提升手势控制的准确性和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: Gestop框架通过技术创新和用户定制化设计，为触控式人机交互提供了可行方案，推动手势控制技术的实用化落地。

authors_text: Akash Srivastava,Yamini Bansal,Yukun Ding,Cole Lincoln Hurwitz,Kai Xu,Bernhard Egger,Prasanna Sattigeri,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Agus Sudjianto,Phuong Le,Arun Prakash R,Nengfeng Zhou,Joel Vaughan,Yaqun Wang,Anwesha Bhattacharyya,Kristjan Greenewald,David D. Cox,Dan Gutfreund
title: Improving the Reconstruction of Disentangled Representation Learners via Multi-Stage Modeling
title_zh: 通过多阶段建模改进解耦表示学习器的重建
abstract: Current autoencoder-based disentangled representation learning methods achieve disentanglement by penalizing the (aggregate) posterior to encourage statistical independence of the latent factors. This approach introduces a trade-off between disentangled representation learning and reconstruction quality since the model does not have enough capacity to learn correlated latent variables that capture detail information present in most image data. To overcome this trade-off, we present a novel multi-stage modeling approach where the disentangled factors are first learned using a penalty-based disentangled representation learning method; then, the low-quality reconstruction is improved with another deep generative model that is trained to model the missing correlated latent variables, adding detail information while maintaining conditioning on the previously learned disentangled factors. Taken together, our multi-stage modelling approach results in a single, coherent probabilistic model that is theoretically justified by the principal of D-separation and can be realized with a variety of model classes including likelihood-based models such as variational autoencoders, implicit models such as generative adversarial networks, and tractable models like normalizing flows or mixtures of Gaussians. We demonstrate that our multi-stage model has higher reconstruction quality than current state-of-the-art methods with equivalent disentanglement performance across multiple standard benchmarks. In addition, we apply the multi-stage model to generate synthetic tabular datasets, showcasing an enhanced performance over benchmark models across a variety of metrics. The interpretability analysis further indicates that the multi-stage model can effectively uncover distinct and meaningful features of variations from which the original distribution can be recovered.
summary: Current autoencoder-based disentangled representation learning methods achieve disentanglement by penalizing the (aggregate) posterior to encourage statistical independence of the latent factors. This approach introduces a trade-off between disentangled representation learning and reconstruction quality since the model does not have enough capacity to learn correlated latent variables that capture detail information present in most image data. To overcome this trade-off, we present a novel multi-stage modeling approach where the disentangled factors are first learned using a penalty-based disentangled representation learning method; then, the low-quality reconstruction is improved with another deep generative model that is trained to model the missing correlated latent variables, adding detail information while maintaining conditioning on the previously learned disentangled factors. Taken together, our multi-stage modelling approach results in a single, coherent probabilistic model that is theoretically justified by the principal of D-separation and can be realized with a variety of model classes including likelihood-based models such as variational autoencoders, implicit models such as generative adversarial networks, and tractable models like normalizing flows or mixtures of Gaussians. We demonstrate that our multi-stage model has higher reconstruction quality than current state-of-the-art methods with equivalent disentanglement performance across multiple standard benchmarks. In addition, we apply the multi-stage model to generate synthetic tabular datasets, showcasing an enhanced performance over benchmark models across a variety of metrics. The interpretability analysis further indicates that the multi-stage model can effectively uncover distinct and meaningful features of variations from which the original distribution can be recovered.
abstract_zh: 当前基于自动编码器的解缠表示学习方法通​​过惩罚（聚合）后验以鼓励潜在因素的统计独立性来实现解缠。这种方法引入了解缠结表示学习和重建质量之间的权衡，因为该模型没有足够的能力来学习捕获大多数图像数据中存在的细节信息的相关潜在变量。为了克服这种权衡，我们提出了一种新颖的多阶段建模方法，其中首先使用基于惩罚的解缠结表示学习方法来学习解缠结因子；然后，使用另一个深度生成模型来改进低质量重建，该模型经过训练以对缺失的相关潜在变量进行建模，添加详细信息，同时保持对先前学习的解开因子的调节。总而言之，我们的多阶段建模方法产生了一个单一的、连贯的概率模型，该模型在理论上由 D 分离原理证明是合理的，并且可以通过各种模型类别来实现，包括基于似然的模型（如变分自动编码器）、隐式模型（如生成对抗网络）以及易于处理的模型（如归一化流或高斯混合）。我们证明，我们的多阶段模型比当前最先进的方法具有更高的重建质量，并且在多个标准基准上具有同等的解缠结性能。此外，我们应用多阶段模型来生成合成表格数据集，在各种指标上展示了比基准模型更高的性能。可解释性分析进一步表明，多阶段模型可以有效地揭示变化的独特且有意义的特征，从中可以恢复原始分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段建模方法，通过分阶段学习解耦因子和补充相关潜在变量，提升解耦表示学习的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自编码器的解耦表示学习方法在解耦与重建质量间存在权衡，因模型容量不足难以同时捕捉细节信息和解耦因子。
AI.method: 分两阶段建模：第一阶段用惩罚法学习解耦因子，第二阶段用独立生成模型补充相关潜在变量以提升重建细节，保持对解耦因子的条件依赖。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在保持同等解耦性能下重建质量优于现有SOTA方法，并在合成数据集生成和可解释性分析中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段模型通过理论支持的D-分离原理，有效平衡了解耦性与重建质量，适用于多种生成模型架构。

tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段建模方法，通过分阶段学习解耦因子和补充相关潜在变量，提升解耦表示学习的重建质量。
motivation: 现有基于自编码器的解耦表示学习方法在解耦与重建质量间存在权衡，因模型容量不足难以同时捕捉细节信息和解耦因子。
method: 分两阶段建模：第一阶段用惩罚法学习解耦因子，第二阶段用独立生成模型补充相关潜在变量以提升重建细节，保持对解耦因子的条件依赖。
result: 在多个基准测试中，该方法在保持同等解耦性能下重建质量优于现有SOTA方法，并在合成数据集生成和可解释性分析中表现更优。
conclusion: 多阶段模型通过理论支持的D-分离原理，有效平衡了解耦性与重建质量，适用于多种生成模型架构。
search_text: Improving the Reconstruction of Disentangled Representation Learners via Multi-Stage Modeling 通过多阶段建模改进解耦表示学习器的重建 Current autoencoder-based disentangled representation learning methods achieve disentanglement by penalizing the (aggregate) posterior to encourage statistical independence of the latent factors. This approach introduces a trade-off between disentangled representation learning and reconstruction quality since the model does not have enough capacity to learn correlated latent variables that capture detail information present in most image data. To overcome this trade-off, we present a novel multi-stage modeling approach where the disentangled factors are first learned using a penalty-based disentangled representation learning method; then, the low-quality reconstruction is improved with another deep generative model that is trained to model the missing correlated latent variables, adding detail information while maintaining conditioning on the previously learned disentangled factors. Taken together, our multi-stage modelling approach results in a single, coherent probabilistic model that is theoretically justified by the principal of D-separation and can be realized with a variety of model classes including likelihood-based models such as variational autoencoders, implicit models such as generative adversarial networks, and tractable models like normalizing flows or mixtures of Gaussians. We demonstrate that our multi-stage model has higher reconstruction quality than current state-of-the-art methods with equivalent disentanglement performance across multiple standard benchmarks. In addition, we apply the multi-stage model to generate synthetic tabular datasets, showcasing an enhanced performance over benchmark models across a variety of metrics. The interpretability analysis further indicates that the multi-stage model can effectively uncover distinct and meaningful features of variations from which the original distribution can be recovered. 当前基于自动编码器的解缠表示学习方法通​​过惩罚（聚合）后验以鼓励潜在因素的统计独立性来实现解缠。这种方法引入了解缠结表示学习和重建质量之间的权衡，因为该模型没有足够的能力来学习捕获大多数图像数据中存在的细节信息的相关潜在变量。为了克服这种权衡，我们提出了一种新颖的多阶段建模方法，其中首先使用基于惩罚的解缠结表示学习方法来学习解缠结因子；然后，使用另一个深度生成模型来改进低质量重建，该模型经过训练以对缺失的相关潜在变量进行建模，添加详细信息，同时保持对先前学习的解开因子的调节。总而言之，我们的多阶段建模方法产生了一个单一的、连贯的概率模型，该模型在理论上由 D 分离原理证明是合理的，并且可以通过各种模型类别来实现，包括基于似然的模型（如变分自动编码器）、隐式模型（如生成对抗网络）以及易于处理的模型（如归一化流或高斯混合）。我们证明，我们的多阶段模型比当前最先进的方法具有更高的重建质量，并且在多个标准基准上具有同等的解缠结性能。此外，我们应用多阶段模型来生成合成表格数据集，在各种指标上展示了比基准模型更高的性能。可解释性分析进一步表明，多阶段模型可以有效地揭示变化的独特且有意义的特征，从中可以恢复原始分布。 本文提出一种多阶段建模方法，通过分阶段学习解耦因子和补充相关潜在变量，提升解耦表示学习的重建质量。 Akash Srivastava,Yamini Bansal,Yukun Ding,Cole Lincoln Hurwitz,Kai Xu,Bernhard Egger,Prasanna Sattigeri,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Agus Sudjianto,Phuong Le,Arun Prakash R,Nengfeng Zhou,Joel Vaughan,Yaqun Wang,Anwesha Bhattacharyya,Kristjan Greenewald,David D. Cox,Dan Gutfreund stat.ML,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Cascaded all-pass filters with randomized center frequencies and phase polarity for acoustic and speech measurement and data augmentation
title_zh: 具有随机中心频率和相位极性的级联全通滤波器，用于声学和语音测量以及数据增强
comment: 5 pages, 5 figures, Accepted ICASSP2021(Review comment by all reviewers: Very original)
comments: 5 pages, 5 figures, Accepted ICASSP2021(Review comment by all reviewers: Very original)
abstract: We introduce a new member of TSP (Time Stretched Pulse) for acoustic and speech measurement infrastructure, based on a simple all-pass filter and systematic randomization. This new infrastructure fundamentally upgrades our previous measurement procedure, which enables simultaneous measurement of multiple attributes, including non-linear ones without requiring extra filtering nor post-processing. Our new proposal establishes a theoretically solid, flexible, and extensible foundation in acoustic measurement. Moreover, it is general enough to provide versatile research tools for other fields, such as biological signal analysis. We illustrate using acoustic measurements and data augmentation as representative examples among various prospective applications. We open-sourced MATLAB implementation. It consists of an interactive and real-time acoustic tool, MATLAB functions, and supporting materials.
summary: We introduce a new member of TSP (Time Stretched Pulse) for acoustic and speech measurement infrastructure, based on a simple all-pass filter and systematic randomization. This new infrastructure fundamentally upgrades our previous measurement procedure, which enables simultaneous measurement of multiple attributes, including non-linear ones without requiring extra filtering nor post-processing. Our new proposal establishes a theoretically solid, flexible, and extensible foundation in acoustic measurement. Moreover, it is general enough to provide versatile research tools for other fields, such as biological signal analysis. We illustrate using acoustic measurements and data augmentation as representative examples among various prospective applications. We open-sourced MATLAB implementation. It consists of an interactive and real-time acoustic tool, MATLAB functions, and supporting materials.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 TSP（时间拉伸脉冲）的新成员，用于声学和语音测量基础设施，基于简单的全通滤波器和系统随机化。这个新的基础设施从根本上升级了我们以前的测量程序，可以同时测量多个属性，包括非线性属性，而无需额外的过滤或后处理。我们的新提案为声学测量奠定了坚实、灵活和可扩展的理论基础。此外，它的通用性足以为其他领域提供通用的研究工具，例如生物信号分析。我们使用声学测量和数据增强作为各种潜在应用中的代表性示例进行说明。我们开源了 MATLAB 实现。它由交互式实时声学工具、MATLAB 函数和支持材料组成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于级联全通滤波器和随机化参数的新型TSP方法，用于声学与语音测量及数据增强。
AI.motivation: 为解决传统测量方法需额外滤波和后处理的局限性，提升多属性（含非线性）同步测量的效率与灵活性。
AI.method: 设计级联全通滤波器结构，通过随机化中心频率与相位极性生成TSP信号，实现无需额外处理的多属性测量。
AI.result: 构建了理论完备且可扩展的声学测量框架，开源MATLAB工具包，并在声学测量与数据增强场景验证有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为声学测量及生物信号分析等领域提供了通用研究工具，具有理论价值和应用潜力。

title: On Updating and Querying Submatrices
title_zh: 关于子矩阵的更新和查询
abstract: In this paper, we study the $d$-dimensional update-query problem. We provide lower bounds on update and query running times, assuming a long-standing conjecture on min-plus matrix multiplication, as well as algorithms that are close to the lower bounds. Given a $d$-dimensional matrix, an \textit{update} changes each element in a given submatrix from $x$ to $x\bigtriangledown v$, where $v$ is a given constant. A \textit{query} returns the $\bigtriangleup$ of all elements in a given submatrix. We study the cases where $\bigtriangledown$ and $\bigtriangleup$ are both commutative and associative binary operators. When $d = 1$, updates and queries can be performed in $O(\log N)$ worst-case time for many $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)$ by using a segment tree with lazy propagation. However, when $d\ge 2$, similar techniques usually cannot be generalized. We show that if min-plus matrix multiplication cannot be computed in $O(N^{3-\varepsilon})$ time for any $\varepsilon>0$ (which is widely believed to be the case), then for $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)=(+,\min)$, either updates or queries cannot both run in $O(N^{1-\varepsilon})$ time for any constant $\varepsilon>0$, or preprocessing cannot run in polynomial time. Finally, we show a special case where lazy propagation can be generalized for $d\ge 2$ and where updates and queries can run in $O(\log^d N)$ worst-case time. We present an algorithm that meets this running time and is simpler than similar algorithms of previous works.
summary: In this paper, we study the $d$-dimensional update-query problem. We provide lower bounds on update and query running times, assuming a long-standing conjecture on min-plus matrix multiplication, as well as algorithms that are close to the lower bounds. Given a $d$-dimensional matrix, an \textit{update} changes each element in a given submatrix from $x$ to $x\bigtriangledown v$, where $v$ is a given constant. A \textit{query} returns the $\bigtriangleup$ of all elements in a given submatrix. We study the cases where $\bigtriangledown$ and $\bigtriangleup$ are both commutative and associative binary operators. When $d = 1$, updates and queries can be performed in $O(\log N)$ worst-case time for many $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)$ by using a segment tree with lazy propagation. However, when $d\ge 2$, similar techniques usually cannot be generalized. We show that if min-plus matrix multiplication cannot be computed in $O(N^{3-\varepsilon})$ time for any $\varepsilon>0$ (which is widely believed to be the case), then for $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)=(+,\min)$, either updates or queries cannot both run in $O(N^{1-\varepsilon})$ time for any constant $\varepsilon>0$, or preprocessing cannot run in polynomial time. Finally, we show a special case where lazy propagation can be generalized for $d\ge 2$ and where updates and queries can run in $O(\log^d N)$ worst-case time. We present an algorithm that meets this running time and is simpler than similar algorithms of previous works.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究$d$维更新查询问题。我们提供更新和查询运行时间的下限，假设对最小加矩阵乘法的长期猜想，以及接近下限的算法。给定 $d$ 维矩阵， \textit{update} 将给定子矩阵中的每个元素从 $x$ 更改为 $x\bigtriangledown v$，其中 $v$ 是给定常量。 \textit{query} 返回给定子矩阵中所有元素的 $\bigtriangleup$。我们研究 $\bigtriangledown$ 和 $\bigtriangleup$ 都是交换和结合二元运算符的情况。当 $d = 1$ 时，通过使用具有惰性传播的线段树，对于许多 $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)$ 来说，可以在 $O(\log N)$ 最坏情况下执行更新和查询。然而，当$d\ge 2$时，类似的技术通常不能推广。我们证明，如果对于任何 $\varepsilon>0$ 都无法在 $O(N^{3-\varepsilon})$ 时间内计算最小加矩阵乘法（人们普遍认为是这种情况），那么对于 $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)=(+,\min)$，对于任何常量 $\varepsilon>0$，更新或查询都不能在 $O(N^{1-\varepsilon})$ 时间内运行，或者预处理无法在多项式时间内运行。最后，我们展示了一种特殊情况，其中延迟传播可以推广到 $d\ge 2$，并且更新和查询可以在 $O(\log^d N)$ 最坏情况下运行。我们提出了一种满足该运行时间的算法，并且比以前的类似算法更简单。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了d维矩阵的更新与查询问题，探讨了在特定运算符下的时间复杂度下界及高效算法。
AI.motivation: 对于一维情况，使用线段树等数据结构可高效处理更新与查询，但高维情况缺乏有效方法，需探索理论下界与适用算法。
AI.method: 基于min-plus矩阵乘法的猜想，通过建立时间复杂度下界，并设计适用于高维的延迟传播算法。
AI.result: 证明当d≥2时，若min-plus矩阵乘法无法在O(N^{3−ε})时间内完成，则更新或查询无法同时达到O(N^{1−ε})时间；提出一种特殊情况下O(log^d N)时间的算法。
AI.conclusion: 高维子矩阵更新与查询存在理论限制，但特定场景下可推广延迟传播技术实现高效处理。

We show that if min-plus matrix multiplication cannot be computed in $O(N^{3-\varepsilon})$ time for any $\varepsilon>0$ (which is widely believed to be the case), then for $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)=(+,\min)$, either updates or queries cannot both run in $O(N^{1-\varepsilon})$ time for any constant $\varepsilon>0$, or preprocessing cannot run in polynomial time. Finally, we show a special case where lazy propagation can be generalized for $d\ge 2$ and where updates and queries can run in $O(\log^d N)$ worst-case time. We present an algorithm that meets this running time and is simpler than similar algorithms of previous works. 在本文中，我们研究$d$维更新查询问题。我们提供更新和查询运行时间的下限，假设对最小加矩阵乘法的长期猜想，以及接近下限的算法。给定 $d$ 维矩阵， \textit{update} 将给定子矩阵中的每个元素从 $x$ 更改为 $x\bigtriangledown v$，其中 $v$ 是给定常量。 \textit{query} 返回给定子矩阵中所有元素的 $\bigtriangleup$。我们研究 $\bigtriangledown$ 和 $\bigtriangleup$ 都是交换和结合二元运算符的情况。当 $d = 1$ 时，通过使用具有惰性传播的线段树，对于许多 $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)$ 来说，可以在 $O(\log N)$ 最坏情况下执行更新和查询。然而，当$d\ge 2$时，类似的技术通常不能推广。我们证明，如果对于任何 $\varepsilon>0$ 都无法在 $O(N^{3-\varepsilon})$ 时间内计算最小加矩阵乘法（人们普遍认为是这种情况），那么对于 $(\bigtriangledown,\bigtriangleup)=(+,\min)$，对于任何常量 $\varepsilon>0$，更新或查询都不能在 $O(N^{1-\varepsilon})$ 时间内运行，或者预处理无法在多项式时间内运行。最后，我们展示了一种特殊情况，其中延迟传播可以推广到 $d\ge 2$，并且更新和查询可以在 $O(\log^d N)$ 最坏情况下运行。我们提出了一种满足该运行时间的算法，并且比以前的类似算法更简单。 本文研究了d维矩阵的更新与查询问题，探讨了在特定运算符下的时间复杂度下界及高效算法。 Jason Yang,Jun Wan cs.DS,cs.CC

title: Amodal Segmentation through Out-of-Task and Out-of-Distribution Generalization with a Bayesian Model
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯模型通过任务外和分布外泛化进行非模态分割
abstract: Amodal completion is a visual task that humans perform easily but which is difficult for computer vision algorithms. The aim is to segment those object boundaries which are occluded and hence invisible. This task is particularly challenging for deep neural networks because data is difficult to obtain and annotate. Therefore, we formulate amodal segmentation as an out-of-task and out-of-distribution generalization problem. Specifically, we replace the fully connected classifier in neural networks with a Bayesian generative model of the neural network features. The model is trained from non-occluded images using bounding box annotations and class labels only, but is applied to generalize out-of-task to object segmentation and to generalize out-of-distribution to segment occluded objects. We demonstrate how such Bayesian models can naturally generalize beyond the training task labels when they learn a prior that models the object's background context and shape. Moreover, by leveraging an outlier process, Bayesian models can further generalize out-of-distribution to segment partially occluded objects and to predict their amodal object boundaries. Our algorithm outperforms alternative methods that use the same supervision by a large margin, and even outperforms methods where annotated amodal segmentations are used during training, when the amount of occlusion is large. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/YihongSun/Bayesian-Amodal.
summary: Amodal completion is a visual task that humans perform easily but which is difficult for computer vision algorithms. The aim is to segment those object boundaries which are occluded and hence invisible. This task is particularly challenging for deep neural networks because data is difficult to obtain and annotate. Therefore, we formulate amodal segmentation as an out-of-task and out-of-distribution generalization problem. Specifically, we replace the fully connected classifier in neural networks with a Bayesian generative model of the neural network features. The model is trained from non-occluded images using bounding box annotations and class labels only, but is applied to generalize out-of-task to object segmentation and to generalize out-of-distribution to segment occluded objects. We demonstrate how such Bayesian models can naturally generalize beyond the training task labels when they learn a prior that models the object's background context and shape. Moreover, by leveraging an outlier process, Bayesian models can further generalize out-of-distribution to segment partially occluded objects and to predict their amodal object boundaries. Our algorithm outperforms alternative methods that use the same supervision by a large margin, and even outperforms methods where annotated amodal segmentations are used during training, when the amount of occlusion is large. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/YihongSun/Bayesian-Amodal.
abstract_zh: 非模态补全是人类很容易完成的视觉任务，但对于计算机视觉算法来说却很困难。目的是分割那些被遮挡因而不可见的对象边界。这项任务对于深度神经网络来说尤其具有挑战性，因为数据很难获取和注释。因此，我们将非模态分割表述为任务外和分布外的泛化问题。具体来说，我们用神经网络特征的贝叶斯生成模型替换神经网络中的全连接分类器。该模型仅使用边界框注释和类标签从非遮挡图像进行训练，但应用于将任务外泛化为对象分割，并将分布外泛化为分割遮挡对象。我们演示了当这些贝叶斯模型学习对对象的背景上下文和形状进行建模的先验知识时，它们如何能够自然地推广到训练任务标签之外。此外，通过利用异常值过程，贝叶斯模型可以进一步概括分布外以分割部分遮挡的对象并预测其非模态对象边界。我们的算法在很大程度上优于使用相同监督的替代方法，甚至在遮挡量较大时优于在训练期间使用带注释的非模态分割的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/YihongSun/Bayesian-Amodal 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯模型的跨任务与跨分布泛化方法，用于解决遮挡物体的模态分割问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模态分割方法依赖大量标注数据且难以处理遮挡，而本文通过跨任务和跨分布泛化，利用非遮挡图像的标注实现对遮挡物体的分割。
AI.method: 用贝叶斯生成模型替代神经网络的全连接分类器，仅使用非遮挡图像的边界框和类别标签进行训练，并通过先验学习和异常值过程实现跨任务与跨分布泛化。
AI.result: 算法在相同监督条件下显著优于现有方法，且在遮挡比例较高时超越使用标注模态分割训练的方法。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯模型能有效实现跨任务与跨分布泛化，为模态分割提供无需大量标注的新思路。

authors_text: Jörg Sander,Bob D. de Vos,Ivana Išgum
title: Unsupervised Super-Resolution: Creating High-Resolution Medical Images from Low-Resolution Anisotropic Examples
title_zh: 无监督超分辨率：从低分辨率各向异性示例创建高分辨率医学图像
comment: accepted at the SPIE Medical Imaging 2021 conference
comments: accepted at the SPIE Medical Imaging 2021 conference
abstract: Although high resolution isotropic 3D medical images are desired in clinical practice, their acquisition is not always feasible. Instead, lower resolution images are upsampled to higher resolution using conventional interpolation methods. Sophisticated learning-based super-resolution approaches are frequently unavailable in clinical setting, because such methods require training with high-resolution isotropic examples. To address this issue, we propose a learning-based super-resolution approach that can be trained using solely anisotropic images, i.e. without high-resolution ground truth data. The method exploits the latent space, generated by autoencoders trained on anisotropic images, to increase spatial resolution in low-resolution images. The method was trained and evaluated using 100 publicly available cardiac cine MR scans from the Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challenge (ACDC). The quantitative results show that the proposed method performs better than conventional interpolation methods. Furthermore, the qualitative results indicate that especially finer cardiac structures are synthesized with high quality. The method has the potential to be applied to other anatomies and modalities and can be easily applied to any 3D anisotropic medical image dataset.
summary: Although high resolution isotropic 3D medical images are desired in clinical practice, their acquisition is not always feasible. Instead, lower resolution images are upsampled to higher resolution using conventional interpolation methods. Sophisticated learning-based super-resolution approaches are frequently unavailable in clinical setting, because such methods require training with high-resolution isotropic examples. To address this issue, we propose a learning-based super-resolution approach that can be trained using solely anisotropic images, i.e. without high-resolution ground truth data. The method exploits the latent space, generated by autoencoders trained on anisotropic images, to increase spatial resolution in low-resolution images. The method was trained and evaluated using 100 publicly available cardiac cine MR scans from the Automated Cardiac Diagnosis Challenge (ACDC). The quantitative results show that the proposed method performs better than conventional interpolation methods. Furthermore, the qualitative results indicate that especially finer cardiac structures are synthesized with high quality. The method has the potential to be applied to other anatomies and modalities and can be easily applied to any 3D anisotropic medical image dataset.
abstract_zh: 尽管临床实践中需要高分辨率各向同性 3D 医学图像，但其获取并不总是可行。相反，使用传统的插值方法将较低分辨率的图像上采样到更高分辨率。复杂的基于学习的超分辨率方法在临床环境中经常无法使用，因为此类方法需要使用高分辨率各向同性示例进行训练。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于学习的超分辨率方法，可以仅使用各向异性图像进行训练，即无需高分辨率地面实况数据。该方法利用在各向异性图像上训练的自动编码器生成的潜在空间来提高低分辨率图像的空间分辨率。该方法使用来自自动心脏诊断挑战赛 (ACDC) 的 100 个公开的心脏电影 MR 扫描进行训练和评估。定量结果表明，该方法比传统插值方法表现更好。此外，定性结果表明特别精细的心脏结构是高质量合成的。该方法有可能应用于其他解剖学和模式，并且可以轻松应用于任何 3D 各向异性医学图像数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需高分辨率同向性医学图像即可训练的无监督超分辨率方法，用于从低分辨率各向异性医学图像生成高分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 临床需要高分辨率各向同性3D医学图像，但其获取成本高且不可行。传统插值方法效果有限，而基于学习的超分辨率方法通常需要高分辨率数据进行训练，这在实际场景中难以满足。
AI.method: 利用自编码器在各向异性图像上生成的潜在空间，通过学习低分辨率图像到高分辨率图像的映射关系，实现超分辨率重建，无需依赖高分辨率真实数据。
AI.result: 在100个心脏 cine MR数据集上的定量和定性实验表明，该方法优于传统插值方法，尤其在心脏细小结构的重建质量上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需高分辨率数据即可实现医学图像超分辨率，具有推广至其他解剖结构和模态的潜力，适用于任意3D各向异性医学图像数据集。

title: An Improved Sketching Algorithm for Edit Distance
title_zh: 一种改进的编辑距离草图算法

abstract: We provide improved upper bounds for the simultaneous sketching complexity of edit distance. Consider two parties, Alice with input $x\inΣ^n$ and Bob with input $y\inΣ^n$, that share public randomness and are given a promise that the edit distance $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ between their two strings is at most some given value $k$. Alice must send a message $sx$ and Bob must send $sy$ to a third party Charlie, who does not know the inputs but shares the same public randomness and also knows $k$. Charlie must output $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ precisely as well as a sequence of $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ edits required to transform $x$ into $y$. The goal is to minimize the lengths $|sx|, |sy|$ of the messages sent. The protocol of Belazzougui and Zhang (FOCS 2016), building upon the random walk method of Chakraborty, Goldenberg, and Koucký (STOC 2016), achieves a maximum message length of $\tilde O(k^8)$ bits, where $\tilde O(\cdot)$ hides $\mathrm{poly}(\log n)$ factors. In this work we build upon Belazzougui and Zhang's protocol and provide an improved analysis demonstrating that a slight modification of their construction achieves a bound of $\tilde O(k^3)$.

Alice must send a message $sx$ and Bob must send $sy$ to a third party Charlie, who does not know the inputs but shares the same public randomness and also knows $k$. Charlie must output $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ precisely as well as a sequence of $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ edits required to transform $x$ into $y$. The goal is to minimize the lengths $|sx|, |sy|$ of the messages sent. The protocol of Belazzougui and Zhang (FOCS 2016), building upon the random walk method of Chakraborty, Goldenberg, and Koucký (STOC 2016), achieves a maximum message length of $\tilde O(k^8)$ bits, where $\tilde O(\cdot)$ hides $\mathrm{poly}(\log n)$ factors. In this work we build upon Belazzougui and Zhang's protocol and provide an improved analysis demonstrating that a slight modification of their construction achieves a bound of $\tilde O(k^3)$.
abstract_zh: 我们为编辑距离的同步草图复杂性提供了改进的上限。考虑两方，Alice 的输入为 $x\inΣ^n$ 和 Bob 的输入为 $y\inΣ^n$，它们共享公共随机性，并被承诺两个字符串之间的编辑距离 $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ 至多为某个给定值 $k$。 Alice 必须发送消息 $sx$，Bob 必须发送 $sy$ 给第三方 Charlie，后者不知道输入，但共享相同的公共随机性并且也知道 $k$。 Charlie 必须精确地输出 $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ 以及将 $x$ 转换为 $y$ 所需的一系列 $\mathsf{ed}(x,y)$ 编辑。目标是最小化发送消息的长度 $|sx|, |sy|$。 Belazzougui和Zhang的协议（FOCS 2016）建立在Chakraborty、Goldenberg和Koucký（STOC 2016）的随机游走方法的基础上，实现了$\tilde O(k^8)$位的最大消息长度，其中$\tilde O(\cdot)$隐藏了$\mathrm{poly}(\log n)$因子。在这项工作中，我们以 Belazzougui 和Zhang 的协议为基础，并提供了改进的分析，证明对其构造的轻微修改可实现 $\tilde O(k^3)$ 的界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的编辑距离同时草图算法，将消息长度上限从~O(k^8)降低至~O(k^3)。
AI.motivation: 编辑距离的通信复杂度研究对分布式计算和数据压缩具有重要意义，现有算法的消息长度上限较高，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 基于Belazzougui和Zhang的协议，通过改进其构造并优化分析方法，结合随机游走技术实现更高效的消息编码。
AI.result: 在相同公共随机性前提下，将消息长度上限从~O(k^8)改进为~O(k^3)，且能精确输出编辑序列。
AI.conclusion: 该改进为编辑距离的通信复杂度研究提供了更优的理论界，推动了相关算法的实际应用潜力。

title: A Survey on Curriculum Learning
title_zh: 课程学习调查
comment: 20 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2021 (TPAMI)
comments: 20 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence 2021 (TPAMI)
abstract: Curriculum learning (CL) is a training strategy that trains a machine learning model from easier data to harder data, which imitates the meaningful learning order in human curricula. As an easy-to-use plug-in, the CL strategy has demonstrated its power in improving the generalization capacity and convergence rate of various models in a wide range of scenarios such as computer vision and natural language processing etc. In this survey article, we comprehensively review CL from various aspects including motivations, definitions, theories, and applications. We discuss works on curriculum learning within a general CL framework, elaborating on how to design a manually predefined curriculum or an automatic curriculum. In particular, we summarize existing CL designs based on the general framework of Difficulty Measurer+Training Scheduler and further categorize the methodologies for automatic CL into four groups, i.e., Self-paced Learning, Transfer Teacher, RL Teacher, and Other Automatic CL. We also analyze principles to select different CL designs that may benefit practical applications. Finally, we present our insights on the relationships connecting CL and other machine learning concepts including transfer learning, meta-learning, continual learning and active learning, etc., then point out challenges in CL as well as potential future research directions deserving further investigations.
summary: Curriculum learning (CL) is a training strategy that trains a machine learning model from easier data to harder data, which imitates the meaningful learning order in human curricula. As an easy-to-use plug-in, the CL strategy has demonstrated its power in improving the generalization capacity and convergence rate of various models in a wide range of scenarios such as computer vision and natural language processing etc. In this survey article, we comprehensively review CL from various aspects including motivations, definitions, theories, and applications. We discuss works on curriculum learning within a general CL framework, elaborating on how to design a manually predefined curriculum or an automatic curriculum. In particular, we summarize existing CL designs based on the general framework of Difficulty Measurer+Training Scheduler and further categorize the methodologies for automatic CL into four groups, i.e., Self-paced Learning, Transfer Teacher, RL Teacher, and Other Automatic CL. We also analyze principles to select different CL designs that may benefit practical applications. Finally, we present our insights on the relationships connecting CL and other machine learning concepts including transfer learning, meta-learning, continual learning and active learning, etc., then point out challenges in CL as well as potential future research directions deserving further investigations.
abstract_zh: 课程学习（CL）是一种训练策略，它模仿人类课程中有意义的学习顺序，从较容易的数据到较难的数据来训练机器学习模型。作为一个易于使用的插件，CL策略在计算机视觉、自然语言处理等广泛场景中展示了其在提高各种模型的泛化能力和收敛速度方面的强大功能。在这篇综述文章中，我们从动机、定义、理论和应用等各个方面全面回顾了CL。我们讨论通用 CL 框架内的课程学习工作，详细说明如何设计手动预定义课程或自动课程。特别是，我们基于难度测量器+训练调度器的总体框架总结了现有的 CL 设计，并将自动 CL 的方法进一步分类为四组，即自定进度学习、转移教师、RL 教师和其他自动 CL。我们还分析了选择可能有利于实际应用的不同 CL 设计的原则。最后，我们提出了对 CL 与其他机器学习概念（包括迁移学习、元学习、持续学习和主动学习等）之间关系的见解，然后指出 CL 的挑战以及值得进一步研究的潜在未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 综述课程学习策略，分析其框架、方法及应用，并探讨其与其他机器学习概念的关系及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 课程学习能提升模型泛化能力与收敛速度，但缺乏系统性总结，需梳理框架、方法及应用以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 通过综合回顾课程学习的动机、定义、理论和应用，提出通用框架（难度测量器+训练调度器），分类自动课程学习方法，并分析不同设计的适用性。
AI.result: 系统梳理课程学习框架和方法，分类自动课程学习为四类，分析选择原则，并指出其与迁移学习等的关系及当前挑战。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习有效提升模型性能，但存在设计复杂性和泛化问题，未来需结合其他学习方法，探索自动化的改进方向。

title: Neuron Merging: Compensating for Pruned Neurons
title_zh: 神经元合并：补偿修剪的神经元
abstract: Network pruning is widely used to lighten and accelerate neural network models. Structured network pruning discards the whole neuron or filter, leading to accuracy loss. In this work, we propose a novel concept of neuron merging applicable to both fully connected layers and convolution layers, which compensates for the information loss due to the pruned neurons/filters. Neuron merging starts with decomposing the original weights into two matrices/tensors. One of them becomes the new weights for the current layer, and the other is what we name a scaling matrix, guiding the combination of neurons. If the activation function is ReLU, the scaling matrix can be absorbed into the next layer under certain conditions, compensating for the removed neurons. We also propose a data-free and inexpensive method to decompose the weights by utilizing the cosine similarity between neurons. Compared to the pruned model with the same topology, our merged model better preserves the output feature map of the original model; thus, it maintains the accuracy after pruning without fine-tuning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over network pruning for various model architectures and datasets. As an example, for VGG-16 on CIFAR-10, we achieve an accuracy of 93.16% while reducing 64% of total parameters, without any fine-tuning. The code can be found here: https://github.com/friendshipkim/neuron-merging
summary: Network pruning is widely used to lighten and accelerate neural network models. Structured network pruning discards the whole neuron or filter, leading to accuracy loss. In this work, we propose a novel concept of neuron merging applicable to both fully connected layers and convolution layers, which compensates for the information loss due to the pruned neurons/filters. Neuron merging starts with decomposing the original weights into two matrices/tensors. One of them becomes the new weights for the current layer, and the other is what we name a scaling matrix, guiding the combination of neurons. If the activation function is ReLU, the scaling matrix can be absorbed into the next layer under certain conditions, compensating for the removed neurons. We also propose a data-free and inexpensive method to decompose the weights by utilizing the cosine similarity between neurons. Compared to the pruned model with the same topology, our merged model better preserves the output feature map of the original model; thus, it maintains the accuracy after pruning without fine-tuning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over network pruning for various model architectures and datasets. As an example, for VGG-16 on CIFAR-10, we achieve an accuracy of 93.16% while reducing 64% of total parameters, without any fine-tuning. The code can be found here: https://github.com/friendshipkim/neuron-merging
abstract_zh: 网络剪枝广泛用于减轻和加速神经网络模型。结构化网络修剪会丢弃整个神经元或过滤器，导致准确性损失。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种适用于全连接层和卷积层的神经元合并的新概念，它补偿了由于修剪神经元/过滤器而导致的信息损失。神经元合并首先将原始权重分解为两个矩阵/张量。其中一个成为当前层的新权重，另一个就是我们所说的缩放矩阵，指导神经元的组合。如果激活函数是ReLU，则在一定条件下，缩放矩阵可以被吸收到下一层，补偿被移除的神经元。我们还提出了一种无数据且廉价的方法，通过利用神经元之间的余弦相似性来分解权重。与具有相同拓扑的剪枝模型相比，我们的合并模型更好地保留了原始模型的输出特征图；因此，它保持剪枝后的精度，无需微调。我们展示了我们的方法对各种模型架构和数据集的网络修剪的有效性。例如，对于 CIFAR-10 上的 VGG-16，我们在没有任何微调的情况下实现了 93.16% 的准确率，同时减少了 64% 的总参数。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/friendshipkim/neuron-merging

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为神经元合并的新方法，用于补偿网络剪枝后因移除神经元或滤波器导致的信息损失，从而在不进行微调的情况下保持模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 结构化网络剪枝通过移除整个神经元或滤波器来压缩模型，但会导致准确性下降。现有方法难以有效补偿剪枝带来的信息损失，因此需要一种无需微调即可保持模型性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 将原始权重分解为两个矩阵/张量，其中一个作为当前层的新权重，另一个作为缩放矩阵以指导神经元组合。利用神经元间的余弦相似性进行数据无关的权重分解，并在ReLU激活函数下将缩放矩阵吸收至下一层以补偿移除的神经元。
AI.result: 在VGG-16模型上，于CIFAR-10数据集上实现93.16%的准确率，减少64%参数量且无需微调；方法在多种模型架构和数据集上均有效。
AI.conclusion: 神经元合并方法能有效补偿剪枝后信息损失，无需微调即可维持模型准确性，为网络压缩提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

search_text: Neuron Merging: Compensating for Pruned Neurons 神经元合并：补偿修剪的神经元 Network pruning is widely used to lighten and accelerate neural network models. Structured network pruning discards the whole neuron or filter, leading to accuracy loss. In this work, we propose a novel concept of neuron merging applicable to both fully connected layers and convolution layers, which compensates for the information loss due to the pruned neurons/filters. Neuron merging starts with decomposing the original weights into two matrices/tensors. One of them becomes the new weights for the current layer, and the other is what we name a scaling matrix, guiding the combination of neurons. If the activation function is ReLU, the scaling matrix can be absorbed into the next layer under certain conditions, compensating for the removed neurons. We also propose a data-free and inexpensive method to decompose the weights by utilizing the cosine similarity between neurons. Compared to the pruned model with the same topology, our merged model better preserves the output feature map of the original model; thus, it maintains the accuracy after pruning without fine-tuning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over network pruning for various model architectures and datasets. As an example, for VGG-16 on CIFAR-10, we achieve an accuracy of 93.16% while reducing 64% of total parameters, without any fine-tuning. The code can be found here: https://github.com/friendshipkim/neuron-merging 网络剪枝广泛用于减轻和加速神经网络模型。结构化网络修剪会丢弃整个神经元或过滤器，导致准确性损失。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种适用于全连接层和卷积层的神经元合并的新概念，它补偿了由于修剪神经元/过滤器而导致的信息损失。神经元合并首先将原始权重分解为两个矩阵/张量。其中一个成为当前层的新权重，另一个就是我们所说的缩放矩阵，指导神经元的组合。如果激活函数是ReLU，则在一定条件下，缩放矩阵可以被吸收到下一层，补偿被移除的神经元。我们还提出了一种无数据且廉价的方法，通过利用神经元之间的余弦相似性来分解权重。与具有相同拓扑的剪枝模型相比，我们的合并模型更好地保留了原始模型的输出特征图；因此，它保持剪枝后的精度，无需微调。我们展示了我们的方法对各种模型架构和数据集的网络修剪的有效性。例如，对于 CIFAR-10 上的 VGG-16，我们在没有任何微调的情况下实现了 93.16% 的准确率，同时减少了 64% 的总参数。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/friendshipkim/neuron-merging 本文提出了一种名为神经元合并的新方法，用于补偿网络剪枝后因移除神经元或滤波器导致的信息损失，从而在不进行微调的情况下保持模型准确性。 Woojeong Kim,Suhyun Kim,Mincheol Park,Geonseok Jeon cs.CV,cs.AI

title: A "DIY" data acquisition system for acoustic field measurements under harsh conditions
title_zh: 用于恶劣条件下声场测量的“DIY”数据采集系统
abstract: Monitoring active volcanos is an ongoing and important task helping to understand and predict volcanic eruptions. In recent years, analysing the acoustic properties of eruptions became more relevant. We present an inexpensive, lightweight, portable, easy to use and modular acoustic data acquisition system for field measurements that can record data with up to 100~kHz. The system is based on a Raspberry Pi 3 B running a custom build bare metal operating system. It connects to an external analog - digital converter with the microphone sensor. A GPS receiver allows the logging of the position and in addition the recording of a very accurate time signal synchronously to the acoustic data. With that, it is possible for multiple modules to effectively work as a single microphone array. The whole system can be build with low cost and demands only minimal technical infrastructure. We demonstrate a possible use of such a microphone array by deploying 20 modules on the active volcano \textit{Stromboli} in the Aeolian Islands by Sicily, Italy. We use the collected acoustic data to indentify the sound source position for all recorded eruptions.
summary: Monitoring active volcanos is an ongoing and important task helping to understand and predict volcanic eruptions. In recent years, analysing the acoustic properties of eruptions became more relevant. We present an inexpensive, lightweight, portable, easy to use and modular acoustic data acquisition system for field measurements that can record data with up to 100~kHz. The system is based on a Raspberry Pi 3 B running a custom build bare metal operating system. It connects to an external analog - digital converter with the microphone sensor. A GPS receiver allows the logging of the position and in addition the recording of a very accurate time signal synchronously to the acoustic data. With that, it is possible for multiple modules to effectively work as a single microphone array. The whole system can be build with low cost and demands only minimal technical infrastructure. We demonstrate a possible use of such a microphone array by deploying 20 modules on the active volcano \textit{Stromboli} in the Aeolian Islands by Sicily, Italy. We use the collected acoustic data to indentify the sound source position for all recorded eruptions.
abstract_zh: 监测活火山是一项持续且重要的任务，有助于了解和预测火山喷发。近年来，分析火山喷发的声学特性变得更加重要。我们推出了一种廉价、轻便、便携、易于使用的模块化声学数据采集系统，用于现场测量，可以记录高达 100kHz 的数据。该系统基于运行定制裸机操作系统的 Raspberry Pi 3 B。它通过麦克风传感器连接到外部模拟-数字转换器。 GPS 接收器可以记录位置，此外还可以与声学数据同步记录非常准确的时间信号。这样，多个模块就可以有效地作为单个麦克风阵列工作。整个系统可以低成本构建，并且只需要最少的技术基础设施。我们通过在意大利西西里岛伊奥利亚群岛的活火山 \textit{Stromboli} 上部署 20 个模块来演示这种麦克风阵列的可能用途。我们使用收集到的声学数据来识别所有记录的火山喷发的声源位置。

AI.tldr: 开发一种低成本、便携且模块化的声学数据采集系统，用于恶劣环境下的火山喷发声场监测。
AI.motivation: 传统火山监测设备成本高且不适用于复杂地形，需开发经济、轻便且能精准记录声学数据的系统以提升喷发预测能力。
AI.method: 基于树莓派3B定制裸金属系统，连接ADC和麦克风传感器，通过GPS实现时空同步，多模块组成立体声阵列。
AI.result: 在斯特龙博利火山部署20个模块，成功采集喷发声学数据并定位声源位置。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了低成本设备在恶劣环境中的可行性，为火山监测提供了新型数据采集方案。

authors_text: Cem Subakan,Mirco Ravanelli,Samuele Cornell,Mirko Bronzi,Jianyuan Zhong
title: Attention is All You Need in Speech Separation
title_zh: 在言语分离中你所需要的就是注意力
abstract: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) have long been the dominant architecture in sequence-to-sequence learning. RNNs, however, are inherently sequential models that do not allow parallelization of their computations. Transformers are emerging as a natural alternative to standard RNNs, replacing recurrent computations with a multi-head attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose the SepFormer, a novel RNN-free Transformer-based neural network for speech separation. The SepFormer learns short and long-term dependencies with a multi-scale approach that employs transformers. The proposed model achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the standard WSJ0-2/3mix datasets. It reaches an SI-SNRi of 22.3 dB on WSJ0-2mix and an SI-SNRi of 19.5 dB on WSJ0-3mix. The SepFormer inherits the parallelization advantages of Transformers and achieves a competitive performance even when downsampling the encoded representation by a factor of 8. It is thus significantly faster and it is less memory-demanding than the latest speech separation systems with comparable performance.
summary: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) have long been the dominant architecture in sequence-to-sequence learning. RNNs, however, are inherently sequential models that do not allow parallelization of their computations. Transformers are emerging as a natural alternative to standard RNNs, replacing recurrent computations with a multi-head attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose the SepFormer, a novel RNN-free Transformer-based neural network for speech separation. The SepFormer learns short and long-term dependencies with a multi-scale approach that employs transformers. The proposed model achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the standard WSJ0-2/3mix datasets. It reaches an SI-SNRi of 22.3 dB on WSJ0-2mix and an SI-SNRi of 19.5 dB on WSJ0-3mix. The SepFormer inherits the parallelization advantages of Transformers and achieves a competitive performance even when downsampling the encoded representation by a factor of 8. It is thus significantly faster and it is less memory-demanding than the latest speech separation systems with comparable performance.
abstract_zh: 循环神经网络（RNN）长期以来一直是序列到序列学习的主导架构。然而，RNN 本质上是顺序模型，不允许并行计算。 Transformer 正在成为标准 RNN 的自然替代品，用多头注意力机制取代循环计算。在本文中，我们提出了 SepFormer，一种新颖的基于 RNN-free Transformer 的神经网络，用于语音分离。 SepFormer 通过使用变压器的多尺度方法来学习短期和长期依赖性。所提出的模型在标准 WSJ0-2/3mix 数据集上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能。它在 WSJ0-2mix 上达到 22.3 dB 的 SI-SNRi，在 WSJ0-3mix 上达到 19.5 dB 的 SI-SNRi。 SepFormer 继承了 Transformer 的并行化优势，即使将编码表示下采样 8 倍，也能实现具有竞争力的性能。因此，与性能相当的最新语音分离系统相比，它的速度明显更快，并且对内存的需求更少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的新型语音分离模型SepFormer，无需RNN即可实现高性能语音分离。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN模型存在计算无法并行化的缺陷，而Transformer的多头注意力机制能有效捕捉依赖关系，因此需要探索更高效的语音分离方案。
AI.method: 设计SepFormer模型，采用多尺度Transformer结构学习短期和长期依赖，通过下采样编码表示提升计算效率。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-2mix数据集上达到22.3dB SI-SNRi，在WSJ0-3mix上达到19.5dB SI-SNRi，且计算速度更快、内存占用更少。
AI.conclusion: SepFormer在保持高性能的同时显著提升了计算效率，为语音分离任务提供了更优的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的新型语音分离模型SepFormer，无需RNN即可实现高性能语音分离。
ai_content.motivation: 传统RNN模型存在计算无法并行化的缺陷，而Transformer的多头注意力机制能有效捕捉依赖关系，因此需要探索更高效的语音分离方案。
ai_content.method: 设计SepFormer模型，采用多尺度Transformer结构学习短期和长期依赖，通过下采样编码表示提升计算效率。
ai_content.result: 在WSJ0-2mix数据集上达到22.3dB SI-SNRi，在WSJ0-3mix上达到19.5dB SI-SNRi，且计算速度更快、内存占用更少。
ai_content.conclusion: SepFormer在保持高性能的同时显著提升了计算效率，为语音分离任务提供了更优的解决方案。

search_text: Attention is All You Need in Speech Separation 在言语分离中你所需要的就是注意力 Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) have long been the dominant architecture in sequence-to-sequence learning. RNNs, however, are inherently sequential models that do not allow parallelization of their computations. Transformers are emerging as a natural alternative to standard RNNs, replacing recurrent computations with a multi-head attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose the SepFormer, a novel RNN-free Transformer-based neural network for speech separation. The SepFormer learns short and long-term dependencies with a multi-scale approach that employs transformers. The proposed model achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on the standard WSJ0-2/3mix datasets. It reaches an SI-SNRi of 22.3 dB on WSJ0-2mix and an SI-SNRi of 19.5 dB on WSJ0-3mix. The SepFormer inherits the parallelization advantages of Transformers and achieves a competitive performance even when downsampling the encoded representation by a factor of 8. It is thus significantly faster and it is less memory-demanding than the latest speech separation systems with comparable performance. 循环神经网络（RNN）长期以来一直是序列到序列学习的主导架构。然而，RNN 本质上是顺序模型，不允许并行计算。 Transformer 正在成为标准 RNN 的自然替代品，用多头注意力机制取代循环计算。在本文中，我们提出了 SepFormer，一种新颖的基于 RNN-free Transformer 的神经网络，用于语音分离。 SepFormer 通过使用变压器的多尺度方法来学习短期和长期依赖性。所提出的模型在标准 WSJ0-2/3mix 数据集上实现了最先进的 (SOTA) 性能。它在 WSJ0-2mix 上达到 22.3 dB 的 SI-SNRi，在 WSJ0-3mix 上达到 19.5 dB 的 SI-SNRi。 SepFormer 继承了 Transformer 的并行化优势，即使将编码表示下采样 8 倍，也能实现具有竞争力的性能。因此，与性能相当的最新语音分离系统相比，它的速度明显更快，并且对内存的需求更少。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的新型语音分离模型SepFormer，无需RNN即可实现高性能语音分离。 Cem Subakan,Mirco Ravanelli,Samuele Cornell,Mirko Bronzi,Jianyuan Zhong eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.SP

title: Towards High-Performance Solid-State-LiDAR-Inertial Odometry and Mapping
title_zh: 迈向高性能固态激光雷达惯性里程计和测绘
abstract: We present a novel tightly-coupled LiDAR-inertial odometry and mapping scheme for both solid-state and mechanical LiDARs. As frontend, a feature-based lightweight LiDAR odometry provides fast motion estimates for adaptive keyframe selection. As backend, a hierarchical keyframe-based sliding window optimization is performed through marginalization for directly fusing IMU and LiDAR measurements. For the Livox Horizon, a newly released solid-state LiDAR, a novel feature extraction method is proposed to handle its irregular scan pattern during preprocessing. LiLi-OM (Livox LiDAR-inertial odometry and mapping) is real-time capable and achieves superior accuracy over state-of-the-art systems for both LiDAR types on public data sets of mechanical LiDARs and in experiments using the Livox Horizon. Source code and recorded experimental data sets are available at https://github.com/KIT-ISAS/lili-om.
summary: We present a novel tightly-coupled LiDAR-inertial odometry and mapping scheme for both solid-state and mechanical LiDARs. As frontend, a feature-based lightweight LiDAR odometry provides fast motion estimates for adaptive keyframe selection. As backend, a hierarchical keyframe-based sliding window optimization is performed through marginalization for directly fusing IMU and LiDAR measurements. For the Livox Horizon, a newly released solid-state LiDAR, a novel feature extraction method is proposed to handle its irregular scan pattern during preprocessing. LiLi-OM (Livox LiDAR-inertial odometry and mapping) is real-time capable and achieves superior accuracy over state-of-the-art systems for both LiDAR types on public data sets of mechanical LiDARs and in experiments using the Livox Horizon. Source code and recorded experimental data sets are available at https://github.com/KIT-ISAS/lili-om.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种适用于固态和机械激光雷达的新型紧耦合激光雷达惯性里程计和测绘方案。作为前端，基于特征的轻量级 LiDAR 里程计为自适应关键帧选择提供快速运动估计。作为后端，通过边缘化执行基于分层关键帧的滑动窗口优化，以直接融合 IMU 和 LiDAR 测量。对于新发布的固态激光雷达 Livox Horizo​​n，提出了一种新颖的特征提取方法来处理预处理过程中的不规则扫描模式。 LiLi-OM（Livox LiDAR-惯性里程计和测绘）具有实时能力，并且在机械 LiDAR 公共数据集上以及使用 Livox Horizo​​n 的实验中，两种 LiDAR 类型均实现了优于最先进系统的精度。源代码和记录的实验数据集可在 https://github.com/KIT-ISAS/lili-om 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效融合固态和机械LiDAR与惯性测量单元（IMU）的紧耦合里程计与建图方案。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在处理固态LiDAR不规则扫描模式时精度不足，且难以实现实时高精度的LiDAR-IMU联合优化。
AI.method: 前端采用特征提取的轻量级LiDAR里程计进行快速运动估计，后端通过分层关键帧滑动窗口优化融合IMU与LiDAR数据，并针对固态LiDAR提出新型特征提取方法。
AI.result: LiLi-OM系统在机械LiDAR公开数据集和Livox Horizon实测中均优于现有方法，具备实时性且开源代码与数据集已发布。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了固态LiDAR不规则扫描问题，为两种类型LiDAR提供了高精度实时定位与建图方案。

title: Approximating Aggregated SQL Queries With LSTM Networks
title_zh: 使用 LSTM 网络近似聚合 SQL 查询
abstract: Despite continuous investments in data technologies, the latency of querying data still poses a significant challenge. Modern analytic solutions require near real-time responsiveness both to make them interactive and to support automated processing. Current technologies (Hadoop, Spark, Dataflow) scan the dataset to execute queries. They focus on providing a scalable data storage to maximize task execution speed. We argue that these solutions fail to offer an adequate level of interactivity since they depend on continual access to data. In this paper we present a method for query approximation, also known as approximate query processing (AQP), that reduce the need to scan data during inference (query calculation), thus enabling a rapid query processing tool. We use LSTM network to learn the relationship between queries and their results, and to provide a rapid inference layer for predicting query results. Our method (referred as ``Hunch``) produces a lightweight LSTM network which provides a high query throughput. We evaluated our method using twelve datasets and compared to state-of-the-art AQP engines (VerdictDB, BlinkDB) from query latency, model weight and accuracy perspectives. The results show that our method predicted queries' results with a normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) ranging from approximately 1\% to 4\% which in the majority of our data sets was better then the compared benchmarks. Moreover, our method was able to predict up to 120,000 queries in a second (streamed together), and with a single query latency of no more than 2ms.
summary: Despite continuous investments in data technologies, the latency of querying data still poses a significant challenge. Modern analytic solutions require near real-time responsiveness both to make them interactive and to support automated processing. Current technologies (Hadoop, Spark, Dataflow) scan the dataset to execute queries. They focus on providing a scalable data storage to maximize task execution speed. We argue that these solutions fail to offer an adequate level of interactivity since they depend on continual access to data. In this paper we present a method for query approximation, also known as approximate query processing (AQP), that reduce the need to scan data during inference (query calculation), thus enabling a rapid query processing tool. We use LSTM network to learn the relationship between queries and their results, and to provide a rapid inference layer for predicting query results. Our method (referred as ``Hunch``) produces a lightweight LSTM network which provides a high query throughput. We evaluated our method using twelve datasets and compared to state-of-the-art AQP engines (VerdictDB, BlinkDB) from query latency, model weight and accuracy perspectives. The results show that our method predicted queries' results with a normalized root mean squared error (NRMSE) ranging from approximately 1\% to 4\% which in the majority of our data sets was better then the compared benchmarks. Moreover, our method was able to predict up to 120,000 queries in a second (streamed together), and with a single query latency of no more than 2ms.
abstract_zh: 尽管对数据技术的持续投资，查询数据的延迟仍然构成重大挑战。现代分析解决方案需要近乎实时的响应能力，以使其具有交互性并支持自动化处理。当前技术（Hadoop、Spark、Dataflow）扫描数据集以执行查询。他们专注于提供可扩展的数据存储，以最大限度地提高任务执行速度。我们认为这些解决方案无法提供足够水平的交互性，因为它们依赖于对数据的持续访问。在本文中，我们提出了一种查询近似方法，也称为近似查询处理（AQP），它减少了推理（查询计算）期间扫描数据的需要，从而实现了快速查询处理工具。我们使用 LSTM 网络来学习查询与其结果之间的关系，并为预测查询结果提供快速推理层。我们的方法（称为“Hunch”）生成一个轻量级 LSTM 网络，可提供高查询吞吐量。我们使用 12 个数据集评估了我们的方法，并从查询延迟、模型权重和准确性的角度与最先进的 AQP 引擎（VerdictDB、BlinkDB）进行了比较。结果表明，我们的方法预测查询结果的归一化均方根误差 (NRMSE) 范围约为 1\% 到 4\%，这在我们的大多数数据集中都优于比较基准。此外，我们的方法能够在一秒钟内预测多达 120,000 个查询（一起流式传输），并且单个查询延迟不超过 2 毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM网络的近似查询处理方法Hunch，通过学习查询与结果的关系实现快速查询响应，减少数据扫描需求。
AI.motivation: 传统大数据处理框架（如Hadoop/Spark）依赖全量数据扫描导致查询延迟高，无法满足实时交互需求，亟需更高效的近似查询处理方案。
AI.method: 构建轻量级LSTM网络模型Hunch，通过训练学习查询语句与结果间的映射关系，在推理阶段直接预测查询结果而无需扫描原始数据。
AI.result: 在12个数据集测试中，Hunch的NRMSE误差1-4%优于VerdictDB/BlinkDB等基准，单查询延迟低于2ms，每秒可处理12万条查询流。
AI.conclusion: LSTM驱动的近似查询方法在保持较高精度的同时显著提升查询吞吐量，为实时数据分析提供了可行的替代方案。

Moreover, our method was able to predict up to 120,000 queries in a second (streamed together), and with a single query latency of no more than 2ms. 尽管对数据技术的持续投资，查询数据的延迟仍然构成重大挑战。现代分析解决方案需要近乎实时的响应能力，以使其具有交互性并支持自动化处理。当前技术（Hadoop、Spark、Dataflow）扫描数据集以执行查询。他们专注于提供可扩展的数据存储，以最大限度地提高任务执行速度。我们认为这些解决方案无法提供足够水平的交互性，因为它们依赖于对数据的持续访问。在本文中，我们提出了一种查询近似方法，也称为近似查询处理（AQP），它减少了推理（查询计算）期间扫描数据的需要，从而实现了快速查询处理工具。我们使用 LSTM 网络来学习查询与其结果之间的关系，并为预测查询结果提供快速推理层。我们的方法（称为“Hunch”）生成一个轻量级 LSTM 网络，可提供高查询吞吐量。我们使用 12 个数据集评估了我们的方法，并从查询延迟、模型权重和准确性的角度与最先进的 AQP 引擎（VerdictDB、BlinkDB）进行了比较。结果表明，我们的方法预测查询结果的归一化均方根误差 (NRMSE) 范围约为 1\% 到 4\%，这在我们的大多数数据集中都优于比较基准。此外，我们的方法能够在一秒钟内预测多达 120,000 个查询（一起流式传输），并且单个查询延迟不超过 2 毫秒。 本文提出一种基于LSTM网络的近似查询处理方法Hunch，通过学习查询与结果的关系实现快速查询响应，减少数据扫描需求。 Nir Regev,Lior Rokach,Asaf Shabtai cs.DB,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuang Guo,Bo Liu,Shen Zhang,Jifeng Guo,Changhong Wang
title: Continuous-time Gaussian Process Trajectory Generation for Multi-robot Formation via Probabilistic Inference
title_zh: 通过概率推理生成多机器人编队的连续时间高斯过程轨迹
abstract: In this paper, we extend a famous motion planning approach GPMP2 to multi-robot cases, yielding a novel centralized trajectory generation method for the multi-robot formation. A sparse Gaussian Process model is employed to represent the continuous-time trajectories of all robots as a limited number of states, which improves computational efficiency due to the sparsity. We add constraints to guarantee collision avoidance between individuals as well as formation maintenance, then all constraints and kinematics are formulated on a factor graph. By introducing a global planner, our proposed method can generate trajectories efficiently for a team of robots which have to get through a width-varying area by adaptive formation change. Finally, we provide the implementation of an incremental replanning algorithm to demonstrate the online operation potential of our proposed framework. The experiments in simulation and real world illustrate the feasibility, efficiency and scalability of our approach.
summary: In this paper, we extend a famous motion planning approach GPMP2 to multi-robot cases, yielding a novel centralized trajectory generation method for the multi-robot formation. A sparse Gaussian Process model is employed to represent the continuous-time trajectories of all robots as a limited number of states, which improves computational efficiency due to the sparsity. We add constraints to guarantee collision avoidance between individuals as well as formation maintenance, then all constraints and kinematics are formulated on a factor graph. By introducing a global planner, our proposed method can generate trajectories efficiently for a team of robots which have to get through a width-varying area by adaptive formation change. Finally, we provide the implementation of an incremental replanning algorithm to demonstrate the online operation potential of our proposed framework. The experiments in simulation and real world illustrate the feasibility, efficiency and scalability of our approach.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将著名的运动规划方法 GPMP2 扩展到多机器人情况，为多机器人编队产生了一种新颖的集中轨迹生成方法。采用稀疏高斯过程模型将所有机器人的连续时间轨迹表示为有限数量的状态，由于稀疏性提高了计算效率。我们添加约束来保证个体之间避免碰撞以及编队维护，然后所有约束和运动学都在因子图上制定。通过引入全局规划器，我们提出的方法可以为必须通过自适应队形变化穿过宽度变化区域的机器人团队有效地生成轨迹。最后，我们提供了增量重新规划算法的实现，以展示我们提出的框架的在线操作潜力。模拟和现实世界的实验说明了我们方法的可行性、效率和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概率推理的多机器人编队轨迹生成方法，通过扩展GPMP2算法实现高效轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多机器人动态编队场景下存在计算效率低、避障与编队约束难以兼顾的问题，需改进轨迹生成算法以适应复杂环境。
AI.method: 采用稀疏高斯过程建模连续时间轨迹，构建因子图整合避障与编队约束，并引入全局规划器实现自适应编队变换的增量重规划。
AI.result: 仿真与实物实验验证了方法在可行性、效率及可扩展性方面的优势，可处理宽度变化环境下的多机器人协同任务。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过概率推理有效平衡了多机器人系统的避障需求与编队稳定性，为动态环境下的群体智能提供了新思路。
