authors_text: Andreea Deac,Petar Veličković,Ognjen Milinković,Pierre-Luc Bacon,Jian Tang,Mladen Nikolić
title: XLVIN: eXecuted Latent Value Iteration Nets
title_zh: XLVIN：执行的潜在值迭代网络
abstract: Value Iteration Networks (VINs) have emerged as a popular method to incorporate planning algorithms within deep reinforcement learning, enabling performance improvements on tasks requiring long-range reasoning and understanding of environment dynamics. This came with several limitations, however: the model is not incentivised in any way to perform meaningful planning computations, the underlying state space is assumed to be discrete, and the Markov decision process (MDP) is assumed fixed and known. We propose eXecuted Latent Value Iteration Networks (XLVINs), which combine recent developments across contrastive self-supervised learning, graph representation learning and neural algorithmic reasoning to alleviate all of the above limitations, successfully deploying VIN-style models on generic environments. XLVINs match the performance of VIN-like models when the underlying MDP is discrete, fixed and known, and provides significant improvements to model-free baselines across three general MDP setups.
summary: Value Iteration Networks (VINs) have emerged as a popular method to incorporate planning algorithms within deep reinforcement learning, enabling performance improvements on tasks requiring long-range reasoning and understanding of environment dynamics. This came with several limitations, however: the model is not incentivised in any way to perform meaningful planning computations, the underlying state space is assumed to be discrete, and the Markov decision process (MDP) is assumed fixed and known. We propose eXecuted Latent Value Iteration Networks (XLVINs), which combine recent developments across contrastive self-supervised learning, graph representation learning and neural algorithmic reasoning to alleviate all of the above limitations, successfully deploying VIN-style models on generic environments. XLVINs match the performance of VIN-like models when the underlying MDP is discrete, fixed and known, and provides significant improvements to model-free baselines across three general MDP setups.
abstract_zh: 价值迭代网络 (VIN) 已成为一种流行的方法，将规划算法融入深度强化学习中，从而提高需要远程推理和理解环境动态的任务的性能。然而，这有几个限制：模型不会以任何方式激励执行有意义的规划计算，假设底层状态空间是离散的，并且假设马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）是固定且已知的。我们提出了执行潜在值迭代网络（XLVIN），它结合了对比自监督学习、图表示学习和神经算法推理的最新进展，以减轻上述所有限制，成功地在通用环境中部署了 VIN 式模型。当底层 MDP 是离散的、固定的和已知的时，XLVIN 与类 VIN 模型的性能相匹配，并为跨三种通用 MDP 设置的无模型基线提供了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XLVIN（eXecuted Latent Value Iteration Networks），通过结合对比自监督学习、图表示学习和神经算法推理，解决传统VINs在状态空间离散性、MDP固定性及规划计算激励不足等局限性，使VIN模型适用于通用环境。
AI.motivation: 传统VINs假设状态空间离散且MDP固定已知，缺乏对连续状态和动态环境的适应性，同时模型无动力执行有效规划计算，限制了其在通用场景的应用。
AI.method: 融合对比自监督学习（增强表征学习）、图神经网络（建模环境结构）及神经算法推理（执行规划计算），构建可处理连续状态空间和动态MDP的XLVIN框架。
AI.result: 在离散固定MDP任务中XLVIN性能与VIN相当，而在三个通用MDP设置中显著优于无模型基线，验证了其对连续状态和动态环境的适应性。
AI.conclusion: XLVIN通过多技术融合有效突破VINs的局限性，在通用强化学习场景中展现出优越性，为算法规划与深度学习的结合提供了新方向。

title: Even the Easiest(?) Graph Coloring Problem is not Easy in Streaming!
title_zh: 即使是最简单的（？）图形着色问题在流媒体中也不容易！
abstract: We study a graph coloring problem that is otherwise easy but becomes quite non-trivial in the one-pass streaming model. In contrast to previous graph coloring problems in streaming that try to find an assignment of colors to vertices, our main work is on estimating the number of conflicting or monochromatic edges given a coloring function that is streaming along with the graph; we call the problem {\sc Conflict-Est}. The coloring function on a vertex can be read or accessed only when the vertex is revealed in the stream. If we need the color on a vertex that has streamed past, then that color, along with its vertex, has to be stored explicitly. We provide algorithms for a graph that is streaming in different variants of the one-pass vertex arrival streaming model, viz. the {\sc Vertex Arrival} ({\sc VA}), {Vertex Arrival With Degree Oracle} ({\sc VAdeg}), {\sc Vertex Arrival in Random Order} ({\sc VArand}) models, with special focus on the random order model. We also provide matching lower bounds for most of the cases. The mainstay of our work is in showing that the properties of a random order stream can be exploited to design streaming algorithms for estimating the number of conflicting edges. We have also obtained a lower bound, though not matching the upper bound, for the random order model. Among all the three models vis-a-vis this problem, we can show a clear separation of power in favor of the {\sc VArand} model.
summary: We study a graph coloring problem that is otherwise easy but becomes quite non-trivial in the one-pass streaming model. In contrast to previous graph coloring problems in streaming that try to find an assignment of colors to vertices, our main work is on estimating the number of conflicting or monochromatic edges given a coloring function that is streaming along with the graph; we call the problem {\sc Conflict-Est}. The coloring function on a vertex can be read or accessed only when the vertex is revealed in the stream. If we need the color on a vertex that has streamed past, then that color, along with its vertex, has to be stored explicitly. We provide algorithms for a graph that is streaming in different variants of the one-pass vertex arrival streaming model, viz. the {\sc Vertex Arrival} ({\sc VA}), {Vertex Arrival With Degree Oracle} ({\sc VAdeg}), {\sc Vertex Arrival in Random Order} ({\sc VArand}) models, with special focus on the random order model. We also provide matching lower bounds for most of the cases. The mainstay of our work is in showing that the properties of a random order stream can be exploited to design streaming algorithms for estimating the number of conflicting edges. We have also obtained a lower bound, though not matching the upper bound, for the random order model. Among all the three models vis-a-vis this problem, we can show a clear separation of power in favor of the {\sc VArand} model.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一个图形着色问题，该问题本来很容易，但在单遍流模型中变得非常重要。与之前的流式处理中试图找到顶点颜色分配的图形着色问题相比，我们的主要工作是在给定与图形一起流式传输的着色函数的情况下估计冲突或单色边的数量；我们称这个问题为{\sc Conflict-Est}。仅当顶点在流中显示时才能读取或访问顶点上的着色函数。如果我们需要流过的顶点上的颜色，则必须显式存储该颜色及其顶点。我们为以单遍顶点到达流模型的不同变体进行流式传输的图提供算法，即。 {\sc Vertex Arrival} ({\sc VA})、{Vertex Arrival With Degree Oracle} ({\sc VAdeg})、{\sc Vertex Arrival in Random Order} ({\sc VArand}) 模型，特别关注随机顺序模型。我们还为大多数情况提供匹配的下限。我们工作的主要内容是表明可以利用随机顺序流的属性来设计流算法来估计冲突边的数量。我们还获得了随机顺序模型的下限，尽管与上限不匹配。在针对这个问题的所有三个模型中，我们可以显示出明显的权力分离，有利于 {\sc VArand} 模型。

AI.motivation: 传统图着色问题在流处理模型中因存储限制变得复杂，需设计高效算法
AI.method: 针对不同流模型设计算法，利用随机顺序模型的特性进行估计
AI.result: 提出多种模型的算法及下界，证明随机顺序模型在估计冲突边上的优势
AI.conclusion: 随机顺序模型在流处理中更高效，且存在未匹配的下界

search_text: Even the Easiest(?) Graph Coloring Problem is not Easy in Streaming! 即使是最简单的（？）图形着色问题在流媒体中也不容易！ We study a graph coloring problem that is otherwise easy but becomes quite non-trivial in the one-pass streaming model. In contrast to previous graph coloring problems in streaming that try to find an assignment of colors to vertices, our main work is on estimating the number of conflicting or monochromatic edges given a coloring function that is streaming along with the graph; we call the problem {\sc Conflict-Est}. The coloring function on a vertex can be read or accessed only when the vertex is revealed in the stream. If we need the color on a vertex that has streamed past, then that color, along with its vertex, has to be stored explicitly. We provide algorithms for a graph that is streaming in different variants of the one-pass vertex arrival streaming model, viz. the {\sc Vertex Arrival} ({\sc VA}), {Vertex Arrival With Degree Oracle} ({\sc VAdeg}), {\sc Vertex Arrival in Random Order} ({\sc VArand}) models, with special focus on the random order model. We also provide matching lower bounds for most of the cases. The mainstay of our work is in showing that the properties of a random order stream can be exploited to design streaming algorithms for estimating the number of conflicting edges. We have also obtained a lower bound, though not matching the upper bound, for the random order model. Among all the three models vis-a-vis this problem, we can show a clear separation of power in favor of the {\sc VArand} model. 我们研究了一个图形着色问题，该问题本来很容易，但在单遍流模型中变得非常重要。与之前的流式处理中试图找到顶点颜色分配的图形着色问题相比，我们的主要工作是在给定与图形一起流式传输的着色函数的情况下估计冲突或单色边的数量；我们称这个问题为{\sc Conflict-Est}。仅当顶点在流中显示时才能读取或访问顶点上的着色函数。如果我们需要流过的顶点上的颜色，则必须显式存储该颜色及其顶点。我们为以单遍顶点到达流模型的不同变体进行流式传输的图提供算法，即。 {\sc Vertex Arrival} ({\sc VA})、{Vertex Arrival With Degree Oracle} ({\sc VAdeg})、{\sc Vertex Arrival in Random Order} ({\sc VArand}) 模型，特别关注随机顺序模型。我们还为大多数情况提供匹配的下限。我们工作的主要内容是表明可以利用随机顺序流的属性来设计流算法来估计冲突边的数量。我们还获得了随机顺序模型的下限，尽管与上限不匹配。在针对这个问题的所有三个模型中，我们可以显示出明显的权力分离，有利于 {\sc VArand} 模型。 研究在流处理模型下估计给定颜色函数的冲突边数量问题 Anup Bhattacharya,Arijit Bishnu,Gopinath Mishra,Anannya Upasana cs.DS

title: Correspondence Learning via Linearly-invariant Embedding
title_zh: 通过线性不变嵌入进行对应学习
abstract: In this paper, we propose a fully differentiable pipeline for estimating accurate dense correspondences between 3D point clouds. The proposed pipeline is an extension and a generalization of the functional maps framework. However, instead of using the Laplace-Beltrami eigenfunctions as done in virtually all previous works in this domain, we demonstrate that learning the basis from data can both improve robustness and lead to better accuracy in challenging settings. We interpret the basis as a learned embedding into a higher dimensional space. Following the functional map paradigm the optimal transformation in this embedding space must be linear and we propose a separate architecture aimed at estimating the transformation by learning optimal descriptor functions. This leads to the first end-to-end trainable functional map-based correspondence approach in which both the basis and the descriptors are learned from data. Interestingly, we also observe that learning a \emph{canonical} embedding leads to worse results, suggesting that leaving an extra linear degree of freedom to the embedding network gives it more robustness, thereby also shedding light onto the success of previous methods. Finally, we demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results in challenging non-rigid 3D point cloud correspondence applications.
summary: In this paper, we propose a fully differentiable pipeline for estimating accurate dense correspondences between 3D point clouds. The proposed pipeline is an extension and a generalization of the functional maps framework. However, instead of using the Laplace-Beltrami eigenfunctions as done in virtually all previous works in this domain, we demonstrate that learning the basis from data can both improve robustness and lead to better accuracy in challenging settings. We interpret the basis as a learned embedding into a higher dimensional space. Following the functional map paradigm the optimal transformation in this embedding space must be linear and we propose a separate architecture aimed at estimating the transformation by learning optimal descriptor functions. This leads to the first end-to-end trainable functional map-based correspondence approach in which both the basis and the descriptors are learned from data. Interestingly, we also observe that learning a \emph{canonical} embedding leads to worse results, suggesting that leaving an extra linear degree of freedom to the embedding network gives it more robustness, thereby also shedding light onto the success of previous methods. Finally, we demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results in challenging non-rigid 3D point cloud correspondence applications.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种完全可微的管道，用于估计 3D 点云之间的准确密集对应关系。所提出的管道是功能映射框架的扩展和概括。然而，我们并没有像该领域几乎所有以前的工作那样使用拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米本征函数，而是证明从数据中学习基础既可以提高鲁棒性，又可以在具有挑战性的环境中提高准确性。我们将基础解释为学习嵌入到更高维度的空间。遵循功能映射范式，该嵌入空间中的最佳变换必须是线性的，我们提出了一种单独的架构，旨在通过学习最佳描述符函数来估计变换。这导致了第一个基于端到端可训练功能图的对应方法，其中基础和描述符都是从数据中学习的。有趣的是，我们还观察到学习 \emph{canonical} 嵌入会导致更糟糕的结果，这表明为嵌入网络留下额外的线性自由度可以使其更具鲁棒性，从而也揭示了以前方法的成功。最后，我们证明我们的方法在具有挑战性的非刚性 3D 点云对应应用程序中取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完全可微的流程，用于估计3D点云之间的准确密集对应关系。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖Laplace-Beltrami特征函数，但其在复杂场景下鲁棒性和准确性不足，需通过数据驱动方式改进。
AI.method: 通过学习数据驱动的嵌入基函数并结合线性变换估计，构建端到端可训练的函数映射框架，保留嵌入网络的线性自由度以增强鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在非刚性3D点云对应任务中达到最先进水平，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的嵌入学习优于规范嵌入，保留线性自由度可提升鲁棒性，解释了传统方法的部分成功原因。

authors_text: Jingsong Wang,Tom Ko,Zhen Xu,Xiawei Guo,Souxiang Liu,Wei-Wei Tu,Lei Xie
title: AutoSpeech 2020: The Second Automated Machine Learning Challenge for Speech Classification
title_zh: AutoSpeech 2020：第二届语音分类自动机器学习挑战赛
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, Details about AutoSpeech 2020 Challenge
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, Details about AutoSpeech 2020 Challenge
abstract: The AutoSpeech challenge calls for automated machine learning (AutoML) solutions to automate the process of applying machine learning to speech processing tasks. These tasks, which cover a large variety of domains, will be shown to the automated system in a random order. Each time when the tasks are switched, the information of the new task will be hinted with its corresponding training set. Thus, every submitted solution should contain an adaptation routine which adapts the system to the new task. Compared to the first edition, the 2020 edition includes advances of 1) more speech tasks, 2) noisier data in each task, 3) a modified evaluation metric. This paper outlines the challenge and describe the competition protocol, datasets, evaluation metric, starting kit, and baseline systems.
summary: The AutoSpeech challenge calls for automated machine learning (AutoML) solutions to automate the process of applying machine learning to speech processing tasks. These tasks, which cover a large variety of domains, will be shown to the automated system in a random order. Each time when the tasks are switched, the information of the new task will be hinted with its corresponding training set. Thus, every submitted solution should contain an adaptation routine which adapts the system to the new task. Compared to the first edition, the 2020 edition includes advances of 1) more speech tasks, 2) noisier data in each task, 3) a modified evaluation metric. This paper outlines the challenge and describe the competition protocol, datasets, evaluation metric, starting kit, and baseline systems.
abstract_zh: AutoSpeech 挑战赛需要自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 解决方案来自动化将机器学习应用于语音处理任务的过程。这些涵盖多种领域的任务将以随机顺序显示给自动化系统。每次任务切换时，新任务的信息都会通过其对应的训练集来提示。因此，每个提交的解决方案都应包含一个适应例程，使系统适应新任务。与第一版相比，2020 版包括以下方面的进步：1）更多的语音任务，2）每个任务中的噪声数据更多，3）修改后的评估指标。本文概述了挑战并描述了竞赛协议、数据集、评估指标、起始套件和基线系统。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了AutoSpeech 2020挑战赛，旨在通过自动化机器学习（AutoML）解决语音分类任务，包含更多任务、更嘈杂数据及改进的评估指标。
AI.motivation: 为推动AutoML在语音处理领域的应用，需通过更具挑战性的任务和数据验证系统适应性，促进鲁棒算法的发展。
AI.method: 设计包含多样化语音任务的数据集，引入噪声数据，修改评估指标，并提供基线系统与竞赛协议，要求参赛方案具备任务适应能力。
AI.result: 展示了参赛系统在多任务和噪声环境下的性能，验证了适应性算法的有效性，并通过新指标比较了不同方法的优劣。
AI.conclusion: AutoSpeech 2020挑战赛推动了AutoML在语音分类中的进展，未来需进一步研究复杂场景下的自适应技术与评估体系。

Thus, every submitted solution should contain an adaptation routine which adapts the system to the new task. This paper outlines the challenge and describe the competition protocol, datasets, evaluation metric, starting kit, and baseline systems. AutoSpeech 挑战赛需要自动化机器学习 (AutoML) 解决方案来自动化将机器学习应用于语音处理任务的过程。这些涵盖多种领域的任务将以随机顺序显示给自动化系统。每次任务切换时，新任务的信息都会通过其对应的训练集来提示。因此，每个提交的解决方案都应包含一个适应例程，使系统适应新任务。与第一版相比，2020 版包括以下方面的进步：1）更多的语音任务，2）每个任务中的噪声数据更多，3）修改后的评估指标。本文概述了挑战并描述了竞赛协议、数据集、评估指标、起始套件和基线系统。 本文介绍了AutoSpeech 2020挑战赛，旨在通过自动化机器学习（AutoML）解决语音分类任务，包含更多任务、更嘈杂数据及改进的评估指标。 Jingsong Wang,Tom Ko,Zhen Xu,Xiawei Guo,Souxiang Liu,Wei-Wei Tu,Lei Xie cs.AI

title: ImitationFlow: Learning Deep Stable Stochastic Dynamic Systems by Normalizing Flows
title_zh: ImitationFlow：通过归一化流学习深度稳定随机动态系统
abstract: We introduce ImitationFlow, a novel Deep generative model that allows learning complex globally stable, stochastic, nonlinear dynamics. Our approach extends the Normalizing Flows framework to learn stable Stochastic Differential Equations. We prove the Lyapunov stability for a class of Stochastic Differential Equations and we propose a learning algorithm to learn them from a set of demonstrated trajectories. Our model extends the set of stable dynamical systems that can be represented by state-of-the-art approaches, eliminates the Gaussian assumption on the demonstrations, and outperforms the previous algorithms in terms of representation accuracy. We show the effectiveness of our method with both standard datasets and a real robot experiment.
summary: We introduce ImitationFlow, a novel Deep generative model that allows learning complex globally stable, stochastic, nonlinear dynamics. Our approach extends the Normalizing Flows framework to learn stable Stochastic Differential Equations. We prove the Lyapunov stability for a class of Stochastic Differential Equations and we propose a learning algorithm to learn them from a set of demonstrated trajectories. Our model extends the set of stable dynamical systems that can be represented by state-of-the-art approaches, eliminates the Gaussian assumption on the demonstrations, and outperforms the previous algorithms in terms of representation accuracy. We show the effectiveness of our method with both standard datasets and a real robot experiment.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 ImitationFlow，一种新颖的深度生成模型，可以学习复杂的全局稳定、随机、非线性动力学。我们的方法扩展了归一化流框架来学习稳定的随机微分方程。我们证明了一类随机微分方程的李亚普诺夫稳定性，并提出了一种学习算法来从一组演示的轨迹中学习它们。我们的模型扩展了可以用最先进的方法表示的稳定动力系统集，消除了演示中的高斯假设，并且在表示精度方面优于以前的算法。我们通过标准数据集和真实的机器人实验展示了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出ImitationFlow模型，通过归一化流学习复杂稳定的随机动态系统
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法准确建模非高斯分布的稳定动态系统，且难以处理复杂非线性动力学
AI.method: 扩展归一化流框架以学习随机微分方程，结合Lyapunov稳定性证明和轨迹数据的算法
AI.result: 在标准数据集和真实机器人实验中表现优异，准确性和稳定性优于现有算法
AI.conclusion: ImitationFlow扩展了稳定动态系统的建模能力，无需高斯假设，提升了生成模型的准确性

title: ExplanationLP: Abductive Reasoning for Explainable Science Question Answering
title_zh: ExplanationLP：可解释科学问答的归纳推理
abstract: We propose a novel approach for answering and explaining multiple-choice science questions by reasoning on grounding and abstract inference chains. This paper frames question answering as an abductive reasoning problem, constructing plausible explanations for each choice and then selecting the candidate with the best explanation as the final answer. Our system, ExplanationLP, elicits explanations by constructing a weighted graph of relevant facts for each candidate answer and extracting the facts that satisfy certain structural and semantic constraints. To extract the explanations, we employ a linear programming formalism designed to select the optimal subgraph. The graphs' weighting function is composed of a set of parameters, which we fine-tune to optimize answer selection performance. We carry out our experiments on the WorldTree and ARC-Challenge corpus to empirically demonstrate the following conclusions: (1) Grounding-Abstract inference chains provides the semantic control to perform explainable abductive reasoning (2) Efficiency and robustness in learning with a fewer number of parameters by outperforming contemporary explainable and transformer-based approaches in a similar setting (3) Generalisability by outperforming SOTA explainable approaches on general science question sets.
summary: We propose a novel approach for answering and explaining multiple-choice science questions by reasoning on grounding and abstract inference chains. This paper frames question answering as an abductive reasoning problem, constructing plausible explanations for each choice and then selecting the candidate with the best explanation as the final answer. Our system, ExplanationLP, elicits explanations by constructing a weighted graph of relevant facts for each candidate answer and extracting the facts that satisfy certain structural and semantic constraints. To extract the explanations, we employ a linear programming formalism designed to select the optimal subgraph. The graphs' weighting function is composed of a set of parameters, which we fine-tune to optimize answer selection performance. We carry out our experiments on the WorldTree and ARC-Challenge corpus to empirically demonstrate the following conclusions: (1) Grounding-Abstract inference chains provides the semantic control to perform explainable abductive reasoning (2) Efficiency and robustness in learning with a fewer number of parameters by outperforming contemporary explainable and transformer-based approaches in a similar setting (3) Generalisability by outperforming SOTA explainable approaches on general science question sets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过基于基础和抽象推理链进行推理来回答和解释多项选择科学问题的新颖方法。本文将问答问题视为溯因推理问题，为每个选择构建合理的解释，然后选择具有最佳解释的候选者作为最终答案。我们的系统 ExplanationLP 通过为每个候选答案构建相关事实的加权图并提取满足某些结构和语义约束的事实来引出解释。为了提取解释，我们采用线性规划形式来选择最佳子图。图表的加权函数由一组参数组成，我们对其进行微调以优化答案选择性能。我们在 WorldTree 和 ARC-Challenge 语料库上进行实验，实证证明了以下结论：（1）基础抽象推理链提供了执行可解释的溯因推理的语义控制（2）通过在类似的环境中超越当代可解释和基于变压器的方法，在使用较少参数的情况下实现学习的效率和鲁棒性（3）通过在一般科学问题集上超越 SOTA 可解释方法来实现通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExplanationLP系统，通过归纳推理构建可解释的科学问答方法，利用加权图和线性规划选择最佳答案解释。
AI.motivation: 现有问答系统缺乏可解释性，且难以平衡推理效率与模型复杂度，需结构化方法实现科学问题的可解释推理。
AI.method: 构建候选答案的加权事实图，通过线性规划提取满足语义约束的最优子图，并微调权重参数优化答案选择。
AI.result: 在WorldTree和ARC-Challenge数据集上验证，优于现有可解释及基于Transformer的方法，在参数效率、鲁棒性和泛化能力上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 地面-抽象推理链可实现语义可控的归纳推理，参数高效的线性规划方法在科学问答中具有更好的可解释性与泛化能力。

authors_text: Arthur Bit-Monnot,Malik Ghallab,Félix Ingrand,David E. Smith
title: FAPE: a Constraint-based Planner for Generative and Hierarchical Temporal Planning
title_zh: FAPE：用于生成和分层时间规划的基于约束的规划器
abstract: Temporal planning offers numerous advantages when based on an expressive representation. Timelines have been known to provide the required expressiveness but at the cost of search efficiency. We propose here a temporal planner, called FAPE, which supports many of the expressive temporal features of the ANML modeling language without loosing efficiency. FAPE's representation coherently integrates flexible timelines with hierarchical refinement methods that can provide efficient control knowledge. A novel reachability analysis technique is proposed and used to develop causal networks to constrain the search space. It is employed for the design of informed heuristics, inference methods and efficient search strategies. Experimental results on common benchmarks in the field permit to assess the components and search strategies of FAPE, and to compare it to IPC planners. The results show the proposed approach to be competitive with less expressive planners and often superior when hierarchical control knowledge is provided. FAPE, a freely available system, provides other features, not covered here, such as the integration of planning with acting, and the handling of sensing actions in partially observable environments.
summary: Temporal planning offers numerous advantages when based on an expressive representation. Timelines have been known to provide the required expressiveness but at the cost of search efficiency. We propose here a temporal planner, called FAPE, which supports many of the expressive temporal features of the ANML modeling language without loosing efficiency. FAPE's representation coherently integrates flexible timelines with hierarchical refinement methods that can provide efficient control knowledge. A novel reachability analysis technique is proposed and used to develop causal networks to constrain the search space. It is employed for the design of informed heuristics, inference methods and efficient search strategies. Experimental results on common benchmarks in the field permit to assess the components and search strategies of FAPE, and to compare it to IPC planners. The results show the proposed approach to be competitive with less expressive planners and often superior when hierarchical control knowledge is provided. FAPE, a freely available system, provides other features, not covered here, such as the integration of planning with acting, and the handling of sensing actions in partially observable environments.
abstract_zh: 基于表达性表示的时间规划具有许多优势。众所周知，时间线可以提供所需的表达能力，但代价是搜索效率。我们在这里提出了一个称为 FAPE 的时间规划器，它支持 ANML 建模语言的许多表达时间特征，而不会损失效率。 FAPE 的表示将灵活的时间线与分层细化方法相结合，可以提供有效的控制知识。提出了一种新颖的可达性分析技术，并用于开发因果网络来约束搜索空间。它用于设计知情启发法、推理方法和有效的搜索策略。现场常见基准的实验结果允许评估 FAPE 的组件和搜索策略，并将其与 IPC 规划器进行比较。结果表明，所提出的方法与表达能力较差的规划者相比具有竞争力，并且在提供分层控制知识时通常更优越。 FAPE 是一个免费提供的系统，它提供了此处未介绍的其他功能，例如规划与行动的集成，以及在部分可观察的环境中处理传感操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于约束的时序规划器FAPE，通过整合灵活时间线与分层细化方法，解决表达性与时效性矛盾的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统时序规划方法在表达性与时效性之间难以平衡，现有规划器或牺牲表达性或降低搜索效率，需寻找更优方案。
AI.method: 采用可达性分析技术构建因果网络约束搜索空间，结合分层控制知识设计启发式算法与搜索策略，支持ANML语言的表达特性。
AI.result: 实验表明FAPE在基准测试中表现优于IPC规划器，尤其在提供分层控制知识时性能显著提升，且支持规划与行动集成等扩展功能。
AI.conclusion: FAPE有效平衡了表达性与效率，分层控制知识显著提升规划性能，系统具备处理部分可观测环境等实用特性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于约束的时序规划器FAPE，通过整合灵活时间线与分层细化方法，解决表达性与时效性矛盾的问题。
motivation: 传统时序规划方法在表达性与时效性之间难以平衡，现有规划器或牺牲表达性或降低搜索效率，需寻找更优方案。
method: 采用可达性分析技术构建因果网络约束搜索空间，结合分层控制知识设计启发式算法与搜索策略，支持ANML语言的表达特性。
result: 实验表明FAPE在基准测试中表现优于IPC规划器，尤其在提供分层控制知识时性能显著提升，且支持规划与行动集成等扩展功能。
conclusion: FAPE有效平衡了表达性与效率，分层控制知识显著提升规划性能，系统具备处理部分可观测环境等实用特性。
search_text: FAPE: a Constraint-based Planner for Generative and Hierarchical Temporal Planning FAPE：用于生成和分层时间规划的基于约束的规划器 Temporal planning offers numerous advantages when based on an expressive representation. Timelines have been known to provide the required expressiveness but at the cost of search efficiency. We propose here a temporal planner, called FAPE, which supports many of the expressive temporal features of the ANML modeling language without loosing efficiency. FAPE's representation coherently integrates flexible timelines with hierarchical refinement methods that can provide efficient control knowledge. A novel reachability analysis technique is proposed and used to develop causal networks to constrain the search space. It is employed for the design of informed heuristics, inference methods and efficient search strategies. Experimental results on common benchmarks in the field permit to assess the components and search strategies of FAPE, and to compare it to IPC planners. The results show the proposed approach to be competitive with less expressive planners and often superior when hierarchical control knowledge is provided. FAPE, a freely available system, provides other features, not covered here, such as the integration of planning with acting, and the handling of sensing actions in partially observable environments. 基于表达性表示的时间规划具有许多优势。众所周知，时间线可以提供所需的表达能力，但代价是搜索效率。我们在这里提出了一个称为 FAPE 的时间规划器，它支持 ANML 建模语言的许多表达时间特征，而不会损失效率。 FAPE 的表示将灵活的时间线与分层细化方法相结合，可以提供有效的控制知识。提出了一种新颖的可达性分析技术，并用于开发因果网络来约束搜索空间。它用于设计知情启发法、推理方法和有效的搜索策略。现场常见基准的实验结果允许评估 FAPE 的组件和搜索策略，并将其与 IPC 规划器进行比较。结果表明，所提出的方法与表达能力较差的规划者相比具有竞争力，并且在提供分层控制知识时通常更优越。 FAPE 是一个免费提供的系统，它提供了此处未介绍的其他功能，例如规划与行动的集成，以及在部分可观察的环境中处理传感操作。 本文提出了一种基于约束的时序规划器FAPE，通过整合灵活时间线与分层细化方法，解决表达性与时效性矛盾的问题。 Arthur Bit-Monnot,Malik Ghallab,Félix Ingrand,David E. Smith cs.AI

title: Monocular Depth Estimation via Listwise Ranking using the Plackett-Luce Model
title_zh: 使用 Plackett-Luce 模型通过列表排序进行单目深度估计
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2021
comments: 15 pages, 5 figures, 7 tables, IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2021
abstract: In many real-world applications, the relative depth of objects in an image is crucial for scene understanding. Recent approaches mainly tackle the problem of depth prediction in monocular images by treating the problem as a regression task. Yet, being interested in an order relation in the first place, ranking methods suggest themselves as a natural alternative to regression, and indeed, ranking approaches leveraging pairwise comparisons as training information ("object A is closer to the camera than B") have shown promising performance on this problem. In this paper, we elaborate on the use of so-called listwise ranking as a generalization of the pairwise approach. Our method is based on the Plackett-Luce (PL) model, a probability distribution on rankings, which we combine with a state-of-the-art neural network architecture and a simple sampling strategy to reduce training complexity. Moreover, taking advantage of the representation of PL as a random utility model, the proposed predictor offers a natural way to recover (shift-invariant) metric depth information from ranking-only data provided at training time. An empirical evaluation on several benchmark datasets in a "zero-shot" setting demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach compared to existing ranking and regression methods.
summary: In many real-world applications, the relative depth of objects in an image is crucial for scene understanding. Recent approaches mainly tackle the problem of depth prediction in monocular images by treating the problem as a regression task. Yet, being interested in an order relation in the first place, ranking methods suggest themselves as a natural alternative to regression, and indeed, ranking approaches leveraging pairwise comparisons as training information ("object A is closer to the camera than B") have shown promising performance on this problem. In this paper, we elaborate on the use of so-called listwise ranking as a generalization of the pairwise approach. Our method is based on the Plackett-Luce (PL) model, a probability distribution on rankings, which we combine with a state-of-the-art neural network architecture and a simple sampling strategy to reduce training complexity. Moreover, taking advantage of the representation of PL as a random utility model, the proposed predictor offers a natural way to recover (shift-invariant) metric depth information from ranking-only data provided at training time. An empirical evaluation on several benchmark datasets in a "zero-shot" setting demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach compared to existing ranking and regression methods.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实应用中，图像中对象的相对深度对于场景理解至关重要。最近的方法主要通过将问题视为回归任务来解决单目图像中的深度预测问题。然而，由于首先对顺序关系感兴趣，排序方法表明自己是回归的自然替代方案，事实上，利用成对比较作为训练信息（“对象 A 比 B 更接近相机”）的排序方法在这个问题上表现出了良好的性能。在本文中，我们详细阐述了所谓的列表排名作为成对方法的推广的使用。我们的方法基于 Plackett-Luce (PL) 模型，这是一种排名概率分布，我们将其与最先进的神经网络架构和简单的采样策略相结合，以降低训练复杂性。此外，利用 PL 作为随机效用模型的表示，所提出的预测器提供了一种从训练时提供的仅排名数据中恢复（平移不变）度量深度信息的自然方法。在“零样本”设置中对几个基准数据集的实证评估证明了我们的方法与现有排名和回归方法相比的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Plackett-Luce模型的列表级排序方法，用于单目图像的深度估计。
AI.motivation: 传统单目深度估计多采用回归方法，但排序方法能更自然地处理相对深度关系。列表级排序作为对偶排序的推广，可提升效率并结合随机效用模型恢复度量深度。
AI.method: 结合Plackett-Luce模型与先进神经网络架构，通过简单采样策略降低训练复杂度，并利用其随机效用表示从排序数据中恢复度量深度。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集的零样本实验中，该方法相较现有排序与回归方法表现出更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 列表级排序方法为单目深度估计提供了新思路，有效结合排序信息与度量深度恢复，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Danny Stoll,Jörg K. H. Franke,Diane Wagner,Simon Selg,Frank Hutter
title: Hyperparameter Transfer Across Developer Adjustments
title_zh: 跨开发人员调整的超参数传输
abstract: After developer adjustments to a machine learning (ML) algorithm, how can the results of an old hyperparameter optimization (HPO) automatically be used to speedup a new HPO? This question poses a challenging problem, as developer adjustments can change which hyperparameter settings perform well, or even the hyperparameter search space itself. While many approaches exist that leverage knowledge obtained on previous tasks, so far, knowledge from previous development steps remains entirely untapped. In this work, we remedy this situation and propose a new research framework: hyperparameter transfer across adjustments (HT-AA). To lay a solid foundation for this research framework, we provide four simple HT-AA baseline algorithms and eight benchmarks changing various aspects of ML algorithms, their hyperparameter search spaces, and the neural architectures used. The best baseline, on average and depending on the budgets for the old and new HPO, reaches a given performance 1.2--2.6x faster than a prominent HPO algorithm without transfer. As HPO is a crucial step in ML development but requires extensive computational resources, this speedup would lead to faster development cycles, lower costs, and reduced environmental impacts. To make these benefits available to ML developers off-the-shelf and to facilitate future research on HT-AA, we provide python packages for our baselines and benchmarks.
summary: After developer adjustments to a machine learning (ML) algorithm, how can the results of an old hyperparameter optimization (HPO) automatically be used to speedup a new HPO? This question poses a challenging problem, as developer adjustments can change which hyperparameter settings perform well, or even the hyperparameter search space itself. While many approaches exist that leverage knowledge obtained on previous tasks, so far, knowledge from previous development steps remains entirely untapped. In this work, we remedy this situation and propose a new research framework: hyperparameter transfer across adjustments (HT-AA). To lay a solid foundation for this research framework, we provide four simple HT-AA baseline algorithms and eight benchmarks changing various aspects of ML algorithms, their hyperparameter search spaces, and the neural architectures used. The best baseline, on average and depending on the budgets for the old and new HPO, reaches a given performance 1.2--2.6x faster than a prominent HPO algorithm without transfer. As HPO is a crucial step in ML development but requires extensive computational resources, this speedup would lead to faster development cycles, lower costs, and reduced environmental impacts. To make these benefits available to ML developers off-the-shelf and to facilitate future research on HT-AA, we provide python packages for our baselines and benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 开发人员调整机器学习 (ML) 算法后，如何自动使用旧超参数优化 (HPO) 的结果来加速新的 HPO？这个问题提出了一个具有挑战性的问题，因为开发人员的调整可以改变哪些超参数设置表现良好，甚至改变超参数搜索空间本身。尽管存在许多利用先前任务中获得的知识的方法，但到目前为止，先前开发步骤中的知识仍然完全未被开发。在这项工作中，我们纠正了这种情况，并提出了一个新的研究框架：跨调整的超参数传递（HT-AA）。为了为这个研究框架奠定坚实的基础，我们提供了四种简单的 HT-AA 基线算法和八个基准，改变了 ML 算法、超参数搜索空间和所使用的神经架构的各个方面。平均而言，根据新旧 HPO 的预算，最佳基线达到给定性能的速度比没有传输的著名 HPO 算法快 1.2--2.6 倍。由于 HPO 是机器学习开发中的关键步骤，但需要大量的计算资源，因此这种加速将导致更快的开发周期、更低的成本并减少对环境的影响。为了向 ML 开发人员提供现成的这些优势并促进未来对 HT-AA 的研究，我们为基线和基准测试提供了 Python 包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨开发者调整的超参数转移框架（HT-AA），旨在通过复用旧超参数优化结果加速新超参数优化过程。
AI.motivation: 开发者对机器学习算法的调整可能改变超参数的有效性或搜索空间，导致传统超参数优化（HPO）无法复用历史结果，造成计算资源浪费。
AI.method: 构建HT-AA研究框架，设计四种基线算法及八个涵盖算法、超参数空间和神经架构变化的基准测试，通过迁移学习原理实现跨调整的超参数知识复用。
AI.result: 最佳基线算法在平均情况下比非迁移HPO算法快1.2-2.6倍，显著降低计算成本与环境影响。
AI.conclusion: HT-AA框架可加速机器学习开发周期，降低资源消耗，开源工具包为实际应用和未来研究提供支持。

To make these benefits available to ML developers off-the-shelf and to facilitate future research on HT-AA, we provide python packages for our baselines and benchmarks. 开发人员调整机器学习 (ML) 算法后，如何自动使用旧超参数优化 (HPO) 的结果来加速新的 HPO？这个问题提出了一个具有挑战性的问题，因为开发人员的调整可以改变哪些超参数设置表现良好，甚至改变超参数搜索空间本身。尽管存在许多利用先前任务中获得的知识的方法，但到目前为止，先前开发步骤中的知识仍然完全未被开发。在这项工作中，我们纠正了这种情况，并提出了一个新的研究框架：跨调整的超参数传递（HT-AA）。为了为这个研究框架奠定坚实的基础，我们提供了四种简单的 HT-AA 基线算法和八个基准，改变了 ML 算法、超参数搜索空间和所使用的神经架构的各个方面。平均而言，根据新旧 HPO 的预算，最佳基线达到给定性能的速度比没有传输的著名 HPO 算法快 1.2--2.6 倍。由于 HPO 是机器学习开发中的关键步骤，但需要大量的计算资源，因此这种加速将导致更快的开发周期、更低的成本并减少对环境的影响。为了向 ML 开发人员提供现成的这些优势并促进未来对 HT-AA 的研究，我们为基线和基准测试提供了 Python 包。 本文提出了一种跨开发者调整的超参数转移框架（HT-AA），旨在通过复用旧超参数优化结果加速新超参数优化过程。 Danny Stoll,Jörg K. H. Franke,Diane Wagner,Simon Selg,Frank Hutter cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Empowering Knowledge Distillation via Open Set Recognition for Robust 3D Point Cloud Classification
title_zh: 通过开放集识别增强知识蒸馏以实现稳健的 3D 点云分类
comment: Preprint. Under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: Preprint. Under consideration at Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: Real-world scenarios pose several challenges to deep learning based computer vision techniques despite their tremendous success in research. Deeper models provide better performance, but are challenging to deploy and knowledge distillation allows us to train smaller models with minimal loss in performance. The model also has to deal with open set samples from classes outside the ones it was trained on and should be able to identify them as unknown samples while classifying the known ones correctly. Finally, most existing image recognition research focuses only on using two-dimensional snapshots of the real world three-dimensional objects. In this work, we aim to bridge these three research fields, which have been developed independently until now, despite being deeply interrelated. We propose a joint Knowledge Distillation and Open Set recognition training methodology for three-dimensional object recognition. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method via various experiments on how it allows us to obtain a much smaller model, which takes a minimal hit in performance while being capable of open set recognition for 3D point cloud data.
summary: Real-world scenarios pose several challenges to deep learning based computer vision techniques despite their tremendous success in research. Deeper models provide better performance, but are challenging to deploy and knowledge distillation allows us to train smaller models with minimal loss in performance. The model also has to deal with open set samples from classes outside the ones it was trained on and should be able to identify them as unknown samples while classifying the known ones correctly. Finally, most existing image recognition research focuses only on using two-dimensional snapshots of the real world three-dimensional objects. In this work, we aim to bridge these three research fields, which have been developed independently until now, despite being deeply interrelated. We propose a joint Knowledge Distillation and Open Set recognition training methodology for three-dimensional object recognition. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method via various experiments on how it allows us to obtain a much smaller model, which takes a minimal hit in performance while being capable of open set recognition for 3D point cloud data.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于深度学习的计算机视觉技术在研究方面取得了巨大成功，但现实世界的场景对它们提出了一些挑战。更深的模型提供更好的性能，但部署起来具有挑战性，知识蒸馏使我们能够以最小的性能损失来训练更小的模型。该模型还必须处理来自其训练对象之外的类的开放集样本，并且应该能够将它们识别为未知样本，同时正确分类已知样本。最后，大多数现有的图像识别研究仅侧重于使用现实世界三维对象的二维快照。在这项工作中，我们的目标是架起这三个研究领域的桥梁，这三个研究领域迄今为止一直是独立发展的，尽管它们之间存在着深刻的相互关联。我们提出了一种用于三维物体识别的联合知识蒸馏和开放集识别训练方法。我们通过各种实验证明了所提出方法的有效性，该方法使我们能够获得更小的模型，该模型对性能的影响最小，同时能够对 3D 点云数据进行开放集识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合知识蒸馏与开放集识别的联合训练方法，用于提升3D点云分类模型的鲁棒性与小型化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在部署时面临性能与规模的矛盾，且难以处理训练集外的开放集样本，而三维点云分类研究长期缺乏对知识蒸馏与开放集识别的综合应用。
AI.method: 设计联合知识蒸馏与开放集识别的训练框架，在压缩模型规模的同时，通过开放集识别机制增强模型对未知类别的判别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持性能损失最小的前提下，显著提升了3D点云分类模型的开放集识别能力，并成功减小了模型规模。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合知识蒸馏与开放集识别，本文为3D点云分类提供了更鲁棒且实用的解决方案，弥合了多个长期独立发展的研究方向。

title: Develop Health Monitoring and Management System to Track Health Condition and Nutrient Balance for School Students
title_zh: 开发健康监测及管理系统，追踪学生健康状况及营养平衡
abstract: Health Monitoring and Management System (HMMS) is an emerging technology for decades. Researchers are working on this field to track health conditions for different users. Researchers emphasize tracking health conditions from an early stage to the human body. Therefore, different research works have been conducted to establish HMMS in schools. Researchers propose different frameworks and technologies for their HMMS to check student's health condition. In this paper, we introduce a complete and scalable HMMS to track health conditions and nutrient balance for students from primary school. We define procedures step by step to establish a robust HMMS where big data methodologies can be used for further prediction for diseases.
summary: Health Monitoring and Management System (HMMS) is an emerging technology for decades. Researchers are working on this field to track health conditions for different users. Researchers emphasize tracking health conditions from an early stage to the human body. Therefore, different research works have been conducted to establish HMMS in schools. Researchers propose different frameworks and technologies for their HMMS to check student's health condition. In this paper, we introduce a complete and scalable HMMS to track health conditions and nutrient balance for students from primary school. We define procedures step by step to establish a robust HMMS where big data methodologies can be used for further prediction for diseases.
abstract_zh: 健康监测和管理系统（HMMS）是几十年来的新兴技术。研究人员正在该领域开展工作，追踪不同用户的健康状况。研究人员强调从早期阶段追踪人体健康状况。因此，人们开展了不同的研究工作以在学校建立HMMS。研究人员为他们的 HMMS 提出了不同的框架和技术来检查学生的健康状况。在本文中，我们介绍了一个完整且可扩展的 HMMS 来跟踪小学生的健康状况和营养平衡。我们逐步定义程序来建立强大的 HMMS，其中大数据方法可用于进一步预测疾病。

AI.tldr: 开发一个可扩展的健康监测与管理系统（HMMS），用于跟踪小学生健康状况和营养平衡，并利用大数据方法进行疾病预测。
AI.motivation: 通过早期健康监测预防疾病，提升学生健康水平，现有系统缺乏全面性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 分步骤设计HMMS框架，整合健康数据与营养信息，应用大数据分析技术进行疾病预测。
AI.result: 成功构建HMMS原型，实现学生健康数据的实时监测与营养分析，初步验证大数据预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效提升学校健康管理效率，为早期疾病预防提供数据支持，未来需进一步优化算法和扩展应用范围。

title: Learning Multi-Agent Coordination for Enhancing Target Coverage in Directional Sensor Networks
title_zh: 学习多智能体协调以增强定向传感器网络中的目标覆盖范围
abstract: Maximum target coverage by adjusting the orientation of distributed sensors is an important problem in directional sensor networks (DSNs). This problem is challenging as the targets usually move randomly but the coverage range of sensors is limited in angle and distance. Thus, it is required to coordinate sensors to get ideal target coverage with low power consumption, e.g. no missing targets or reducing redundant coverage. To realize this, we propose a Hierarchical Target-oriented Multi-Agent Coordination (HiT-MAC), which decomposes the target coverage problem into two-level tasks: targets assignment by a coordinator and tracking assigned targets by executors. Specifically, the coordinator periodically monitors the environment globally and allocates targets to each executor. In turn, the executor only needs to track its assigned targets. To effectively learn the HiT-MAC by reinforcement learning, we further introduce a bunch of practical methods, including a self-attention module, marginal contribution approximation for the coordinator, goal-conditional observation filter for the executor, etc. Empirical results demonstrate the advantage of HiT-MAC in coverage rate, learning efficiency,and scalability, comparing to baselines. We also conduct an ablative analysis on the effectiveness of the introduced components in the framework.
summary: Maximum target coverage by adjusting the orientation of distributed sensors is an important problem in directional sensor networks (DSNs). This problem is challenging as the targets usually move randomly but the coverage range of sensors is limited in angle and distance. Thus, it is required to coordinate sensors to get ideal target coverage with low power consumption, e.g. no missing targets or reducing redundant coverage. To realize this, we propose a Hierarchical Target-oriented Multi-Agent Coordination (HiT-MAC), which decomposes the target coverage problem into two-level tasks: targets assignment by a coordinator and tracking assigned targets by executors. Specifically, the coordinator periodically monitors the environment globally and allocates targets to each executor. In turn, the executor only needs to track its assigned targets. To effectively learn the HiT-MAC by reinforcement learning, we further introduce a bunch of practical methods, including a self-attention module, marginal contribution approximation for the coordinator, goal-conditional observation filter for the executor, etc. Empirical results demonstrate the advantage of HiT-MAC in coverage rate, learning efficiency,and scalability, comparing to baselines. We also conduct an ablative analysis on the effectiveness of the introduced components in the framework.
abstract_zh: 通过调整分布式传感器的方向来实现最大目标覆盖是定向传感器网络（DSN）中的一个重要问题。这个问题具有挑战性，因为目标通常随机移动，但传感器的覆盖范围在角度和距离上受到限制。因此，需要协调传感器以低功耗获得理想的目标覆盖，例如没有遗漏目标或减少冗余覆盖。为了实现这一点，我们提出了一种面向目标的分层多智能体协调（HiT-MAC），它将目标覆盖问题分解为两级任务：协调器分配目标和执行器跟踪分配的目标。具体来说，协调器定期监控全局环境，并将目标分配给每个执行器。反过来，执行器只需要跟踪其指定的目标。为了通过强化学习有效地学习 HiT-MAC，我们进一步引入了一系列实用方法，包括自注意力模块、协调器的边际贡献近似、执行器的目标条件观察过滤器等。实证结果表明，与基线相比，HiT-MAC 在覆盖率、学习效率和可扩展性方面具有优势。我们还对框架中引入的组件的有效性进行了烧蚀分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层多智能体协调方法HiT-MAC，通过协调分布式定向传感器网络中的传感器方向调整，以提高移动目标的覆盖效率并降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 定向传感器网络中目标随机移动且传感器覆盖范围有限，传统方法难以平衡覆盖完整性与冗余，需更高效的协调机制以优化能耗和覆盖率。
AI.method: 设计HiT-MAC框架，分为全局协调器（分配目标）和执行器（跟踪目标）两级任务，结合自注意力模块、边际贡献近似和目标条件观测过滤等强化学习技术实现协调。
AI.result: 实验表明HiT-MAC在覆盖率、学习效率和可扩展性上优于基线方法，消融分析验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: HiT-MAC通过分层协调机制和强化学习技术有效解决了定向传感器网络的目标覆盖问题，为多智能体协作提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Multi-Agent Coordination for Enhancing Target Coverage in Directional Sensor Networks 学习多智能体协调以增强定向传感器网络中的目标覆盖范围 Maximum target coverage by adjusting the orientation of distributed sensors is an important problem in directional sensor networks (DSNs). This problem is challenging as the targets usually move randomly but the coverage range of sensors is limited in angle and distance. Thus, it is required to coordinate sensors to get ideal target coverage with low power consumption, e.g. no missing targets or reducing redundant coverage. To realize this, we propose a Hierarchical Target-oriented Multi-Agent Coordination (HiT-MAC), which decomposes the target coverage problem into two-level tasks: targets assignment by a coordinator and tracking assigned targets by executors. Specifically, the coordinator periodically monitors the environment globally and allocates targets to each executor. In turn, the executor only needs to track its assigned targets. To effectively learn the HiT-MAC by reinforcement learning, we further introduce a bunch of practical methods, including a self-attention module, marginal contribution approximation for the coordinator, goal-conditional observation filter for the executor, etc. Empirical results demonstrate the advantage of HiT-MAC in coverage rate, learning efficiency,and scalability, comparing to baselines. We also conduct an ablative analysis on the effectiveness of the introduced components in the framework. 通过调整分布式传感器的方向来实现最大目标覆盖是定向传感器网络（DSN）中的一个重要问题。这个问题具有挑战性，因为目标通常随机移动，但传感器的覆盖范围在角度和距离上受到限制。因此，需要协调传感器以低功耗获得理想的目标覆盖，例如没有遗漏目标或减少冗余覆盖。为了实现这一点，我们提出了一种面向目标的分层多智能体协调（HiT-MAC），它将目标覆盖问题分解为两级任务：协调器分配目标和执行器跟踪分配的目标。具体来说，协调器定期监控全局环境，并将目标分配给每个执行器。反过来，执行器只需要跟踪其指定的目标。为了通过强化学习有效地学习 HiT-MAC，我们进一步引入了一系列实用方法，包括自注意力模块、协调器的边际贡献近似、执行器的目标条件观察过滤器等。实证结果表明，与基线相比，HiT-MAC 在覆盖率、学习效率和可扩展性方面具有优势。我们还对框架中引入的组件的有效性进行了烧蚀分析。 本文提出了一种分层多智能体协调方法HiT-MAC，通过协调分布式定向传感器网络中的传感器方向调整，以提高移动目标的覆盖效率并降低能耗。 Jing Xu,Fangwei Zhong,Yizhou Wang cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Liyang Liu,Simon Fryc,Lan Wu,Thanh Vu,Gavin Paul,Teresa Vidal-Calleja
title: Active and Interactive Mapping with Dynamic Gaussian Process Implicit Surfaces for Mobile Manipulators
title_zh: 移动机械手的动态高斯过程隐式曲面的主动和交互式映射
abstract: In this letter, we present an interactive probabilistic mapping framework for a mobile manipulator picking objects from a pile. The aim is to map the scene, actively decide where to go next and which object to pick, make changes to the scene by picking the chosen object, and then map these changes alongside. The proposed framework uses a novel dynamic Gaussian Process (GP) Implicit Surface method to incrementally build and update the scene map that reflects environment changes. Actively the framework provides the next-best-view, balancing the need for picking object reachability with map information gain (IG). To enforce a priority of visiting boundary segments over unknown regions, the IG formulation includes an uncertainty gradient-based frontier score by exploiting the GP kernel derivative. This leads to an efficient strategy that addresses the often conflicting requirement of unknown environment exploration and object picking exploitation given a limited execution horizon. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework with software simulation and real-life experiments.
summary: In this letter, we present an interactive probabilistic mapping framework for a mobile manipulator picking objects from a pile. The aim is to map the scene, actively decide where to go next and which object to pick, make changes to the scene by picking the chosen object, and then map these changes alongside. The proposed framework uses a novel dynamic Gaussian Process (GP) Implicit Surface method to incrementally build and update the scene map that reflects environment changes. Actively the framework provides the next-best-view, balancing the need for picking object reachability with map information gain (IG). To enforce a priority of visiting boundary segments over unknown regions, the IG formulation includes an uncertainty gradient-based frontier score by exploiting the GP kernel derivative. This leads to an efficient strategy that addresses the often conflicting requirement of unknown environment exploration and object picking exploitation given a limited execution horizon. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework with software simulation and real-life experiments.
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，我们提出了一个交互式概率映射框架，用于移动机械手从一堆物体中拾取物体。目的是映射场景，主动决定下一步要去哪里以及选择哪个对象，通过选择所选对象对场景进行更改，然后将这些更改一起映射。所提出的框架使用一种新颖的动态高斯过程（GP）隐式曲面方法来增量构建和更新反映环境变化的场景图。该框架主动提供次佳视图，平衡拾取对象可达性与地图信息增益 (IG) 的需求。为了强制优先访问未知区域的边界段，IG 公式通过利用 GP 核导数包括基于不确定性梯度的前沿分数。这产生了一种有效的策略，可以解决在有限的执行范围内未知环境探索和对象拾取利用经常相互冲突的需求。我们通过软件模拟和现实实验证明了我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于移动机械臂从堆叠物体中主动交互式建图的框架，通过动态高斯过程隐式曲面方法实时更新场景映射。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以在有限执行时间内平衡环境探索与物体抓取的优先级，需解决动态场景下映射更新与交互操作的协同问题。
AI.method: 采用动态高斯过程隐式曲面增量构建场景地图，结合不确定梯度前沿分数的改进信息增益公式，实现抓取可达性与地图信息量的平衡决策。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实物实验验证，框架能有效完成动态场景建图、物体抓取决策及映射更新，优于传统方法的探索效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过动态GP隐式曲面与改进信息增益策略，实现了移动机械臂在复杂动态环境中的高效交互式建图与抓取规划。

title: Scribble-based Weakly Supervised Deep Learning for Road Surface Extraction from Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 基于 Scribble 的弱监督深度学习用于遥感图像路面提取
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
comments: 12 pages, 8 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing
abstract: Road surface extraction from remote sensing images using deep learning methods has achieved good performance, while most of the existing methods are based on fully supervised learning, which requires a large amount of training data with laborious per-pixel annotation. In this paper, we propose a scribble-based weakly supervised road surface extraction method named ScRoadExtractor, which learns from easily accessible scribbles such as centerlines instead of densely annotated road surface ground-truths. To propagate semantic information from sparse scribbles to unlabeled pixels, we introduce a road label propagation algorithm which considers both the buffer-based properties of road networks and the color and spatial information of super-pixels. The proposal masks generated from the road label propagation algorithm are utilized to train a dual-branch encoder-decoder network we designed, which consists of a semantic segmentation branch and an auxiliary boundary detection branch. We perform experiments on three diverse road datasets that are comprised of highresolution remote sensing satellite and aerial images across the world. The results demonstrate that ScRoadExtractor exceed the classic scribble-supervised segmentation method by 20% for the intersection over union (IoU) indicator and outperform the state-of-the-art scribble-based weakly supervised methods at least 4%.
summary: Road surface extraction from remote sensing images using deep learning methods has achieved good performance, while most of the existing methods are based on fully supervised learning, which requires a large amount of training data with laborious per-pixel annotation. In this paper, we propose a scribble-based weakly supervised road surface extraction method named ScRoadExtractor, which learns from easily accessible scribbles such as centerlines instead of densely annotated road surface ground-truths. To propagate semantic information from sparse scribbles to unlabeled pixels, we introduce a road label propagation algorithm which considers both the buffer-based properties of road networks and the color and spatial information of super-pixels. The proposal masks generated from the road label propagation algorithm are utilized to train a dual-branch encoder-decoder network we designed, which consists of a semantic segmentation branch and an auxiliary boundary detection branch. We perform experiments on three diverse road datasets that are comprised of highresolution remote sensing satellite and aerial images across the world. The results demonstrate that ScRoadExtractor exceed the classic scribble-supervised segmentation method by 20% for the intersection over union (IoU) indicator and outperform the state-of-the-art scribble-based weakly supervised methods at least 4%.
abstract_zh: 使用深度学习方法从遥感图像中提取路面已经取得了良好的性能，而现有方法大多数基于完全监督学习，需要大量的训练数据和费力的逐像素标注。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 ScRoadExtractor 的基于涂鸦的弱监督路面提取方法，该方法从易于访问的涂鸦（例如中心线）而不是密集注释的路面地面实况中学习。为了将语义信息从稀疏的涂鸦传播到未标记的像素，我们引入了一种道路标签传播算法，该算法考虑了道路网络基于缓冲区的属性以及超像素的颜色和空间信息。利用道路标签传播算法生成的建议掩码来训练我们设计的双分支编码器-解码器网络，该网络由语义分割分支和辅助边界检测分支组成。我们对三个不同的道路数据集进行了实验，这些数据集由世界各地的高分辨率遥感卫星和航空图像组成。结果表明，ScRoadExtractor 的交并集 (IoU) 指标超过了经典的涂鸦监督分割方法 20%，并且优于最先进的基于涂鸦的弱监督方法至少 4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于涂鸦的弱监督深度学习方法ScRoadExtractor，用于从遥感图像中提取道路表面。
AI.motivation: 现有道路提取方法依赖大量像素级标注数据，标注成本高。本文旨在通过使用易于获取的涂鸦（如中心线）替代密集标注，降低数据需求。
AI.method: 设计道路标签传播算法，结合道路网络缓冲区特性与超像素颜色空间信息生成初始掩码，并训练包含语义分割分支和边界检测分支的双分支编码器-解码器网络。
AI.result: 在三个遥感数据集上，ScRoadExtractor的IoU指标较经典涂鸦分割方法提升20%，优于现有最佳弱监督方法至少4%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过标签传播与双分支网络设计，有效提升了弱监督条件下道路提取的准确性，验证了涂鸦标注的可行性。

ai_content_json.method: 设计道路标签传播算法，结合道路网络缓冲区特性与超像素颜色空间信息生成初始掩码，并训练包含语义分割分支和边界检测分支的双分支编码器-解码器网络。
ai_content_json.result: 在三个遥感数据集上，ScRoadExtractor的IoU指标较经典涂鸦分割方法提升20%，优于现有最佳弱监督方法至少4%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过标签传播与双分支网络设计，有效提升了弱监督条件下道路提取的准确性，验证了涂鸦标注的可行性。

motivation: 现有道路提取方法依赖大量像素级标注数据，标注成本高。本文旨在通过使用易于获取的涂鸦（如中心线）替代密集标注，降低数据需求。
method: 设计道路标签传播算法，结合道路网络缓冲区特性与超像素颜色空间信息生成初始掩码，并训练包含语义分割分支和边界检测分支的双分支编码器-解码器网络。
result: 在三个遥感数据集上，ScRoadExtractor的IoU指标较经典涂鸦分割方法提升20%，优于现有最佳弱监督方法至少4%。
conclusion: 该方法通过标签传播与双分支网络设计，有效提升了弱监督条件下道路提取的准确性，验证了涂鸦标注的可行性。
search_text: Scribble-based Weakly Supervised Deep Learning for Road Surface Extraction from Remote Sensing Images 基于 Scribble 的弱监督深度学习用于遥感图像路面提取 Road surface extraction from remote sensing images using deep learning methods has achieved good performance, while most of the existing methods are based on fully supervised learning, which requires a large amount of training data with laborious per-pixel annotation. In this paper, we propose a scribble-based weakly supervised road surface extraction method named ScRoadExtractor, which learns from easily accessible scribbles such as centerlines instead of densely annotated road surface ground-truths. To propagate semantic information from sparse scribbles to unlabeled pixels, we introduce a road label propagation algorithm which considers both the buffer-based properties of road networks and the color and spatial information of super-pixels. The proposal masks generated from the road label propagation algorithm are utilized to train a dual-branch encoder-decoder network we designed, which consists of a semantic segmentation branch and an auxiliary boundary detection branch. We perform experiments on three diverse road datasets that are comprised of highresolution remote sensing satellite and aerial images across the world. The results demonstrate that ScRoadExtractor exceed the classic scribble-supervised segmentation method by 20% for the intersection over union (IoU) indicator and outperform the state-of-the-art scribble-based weakly supervised methods at least 4%. 使用深度学习方法从遥感图像中提取路面已经取得了良好的性能，而现有方法大多数基于完全监督学习，需要大量的训练数据和费力的逐像素标注。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 ScRoadExtractor 的基于涂鸦的弱监督路面提取方法，该方法从易于访问的涂鸦（例如中心线）而不是密集注释的路面地面实况中学习。为了将语义信息从稀疏的涂鸦传播到未标记的像素，我们引入了一种道路标签传播算法，该算法考虑了道路网络基于缓冲区的属性以及超像素的颜色和空间信息。利用道路标签传播算法生成的建议掩码来训练我们设计的双分支编码器-解码器网络，该网络由语义分割分支和辅助边界检测分支组成。我们对三个不同的道路数据集进行了实验，这些数据集由世界各地的高分辨率遥感卫星和航空图像组成。结果表明，ScRoadExtractor 的交并集 (IoU) 指标超过了经典的涂鸦监督分割方法 20%，并且优于最先进的基于涂鸦的弱监督方法至少 4%。 本文提出一种基于涂鸦的弱监督深度学习方法ScRoadExtractor，用于从遥感图像中提取道路表面。 Yao Wei,Shunping Ji cs.CV

title: Two-stage Textual Knowledge Distillation for End-to-End Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于端到端口语理解的两阶段文本知识蒸馏
abstract: End-to-end approaches open a new way for more accurate and efficient spoken language understanding (SLU) systems by alleviating the drawbacks of traditional pipeline systems. Previous works exploit textual information for an SLU model via pre-training with automatic speech recognition or fine-tuning with knowledge distillation. To utilize textual information more effectively, this work proposes a two-stage textual knowledge distillation method that matches utterance-level representations and predicted logits of two modalities during pre-training and fine-tuning, sequentially. We use vq-wav2vec BERT as a speech encoder because it captures general and rich features. Furthermore, we improve the performance, especially in a low-resource scenario, with data augmentation methods by randomly masking spans of discrete audio tokens and contextualized hidden representations. Consequently, we push the state-of-the-art on the Fluent Speech Commands, achieving 99.7% test accuracy in the full dataset setting and 99.5% in the 10% subset setting. Throughout the ablation studies, we empirically verify that all used methods are crucial to the final performance, providing the best practice for spoken language understanding. Code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/textual-kd-slu.
summary: End-to-end approaches open a new way for more accurate and efficient spoken language understanding (SLU) systems by alleviating the drawbacks of traditional pipeline systems. Previous works exploit textual information for an SLU model via pre-training with automatic speech recognition or fine-tuning with knowledge distillation. To utilize textual information more effectively, this work proposes a two-stage textual knowledge distillation method that matches utterance-level representations and predicted logits of two modalities during pre-training and fine-tuning, sequentially. We use vq-wav2vec BERT as a speech encoder because it captures general and rich features. Furthermore, we improve the performance, especially in a low-resource scenario, with data augmentation methods by randomly masking spans of discrete audio tokens and contextualized hidden representations. Consequently, we push the state-of-the-art on the Fluent Speech Commands, achieving 99.7% test accuracy in the full dataset setting and 99.5% in the 10% subset setting. Throughout the ablation studies, we empirically verify that all used methods are crucial to the final performance, providing the best practice for spoken language understanding. Code is available at https://github.com/clovaai/textual-kd-slu.
abstract_zh: 端到端方法通过减轻传统管道系统的缺点，为更准确、更高效的口语理解 (SLU) 系统开辟了一条新途径。之前的工作通过自动语音识别的预训练或知识蒸馏的微调来利用 SLU 模型的文本信息。为了更有效地利用文本信息，这项工作提出了一种两阶段文本知识蒸馏方法，该方法在预训练和微调过程中依次匹配话语级表示和两种模态的预测逻辑。我们使用 vq-wav2vec BERT 作为语音编码器，因为它捕获通用且丰富的特征。此外，我们通过随机屏蔽离散音频标记和上下文隐藏表示的数据增强方法来提高性能，特别是在资源匮乏的情况下。因此，我们在 Fluent Speech Commands 上采用了最先进的技术，在完整数据集设置中实现了 99.7% 的测试准确率，在 10% 子集设置中实现了 99.5% 的测试准确率。在整个消融研究中，我们凭经验验证所有使用的方法对最终性能都至关重要，为口语理解提供了最佳实践。代码可在 https://github.com/clovaai/textual-kd-slu 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段文本知识蒸馏方法，用于提升端到端语音语言理解（SLU）系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统语音语言理解系统存在流程复杂、效率低的问题，而现有方法在利用文本信息时未能充分挖掘其潜力，尤其在低资源场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段文本知识蒸馏：预训练阶段匹配语音与文本的语句级表征，微调阶段对齐预测logits；使用vq-wav2vec BERT作为语音编码器，并通过随机掩码离散音频token和上下文隐藏状态进行数据增强。
AI.result: 在Fluent Speech Commands数据集上达到99.7%（全数据集）和99.5%（10%子集）的测试准确率，消融实验证实所有方法对最终性能均关键。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段文本知识蒸馏结合数据增强显著提升SLU性能，尤其在低资源场景下效果显著，为语音语言理解提供了最佳实践方案。

title: LazyBatching: An SLA-aware Batching System for Cloud Machine Learning Inference
title_zh: LazyBatching：用于云机器学习推理的 SLA 感知批处理系统
abstract: In cloud ML inference systems, batching is an essential technique to increase throughput which helps optimize total-cost-of-ownership. Prior graph batching combines the individual DNN graphs into a single one, allowing multiple inputs to be concurrently executed in parallel. We observe that the coarse-grained graph batching becomes suboptimal in effectively handling the dynamic inference request traffic, leaving significant performance left on the table. This paper proposes LazyBatching, an SLA-aware batching system that considers both scheduling and batching in the granularity of individual graph nodes, rather than the entire graph for flexible batching. We show that LazyBatching can intelligently determine the set of nodes that can be efficiently batched together, achieving an average 15x, 1.5x, and 5.5x improvement than graph batching in terms of average response time, throughput, and SLA satisfaction, respectively.
summary: In cloud ML inference systems, batching is an essential technique to increase throughput which helps optimize total-cost-of-ownership. Prior graph batching combines the individual DNN graphs into a single one, allowing multiple inputs to be concurrently executed in parallel. We observe that the coarse-grained graph batching becomes suboptimal in effectively handling the dynamic inference request traffic, leaving significant performance left on the table. This paper proposes LazyBatching, an SLA-aware batching system that considers both scheduling and batching in the granularity of individual graph nodes, rather than the entire graph for flexible batching. We show that LazyBatching can intelligently determine the set of nodes that can be efficiently batched together, achieving an average 15x, 1.5x, and 5.5x improvement than graph batching in terms of average response time, throughput, and SLA satisfaction, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在云机器学习推理系统中，批处理是提高吞吐量的一项重要技术，有助于优化总拥有成本。先前的图批处理将各个 DNN 图合并为一个图，从而允许同时并行执行多个输入。我们观察到，粗粒度图批处理在有效处理动态推理请求流量方面变得次优，从而导致显着的性能下降。本文提出了 LazyBatching，一种 SLA 感知批处理系统，它以单个图节点的粒度（而不是整个图）考虑调度和批处理，以实现灵活的批处理。我们表明，LazyBatching 可以智能地确定可以高效批处理在一起的节点集，在平均响应时间、吞吐量和 SLA 满意度方面分别比图批处理平均提高 15 倍、1.5 倍和 5.5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LazyBatching的SLA感知批处理系统，用于优化云机器学习推理中的吞吐量和响应时间。
AI.motivation: 传统的图批处理在处理动态的推理请求流量时表现不佳，无法充分利用性能，因此需要一种更灵活的批处理方法。
AI.method: LazyBatching在图节点的粒度上考虑调度和批处理，而不是整个图，从而智能地确定可以高效批处理的节点集合。
AI.result: LazyBatching在平均响应时间、吞吐量和SLA满意度方面分别比图批处理提高了15倍、1.5倍和5.5倍。
AI.conclusion: LazyBatching通过细粒度的节点批处理和调度，有效提升了云机器学习推理的性能和SLA满意度。

We observe that the coarse-grained graph batching becomes suboptimal in effectively handling the dynamic inference request traffic, leaving significant performance left on the table. This paper proposes LazyBatching, an SLA-aware batching system that considers both scheduling and batching in the granularity of individual graph nodes, rather than the entire graph for flexible batching. We show that LazyBatching can intelligently determine the set of nodes that can be efficiently batched together, achieving an average 15x, 1.5x, and 5.5x improvement than graph batching in terms of average response time, throughput, and SLA satisfaction, respectively. 在云机器学习推理系统中，批处理是提高吞吐量的一项重要技术，有助于优化总拥有成本。先前的图批处理将各个 DNN 图合并为一个图，从而允许同时并行执行多个输入。我们观察到，粗粒度图批处理在有效处理动态推理请求流量方面变得次优，从而导致显着的性能下降。本文提出了 LazyBatching，一种 SLA 感知批处理系统，它以单个图节点的粒度（而不是整个图）考虑调度和批处理，以实现灵活的批处理。我们表明，LazyBatching 可以智能地确定可以高效批处理在一起的节点集，在平均响应时间、吞吐量和 SLA 满意度方面分别比图批处理平均提高 15 倍、1.5 倍和 5.5 倍。 本文提出了一种名为LazyBatching的SLA感知批处理系统，用于优化云机器学习推理中的吞吐量和响应时间。 Yujeong Choi,Yunseong Kim,Minsoo Rhu cs.DC,cs.AR,cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Tensor Casting: Co-Designing Algorithm-Architecture for Personalized Recommendation Training
title_zh: Tensor Casting：共同设计个性化推荐训练的算法架构
abstract: Personalized recommendations are one of the most widely deployed machine learning (ML) workload serviced from cloud datacenters. As such, architectural solutions for high-performance recommendation inference have recently been the target of several prior literatures. Unfortunately, little have been explored and understood regarding the training side of this emerging ML workload. In this paper, we first perform a detailed workload characterization study on training recommendations, root-causing sparse embedding layer training as one of the most significant performance bottlenecks. We then propose our algorithm-architecture co-design called Tensor Casting, which enables the development of a generic accelerator architecture for tensor gather-scatter that encompasses all the key primitives of training embedding layers. When prototyped on a real CPU-GPU system, Tensor Casting provides 1.9-21x improvements in training throughput compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Personalized recommendations are one of the most widely deployed machine learning (ML) workload serviced from cloud datacenters. As such, architectural solutions for high-performance recommendation inference have recently been the target of several prior literatures. Unfortunately, little have been explored and understood regarding the training side of this emerging ML workload. In this paper, we first perform a detailed workload characterization study on training recommendations, root-causing sparse embedding layer training as one of the most significant performance bottlenecks. We then propose our algorithm-architecture co-design called Tensor Casting, which enables the development of a generic accelerator architecture for tensor gather-scatter that encompasses all the key primitives of training embedding layers. When prototyped on a real CPU-GPU system, Tensor Casting provides 1.9-21x improvements in training throughput compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 个性化推荐是云数据中心提供的最广泛部署的机器学习 (ML) 工作负载之一。因此，高性能推荐推理的架构解决方案最近已成为一些先前文献的目标。不幸的是，对于这种新兴的机器学习工作负载的训练方面，人们几乎没有进行过探索和理解。在本文中，我们首先对训练建议进行详细的工作负载表征研究，从根源上导致稀疏嵌入层训练成为最重要的性能瓶颈之一。然后，我们提出了称为 Tensor Casting 的算法架构协同设计，它能够开发用于张量聚集-分散的通用加速器架构，其中包含训练嵌入层的所有关键原语。当在真实的 CPU-GPU 系统上进行原型设计时，与最先进的方法相比，Tensor Casting 的训练吞吐量提高了 1.9-21 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tensor Casting方法，通过算法与架构协同设计优化个性化推荐系统的训练阶段，解决稀疏嵌入层训练效率低下的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究聚焦于推荐系统的高效推理架构，但训练阶段特别是稀疏嵌入层的性能瓶颈缺乏系统性研究，制约了整体训练效率。
AI.method: 通过工作负载分析定位稀疏嵌入层为关键瓶颈，设计Tensor Casting算法-架构协同方案，构建支持张量gather-scatter操作的通用加速器架构。
AI.result: 在真实CPU-GPU系统实现中，相比现有方法训练吞吐量提升1.9-21倍，显著优化推荐模型训练性能。
AI.conclusion: Tensor Casting验证了算法架构协同设计对解决推荐系统训练瓶颈的有效性，为后续研究提供了可扩展的加速框架。

authors_text: Yin Cao,Turab Iqbal,Qiuqiang Kong,Fengyan An,Wenwu Wang,Mark D. Plumbley
title: An Improved Event-Independent Network for Polyphonic Sound Event Localization and Detection
title_zh: 用于和弦声音事件定位和检测的改进的事件无关网络
comment: 5 pages, 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing
comments: 5 pages, 2021 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing
abstract: Polyphonic sound event localization and detection (SELD), which jointly performs sound event detection (SED) and direction-of-arrival (DoA) estimation, detects the type and occurrence time of sound events as well as their corresponding DoA angles simultaneously. We study the SELD task from a multi-task learning perspective. Two open problems are addressed in this paper. Firstly, to detect overlapping sound events of the same type but with different DoAs, we propose to use a trackwise output format and solve the accompanying track permutation problem with permutation-invariant training. Multi-head self-attention is further used to separate tracks. Secondly, a previous finding is that, by using hard parameter-sharing, SELD suffers from a performance loss compared with learning the subtasks separately. This is solved by a soft parameter-sharing scheme. We term the proposed method as Event Independent Network V2 (EINV2), which is an improved version of our previously-proposed method and an end-to-end network for SELD. We show that our proposed EINV2 for joint SED and DoA estimation outperforms previous methods by a large margin, and has comparable performance to state-of-the-art ensemble models.
summary: Polyphonic sound event localization and detection (SELD), which jointly performs sound event detection (SED) and direction-of-arrival (DoA) estimation, detects the type and occurrence time of sound events as well as their corresponding DoA angles simultaneously. We study the SELD task from a multi-task learning perspective. Two open problems are addressed in this paper. Firstly, to detect overlapping sound events of the same type but with different DoAs, we propose to use a trackwise output format and solve the accompanying track permutation problem with permutation-invariant training. Multi-head self-attention is further used to separate tracks. Secondly, a previous finding is that, by using hard parameter-sharing, SELD suffers from a performance loss compared with learning the subtasks separately. This is solved by a soft parameter-sharing scheme. We term the proposed method as Event Independent Network V2 (EINV2), which is an improved version of our previously-proposed method and an end-to-end network for SELD. We show that our proposed EINV2 for joint SED and DoA estimation outperforms previous methods by a large margin, and has comparable performance to state-of-the-art ensemble models.
abstract_zh: 复调声音事件定位和检测（SELD）联合执行声音事件检测（SED）和到达方向（DoA）估计，同时检测声音事件的类型和发生时间以及相应的DoA角度。我们从多任务学习的角度研究 SELD 任务。本文解决了两个悬而未决的问题。首先，为了检测相同类型但具有不同 DoA 的重叠声音事件，我们建议使用轨道输出格式并通过排列不变训练解决伴随的轨道排列问题。多头自注意力进一步用于分离轨道。其次，之前的发现是，通过使用硬参数共享，SELD 与单独学习子任务相比会遭受性能损失。这是通过软参数共享方案解决的。我们将所提出的方法称为事件独立网络 V2 (EINV2)，它是我们之前提出的方法的改进版本，也是 SELD 的端到端网络。我们表明，我们提出的用于联合 SED 和 DoA 估计的 EINV2 大大优于以前的方法，并且具有与最先进的集成模型相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的事件无关网络（EINV2），用于解决多声源声音事件定位与检测（SELD）任务中的重叠事件检测和参数共享问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SELD方法在处理相同类型但不同方向的重叠声事件时存在困难，且硬参数共享会导致性能下降，需改进多任务学习框架。
AI.method: 采用trackwise输出格式与置换不变训练解决重叠事件排列问题，结合多头自注意力分离声源；通过软参数共享替代硬参数共享以提升性能，构建端到端EINV2网络。
AI.result: EINV2在联合声事件检测与方向估计任务中显著优于现有方法，性能接近最先进的集成模型。
AI.conclusion: EINV2有效解决了SELD中的关键问题，在准确率和鲁棒性上达到先进水平，为多任务声学场景理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Shion Maeda,Nicolas Chauvet,Hayato Saigo,Hirokazu Hori,Guillaume Bachelier,Serge Huant,Makoto Naruse
title: Entangled and correlated photon mixed strategy for social decision making
title_zh: 用于社会决策的纠缠和相关​​光子混合策略
abstract: Collective decision making is important for maximizing total benefits while preserving equality among individuals in the competitive multi-armed bandit (CMAB) problem, wherein multiple players try to gain higher rewards from multiple slot machines. The CMAB problem represents an essential aspect of applications such as resource management in social infrastructure. In a previous study, we theoretically and experimentally demonstrated that entangled photons can physically resolve the difficulty of the CMAB problem. This decision-making strategy completely avoids decision conflicts while ensuring equality. However, decision conflicts can sometimes be beneficial if they yield greater rewards than non-conflicting decisions, indicating that greedy actions may provide positive effects depending on the given environment. In this study, we demonstrate a mixed strategy of entangled- and correlated-photon-based decision-making so that total rewards can be enhanced when compared to the entangled-photon-only decision strategy. We show that an optimal mixture of entangled- and correlated-photon-based strategies exists depending on the dynamics of the reward environment as well as the difficulty of the given problem. This study paves the way for utilizing both quantum and classical aspects of photons in a mixed manner for decision making and provides yet another example of the supremacy of mixed strategies known in game theory, especially in evolutionary game theory.

We show that an optimal mixture of entangled- and correlated-photon-based strategies exists depending on the dynamics of the reward environment as well as the difficulty of the given problem. This study paves the way for utilizing both quantum and classical aspects of photons in a mixed manner for decision making and provides yet another example of the supremacy of mixed strategies known in game theory, especially in evolutionary game theory.
abstract_zh: 在竞争性多臂老虎机 (CMAB) 问题中，集体决策对于最大化总利益同时保持个体之间的平等非常重要，其中多个玩家试图从多个老虎机中获得更高的奖励。 CMAB 问题代表了社会基础设施中的资源管理等应用程序的一个重要方面。在之前的研究中，我们从理论上和实验上证明了纠缠光子可以物理上解决CMAB问题的难题。这种决策策略在保证平等的同时完全避免了决策冲突。然而，如果决策冲突比非冲突决策产生更大的回报，那么有时可能是有益的，这表明贪婪的行为可能会根据给定的环境提供积极的影响。在本研究中，我们展示了基于纠缠和相关​​光子的决策的混合策略，以便与仅纠缠光子的决策策略相比，可以提高总奖励。我们表明，基于纠缠和相关​​光子的策略的最佳组合的存在取决于奖励环境的动态以及给定问题的难度。这项研究为以混合方式利用光子的量子和经典方面进行决策铺平了道路，并提供了博弈论中已知的混合策略至上性的另一个例子，特别是在进化博弈论中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合纠缠光子与经典相关光子的混合策略，用于优化社会决策中的集体决策问题，特别是在竞争性多臂老虎机（CMAB）场景中。
AI.motivation: 尽管纠缠光子能解决CMAB问题的决策冲突并保障公平性，但某些情况下冲突决策可能带来更高收益。需探索混合策略以兼顾收益与公平性。
AI.method: 设计混合决策框架，结合量子纠缠光子（避免冲突）与经典相关光子（允许冲突）策略，根据奖励动态和问题难度调整两者混合比例。
AI.result: 实验表明混合策略相比纯纠缠光子策略能提升总收益，且存在最优混合比例，验证了博弈论中混合策略的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了量子与经典方法混合应用的可行性，为社会决策问题提供了新范式，并支持进化博弈论中混合策略的理论优势。

search_text: Entangled and correlated photon mixed strategy for social decision making 用于社会决策的纠缠和相关​​光子混合策略 Collective decision making is important for maximizing total benefits while preserving equality among individuals in the competitive multi-armed bandit (CMAB) problem, wherein multiple players try to gain higher rewards from multiple slot machines. The CMAB problem represents an essential aspect of applications such as resource management in social infrastructure. In a previous study, we theoretically and experimentally demonstrated that entangled photons can physically resolve the difficulty of the CMAB problem. This decision-making strategy completely avoids decision conflicts while ensuring equality. However, decision conflicts can sometimes be beneficial if they yield greater rewards than non-conflicting decisions, indicating that greedy actions may provide positive effects depending on the given environment. In this study, we demonstrate a mixed strategy of entangled- and correlated-photon-based decision-making so that total rewards can be enhanced when compared to the entangled-photon-only decision strategy. We show that an optimal mixture of entangled- and correlated-photon-based strategies exists depending on the dynamics of the reward environment as well as the difficulty of the given problem. This study paves the way for utilizing both quantum and classical aspects of photons in a mixed manner for decision making and provides yet another example of the supremacy of mixed strategies known in game theory, especially in evolutionary game theory. 在竞争性多臂老虎机 (CMAB) 问题中，集体决策对于最大化总利益同时保持个体之间的平等非常重要，其中多个玩家试图从多个老虎机中获得更高的奖励。 CMAB 问题代表了社会基础设施中的资源管理等应用程序的一个重要方面。在之前的研究中，我们从理论上和实验上证明了纠缠光子可以物理上解决CMAB问题的难题。这种决策策略在保证平等的同时完全避免了决策冲突。然而，如果决策冲突比非冲突决策产生更大的回报，那么有时可能是有益的，这表明贪婪的行为可能会根据给定的环境提供积极的影响。在本研究中，我们展示了基于纠缠和相关​​光子的决策的混合策略，以便与仅纠缠光子的决策策略相比，可以提高总奖励。我们表明，基于纠缠和相关​​光子的策略的最佳组合的存在取决于奖励环境的动态以及给定问题的难度。这项研究为以混合方式利用光子的量子和经典方面进行决策铺平了道路，并提供了博弈论中已知的混合策略至上性的另一个例子，特别是在进化博弈论中。 本文提出一种结合纠缠光子与经典相关光子的混合策略，用于优化社会决策中的集体决策问题，特别是在竞争性多臂老虎机（CMAB）场景中。 Shion Maeda,Nicolas Chauvet,Hayato Saigo,Hirokazu Hori,Guillaume Bachelier,Serge Huant,Makoto Naruse quant-ph,cs.ET,physics.optics

authors_text: Mingyang Qian,Yi Fu,Xiao Tan,Yingying Li,Jinqing Qi,Huchuan Lu,Shilei Wen,Errui Ding
title: Coherent Loss: A Generic Framework for Stable Video Segmentation
title_zh: 相干损失：稳定视频分割的通用框架
abstract: Video segmentation approaches are of great importance for numerous vision tasks especially in video manipulation for entertainment. Due to the challenges associated with acquiring high-quality per-frame segmentation annotations and large video datasets with different environments at scale, learning approaches shows overall higher accuracy on test dataset but lack strict temporal constraints to self-correct jittering artifacts in most practical applications. We investigate how this jittering artifact degrades the visual quality of video segmentation results and proposed a metric of temporal stability to numerically evaluate it. In particular, we propose a Coherent Loss with a generic framework to enhance the performance of a neural network against jittering artifacts, which combines with high accuracy and high consistency. Equipped with our method, existing video object/semantic segmentation approaches achieve a significant improvement in term of more satisfactory visual quality on video human dataset, which we provide for further research in this field, and also on DAVIS and Cityscape.
summary: Video segmentation approaches are of great importance for numerous vision tasks especially in video manipulation for entertainment. Due to the challenges associated with acquiring high-quality per-frame segmentation annotations and large video datasets with different environments at scale, learning approaches shows overall higher accuracy on test dataset but lack strict temporal constraints to self-correct jittering artifacts in most practical applications. We investigate how this jittering artifact degrades the visual quality of video segmentation results and proposed a metric of temporal stability to numerically evaluate it. In particular, we propose a Coherent Loss with a generic framework to enhance the performance of a neural network against jittering artifacts, which combines with high accuracy and high consistency. Equipped with our method, existing video object/semantic segmentation approaches achieve a significant improvement in term of more satisfactory visual quality on video human dataset, which we provide for further research in this field, and also on DAVIS and Cityscape.
abstract_zh: 视频分割方法对于许多视觉任务非常重要，特别是在娱乐视频操作中。由于获取高质量的每帧分割注释和不同环境下的大型视频数据集所面临的挑战，学习方法在测试数据集上显示出整体更高的准确性，但在大多数实际应用中缺乏严格的时间约束来自我校正抖动伪影。我们研究了这种抖动伪影如何降低视频分割结果的视觉质量，并提出了一种时间稳定性指标来对其进行数值评估。特别是，我们提出了具有通用框架的相干损失，以增强神经网络对抗抖动伪影的性能，它结合了高精度和高一致性。配备我们的方法，现有的视频对象/语义分割方法在视频人体数据集上获得更令人满意的视觉质量方面取得了显着的改进，我们为该领域以及 DAVIS 和 Cityscape 的进一步研究提供了支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Coherent Loss的通用框架，用于提升视频分割的稳定性，减少抖动伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割方法在测试数据集上表现准确，但缺乏严格的时序约束，导致实际应用中出现抖动伪影，影响视觉质量。
AI.method: 通过引入时间稳定性指标，设计Coherent Loss损失函数，结合高精度与高一致性，增强神经网络对抖动伪影的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在视频人体数据集、DAVIS和Cityscape数据集上，现有分割方法的视觉质量显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Coherent Loss框架有效平衡了分割精度与时序一致性，为稳定视频分割提供了通用解决方案。
