title: How to Make Deep RL Work in Practice
title_zh: 如何让深度强化学习在实践中发挥作用
comment: Published as a workshop paper at the Deep RL workshop, NeurIPS 2020
comments: Published as a workshop paper at the Deep RL workshop, NeurIPS 2020
abstract: In recent years, challenging control problems became solvable with deep reinforcement learning (RL). To be able to use RL for large-scale real-world applications, a certain degree of reliability in their performance is necessary. Reported results of state-of-the-art algorithms are often difficult to reproduce. One reason for this is that certain implementation details influence the performance significantly. Commonly, these details are not highlighted as important techniques to achieve state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, techniques from supervised learning are often used by default but influence the algorithms in a reinforcement learning setting in different and not well-understood ways. In this paper, we investigate the influence of certain initialization, input normalization, and adaptive learning techniques on the performance of state-of-the-art RL algorithms. We make suggestions which of those techniques to use by default and highlight areas that could benefit from a solution specifically tailored to RL.
summary: In recent years, challenging control problems became solvable with deep reinforcement learning (RL). To be able to use RL for large-scale real-world applications, a certain degree of reliability in their performance is necessary. Reported results of state-of-the-art algorithms are often difficult to reproduce. One reason for this is that certain implementation details influence the performance significantly. Commonly, these details are not highlighted as important techniques to achieve state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, techniques from supervised learning are often used by default but influence the algorithms in a reinforcement learning setting in different and not well-understood ways. In this paper, we investigate the influence of certain initialization, input normalization, and adaptive learning techniques on the performance of state-of-the-art RL algorithms. We make suggestions which of those techniques to use by default and highlight areas that could benefit from a solution specifically tailored to RL.
abstract_zh: 近年来，具有挑战性的控制问题可以通过深度强化学习（RL）来解决。为了能够将强化学习用于大规模的现实应用，其性能必须具有一定程度的可靠性。最先进算法的报告结果通常难以重现。原因之一是某些实现细节会显着影响性能。通常，这些细节并没有被强调为实现最先进性能的重要技术。此外，监督学习的技术通常是默认使用的，但会以不同且不被充分理解的方式影响强化学习设置中的算法。在本文中，我们研究了某些初始化、输入归一化和自适应学习技术对最先进的 RL 算法性能的影响。我们建议默认使用哪些技术，并突出显示可以从专门为 RL 定制的解决方案中受益的领域。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何在实际中有效应用深度强化学习，解决其性能不稳定和结果不可复现的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前RL算法在实际应用中存在可靠性问题，导致结果难以复现，而一些实现细节和监督学习技术的影响未被充分理解。
AI.method: 通过实验分析初始化、输入归一化和自适应学习技术对RL算法性能的影响，并提出默认使用的技术和需要进一步研究的领域。
AI.result: 发现这些技术对性能有显著影响，建议默认使用部分技术，并指出需要针对RL定制的领域。
AI.conclusion: 优化这些技术可提高RL的可靠性，未来需进一步研究特定于RL的解决方案。

tldr: 本文探讨了如何在实际中有效应用深度强化学习，解决其性能不稳定和结果不可复现的问题。
motivation: 当前RL算法在实际应用中存在可靠性问题，导致结果难以复现，而一些实现细节和监督学习技术的影响未被充分理解。
method: 通过实验分析初始化、输入归一化和自适应学习技术对RL算法性能的影响，并提出默认使用的技术和需要进一步研究的领域。
result: 发现这些技术对性能有显著影响，建议默认使用部分技术，并指出需要针对RL定制的领域。
conclusion: 优化这些技术可提高RL的可靠性，未来需进一步研究特定于RL的解决方案。
search_text: How to Make Deep RL Work in Practice 如何让深度强化学习在实践中发挥作用 In recent years, challenging control problems became solvable with deep reinforcement learning (RL). To be able to use RL for large-scale real-world applications, a certain degree of reliability in their performance is necessary. Reported results of state-of-the-art algorithms are often difficult to reproduce. One reason for this is that certain implementation details influence the performance significantly. Commonly, these details are not highlighted as important techniques to achieve state-of-the-art performance. Additionally, techniques from supervised learning are often used by default but influence the algorithms in a reinforcement learning setting in different and not well-understood ways. In this paper, we investigate the influence of certain initialization, input normalization, and adaptive learning techniques on the performance of state-of-the-art RL algorithms. We make suggestions which of those techniques to use by default and highlight areas that could benefit from a solution specifically tailored to RL. 近年来，具有挑战性的控制问题可以通过深度强化学习（RL）来解决。为了能够将强化学习用于大规模的现实应用，其性能必须具有一定程度的可靠性。最先进算法的报告结果通常难以重现。原因之一是某些实现细节会显着影响性能。通常，这些细节并没有被强调为实现最先进性能的重要技术。此外，监督学习的技术通常是默认使用的，但会以不同且不被充分理解的方式影响强化学习设置中的算法。在本文中，我们研究了某些初始化、输入归一化和自适应学习技术对最先进的 RL 算法性能的影响。我们建议默认使用哪些技术，并突出显示可以从专门为 RL 定制的解决方案中受益的领域。 本文探讨了如何在实际中有效应用深度强化学习，解决其性能不稳定和结果不可复现的问题。 Nirnai Rao,Elie Aljalbout,Axel Sauer,Sami Haddadin cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Context Aware 3D UNet for Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 用于脑肿瘤分割的上下文感知 3D UNet
comment: Accepted for MICCAI 2020 Brain Lesions (BrainLes) Workshop
comments: Accepted for MICCAI 2020 Brain Lesions (BrainLes) Workshop
abstract: Deep convolutional neural network (CNN) achieves remarkable performance for medical image analysis. UNet is the primary source in the performance of 3D CNN architectures for medical imaging tasks, including brain tumor segmentation. The skip connection in the UNet architecture concatenates features from both encoder and decoder paths to extract multi-contextual information from image data. The multi-scaled features play an essential role in brain tumor segmentation. However, the limited use of features can degrade the performance of the UNet approach for segmentation. In this paper, we propose a modified UNet architecture for brain tumor segmentation. In the proposed architecture, we used densely connected blocks in both encoder and decoder paths to extract multi-contextual information from the concept of feature reusability. In addition, residual-inception blocks (RIB) are used to extract the local and global information by merging features of different kernel sizes. We validate the proposed architecture on the multi-modal brain tumor segmentation challenge (BRATS) 2020 testing dataset. The dice (DSC) scores of the whole tumor (WT), tumor core (TC), and enhancing tumor (ET) are 89.12%, 84.74%, and 79.12%, respectively.

In this paper, we propose a modified UNet architecture for brain tumor segmentation. In the proposed architecture, we used densely connected blocks in both encoder and decoder paths to extract multi-contextual information from the concept of feature reusability. In addition, residual-inception blocks (RIB) are used to extract the local and global information by merging features of different kernel sizes. abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络（CNN）在医学图像分析方面取得了显着的性能。 UNet 是用于医学成像任务（包括脑肿瘤分割）的 3D CNN 架构性能的主要来源。 UNet 架构中的跳跃连接连接来自编码器和解码器路径的特征，以从图像数据中提取多上下文信息。多尺度特征在脑肿瘤分割中发挥着重要作用。然而，特征的有限使用可能会降低 UNet 分割方法的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于脑肿瘤分割的改进的 UNet 架构。在所提出的架构中，我们在编码器和解码器路径中使用密集连接的块，从特征可重用性的概念中提取多上下文信息。此外，残差初始块（RIB）用于通过合并不同内核大小的特征来提取局部和全局信息。我们在多模式脑肿瘤分割挑战 (BRATS) 2020 测试数据集上验证了所提出的架构。全肿瘤（WT）、肿瘤核心（TC）和增强肿瘤（ET）的骰子（DSC）评分分别为89.12%、84.74%和79.12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的3D UNet架构，用于提高脑肿瘤分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统UNet在特征利用上存在局限，导致分割性能下降，需通过增强多尺度特征提取和上下文信息来改进。
AI.method: 在编码器和解码器路径中引入密集连接块，并采用残差-膨胀块融合不同尺度特征以捕捉局部与全局信息。
AI.result: 在BRATS 2020数据集上，全肿瘤（WT）、肿瘤核心（TC）和增强肿瘤（ET）的Dice系数分别为89.12%、84.74%和79.12%。
AI.conclusion: 所提架构通过特征复用和多尺度上下文建模有效提升了脑肿瘤分割精度，验证了方法的有效性。

title: Exploiting Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks with Latent Worker/Task Correlation Information for Label Aggregation in Crowdsourcing
title_zh: 利用具有潜在工作人员/任务相关信息的异构图神经网络进行众包中的标签聚合
abstract: Crowdsourcing has attracted much attention for its convenience to collect labels from non-expert workers instead of experts. However, due to the high level of noise from the non-experts, an aggregation model that learns the true label by incorporating the source credibility is required. In this paper, we propose a novel framework based on graph neural networks for aggregating crowd labels. We construct a heterogeneous graph between workers and tasks and derive a new graph neural network to learn the representations of nodes and the true labels. Besides, we exploit the unknown latent interaction between the same type of nodes (workers or tasks) by adding a homogeneous attention layer in the graph neural networks. Experimental results on 13 real-world datasets show superior performance over state-of-the-art models.
summary: Crowdsourcing has attracted much attention for its convenience to collect labels from non-expert workers instead of experts. However, due to the high level of noise from the non-experts, an aggregation model that learns the true label by incorporating the source credibility is required. In this paper, we propose a novel framework based on graph neural networks for aggregating crowd labels. We construct a heterogeneous graph between workers and tasks and derive a new graph neural network to learn the representations of nodes and the true labels. Besides, we exploit the unknown latent interaction between the same type of nodes (workers or tasks) by adding a homogeneous attention layer in the graph neural networks. Experimental results on 13 real-world datasets show superior performance over state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 众包因其方便地从非专家而非专家那里收集标签而备受关注。然而，由于非专家的噪音水平很高，因此需要一个通过合并源可信度来学习真实标签的聚合模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图神经网络的新颖框架，用于聚合人群标签。我们在工作人员和任务之间构建异构图，并派生一个新的图神经网络来学习节点的表示和真实标签。此外，我们通过在图神经网络中添加同质注意力层来利用相同类型节点（工作节点或任务）之间的未知潜在交互。 13 个真实世界数据集的实验结果显示，其性能优于最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于异构图神经网络的框架，通过整合工人与任务的潜在关联信息，解决众包中的标签聚合问题。
AI.motivation: 众包标签因非专家工人导致噪声高，需有效模型整合来源可信度以学习真实标签。
AI.method: 构建工人与任务的异构图，设计图神经网络学习节点表示，并引入同质注意力层挖掘同类节点潜在关联。
AI.result: 在13个真实数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过异构图神经网络与潜在关联建模，有效提升众包标签聚合的准确性。

title: Fast and Accurate Light Field Saliency Detection through Deep Encoding
title_zh: 通过深度编码快速准确的光场显着性检测
abstract: Light field saliency detection -- important due to utility in many vision tasks -- still lacks speed and can improve in accuracy. Due to the formulation of the saliency detection problem in light fields as a segmentation task or a memorizing task, existing approaches consume unnecessarily large amounts of computational resources for training, and have longer execution times for testing. We solve this by aggressively reducing the large light field images to a much smaller three-channel feature map appropriate for saliency detection using an RGB image saliency detector with attention mechanisms. We achieve this by introducing a novel convolutional neural network based features extraction and encoding module. Our saliency detector takes $0.4$ s to process a light field of size $9\times9\times512\times375$ in a CPU and is significantly faster than state-of-the-art light field saliency detectors, with better or comparable accuracy. Furthermore, model size of our architecture is significantly lower compared to state-of-the-art light field saliency detectors. Our work shows that extracting features from light fields through aggressive size reduction and the attention mechanism results in a faster and accurate light field saliency detector leading to near real-time light field processing.
summary: Light field saliency detection -- important due to utility in many vision tasks -- still lacks speed and can improve in accuracy. Due to the formulation of the saliency detection problem in light fields as a segmentation task or a memorizing task, existing approaches consume unnecessarily large amounts of computational resources for training, and have longer execution times for testing. We solve this by aggressively reducing the large light field images to a much smaller three-channel feature map appropriate for saliency detection using an RGB image saliency detector with attention mechanisms. We achieve this by introducing a novel convolutional neural network based features extraction and encoding module. Our saliency detector takes $0.4$ s to process a light field of size $9\times9\times512\times375$ in a CPU and is significantly faster than state-of-the-art light field saliency detectors, with better or comparable accuracy. Furthermore, model size of our architecture is significantly lower compared to state-of-the-art light field saliency detectors. Our work shows that extracting features from light fields through aggressive size reduction and the attention mechanism results in a faster and accurate light field saliency detector leading to near real-time light field processing.
abstract_zh: 光场显着性检测（由于在许多视觉任务中的实用性而很重要）仍然缺乏速度并且可以提高准确性。由于将光场中的显着性检测问题表述为分割任务或记忆任务，现有方法不必要地消耗大量计算资源来进行训练，并且具有更长的测试执行时间。我们通过使用具有注意机制的 RGB 图像显着性检测器积极地将大光场图像减少为适合显着性检测的更小的三通道特征图来解决这个问题。我们通过引入一种新颖的基于卷积神经网络的特征提取和编码模块来实现这一目标。我们的显着性检测器需要 $0.4$ 秒来在 CPU 中处理大小为 $9\times9\times512\times375$ 的光场，并且比最先进的光场显着性检测器要快得多，并且具有更好或相当的精度。此外，与最先进的光场显着性探测器相比，我们的架构的模型尺寸要小得多。我们的工作表明，通过积极减小尺寸和注意力机制从光场中提取特征，可以产生更快、更准确的光场显着性检测器，从而实现近实时光场处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且准确的光场显著性检测方法，通过深度编码减少计算资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有光场显著性检测方法计算量大、速度慢且精度有待提升，需通过优化模型结构实现高效处理。
AI.method: 设计基于卷积神经网络的特征提取模块，结合注意力机制将高维光场图像压缩为三通道特征图进行检测。
AI.result: 在CPU上处理9×9×512×375光场仅需0.4秒，模型体积更小且精度优于或接近现有方法，实现近实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 通过激进的尺寸压缩与注意力机制，可有效提升光场显著性检测的速度与精度。

search_text: Fast and Accurate Light Field Saliency Detection through Deep Encoding 通过深度编码快速准确的光场显着性检测 Light field saliency detection -- important due to utility in many vision tasks -- still lacks speed and can improve in accuracy. Due to the formulation of the saliency detection problem in light fields as a segmentation task or a memorizing task, existing approaches consume unnecessarily large amounts of computational resources for training, and have longer execution times for testing. We solve this by aggressively reducing the large light field images to a much smaller three-channel feature map appropriate for saliency detection using an RGB image saliency detector with attention mechanisms. We achieve this by introducing a novel convolutional neural network based features extraction and encoding module. Our saliency detector takes $0.4$ s to process a light field of size $9\times9\times512\times375$ in a CPU and is significantly faster than state-of-the-art light field saliency detectors, with better or comparable accuracy. Furthermore, model size of our architecture is significantly lower compared to state-of-the-art light field saliency detectors. Our work shows that extracting features from light fields through aggressive size reduction and the attention mechanism results in a faster and accurate light field saliency detector leading to near real-time light field processing. 光场显着性检测（由于在许多视觉任务中的实用性而很重要）仍然缺乏速度并且可以提高准确性。由于将光场中的显着性检测问题表述为分割任务或记忆任务，现有方法不必要地消耗大量计算资源来进行训练，并且具有更长的测试执行时间。我们通过使用具有注意机制的 RGB 图像显着性检测器积极地将大光场图像减少为适合显着性检测的更小的三通道特征图来解决这个问题。我们通过引入一种新颖的基于卷积神经网络的特征提取和编码模块来实现这一目标。我们的显着性检测器需要 $0.4$ 秒来在 CPU 中处理大小为 $9\times9\times512\times375$ 的光场，并且比最先进的光场显着性检测器要快得多，并且具有更好或相当的精度。此外，与最先进的光场显着性探测器相比，我们的架构的模型尺寸要小得多。我们的工作表明，通过积极减小尺寸和注意力机制从光场中提取特征，可以产生更快、更准确的光场显着性检测器，从而实现近实时光场处理。 本文提出一种快速且准确的光场显著性检测方法，通过深度编码减少计算资源消耗。 Sahan Hemachandra,Ranga Rodrigo,Chamira Edussooriya cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Thien-Minh Nguyen,Muqing Cao,Shenghai Yuan,Yang Lyu,Thien Hoang Nguyen,Lihua Xie
title: LIRO: Tightly Coupled Lidar-Inertia-Ranging Odometry
title_zh: LIRO：紧耦合激光雷达惯性测距里程计
abstract: In recent years, thanks to the continuously reduced cost and weight of 3D Lidar, the applications of this type of sensor in robotics community have become increasingly popular. Despite many progresses, estimation drift and tracking loss are still prevalent concerns associated with these systems. However, in theory these issues can be resolved with the use of some observations to fixed landmarks in the environments. This motivates us to investigate a tightly coupled sensor fusion scheme of Ultra-Wideband (UWB) range measurements with Lidar and inertia measurements. First, data from IMU, Lidar and UWB are associated with the robot's states on a sliding windows based on their timestamps. Then, we construct a cost function comprising of factors from UWB, Lidar and IMU preintegration measurements. Finally an optimization process is carried out to estimate the robot's position and orientation. Via some real world experiments, we show that the method can effectively resolve the drift issue, while only requiring two or three anchors deployed in the environment.
summary: In recent years, thanks to the continuously reduced cost and weight of 3D Lidar, the applications of this type of sensor in robotics community have become increasingly popular. Despite many progresses, estimation drift and tracking loss are still prevalent concerns associated with these systems. However, in theory these issues can be resolved with the use of some observations to fixed landmarks in the environments. This motivates us to investigate a tightly coupled sensor fusion scheme of Ultra-Wideband (UWB) range measurements with Lidar and inertia measurements. First, data from IMU, Lidar and UWB are associated with the robot's states on a sliding windows based on their timestamps. Then, we construct a cost function comprising of factors from UWB, Lidar and IMU preintegration measurements. Finally an optimization process is carried out to estimate the robot's position and orientation. Via some real world experiments, we show that the method can effectively resolve the drift issue, while only requiring two or three anchors deployed in the environment.
abstract_zh: 近年来，由于3D激光雷达的成本和重量不断降低，此类传感器在机器人领域的应用越来越受欢迎。尽管取得了许多进展，估计漂移和跟踪损失仍然是与这些系统相关的普遍问题。然而，从理论上讲，这些问题可以通过对环境中的固定地标进行一些观察来解决。这促使我们研究超宽带 (UWB) 范围测量与激光雷达和惯性测量的紧密耦合传感器融合方案。首先，来自 IMU、激光雷达和 UWB 的数据根据​​时间戳与滑动窗口上的机器人状态相关联。然后，我们构建一个由 UWB、激光雷达和 IMU 预积分测量因素组成的成本函数。最后进行优化过程来估计机器人的位置和方向。通过一些现实世界的实验，我们表明该方法可以有效解决漂移问题，同时只需要在环境中部署两个或三个锚点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合激光雷达、惯性测量单元（IMU）和超宽带（UWB）测距的紧耦合里程计方法LIRO，用于解决机器人定位中的漂移和跟踪丢失问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D激光雷达成本降低，但现有系统仍存在估计漂移和跟踪丢失问题，而通过固定路标观测可理论解决这些问题，因此需探索多传感器融合方案。
AI.method: 基于时间戳将IMU、激光雷达和UWB数据关联到滑动窗口，构建包含UWB距离、激光雷达点云和IMU预积分的代价函数，通过优化估计机器人位姿。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效抑制漂移，且仅需部署2-3个环境锚点即可实现稳定定位。
AI.conclusion: LIRO通过紧耦合多传感器数据，显著提升了复杂环境下的定位鲁棒性，为低成本高精度定位提供了可行方案。

title: Dynamic Adversarial Patch for Evading Object Detection Models
title_zh: 用于逃避对象检测模型的动态对抗补丁
abstract: Recent research shows that neural networks models used for computer vision (e.g., YOLO and Fast R-CNN) are vulnerable to adversarial evasion attacks. Most of the existing real-world adversarial attacks against object detectors use an adversarial patch which is attached to the target object (e.g., a carefully crafted sticker placed on a stop sign). This method may not be robust to changes in the camera's location relative to the target object; in addition, it may not work well when applied to nonplanar objects such as cars. In this study, we present an innovative attack method against object detectors applied in a real-world setup that addresses some of the limitations of existing attacks. Our method uses dynamic adversarial patches which are placed at multiple predetermined locations on a target object. An adversarial learning algorithm is applied in order to generate the patches used. The dynamic attack is implemented by switching between optimized patches dynamically, according to the camera's position (i.e., the object detection system's position). In order to demonstrate our attack in a real-world setup, we implemented the patches by attaching flat screens to the target object; the screens are used to present the patches and switch between them, depending on the current camera location. Thus, the attack is dynamic and adjusts itself to the situation to achieve optimal results. We evaluated our dynamic patch approach by attacking the YOLOv2 object detector with a car as the target object and succeeded in misleading it in up to 90% of the video frames when filming the car from a wide viewing angle range. We improved the attack by generating patches that consider the semantic distance between the target object and its classification. We also examined the attack's transferability among different car models and were able to mislead the detector 71% of the time.
summary: Recent research shows that neural networks models used for computer vision (e.g., YOLO and Fast R-CNN) are vulnerable to adversarial evasion attacks. Most of the existing real-world adversarial attacks against object detectors use an adversarial patch which is attached to the target object (e.g., a carefully crafted sticker placed on a stop sign). This method may not be robust to changes in the camera's location relative to the target object; in addition, it may not work well when applied to nonplanar objects such as cars. In this study, we present an innovative attack method against object detectors applied in a real-world setup that addresses some of the limitations of existing attacks. Our method uses dynamic adversarial patches which are placed at multiple predetermined locations on a target object. An adversarial learning algorithm is applied in order to generate the patches used. The dynamic attack is implemented by switching between optimized patches dynamically, according to the camera's position (i.e., the object detection system's position). In order to demonstrate our attack in a real-world setup, we implemented the patches by attaching flat screens to the target object; the screens are used to present the patches and switch between them, depending on the current camera location. Thus, the attack is dynamic and adjusts itself to the situation to achieve optimal results. We evaluated our dynamic patch approach by attacking the YOLOv2 object detector with a car as the target object and succeeded in misleading it in up to 90% of the video frames when filming the car from a wide viewing angle range. We improved the attack by generating patches that consider the semantic distance between the target object and its classification. We also examined the attack's transferability among different car models and were able to mislead the detector 71% of the time.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，用于计算机视觉的神经网络模型（例如 YOLO 和 Fast R-CNN）很容易受到对抗性规避攻击。大多数现有的针对对象检测器的现实世界对抗性攻击都使用附加到目标对象的对抗性补丁（例如，放置在停车标志上的精心制作的贴纸）。该方法对于相机相对于目标物体的位置的变化可能不鲁棒；此外，当应用于汽车等非平面物体时，它可能效果不佳。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种针对现实世界设置中应用的对象检测器的创新攻击方法，该方法解决了现有攻击的一些局限性。我们的方法使用动态对抗性补丁，这些补丁被放置在目标对象上的多个预定位置。应用对抗性学习算法来生成所使用的补丁。动态攻击是通过根据相机的位置（即对象检测系统的位置）在优化的补丁之间动态切换来实现的。为了在现实世界中演示我们的攻击，我们通过将平面屏幕附加到目标对象来实现补丁；屏幕用于显示补丁并根据当前相机位置在它们之间切换。因此，攻击是动态的，并根据情况进行自我调整以达到最佳结果。我们通过以汽车为目标对象攻击 YOLOv2 对象检测器来评估我们的动态补丁方法，并在从宽视角范围拍摄汽车时成功地在高达 90% 的视频帧中误导了它。我们通过生成考虑目标对象与其分类之间的语义距离的补丁来改进攻击。我们还检查了攻击在不同车型之间的可转移性，并且能够在 71% 的时间内误导检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态对抗性补丁方法，用于在真实场景中规避物体检测模型（如YOLOv2）的识别。
AI.motivation: 现有静态对抗补丁对摄像头位置变化和非平面物体（如汽车）效果有限，需开发更鲁棒的攻击方法。
AI.method: 通过在目标物体多位置放置动态补丁，结合对抗学习算法生成补丁，并根据摄像头位置实时切换优化后的补丁，使用屏幕实现动态展示。
AI.result: 在宽视角拍摄下，成功误导YOLOv2检测模型达90%的视频帧；跨车型测试中误导率仍达71%。
AI.conclusion: 动态对抗补丁方法显著提升了攻击效果和适应性，为现实场景中的模型规避提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种动态对抗性补丁方法，用于在真实场景中规避物体检测模型（如YOLOv2）的识别。
motivation: 现有静态对抗补丁对摄像头位置变化和非平面物体（如汽车）效果有限，需开发更鲁棒的攻击方法。
method: 通过在目标物体多位置放置动态补丁，结合对抗学习算法生成补丁，并根据摄像头位置实时切换优化后的补丁，使用屏幕实现动态展示。
result: 在宽视角拍摄下，成功误导YOLOv2检测模型达90%的视频帧；跨车型测试中误导率仍达71%。
conclusion: 动态对抗补丁方法显著提升了攻击效果和适应性，为现实场景中的模型规避提供了新思路。
search_text: Dynamic Adversarial Patch for Evading Object Detection Models 用于逃避对象检测模型的动态对抗补丁 Recent research shows that neural networks models used for computer vision (e.g., YOLO and Fast R-CNN) are vulnerable to adversarial evasion attacks. Most of the existing real-world adversarial attacks against object detectors use an adversarial patch which is attached to the target object (e.g., a carefully crafted sticker placed on a stop sign). This method may not be robust to changes in the camera's location relative to the target object; in addition, it may not work well when applied to nonplanar objects such as cars. In this study, we present an innovative attack method against object detectors applied in a real-world setup that addresses some of the limitations of existing attacks. Our method uses dynamic adversarial patches which are placed at multiple predetermined locations on a target object. An adversarial learning algorithm is applied in order to generate the patches used. The dynamic attack is implemented by switching between optimized patches dynamically, according to the camera's position (i.e., the object detection system's position). In order to demonstrate our attack in a real-world setup, we implemented the patches by attaching flat screens to the target object; the screens are used to present the patches and switch between them, depending on the current camera location. Thus, the attack is dynamic and adjusts itself to the situation to achieve optimal results. We evaluated our dynamic patch approach by attacking the YOLOv2 object detector with a car as the target object and succeeded in misleading it in up to 90% of the video frames when filming the car from a wide viewing angle range. We improved the attack by generating patches that consider the semantic distance between the target object and its classification. We also examined the attack's transferability among different car models and were able to mislead the detector 71% of the time. 最近的研究表明，用于计算机视觉的神经网络模型（例如 YOLO 和 Fast R-CNN）很容易受到对抗性规避攻击。大多数现有的针对对象检测器的现实世界对抗性攻击都使用附加到目标对象的对抗性补丁（例如，放置在停车标志上的精心制作的贴纸）。该方法对于相机相对于目标物体的位置的变化可能不鲁棒；此外，当应用于汽车等非平面物体时，它可能效果不佳。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种针对现实世界设置中应用的对象检测器的创新攻击方法，该方法解决了现有攻击的一些局限性。我们的方法使用动态对抗性补丁，这些补丁被放置在目标对象上的多个预定位置。应用对抗性学习算法来生成所使用的补丁。动态攻击是通过根据相机的位置（即对象检测系统的位置）在优化的补丁之间动态切换来实现的。为了在现实世界中演示我们的攻击，我们通过将平面屏幕附加到目标对象来实现补丁；屏幕用于显示补丁并根据当前相机位置在它们之间切换。因此，攻击是动态的，并根据情况进行自我调整以达到最佳结果。我们通过以汽车为目标对象攻击 YOLOv2 对象检测器来评估我们的动态补丁方法，并在从宽视角范围拍摄汽车时成功地在高达 90% 的视频帧中误导了它。我们通过生成考虑目标对象与其分类之间的语义距离的补丁来改进攻击。我们还检查了攻击在不同车型之间的可转移性，并且能够在 71% 的时间内误导检测器。 本文提出一种动态对抗性补丁方法，用于在真实场景中规避物体检测模型（如YOLOv2）的识别。 Shahar Hoory,Tzvika Shapira,Asaf Shabtai,Yuval Elovici cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ross Cutler,Babak Naderi,Markus Loide,Sten Sootla,Ando Saabas
title: Crowdsourcing approach for subjective evaluation of echo impairment
title_zh: 回声损伤主观评估的众包方法
abstract: The quality of acoustic echo cancellers (AECs) in real-time communication systems is typically evaluated using objective metrics like ERLE and PESQ, and less commonly with lab-based subjective tests like ITU-T Rec. P.831. We will show that these objective measures are not well correlated to subjective measures. We then introduce an open-source crowdsourcing approach for subjective evaluation of echo impairment which can be used to evaluate the performance of AECs. We provide a study that shows this tool is accurate and highly reproducible. This new tool has been recently used in the ICASSP 2021 AEC Challenge which made the challenge possible to do quickly and cost effectively.
summary: The quality of acoustic echo cancellers (AECs) in real-time communication systems is typically evaluated using objective metrics like ERLE and PESQ, and less commonly with lab-based subjective tests like ITU-T Rec. P.831. We will show that these objective measures are not well correlated to subjective measures. We then introduce an open-source crowdsourcing approach for subjective evaluation of echo impairment which can be used to evaluate the performance of AECs. We provide a study that shows this tool is accurate and highly reproducible. This new tool has been recently used in the ICASSP 2021 AEC Challenge which made the challenge possible to do quickly and cost effectively.
abstract_zh: 实时通信系统中声学回声消除器 (AEC) 的质量通常使用 ERLE 和 PESQ 等客观指标进行评估，很少使用 ITU-T Rec.1 等基于实验室的主观测试来评估。第831页。我们将证明这些客观测量与主观测量没有很好的相关性。然后，我们介绍了一种用于主观评估回声损伤的开源众包方法，可用于评估 AEC 的性能。我们提供的一项研究表明该工具是准确且高度可重复的。这一新工具最近已在 ICASSP 2021 AEC 挑战赛中使用，使得该挑战赛能够快速且经济高效地完成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于众包的主观评估方法，用于评估回声抑制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统客观指标（如ERLE、PESQ）与主观评估结果关联性弱，实验室主观测试成本高且应用少。
AI.method: 开发开源众包平台，通过大规模用户参与进行主观回声质量评估。
AI.result: 验证该工具具有高准确性和可重复性，并成功应用于ICASSP 2021 AEC挑战赛。
AI.conclusion: 众包方法为回声消除器性能评估提供了快速、低成本的有效解决方案。

authors_text: Chao Liu,Heming Sun,Jiro Katto,Xiaoyang Zeng,Yibo Fan
title: A QP-adaptive Mechanism for CNN-based Filter in Video Coding
title_zh: 视频编码中基于 CNN 滤波器的 QP 自适应机制
abstract: Convolutional neural network (CNN)-based filters have achieved great success in video coding. However, in most previous works, individual models are needed for each quantization parameter (QP) band. This paper presents a generic method to help an arbitrary CNN-filter handle different quantization noise. We model the quantization noise problem and implement a feasible solution on CNN, which introduces the quantization step (Qstep) into the convolution. When the quantization noise increases, the ability of the CNN-filter to suppress noise improves accordingly. This method can be used directly to replace the (vanilla) convolution layer in any existing CNN-filters. By using only 25% of the parameters, the proposed method achieves better performance than using multiple models with VTM-6.3 anchor. Besides, an additional BD-rate reduction of 0.2% is achieved by our proposed method for chroma components.
summary: Convolutional neural network (CNN)-based filters have achieved great success in video coding. However, in most previous works, individual models are needed for each quantization parameter (QP) band. This paper presents a generic method to help an arbitrary CNN-filter handle different quantization noise. We model the quantization noise problem and implement a feasible solution on CNN, which introduces the quantization step (Qstep) into the convolution. When the quantization noise increases, the ability of the CNN-filter to suppress noise improves accordingly. This method can be used directly to replace the (vanilla) convolution layer in any existing CNN-filters. By using only 25% of the parameters, the proposed method achieves better performance than using multiple models with VTM-6.3 anchor. Besides, an additional BD-rate reduction of 0.2% is achieved by our proposed method for chroma components.
abstract_zh: 基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的滤波器在视频编码中取得了巨大成功。然而，在大多数先前的工作中，每个量化参数（QP）频带都需要单独的模型。本文提出了一种通用方法来帮助任意 CNN 滤波器处理不同的量化噪声。我们对量化噪声问题进行建模，并在 CNN 上实现了一个可行的解决方案，它将量化步长 (Qstep) 引入到卷积中。当量化噪声增加时，CNN滤波器抑制噪声的能力相应提高。该方法可直接用于替换任何现有 CNN 滤波器中的（普通）卷积层。通过仅使用 25% 的参数，该方法比使用带有 VTM-6.3 锚点的多个模型获得了更好的性能。此外，我们提出的色度分量方法还实现了 0.2% 的额外 BD 速率降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN的视频编码滤波器的QP自适应机制，通过引入量化步长（Qstep）到卷积操作中，使单一模型能适应不同量化噪声，无需为每个QP区间单独训练模型。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN滤波器需为每个量化参数（QP）区间训练独立模型，导致参数冗余和效率低下，亟需一种通用方法以适应不同量化噪声并减少模型复杂度。
AI.method: 将量化步长（Qstep）直接嵌入卷积层，通过调整卷积核对量化噪声的敏感度，使CNN滤波器在噪声增加时自动增强降噪能力，且可直接替换现有卷积层，参数量减少至原模型的25%。
AI.result: 在VTM-6.3基准测试中，该方法以仅25%的参数量超越多模型方案，且针对色度分量实现额外0.2%的BD率降低，验证了其有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的QP自适应机制显著提升了CNN滤波器的跨QP泛化能力，在保持性能的同时大幅降低参数开销，为视频编码中的神经网络设计提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Yunlei Shi,Zhaopeng Chen,Hongxu Liu,Sebastian Riedel,Chunhui Gao,Qian Feng,Jun Deng,Jianwei Zhang
title: Proactive Action Visual Residual Reinforcement Learning for Contact-Rich Tasks Using a Torque-Controlled Robot
title_zh: 使用扭矩控制机器人进行接触丰富的任务的主动视觉残差强化学习
abstract: Contact-rich manipulation tasks are commonly found in modern manufacturing settings. However, manually designing a robot controller is considered hard for traditional control methods as the controller requires an effective combination of modalities and vastly different characteristics. In this paper, we firstly consider incorporating operational space visual and haptic information into reinforcement learning(RL) methods to solve the target uncertainty problem in unstructured environments. Moreover, we propose a novel idea of introducing a proactive action to solve the partially observable Markov decision process problem. Together with these two ideas, our method can either adapt to reasonable variations in unstructured environments and improve the sample efficiency of policy learning. We evaluated our method on a task that involved inserting a random-access memory using a torque-controlled robot, and we tested the success rates of the different baselines used in the traditional methods. We proved that our method is robust and can tolerate environmental variations very well.
summary: Contact-rich manipulation tasks are commonly found in modern manufacturing settings. However, manually designing a robot controller is considered hard for traditional control methods as the controller requires an effective combination of modalities and vastly different characteristics. In this paper, we firstly consider incorporating operational space visual and haptic information into reinforcement learning(RL) methods to solve the target uncertainty problem in unstructured environments. Moreover, we propose a novel idea of introducing a proactive action to solve the partially observable Markov decision process problem. Together with these two ideas, our method can either adapt to reasonable variations in unstructured environments and improve the sample efficiency of policy learning. We evaluated our method on a task that involved inserting a random-access memory using a torque-controlled robot, and we tested the success rates of the different baselines used in the traditional methods. We proved that our method is robust and can tolerate environmental variations very well.
abstract_zh: 现代制造环境中常见于接触丰富的操作任务。然而，对于传统控制方法来说，手动设计机器人控制器被认为是困难的，因为控制器需要模式和截然不同的特性的有效组合。在本文中，我们首先考虑将操作空间视觉和触觉信息纳入强化学习（RL）方法中，以解决非结构化环境中的目标不确定性问题。此外，我们提出了一种引入主动行动来解决部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程问题的新颖想法。结合这两个想法，我们的方法既可以适应非结构​​化环境中的合理变化，又可以提高策略学习的样本效率。我们在一项涉及使用扭矩控制机器人插入随机存取存储器的任务中评估了我们的方法，并测试了传统方法中使用的不同基线的成功率。我们证明了我们的方法是稳健的并且可以很好地容忍环境变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉和触觉信息的强化学习方法，用于解决扭矩控制机器人在非结构化环境中进行复杂接触操作的任务。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法难以处理非结构化环境中目标不确定性及多模态信息融合问题，手动设计控制器效率低下且难以适应环境变化。
AI.method: 将操作空间视觉与触觉信息引入强化学习框架，并创新性地引入主动行动机制以解决部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程问题，提升策略学习的样本效率和环境适应性。
AI.result: 在随机存取存储器插入任务中验证方法有效性，实验表明该方法相较于传统基线具有更高的成功率和环境鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出方法通过多模态感知与主动行动机制的结合，有效解决了接触丰富任务中的不确定性与部分可观测性问题，验证了其在复杂环境中的适用性。

search_text: Proactive Action Visual Residual Reinforcement Learning for Contact-Rich Tasks Using a Torque-Controlled Robot 使用扭矩控制机器人进行接触丰富的任务的主动视觉残差强化学习 Contact-rich manipulation tasks are commonly found in modern manufacturing settings. However, manually designing a robot controller is considered hard for traditional control methods as the controller requires an effective combination of modalities and vastly different characteristics. In this paper, we firstly consider incorporating operational space visual and haptic information into reinforcement learning(RL) methods to solve the target uncertainty problem in unstructured environments. Moreover, we propose a novel idea of introducing a proactive action to solve the partially observable Markov decision process problem. Together with these two ideas, our method can either adapt to reasonable variations in unstructured environments and improve the sample efficiency of policy learning. We evaluated our method on a task that involved inserting a random-access memory using a torque-controlled robot, and we tested the success rates of the different baselines used in the traditional methods. We proved that our method is robust and can tolerate environmental variations very well. 现代制造环境中常见于接触丰富的操作任务。然而，对于传统控制方法来说，手动设计机器人控制器被认为是困难的，因为控制器需要模式和截然不同的特性的有效组合。在本文中，我们首先考虑将操作空间视觉和触觉信息纳入强化学习（RL）方法中，以解决非结构化环境中的目标不确定性问题。此外，我们提出了一种引入主动行动来解决部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程问题的新颖想法。结合这两个想法，我们的方法既可以适应非结构​​化环境中的合理变化，又可以提高策略学习的样本效率。我们在一项涉及使用扭矩控制机器人插入随机存取存储器的任务中评估了我们的方法，并测试了传统方法中使用的不同基线的成功率。我们证明了我们的方法是稳健的并且可以很好地容忍环境变化。 本文提出一种结合视觉和触觉信息的强化学习方法，用于解决扭矩控制机器人在非结构化环境中进行复杂接触操作的任务。 Yunlei Shi,Zhaopeng Chen,Hongxu Liu,Sebastian Riedel,Chunhui Gao,Qian Feng,Jun Deng,Jianwei Zhang cs.RO

title: Applying convolutional neural networks to extremely sparse image datasets using an image subdivision approach
title_zh: 使用图像细分方法将卷积神经网络应用于极其稀疏的图像数据集
abstract: Purpose: The aim of this work is to demonstrate that convolutional neural networks (CNN) can be applied to extremely sparse image libraries by subdivision of the original image datasets. Methods: Image datasets from a conventional digital camera was created and scanning electron microscopy (SEM) measurements were obtained from the literature. The image datasets were subdivided and CNN models were trained on parts of the subdivided datasets. Results: The CNN models were capable of analyzing extremely sparse image datasets by utilizing the proposed method of image subdivision. It was furthermore possible to provide a direct assessment of the various regions where a given API or appearance was predominant.
summary: Purpose: The aim of this work is to demonstrate that convolutional neural networks (CNN) can be applied to extremely sparse image libraries by subdivision of the original image datasets. Methods: Image datasets from a conventional digital camera was created and scanning electron microscopy (SEM) measurements were obtained from the literature. The image datasets were subdivided and CNN models were trained on parts of the subdivided datasets. Results: The CNN models were capable of analyzing extremely sparse image datasets by utilizing the proposed method of image subdivision. It was furthermore possible to provide a direct assessment of the various regions where a given API or appearance was predominant.
abstract_zh: 目的：这项工作的目的是证明卷积神经网络（CNN）可以通过对原始图像数据集进行细分来应用于极其稀疏的图像库。方法：创建传统数码相机的图像数据集，并从文献中获得扫描电子显微镜 (SEM) 测量结果。图像数据集被细分，CNN 模型在细分数据集的部分上进行训练。结果：CNN 模型能够利用所提出的图像细分方法来分析极其稀疏的图像数据集。此外，还可以对特定 API 或外观占主导地位的各个区域进行直接评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过图像分块方法，使卷积神经网络（CNN）能够处理极度稀疏的图像数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN在处理稀疏图像数据时效果有限，需探索新方法以提升模型在数据稀缺场景下的分析能力。
AI.method: 从数码相机和文献中获取图像数据集，通过分块处理稀疏数据，并在分块后的子集上训练CNN模型。
AI.result: CNN模型成功分析了极度稀疏数据集，并能直接评估不同区域的API或外观分布特征。
AI.conclusion: 图像分块方法有效解决了稀疏数据下CNN的应用难题，为相关领域提供了可行的分析方案。

title: Speakerfilter-Pro: an improved target speaker extractor combines the time domain and frequency domain
title_zh: peakerfilter-Pro：改进的目标说话人提取器，结合了时域和频域
abstract: This paper introduces an improved target speaker extractor, referred to as Speakerfilter-Pro, based on our previous Speakerfilter model. The Speakerfilter uses a bi-direction gated recurrent unit (BGRU) module to characterize the target speaker from anchor speech and use a convolutional recurrent network (CRN) module to separate the target speech from a noisy signal.Different from the Speakerfilter, the Speakerfilter-Pro sticks a WaveUNet module in the beginning and the ending, respectively. The WaveUNet has been proven to have a better ability to perform speech separation in the time domain. In order to extract the target speaker information better, the complex spectrum instead of the magnitude spectrum is utilized as the input feature for the CRN module. Experiments are conducted on the two-speaker dataset (WSJ0-mix2) which is widely used for speaker extraction. The systematic evaluation shows that the Speakerfilter-Pro outperforms the Speakerfilter and other baselines, and achieves a signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR) of 14.95 dB.
summary: This paper introduces an improved target speaker extractor, referred to as Speakerfilter-Pro, based on our previous Speakerfilter model. The Speakerfilter uses a bi-direction gated recurrent unit (BGRU) module to characterize the target speaker from anchor speech and use a convolutional recurrent network (CRN) module to separate the target speech from a noisy signal.Different from the Speakerfilter, the Speakerfilter-Pro sticks a WaveUNet module in the beginning and the ending, respectively. The WaveUNet has been proven to have a better ability to perform speech separation in the time domain. In order to extract the target speaker information better, the complex spectrum instead of the magnitude spectrum is utilized as the input feature for the CRN module. Experiments are conducted on the two-speaker dataset (WSJ0-mix2) which is widely used for speaker extraction. The systematic evaluation shows that the Speakerfilter-Pro outperforms the Speakerfilter and other baselines, and achieves a signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR) of 14.95 dB.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种改进的目标说话人提取器，称为Speakerfilter-Pro，基于我们之前的Speakerfilter模型。 peakerfilter使用双向门控循环单元（BGRU）模块从锚定语音中表征目标说话人，并使用卷积循环网络（CRN）模块将目标语音与噪声信号分离。与Speakerfilter不同的是，Speakerfilter-Pro在开头和结尾分别粘贴了WaveUNet模块。 WaveUNet已被证明具有更好的时域语音分离能力。为了更好地提取目标说话人信息，采用复谱而不是幅度谱作为CRN模块的输入特征。在广泛用于说话人提取的双说话人数据集（WSJ0-mix2）上进行了实验。系统评估表明，Speakerfilter-Pro 的性能优于Speakerfilter 和其他基准，并实现了 14.95 dB 的信号失真比 (SDR)。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的目标说话人提取器Speakerfilter-Pro，结合时域和频域方法提升语音分离效果。
AI.motivation: 为提升复杂噪声环境下目标说话人提取性能，需优化时频特征建模与网络结构设计。
AI.method: 在原有CRN框架基础上，首尾添加WaveUNet模块增强时域分离能力，并采用复数谱代替幅度谱作为CRN输入特征。
AI.result: 在WSJ0-mix2数据集上实现14.95dB的SDR指标，优于原始模型及其他基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合时域建模与复数谱特征的改进方法有效提升了目标说话人提取性能。

title: Differentially Private Weighted Sampling
title_zh: 差分隐私加权采样
abstract: Common datasets have the form of elements with keys (e.g., transactions and products) and the goal is to perform analytics on the aggregated form of key and frequency pairs. A weighted sample of keys by (a function of) frequency is a highly versatile summary that provides a sparse set of representative keys and supports approximate evaluations of query statistics. We propose private weighted sampling (PWS): A method that ensures element-level differential privacy while retaining, to the extent possible, the utility of a respective non-private weighted sample. PWS maximizes the reporting probabilities of keys and estimation quality of a broad family of statistics. PWS improves over the state of the art also for the well-studied special case of private histograms, when no sampling is performed. We empirically demonstrate significant performance gains compared with prior baselines: 20%-300% increase in key reporting for common Zipfian frequency distributions and accuracy for $\times 2$-$ 8$ lower frequencies in estimation tasks. Moreover, PWS is applied as a simple post-processing of a non-private sample, without requiring the original data. This allows for seamless integration with existing implementations of non-private schemes and retaining the efficiency of schemes designed for resource-constrained settings such as massive distributed or streamed data. We believe that due to practicality and performance, PWS may become a method of choice in applications where privacy is desired.
summary: Common datasets have the form of elements with keys (e.g., transactions and products) and the goal is to perform analytics on the aggregated form of key and frequency pairs. A weighted sample of keys by (a function of) frequency is a highly versatile summary that provides a sparse set of representative keys and supports approximate evaluations of query statistics. We propose private weighted sampling (PWS): A method that ensures element-level differential privacy while retaining, to the extent possible, the utility of a respective non-private weighted sample. PWS maximizes the reporting probabilities of keys and estimation quality of a broad family of statistics. PWS improves over the state of the art also for the well-studied special case of private histograms, when no sampling is performed. We empirically demonstrate significant performance gains compared with prior baselines: 20%-300% increase in key reporting for common Zipfian frequency distributions and accuracy for $\times 2$-$ 8$ lower frequencies in estimation tasks. Moreover, PWS is applied as a simple post-processing of a non-private sample, without requiring the original data. This allows for seamless integration with existing implementations of non-private schemes and retaining the efficiency of schemes designed for resource-constrained settings such as massive distributed or streamed data. We believe that due to practicality and performance, PWS may become a method of choice in applications where privacy is desired.
abstract_zh: 常见数据集具有带有键的元素形式（例如交易和产品），目标是对键和频率对的聚合形式执行分析。按频率（函数）的键加权样本是一种高度通用的摘要，它提供一组稀疏的代表性键并支持查询统计信息的近似评估。我们提出私有加权采样（PWS）：一种确保元素级差分隐私，同时尽可能保留各个非私有加权样本的效用的方法。 PWS 最大限度地提高了关键的报告概率和广泛的统计数据的估计质量。当不执行采样时，对于经过充分研究的私有直方图的特殊情况，PWS 也比现有技术有所改进。我们凭经验证明，与之前的基线相比，性能显着提升：常见 Zipfian 频率分布的关键报告增加了 20%-300%，估计任务频率的准确性降低了 $\times 2$-$8$。此外，PWS 被用作非私人样本的简单后处理，而不需要原始数据。这允许与非私有方案的现有实现无缝集成，并保留为资源受限设置（例如大量分布式或流数据）设计的方案的效率。我们相信，由于实用性和性能，PWS 可能成为需要隐私的应用程序的选择方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为差分隐私加权采样（PWS）的方法，在保证元素级差分隐私的同时，尽可能保留非隐私加权样本的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在隐私保护与数据效用之间难以平衡，尤其在频率分析任务中存在关键信息丢失和准确性不足的问题。
AI.method: 通过设计隐私预算分配机制，最大化键值报告概率和统计估计质量，无需原始数据即可对非隐私样本进行简单后处理。
AI.result: 在常见Zipfian分布下，关键键值报告量提升20%-300%，低频估计任务精度提高2-8倍，且兼容分布式和流式数据场景。
AI.conclusion: PWS凭借实用性与性能优势，可能成为隐私敏感场景下的首选方法，为隐私保护与数据分析提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Hirofumi Inaguma,Yosuke Higuchi,Kevin Duh,Tatsuya Kawahara,Shinji Watanabe
title: Orthros: Non-autoregressive End-to-end Speech Translation with Dual-decoder
title_zh: Orthros：使用双解码器的非自回归端到端语音翻译
abstract: Fast inference speed is an important goal towards real-world deployment of speech translation (ST) systems. End-to-end (E2E) models based on the encoder-decoder architecture are more suitable for this goal than traditional cascaded systems, but their effectiveness regarding decoding speed has not been explored so far. Inspired by recent progress in non-autoregressive (NAR) methods in text-based translation, which generates target tokens in parallel by eliminating conditional dependencies, we study the problem of NAR decoding for E2E-ST. We propose a novel NAR E2E-ST framework, Orthros, in which both NAR and autoregressive (AR) decoders are jointly trained on the shared speech encoder. The latter is used for selecting better translation among various length candidates generated from the former, which dramatically improves the effectiveness of a large length beam with negligible overhead. We further investigate effective length prediction methods from speech inputs and the impact of vocabulary sizes. Experiments on four benchmarks show the effectiveness of the proposed method in improving inference speed while maintaining competitive translation quality compared to state-of-the-art AR E2E-ST systems.
summary: Fast inference speed is an important goal towards real-world deployment of speech translation (ST) systems. End-to-end (E2E) models based on the encoder-decoder architecture are more suitable for this goal than traditional cascaded systems, but their effectiveness regarding decoding speed has not been explored so far. Inspired by recent progress in non-autoregressive (NAR) methods in text-based translation, which generates target tokens in parallel by eliminating conditional dependencies, we study the problem of NAR decoding for E2E-ST. We propose a novel NAR E2E-ST framework, Orthros, in which both NAR and autoregressive (AR) decoders are jointly trained on the shared speech encoder. The latter is used for selecting better translation among various length candidates generated from the former, which dramatically improves the effectiveness of a large length beam with negligible overhead. We further investigate effective length prediction methods from speech inputs and the impact of vocabulary sizes. Experiments on four benchmarks show the effectiveness of the proposed method in improving inference speed while maintaining competitive translation quality compared to state-of-the-art AR E2E-ST systems.
abstract_zh: 快速推理速度是语音翻译 (ST) 系统实际部署的一个重要目标。基于编码器-解码器架构的端到端（E2E）模型比传统的级联系统更适合此目标，但迄今为止尚未探索其在解码速度方面的有效性。受基于文本翻译中非自回归（NAR）方法最新进展的启发，该方法通过消除条件依赖性并行生成目标标记，我们研究了 E2E-ST 的 NAR 解码问题。我们提出了一种新颖的 NAR E2E-ST 框架 Orthros，其中 NAR 和自回归 (AR) 解码器在共享语音编码器上联合训练。后者用于在前者生成的各种长度候选中选择更好的转换，这在开销可以忽略不计的情况下显着提高了大长度光束的有效性。我们进一步研究语音输入的有效长度预测方法以及词汇量的影响。四个基准测试的实验表明，与最先进的 AR E2E-ST 系统相比，该方法在提高推理速度的同时保持有竞争力的翻译质量是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Orthros的非自回归端到端语音翻译框架，通过双解码器结构提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 传统级联系统和现有端到端模型在语音翻译中推理速度不足，需探索非自回归方法以实现快速解码。
AI.method: 设计共享语音编码器的双解码器框架，联合训练非自回归（NAR）和自回归（AR）解码器，AR解码器用于筛选NAR生成的多长度候选译文。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试中，Orthros在保持与最先进自回归系统相当翻译质量的同时，显著提升了推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 双解码器结构有效结合NAR与AR优势，在低开销下实现高速语音翻译，验证了非自回归方法在端到端语音翻译中的潜力。

authors_text: Louise Gillian C. Bautista,Prospero C. Naval Jr
title: CLRGaze: Contrastive Learning of Representations for Eye Movement Signals
title_zh: CLRGaze：眼动信号表示的对比学习
comment: Accepted to 29th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2021)
comments: Accepted to 29th European Signal Processing Conference (EUSIPCO 2021)
abstract: Eye movements are intricate and dynamic biosignals that contain a wealth of cognitive information about the subject. However, these are ambiguous signals and therefore require meticulous feature engineering to be used by machine learning algorithms. We instead propose to learn feature vectors of eye movements in a self-supervised manner. We adopt a contrastive learning approach and propose a set of data transformations that encourage a deep neural network to discern salient and granular gaze patterns. This paper presents a novel experiment utilizing six eye-tracking data sets despite different data specifications and experimental conditions. We assess the learned features on biometric tasks with only a linear classifier, achieving 84.6% accuracy on a mixed dataset, and up to 97.3% accuracy on a single dataset. Our work advances the state of machine learning for eye movements and provides insights into a general representation learning method not only for eye movements but also for similar biosignals.
summary: Eye movements are intricate and dynamic biosignals that contain a wealth of cognitive information about the subject. However, these are ambiguous signals and therefore require meticulous feature engineering to be used by machine learning algorithms. We instead propose to learn feature vectors of eye movements in a self-supervised manner. We adopt a contrastive learning approach and propose a set of data transformations that encourage a deep neural network to discern salient and granular gaze patterns. This paper presents a novel experiment utilizing six eye-tracking data sets despite different data specifications and experimental conditions. We assess the learned features on biometric tasks with only a linear classifier, achieving 84.6% accuracy on a mixed dataset, and up to 97.3% accuracy on a single dataset. Our work advances the state of machine learning for eye movements and provides insights into a general representation learning method not only for eye movements but also for similar biosignals.
abstract_zh: 眼球运动是复杂且动态的生物信号，包含有关主体的丰富认知信息。然而，这些信号是模糊的，因此需要细致的特征工程才能被机器学习算法使用。相反，我们建议以自我监督的方式学习眼球运动的特征向量。我们采用对比学习方法，并提出一组数据转换，鼓励深度神经网络辨别显着和细粒度的注视模式。本文提出了一项利用六个眼动追踪数据集的新颖实验，尽管数据规格和实验条件不同。我们仅使用线性分类器评估生物识别任务中学习到的特征，在混合数据集上实现 84.6% 的准确率，在单个数据集上实现高达 97.3% 的准确率。我们的工作推进了眼球运动机器学习的发展，并为不仅针对眼球运动而且针对类似生物信号的通用表示学习方法提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLRGaze方法，通过对比学习在自监督框架下学习眼动信号的特征表示，无需人工特征工程。
AI.motivation: 眼动信号包含丰富认知信息但需复杂特征工程，传统方法受限于手动设计特征的表达能力。
AI.method: 采用对比学习框架，设计数据增强策略生成正负样本，训练深度网络学习区分显著注视模式，并在六个不同数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在混合数据集上线性分类器达到84.6%准确率，在单个数据集上最高达97.3%准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了眼动信号的机器学习性能，为生物信号的通用表示学习提供了新思路。

search_text: CLRGaze: Contrastive Learning of Representations for Eye Movement Signals CLRGaze：眼动信号表示的对比学习 Eye movements are intricate and dynamic biosignals that contain a wealth of cognitive information about the subject. However, these are ambiguous signals and therefore require meticulous feature engineering to be used by machine learning algorithms. We instead propose to learn feature vectors of eye movements in a self-supervised manner. We adopt a contrastive learning approach and propose a set of data transformations that encourage a deep neural network to discern salient and granular gaze patterns. This paper presents a novel experiment utilizing six eye-tracking data sets despite different data specifications and experimental conditions. We assess the learned features on biometric tasks with only a linear classifier, achieving 84.6% accuracy on a mixed dataset, and up to 97.3% accuracy on a single dataset. Our work advances the state of machine learning for eye movements and provides insights into a general representation learning method not only for eye movements but also for similar biosignals. 眼球运动是复杂且动态的生物信号，包含有关主体的丰富认知信息。然而，这些信号是模糊的，因此需要细致的特征工程才能被机器学习算法使用。相反，我们建议以自我监督的方式学习眼球运动的特征向量。我们采用对比学习方法，并提出一组数据转换，鼓励深度神经网络辨别显着和细粒度的注视模式。本文提出了一项利用六个眼动追踪数据集的新颖实验，尽管数据规格和实验条件不同。我们仅使用线性分类器评估生物识别任务中学习到的特征，在混合数据集上实现 84.6% 的准确率，在单个数据集上实现高达 97.3% 的准确率。我们的工作推进了眼球运动机器学习的发展，并为不仅针对眼球运动而且针对类似生物信号的通用表示学习方法提供了见解。 本文提出CLRGaze方法，通过对比学习在自监督框架下学习眼动信号的特征表示，无需人工特征工程。 Louise Gillian C. Bautista,Prospero C. Naval Jr cs.CV

title: A Novel Move-To-Front-or-Logarithmic Position (MFLP) Online List Update Algorithm
title_zh: 一种新颖的前移或对数位置（MFLP）在线列表更新算法
comment: 11 pages, 2 figures, accepted in International Conference on Discrete Mathematics and its Applications to Network Sciences (ICDMANS) 2018, BITS, Pilani, K.K Birla Campus, Goa, India
comments: 11 pages, 2 figures, accepted in International Conference on Discrete Mathematics and its Applications to Network Sciences (ICDMANS) 2018, BITS, Pilani, K.K Birla Campus, Goa, India
abstract: In this paper we propose a novel online deterministic list update algorithm known as Move-To-Front-or-Logarithmic Position (MFLP). Our proposed algorithm MFLP achieves a competitive ratio of 2 for larger list with respect to static optimum offline algorithm, whereas MFLP is not competitive for smaller list. We also show that MFLP is 2 competitive with respect to dynamic optimum offline algorithm. Our results open up a new direction of work towards classifying the online algorithms based on competitive and not competitive.
summary: In this paper we propose a novel online deterministic list update algorithm known as Move-To-Front-or-Logarithmic Position (MFLP). Our proposed algorithm MFLP achieves a competitive ratio of 2 for larger list with respect to static optimum offline algorithm, whereas MFLP is not competitive for smaller list. We also show that MFLP is 2 competitive with respect to dynamic optimum offline algorithm. Our results open up a new direction of work towards classifying the online algorithms based on competitive and not competitive.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的在线确定性列表更新算法，称为移动到前面或对数位置（MFLP）。我们提出的算法 MFLP 对于较大的列表相对于静态最优离线算法实现了 2 的竞争比，而 MFLP 对于较小的列表没有竞争力。我们还表明 MFLP 相对于动态最优离线算法具有 2 竞争力。我们的结果开辟了一个新的工作方向，即根据竞争性和非竞争性对在线算法进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型在线确定性列表更新算法MFLP，针对不同规模列表实现差异化竞争比。
AI.motivation: 现有在线列表更新算法在不同规模数据集上表现不一致，缺乏基于竞争性的分类标准。
AI.method: 设计结合Move-To-Front与对数位置移动策略的MFLP算法，根据列表规模动态调整元素移动位置。
AI.result: MFLP在较大列表上达到静态最优离线算法2倍竞争比，在动态最优离线算法下保持2竞争性，但小列表不具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 研究为在线算法分类提供了新方向，揭示了基于竞争性划分算法性能边界的可能性。

title: Enactive Mandala: Audio-visualizing Brain Waves
title_zh: 活跃的曼陀罗：视听脑电波
abstract: We are exploring the design and implementation of artificial expressions, kinetic audio-visual representations of real-time physiological data that reflect emotional and cognitive state. In this work, we demonstrate a prototype, the Enactive Mandala, which maps real-time EEG signals to modulate ambient music and animated visual music. Transparent real-time audio-visual feedback of brainwave qualities supports intuitive insight into the connection between thoughts and physiological states.
summary: We are exploring the design and implementation of artificial expressions, kinetic audio-visual representations of real-time physiological data that reflect emotional and cognitive state. In this work, we demonstrate a prototype, the Enactive Mandala, which maps real-time EEG signals to modulate ambient music and animated visual music. Transparent real-time audio-visual feedback of brainwave qualities supports intuitive insight into the connection between thoughts and physiological states.
abstract_zh: 我们正在探索人工表达的设计和实现，以及反映情绪和认知状态的实时生理数据的动态视听表示。在这项工作中，我们演示了一个原型，Enactive Mandala，它映射实时脑电图信号来调制环境音乐和动画视觉音乐。脑电波质量的透明实时视听反馈支持对思想和生理状态之间联系的直观洞察。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个名为Enactive Mandala的原型系统，通过实时将脑电波（EEG）信号转化为环境音乐和动画视觉，提供直观的身心状态反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有生理数据可视化方法缺乏直观性和实时性，难以帮助用户有效理解思维与生理状态的关联，需探索更具沉浸感的反馈方式。
AI.method: 通过实时采集EEG信号，利用算法将脑波特征映射到音乐参数（如节奏、音高）和视觉动态（如色彩、形态变化），构建多感官反馈系统。
AI.result: 成功开发出可实时响应脑波变化的视听反馈原型，验证了该系统在增强用户对认知-生理关联感知方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了实时音频可视化反馈在提升身心状态认知中的潜力，为神经反馈训练和心理健康干预提供了新的交互范式。

title: Robust Hierarchical Planning with Policy Delegation
title_zh: 具有政策授权的稳健分层规划
abstract: We propose a novel framework and algorithm for hierarchical planning based on the principle of delegation. This framework, the Markov Intent Process, features a collection of skills which are each specialised to perform a single task well. Skills are aware of their intended effects and are able to analyse planning goals to delegate planning to the best-suited skill. This principle dynamically creates a hierarchy of plans, in which each skill plans for sub-goals for which it is specialised. The proposed planning method features on-demand execution---skill policies are only evaluated when needed. Plans are only generated at the highest level, then expanded and optimised when the latest state information is available. The high-level plan retains the initial planning intent and previously computed skills, effectively reducing the computation needed to adapt to environmental changes. We show this planning approach is experimentally very competitive to classic planning and reinforcement learning techniques on a variety of domains, both in terms of solution length and planning time.
summary: We propose a novel framework and algorithm for hierarchical planning based on the principle of delegation. This framework, the Markov Intent Process, features a collection of skills which are each specialised to perform a single task well. Skills are aware of their intended effects and are able to analyse planning goals to delegate planning to the best-suited skill. This principle dynamically creates a hierarchy of plans, in which each skill plans for sub-goals for which it is specialised. The proposed planning method features on-demand execution---skill policies are only evaluated when needed. Plans are only generated at the highest level, then expanded and optimised when the latest state information is available. The high-level plan retains the initial planning intent and previously computed skills, effectively reducing the computation needed to adapt to environmental changes. We show this planning approach is experimentally very competitive to classic planning and reinforcement learning techniques on a variety of domains, both in terms of solution length and planning time.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于委托原则的分层规划的新颖框架和算法。这个框架，即马尔可夫意图过程，具有一系列技能，每个技能都专门用于很好地执行单个任务。技能了解其预期效果，并能够分析规划目标，将规划委托给最适合的技能。这一原则动态地创建了一个计划层次结构，其中每个技能都针对其专业的子目标进行计划。所提出的规划方法具有按需执行的特点——仅在需要时评估技能策略。计划仅在最高级别生成，然后在获得最新状态信息时进行扩展和优化。高层规划保留了最初的规划意图和之前的计算技能，有效减少了适应环境变化所需的计算量。我们通过实验表明，无论是在解决方案长度还是规划时间方面，这种规划方法在各个领域都比经典规划和强化学习技术更具竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于委托原则的分层规划框架——马尔可夫意图过程，通过动态创建技能层次结构实现高效规划。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法在复杂环境中存在计算效率低、适应性差的问题，需设计更高效的分层规划机制以应对动态变化。
AI.method: 构建包含专用技能的马尔可夫意图过程框架，通过技能自主分析目标并委托最优子任务，实现按需执行与高阶计划动态扩展。
AI.result: 在多个领域实验表明，该方法在解长度和规划时间上均优于经典规划与强化学习技术。
AI.conclusion: 委托式分层规划框架通过技能复用与动态层次结构，有效提升了复杂环境下的规划效率与鲁棒性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于委托原则的分层规划框架——马尔可夫意图过程，通过动态创建技能层次结构实现高效规划。
motivation: 传统规划方法在复杂环境中存在计算效率低、适应性差的问题，需设计更高效的分层规划机制以应对动态变化。
method: 构建包含专用技能的马尔可夫意图过程框架，通过技能自主分析目标并委托最优子任务，实现按需执行与高阶计划动态扩展。
result: 在多个领域实验表明，该方法在解长度和规划时间上均优于经典规划与强化学习技术。
conclusion: 委托式分层规划框架通过技能复用与动态层次结构，有效提升了复杂环境下的规划效率与鲁棒性。
search_text: Robust Hierarchical Planning with Policy Delegation 具有政策授权的稳健分层规划 We propose a novel framework and algorithm for hierarchical planning based on the principle of delegation. This framework, the Markov Intent Process, features a collection of skills which are each specialised to perform a single task well. Skills are aware of their intended effects and are able to analyse planning goals to delegate planning to the best-suited skill. This principle dynamically creates a hierarchy of plans, in which each skill plans for sub-goals for which it is specialised. The proposed planning method features on-demand execution---skill policies are only evaluated when needed. Plans are only generated at the highest level, then expanded and optimised when the latest state information is available. The high-level plan retains the initial planning intent and previously computed skills, effectively reducing the computation needed to adapt to environmental changes. We show this planning approach is experimentally very competitive to classic planning and reinforcement learning techniques on a variety of domains, both in terms of solution length and planning time. 我们提出了一种基于委托原则的分层规划的新颖框架和算法。这个框架，即马尔可夫意图过程，具有一系列技能，每个技能都专门用于很好地执行单个任务。技能了解其预期效果，并能够分析规划目标，将规划委托给最适合的技能。这一原则动态地创建了一个计划层次结构，其中每个技能都针对其专业的子目标进行计划。所提出的规划方法具有按需执行的特点——仅在需要时评估技能策略。计划仅在最高级别生成，然后在获得最新状态信息时进行扩展和优化。高层规划保留了最初的规划意图和之前的计算技能，有效减少了适应环境变化所需的计算量。我们通过实验表明，无论是在解决方案长度还是规划时间方面，这种规划方法在各个领域都比经典规划和强化学习技术更具竞争力。 本文提出了一种基于委托原则的分层规划框架——马尔可夫意图过程，通过动态创建技能层次结构实现高效规划。 Tin Lai,Philippe Morere cs.AI

title: CRAB: Class Representation Attentive BERT for Hate Speech Identification in Social Media
title_zh: CRAB：用于社交媒体中仇恨言论识别的类别表示 Attention BERT
abstract: In recent years, social media platforms have hosted an explosion of hate speech and objectionable content. The urgent need for effective automatic hate speech detection models have drawn remarkable investment from companies and researchers. Social media posts are generally short and their semantics could drastically be altered by even a single token. Thus, it is crucial for this task to learn context-aware input representations, and consider relevancy scores between input embeddings and class representations as an additional signal. To accommodate these needs, this paper introduces CRAB (Class Representation Attentive BERT), a neural model for detecting hate speech in social media. The model benefits from two semantic representations: (i) trainable token-wise and sentence-wise class representations, and (ii) contextualized input embeddings from state-of-the-art BERT encoder. To investigate effectiveness of CRAB, we train our model on Twitter data and compare it against strong baselines. Our results show that CRAB achieves 1.89% relative improved Macro-averaged F1 over state-of-the-art baseline. The results of this research open an opportunity for the future research on automated abusive behavior detection in social media

The urgent need for effective automatic hate speech detection models have drawn remarkable investment from companies and researchers. Social media posts are generally short and their semantics could drastically be altered by even a single token. Thus, it is crucial for this task to learn context-aware input representations, and consider relevancy scores between input embeddings and class representations as an additional signal. To accommodate these needs, this paper introduces CRAB (Class Representation Attentive BERT), a neural model for detecting hate speech in social media. The model benefits from two semantic representations: (i) trainable token-wise and sentence-wise class representations, and (ii) contextualized input embeddings from state-of-the-art BERT encoder. To investigate effectiveness of CRAB, we train our model on Twitter data and compare it against strong baselines. Our results show that CRAB achieves 1.89% relative improved Macro-averaged F1 over state-of-the-art baseline. The results of this research open an opportunity for the future research on automated abusive behavior detection in social media
abstract_zh: 近年来，社交媒体平台上仇恨言论和令人反感的内容激增。对有效的自动仇恨言论检测模型的迫切需求吸引了公司和研究人员的大量投资。社交媒体帖子通常都很短，即使是一个标记也可能会极大地改变它们的语义。因此，对于此任务来说，学习上下文感知输入表示并将输入嵌入和类表示之间的相关性分数视为附加信号至关重要。为了满足这些需求，本文引入了 CRAB（Class Representation Attentive BERT），一种用于检测社交媒体中仇恨言论的神经模型。该模型受益于两种语义表示：(i) 可训练的按标记和按句子的类表示，以及 (ii) 来自最先进的 BERT 编码器的上下文化输入嵌入。为了研究 CRAB 的有效性，我们在 Twitter 数据上训练我们的模型，并将其与强大的基线进行比较。我们的结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，CRAB 的宏观平均 F1 相对提高了 1.89%。这项研究的结果为社交媒体中自动虐待行为检测的未来研究提供了机会

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRAB模型，通过结合可训练的类别表示和BERT嵌入，用于社交媒体中的仇恨言论检测。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体短文本语义易受单字影响，需上下文感知表示及类别相关性信号以提升仇恨言论检测效果。
AI.method: CRAB模型融合两类语义表示：可训练的token级/句级类别表示与BERT的上下文嵌入，通过注意力机制关联输入与类别表示。
AI.result: 在Twitter数据集上，CRAB相较基线模型实现1.89%的相对Macro-F1提升，验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CRAB为社交媒体自动化检测提供了新方法，未来可拓展至其他滥用行为识别研究。

authors_text: Michelle A. Lee,Brent Yi,Roberto Martín-Martín,Silvio Savarese,Jeannette Bohg
title: Multimodal Sensor Fusion with Differentiable Filters
title_zh: 具有可微分滤波器的多模态传感器融合
comment: Published in IROS 2020. Updated sponsors, fixed Kalman gain typo
comments: Published in IROS 2020. Updated sponsors, fixed Kalman gain typo
abstract: Leveraging multimodal information with recursive Bayesian filters improves performance and robustness of state estimation, as recursive filters can combine different modalities according to their uncertainties. Prior work has studied how to optimally fuse different sensor modalities with analytical state estimation algorithms. However, deriving the dynamics and measurement models along with their noise profile can be difficult or lead to intractable models. Differentiable filters provide a way to learn these models end-to-end while retaining the algorithmic structure of recursive filters. This can be especially helpful when working with sensor modalities that are high dimensional and have very different characteristics. In contact-rich manipulation, we want to combine visual sensing (which gives us global information) with tactile sensing (which gives us local information). In this paper, we study new differentiable filtering architectures to fuse heterogeneous sensor information. As case studies, we evaluate three tasks: two in planar pushing (simulated and real) and one in manipulating a kinematically constrained door (simulated). In extensive evaluations, we find that differentiable filters that leverage crossmodal sensor information reach comparable accuracies to unstructured LSTM models, while presenting interpretability benefits that may be important for safety-critical systems. We also release an open-source library for creating and training differentiable Bayesian filters in PyTorch, which can be found on our project website: https://sites.google.com/view/multimodalfilter

This can be especially helpful when working with sensor modalities that are high dimensional and have very different characteristics. In contact-rich manipulation, we want to combine visual sensing (which gives us global information) with tactile sensing (which gives us local information). In this paper, we study new differentiable filtering architectures to fuse heterogeneous sensor information. As case studies, we evaluate three tasks: two in planar pushing (simulated and real) and one in manipulating a kinematically constrained door (simulated). In extensive evaluations, we find that differentiable filters that leverage crossmodal sensor information reach comparable accuracies to unstructured LSTM models, while presenting interpretability benefits that may be important for safety-critical systems. We also release an open-source library for creating and training differentiable Bayesian filters in PyTorch, which can be found on our project website: https://sites.google.com/view/multimodalfilter
abstract_zh: 通过递归贝叶斯滤波器利用多模态信息可以提高状态估计的性能和鲁棒性，因为递归滤波器可以根据其不确定性组合不同的模态。先前的工作研究了如何将不同的传感器模式与分析状态估计算法最佳地融合。然而，推导动力学和测量模型及其噪声分布可能很困难，或者会导致模型变得棘手。可微滤波器提供了一种端到端学习这些模型的方法，同时保留了递归滤波器的算法结构。当使用高维且具有截然不同特征的传感器模式时，这尤其有用。在富含接触的操作中，我们希望将视觉传感（为我们提供全局信息）与触觉传感（为我们提供局部信息）结合起来。在本文中，我们研究了新的可微分过滤架构来融合异构传感器信息。作为案例研究，我们评估了三项任务：两项是平面推动（模拟和真实），一项是操纵运动学约束的门（模拟）。在广泛的评估中，我们发现利用跨模态传感器信息的可微分滤波器可以达到与非结构化 LSTM 模型相当的精度，同时呈现出对安全关键系统可能很重要的可解释性优势。我们还发布了一个开源库，用于在 PyTorch 中创建和训练可微贝叶斯滤波器，可以在我们的项目网站上找到该库：https://sites.google.com/view/multimodalfilter

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微分滤波器的多模态传感器融合方法，用于提升状态估计的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统递归贝叶斯滤波器虽能融合多模态传感器信息，但建模动态和噪声特性困难，尤其在高维异构传感器（如视觉与触觉）融合场景中存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计新的可微分滤波架构，通过端到端学习动态和观测模型，结合视觉与触觉等异构传感器信息，并在平面推移和机械门操控任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在准确率上可与无结构LSTM模型媲美，同时提供可解释性优势；并开源了PyTorch实现库。
AI.conclusion: 可微分滤波器有效解决了异构传感器融合问题，其可解释性对安全关键系统具有重要意义，开源工具助力相关研究。

As case studies, we evaluate three tasks: two in planar pushing (simulated and real) and one in manipulating a kinematically constrained door (simulated). In extensive evaluations, we find that differentiable filters that leverage crossmodal sensor information reach comparable accuracies to unstructured LSTM models, while presenting interpretability benefits that may be important for safety-critical systems. We also release an open-source library for creating and training differentiable Bayesian filters in PyTorch, which can be found on our project website: https://sites.google.com/view/multimodalfilter 通过递归贝叶斯滤波器利用多模态信息可以提高状态估计的性能和鲁棒性，因为递归滤波器可以根据其不确定性组合不同的模态。先前的工作研究了如何将不同的传感器模式与分析状态估计算法最佳地融合。然而，推导动力学和测量模型及其噪声分布可能很困难，或者会导致模型变得棘手。可微滤波器提供了一种端到端学习这些模型的方法，同时保留了递归滤波器的算法结构。当使用高维且具有截然不同特征的传感器模式时，这尤其有用。在富含接触的操作中，我们希望将视觉传感（为我们提供全局信息）与触觉传感（为我们提供局部信息）结合起来。在本文中，我们研究了新的可微分过滤架构来融合异构传感器信息。作为案例研究，我们评估了三项任务：两项是平面推动（模拟和真实），一项是操纵运动学约束的门（模拟）。在广泛的评估中，我们发现利用跨模态传感器信息的可微分滤波器可以达到与非结构化 LSTM 模型相当的精度，同时呈现出对安全关键系统可能很重要的可解释性优势。我们还发布了一个开源库，用于在 PyTorch 中创建和训练可微贝叶斯滤波器，可以在我们的项目网站上找到该库：https://sites.google.com/view/multimodalfilter 本文提出了一种基于可微分滤波器的多模态传感器融合方法，用于提升状态估计的性能和鲁棒性。 Michelle A. Lee,Brent Yi,Roberto Martín-Martín,Silvio Savarese,Jeannette Bohg cs.RO

authors_text: Jiangning Zhang,Xianfang Zeng,Chao Xu,Jun Chen,Yong Liu,Yunliang Jiang
title: APB2FaceV2: Real-Time Audio-Guided Multi-Face Reenactment
title_zh: APB2FaceV2：实时音频引导多脸重演
abstract: Audio-guided face reenactment aims to generate a photorealistic face that has matched facial expression with the input audio. However, current methods can only reenact a special person once the model is trained or need extra operations such as 3D rendering and image post-fusion on the premise of generating vivid faces. To solve the above challenge, we propose a novel \emph{R}eal-time \emph{A}udio-guided \emph{M}ulti-face reenactment approach named \emph{APB2FaceV2}, which can reenact different target faces among multiple persons with corresponding reference face and drive audio signal as inputs. Enabling the model to be trained end-to-end and have a faster speed, we design a novel module named Adaptive Convolution (AdaConv) to infuse audio information into the network, as well as adopt a lightweight network as our backbone so that the network can run in real time on CPU and GPU. Comparison experiments prove the superiority of our approach than existing state-of-the-art methods, and further experiments demonstrate that our method is efficient and flexible for practical applications https://github.com/zhangzjn/APB2FaceV2
summary: Audio-guided face reenactment aims to generate a photorealistic face that has matched facial expression with the input audio. However, current methods can only reenact a special person once the model is trained or need extra operations such as 3D rendering and image post-fusion on the premise of generating vivid faces. To solve the above challenge, we propose a novel \emph{R}eal-time \emph{A}udio-guided \emph{M}ulti-face reenactment approach named \emph{APB2FaceV2}, which can reenact different target faces among multiple persons with corresponding reference face and drive audio signal as inputs. Enabling the model to be trained end-to-end and have a faster speed, we design a novel module named Adaptive Convolution (AdaConv) to infuse audio information into the network, as well as adopt a lightweight network as our backbone so that the network can run in real time on CPU and GPU. Comparison experiments prove the superiority of our approach than existing state-of-the-art methods, and further experiments demonstrate that our method is efficient and flexible for practical applications https://github.com/zhangzjn/APB2FaceV2
abstract_zh: 音频引导的面部重演旨在生成将面部表情与输入音频相匹配的逼真面部。然而，目前的方法只能在模型训练完成后再现一个特殊的人，或者在生成生动面部的前提下需要3D渲染和图像后融合等额外操作。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的\emph{R}实时\emph{A}音频引导\emph{M}多面部重演方法，名为\emph{APB2FaceV2}，该方法可以在具有相应参考面部的多人之间重演不同的目标面部，并驱动音频信号作为输入。为了使模型能够进行端到端训练并具有更快的速度，我们设计了一个名为自适应卷积（AdaConv）的新颖模块，将音频信息注入到网络中，并采用轻量级网络作为主干，使网络可以在CPU和GPU上实时运行。比较实验证明了我们的方法比现有最先进方法的优越性，进一步的实验证明我们的方法对于实际应用来说是高效且灵活的 https://github.com/zhangzjn/APB2FaceV2

AI.tldr: 本文提出APB2FaceV2方法，实现基于音频的实时多面孔重演，通过输入参考面孔和音频信号生成匹配表情的逼真人脸。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需预先训练特定人物模型或依赖3D渲染等复杂操作，难以实现实时多面孔重演。本文旨在开发无需额外操作、支持多目标面孔的实时音频驱动方案。
AI.method: 设计自适应卷积模块（AdaConv）将音频信息注入网络，并采用轻量级网络架构，实现CPU/GPU端到端实时推理。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在生成质量上优于现有SOTA方法，且在实际应用中展现高效性与灵活性。
AI.conclusion: APB2FaceV2通过创新模块设计与轻量化架构，有效解决了多面孔实时音频驱动重演的技术难题，具有广泛的应用价值。

authors_text: Jian-Guo Zhang,Kazuma Hashimoto,Wenhao Liu,Chien-Sheng Wu,Yao Wan,Philip S. Yu,Richard Socher,Caiming Xiong
title: Discriminative Nearest Neighbor Few-Shot Intent Detection by Transferring Natural Language Inference
title_zh: 通过迁移自然语言推理进行判别性最近邻少样本意图检测
comment: 19 pages, accepted by EMNLP 2020 main conference as a long paper. Code will be available at https://github.com/salesforce/DNNC-few-shot-intent
comments: 19 pages, accepted by EMNLP 2020 main conference as a long paper. Code will be available at https://github.com/salesforce/DNNC-few-shot-intent
abstract: Intent detection is one of the core components of goal-oriented dialog systems, and detecting out-of-scope (OOS) intents is also a practically important skill. Few-shot learning is attracting much attention to mitigate data scarcity, but OOS detection becomes even more challenging. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective approach, discriminative nearest neighbor classification with deep self-attention. Unlike softmax classifiers, we leverage BERT-style pairwise encoding to train a binary classifier that estimates the best matched training example for a user input. We propose to boost the discriminative ability by transferring a natural language inference (NLI) model. Our extensive experiments on a large-scale multi-domain intent detection task show that our method achieves more stable and accurate in-domain and OOS detection accuracy than RoBERTa-based classifiers and embedding-based nearest neighbor approaches. More notably, the NLI transfer enables our 10-shot model to perform competitively with 50-shot or even full-shot classifiers, while we can keep the inference time constant by leveraging a faster embedding retrieval model.
summary: Intent detection is one of the core components of goal-oriented dialog systems, and detecting out-of-scope (OOS) intents is also a practically important skill. Few-shot learning is attracting much attention to mitigate data scarcity, but OOS detection becomes even more challenging. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective approach, discriminative nearest neighbor classification with deep self-attention. Unlike softmax classifiers, we leverage BERT-style pairwise encoding to train a binary classifier that estimates the best matched training example for a user input. We propose to boost the discriminative ability by transferring a natural language inference (NLI) model. Our extensive experiments on a large-scale multi-domain intent detection task show that our method achieves more stable and accurate in-domain and OOS detection accuracy than RoBERTa-based classifiers and embedding-based nearest neighbor approaches. More notably, the NLI transfer enables our 10-shot model to perform competitively with 50-shot or even full-shot classifiers, while we can keep the inference time constant by leveraging a faster embedding retrieval model.
abstract_zh: 意图检测是面向目标的对话系统的核心组件之一，检测超出范围（OOS）意图也是一项实用的重要技能。少样本学习在缓解数据稀缺方面引起了广泛关注，但 OOS 检测变得更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，即具有深度自注意力的判别性最近邻分类。与 softmax 分类器不同，我们利用 BERT 风格的成对编码来训练二元分类器，该分类器估计用户输入的最佳匹配训练示例。我们建议通过迁移自然语言推理（NLI）模型来提高判别能力。我们对大规模多域意图检测任务的大量实验表明，我们的方法比基于 RoBERTa 的分类器和基于嵌入的最近邻方法实现了更稳定、更准确的域内和 OOS 检测精度。更值得注意的是，NLI 传输使我们的 10-shot 模型能够与 50-shot 甚至 full-shot 分类器竞争，同时我们可以通过利用更快的嵌入检索模型来保持推理时间恒定。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移自然语言推理的判别最近邻分类方法，解决少样本意图检测中领域内及超出范围（OOS）意图识别的挑战。
AI.motivation: 少样本学习在意图检测中面临OOS识别困难，传统分类器与嵌入近邻方法存在准确率不稳定或效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用BERT式成对编码训练二元分类器，结合深度自注意力机制，并通过迁移自然语言推理（NLI）模型增强判别能力，利用快速嵌入检索保持推理效率。
AI.result: 在多领域任务中，该方法在领域内和OOS检测准确率均优于RoBERTa分类器及嵌入近邻方法，且10-shot模型性能接近50-shot或全样本模型，推理时间不变。
AI.conclusion: 迁移NLI模型显著提升少样本意图检测效果，尤其在OOS场景下表现优异，同时保持高效推理能力。

title: Probing Acoustic Representations for Phonetic Properties
title_zh: 探索语音属性的声学表征
abstract: Pre-trained acoustic representations such as wav2vec and DeCoAR have attained impressive word error rates (WER) for speech recognition benchmarks, particularly when labeled data is limited. But little is known about what phonetic properties these various representations acquire, and how well they encode transferable features of speech. We compare features from two conventional and four pre-trained systems in some simple frame-level phonetic classification tasks, with classifiers trained on features from one version of the TIMIT dataset and tested on features from another. All contextualized representations offered some level of transferability across domains, and models pre-trained on more audio data give better results; but overall, DeCoAR, the system with the simplest architecture, performs best. This type of benchmarking analysis can thus uncover relative strengths of various proposed acoustic representations.
summary: Pre-trained acoustic representations such as wav2vec and DeCoAR have attained impressive word error rates (WER) for speech recognition benchmarks, particularly when labeled data is limited. But little is known about what phonetic properties these various representations acquire, and how well they encode transferable features of speech. We compare features from two conventional and four pre-trained systems in some simple frame-level phonetic classification tasks, with classifiers trained on features from one version of the TIMIT dataset and tested on features from another. All contextualized representations offered some level of transferability across domains, and models pre-trained on more audio data give better results; but overall, DeCoAR, the system with the simplest architecture, performs best. This type of benchmarking analysis can thus uncover relative strengths of various proposed acoustic representations.
abstract_zh: wav2vec 和 DeCoAR 等预训练的声学表示在语音识别基准测试中取得了令人印象深刻的单词错误率 (WER)，特别是在标记数据有限的情况下。但人们对这些不同的表征所获得的语音特性以及它们对语音可转移特征的编码效果知之甚少。我们在一些简单的帧级语音分类任务中比较了两个传统系统和四个预训练系统的特征，分类器根据一个版本的 TIMIT 数据集的特征进行训练，并根据另一个版本的特征进行测试。所有情境化表示都提供了一定程度的跨领域可转移性，并且针对更多音频数据进行预训练的模型可以提供更好的结果；但总体来说，架构最简单的DeCoAR系统表现最好。因此，这种类型的基准分析可以揭示各种提出的声学表示的相对优势。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了不同预训练声学表示在语音分类任务中的表现，评估其编码的语音特征和跨领域可转移性。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练声学模型在语音识别中表现优异，但其编码的语音特征及可转移性尚不明确，需通过基准测试分析不同模型的相对优势。
AI.method: 在TIMIT数据集上训练分类器并测试跨数据集性能，比较传统模型与四种预训练系统（包括DeCoAR）的特征表现。
AI.result: 所有上下文相关模型均具备跨领域可转移性，预训练数据量越大效果越佳，但架构简单的DeCoAR表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 基准测试可有效揭示不同声学表示的特性，为模型选择和优化提供依据。
