title: Pre-trained Summarization Distillation
title_zh: 预训练摘要蒸馏
abstract: Recent state-of-the-art approaches to summarization utilize large pre-trained Transformer models. Distilling these models to smaller student models has become critically important for practical use; however there are many different distillation methods proposed by the NLP literature. Recent work on distilling BERT for classification and regression tasks shows strong performance using direct knowledge distillation. Alternatively, machine translation practitioners distill using pseudo-labeling, where a small model is trained on the translations of a larger model. A third, simpler approach is to 'shrink and fine-tune' (SFT), which avoids any explicit distillation by copying parameters to a smaller student model and then fine-tuning. We compare these three approaches for distillation of Pegasus and BART, the current and former state of the art, pre-trained summarization models, and find that SFT outperforms knowledge distillation and pseudo-labeling on the CNN/DailyMail dataset, but under-performs pseudo-labeling on the more abstractive XSUM dataset. PyTorch Code and checkpoints of different sizes are available through Hugging Face transformers here http://tiny.cc/4iy0tz.
summary: Recent state-of-the-art approaches to summarization utilize large pre-trained Transformer models. Distilling these models to smaller student models has become critically important for practical use; however there are many different distillation methods proposed by the NLP literature. Recent work on distilling BERT for classification and regression tasks shows strong performance using direct knowledge distillation. Alternatively, machine translation practitioners distill using pseudo-labeling, where a small model is trained on the translations of a larger model. A third, simpler approach is to 'shrink and fine-tune' (SFT), which avoids any explicit distillation by copying parameters to a smaller student model and then fine-tuning. We compare these three approaches for distillation of Pegasus and BART, the current and former state of the art, pre-trained summarization models, and find that SFT outperforms knowledge distillation and pseudo-labeling on the CNN/DailyMail dataset, but under-performs pseudo-labeling on the more abstractive XSUM dataset. PyTorch Code and checkpoints of different sizes are available through Hugging Face transformers here http://tiny.cc/4iy0tz.
abstract_zh: 最近最先进的总结方法利用大型预训练 Transformer 模型。将这些模型提炼为更小的学生模型对于实际使用变得至关重要；然而，NLP 文献提出了许多不同的蒸馏方法。最近关于将 BERT 蒸馏用于分类和回归任务的工作显示了使用直接知识蒸馏的强大性能。或者，机器翻译从业者使用伪标签进行提炼，其中一个小模型根据较大模型的翻译进行训练。第三种更简单的方法是“收缩和微调”（S​​FT），它通过将参数复制到较小的学生模型然后进行微调来避免任何显式蒸馏。我们比较了 Pegasus 和 BART 的三种蒸馏方法、当前和以前的最先进技术、预训练的摘要模型，发现 SFT 在 CNN/DailyMail 数据集上优于知识蒸馏和伪标记，但在更抽象的 XSUM 数据集上表现不佳。 PyTorch 代码和不同大小的检查点可通过此处的 Hugging Face 转换器获得：http://tiny.cc/4iy0tz。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种预训练摘要模型蒸馏方法在不同数据集上的效果。
AI.motivation: 大型预训练Transformer模型在摘要任务中表现优异，但实际应用需将其蒸馏为更小模型以适应计算资源限制。
AI.method: 对比了直接知识蒸馏、伪标签蒸馏和'缩小并微调'(SFT)三种方法在Pegasus和BART模型上的性能。
AI.result: SFT在CNN/DailyMail数据集上优于其他方法，但在更抽象的XSUM数据集上表现弱于伪标签方法。
AI.conclusion: SFT是多数场景的有效蒸馏方案，但伪标签在处理高度抽象文本时更具优势，需根据任务特性选择蒸馏策略。

authors_text: Yann Pequignot,Mathieu Alain,Patrick Dallaire,Alireza Yeganehparast,Pascal Germain,Josée Desharnais,François Laviolette
title: Out-of-distribution detection for regression tasks: parameter versus predictor entropy
title_zh: 回归任务的分布外检测：参数与预测熵
abstract: It is crucial to detect when an instance lies downright too far from the training samples for the machine learning model to be trusted, a challenge known as out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. For neural networks, one approach to this task consists of learning a diversity of predictors that all can explain the training data. This information can be used to estimate the epistemic uncertainty at a given newly observed instance in terms of a measure of the disagreement of the predictions. Evaluation and certification of the ability of a method to detect OOD require specifying instances which are likely to occur in deployment yet on which no prediction is available. Focusing on regression tasks, we choose a simple yet insightful model for this OOD distribution and conduct an empirical evaluation of the ability of various methods to discriminate OOD samples from the data. Moreover, we exhibit evidence that a diversity of parameters may fail to translate to a diversity of predictors. Based on the choice of an OOD distribution, we propose a new way of estimating the entropy of a distribution on predictors based on nearest neighbors in function space. This leads to a variational objective which, combined with the family of distributions given by a generative neural network, systematically produces a diversity of predictors that provides a robust way to detect OOD samples.
summary: It is crucial to detect when an instance lies downright too far from the training samples for the machine learning model to be trusted, a challenge known as out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. For neural networks, one approach to this task consists of learning a diversity of predictors that all can explain the training data. This information can be used to estimate the epistemic uncertainty at a given newly observed instance in terms of a measure of the disagreement of the predictions. Evaluation and certification of the ability of a method to detect OOD require specifying instances which are likely to occur in deployment yet on which no prediction is available. Focusing on regression tasks, we choose a simple yet insightful model for this OOD distribution and conduct an empirical evaluation of the ability of various methods to discriminate OOD samples from the data. Moreover, we exhibit evidence that a diversity of parameters may fail to translate to a diversity of predictors. Based on the choice of an OOD distribution, we propose a new way of estimating the entropy of a distribution on predictors based on nearest neighbors in function space. This leads to a variational objective which, combined with the family of distributions given by a generative neural network, systematically produces a diversity of predictors that provides a robust way to detect OOD samples.
abstract_zh: 为了让机器学习模型可信，检测实例何时距离训练样本太远至关重要，这一挑战称为分布外 (OOD) 检测。对于神经网络来说，完成此任务的一种方法是学习多种预测变量，这些预测变量都可以解释训练数据。该信息可用于根据预测不一致的度量来估计给定新观察到的实例的认知不确定性。对检测 OOD 的方法的能力进行评估和认证需要指定部署中可能发生但无法预测的实例。着眼于回归任务，我们为这种 OOD 分布选择了一个简单但富有洞察力的模型，并对各种方法从数据中区分 OOD 样本的能力进行了实证评估。此外，我们提供的证据表明，参数的多样性可能无法转化为预测变量的多样性。基于 OOD 分布的选择，我们提出了一种基于函数空间中最近邻估计预测变量分布熵的新方法。这导致了一个变分目标，与生成神经网络给出的分布族相结合，系统地产生了多种预测变量，从而提供了检测 OOD 样本的稳健方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预测器熵的回归任务分布外检测方法，通过参数与预测器多样性差异分析改进检测效果。
AI.motivation: 分布外检测对保障机器学习模型可靠性至关重要，但现有方法在回归任务中难以有效衡量预测器多样性，导致检测性能不足。
AI.method: 构建生成神经网络家族生成预测器分布，结合函数空间最近邻计算预测器熵，设计变分目标函数以系统化生成多样化预测器。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法能有效区分分布外样本，揭示参数多样性未必带来预测器多样性，并在选定分布下验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过预测器熵估计的新型检测框架，为回归任务提供了更稳健的分布外检测方案，凸显预测器多样性研究的重要性。

conclusion: 通过预测器熵估计的新型检测框架，为回归任务提供了更稳健的分布外检测方案，凸显预测器多样性研究的重要性。
search_text: Out-of-distribution detection for regression tasks: parameter versus predictor entropy 回归任务的分布外检测：参数与预测熵 It is crucial to detect when an instance lies downright too far from the training samples for the machine learning model to be trusted, a challenge known as out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. For neural networks, one approach to this task consists of learning a diversity of predictors that all can explain the training data. This information can be used to estimate the epistemic uncertainty at a given newly observed instance in terms of a measure of the disagreement of the predictions. Evaluation and certification of the ability of a method to detect OOD require specifying instances which are likely to occur in deployment yet on which no prediction is available. Focusing on regression tasks, we choose a simple yet insightful model for this OOD distribution and conduct an empirical evaluation of the ability of various methods to discriminate OOD samples from the data. Moreover, we exhibit evidence that a diversity of parameters may fail to translate to a diversity of predictors. Based on the choice of an OOD distribution, we propose a new way of estimating the entropy of a distribution on predictors based on nearest neighbors in function space. This leads to a variational objective which, combined with the family of distributions given by a generative neural network, systematically produces a diversity of predictors that provides a robust way to detect OOD samples. 为了让机器学习模型可信，检测实例何时距离训练样本太远至关重要，这一挑战称为分布外 (OOD) 检测。对于神经网络来说，完成此任务的一种方法是学习多种预测变量，这些预测变量都可以解释训练数据。该信息可用于根据预测不一致的度量来估计给定新观察到的实例的认知不确定性。对检测 OOD 的方法的能力进行评估和认证需要指定部署中可能发生但无法预测的实例。着眼于回归任务，我们为这种 OOD 分布选择了一个简单但富有洞察力的模型，并对各种方法从数据中区分 OOD 样本的能力进行了实证评估。此外，我们提供的证据表明，参数的多样性可能无法转化为预测变量的多样性。基于 OOD 分布的选择，我们提出了一种基于函数空间中最近邻估计预测变量分布熵的新方法。这导致了一个变分目标，与生成神经网络给出的分布族相结合，系统地产生了多种预测变量，从而提供了检测 OOD 样本的稳健方法。 本文提出一种基于预测器熵的回归任务分布外检测方法，通过参数与预测器多样性差异分析改进检测效果。 Yann Pequignot,Mathieu Alain,Patrick Dallaire,Alireza Yeganehparast,Pascal Germain,Josée Desharnais,François Laviolette cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Linh Kästner,Samim Ahmadi,Florian Jonietz,Mathias Ziegler,Peter Jung,Giuseppe Caire,Jens Lambrecht
title: Classification of Spot-welded Joints in Laser Thermography Data using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络对激光热成像数据中的点焊接头进行分类
abstract: Spot welding is a crucial process step in various industries. However, classification of spot welding quality is still a tedious process due to the complexity and sensitivity of the test material, which drain conventional approaches to its limits. In this paper, we propose an approach for quality inspection of spot weldings using images from laser thermography data.We propose data preparation approaches based on the underlying physics of spot welded joints, heated with pulsed laser thermography by analyzing the intensity over time and derive dedicated data filters to generate training datasets. Subsequently, we utilize convolutional neural networks to classify weld quality and compare the performance of different models against each other. We achieve competitive results in terms of classifying the different welding quality classes compared to traditional approaches, reaching an accuracy of more than 95 percent. Finally, we explore the effect of different augmentation methods.
summary: Spot welding is a crucial process step in various industries. However, classification of spot welding quality is still a tedious process due to the complexity and sensitivity of the test material, which drain conventional approaches to its limits. In this paper, we propose an approach for quality inspection of spot weldings using images from laser thermography data.We propose data preparation approaches based on the underlying physics of spot welded joints, heated with pulsed laser thermography by analyzing the intensity over time and derive dedicated data filters to generate training datasets. Subsequently, we utilize convolutional neural networks to classify weld quality and compare the performance of different models against each other. We achieve competitive results in terms of classifying the different welding quality classes compared to traditional approaches, reaching an accuracy of more than 95 percent. Finally, we explore the effect of different augmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 点焊是各个行业中至关重要的工艺步骤。然而，由于测试材料的复杂性和敏感性，点焊质量的分类仍然是一个繁琐的过程，这使传统方法达到了极限。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用激光热成像数据图像进行点焊质量检查的方法。我们提出了基于点焊接头的基础物理的数据准备方法，通过分析随时间变化的强度，用脉冲激光热成像加热，并派生专用数据过滤器来生成训练数据集。随后，我们利用卷积神经网络对焊接质量进行分类，并比较不同模型的性能。与传统方法相比，我们在对不同焊接质量等级进行分类方面取得了具有竞争力的结果，准确率达到 95% 以上。最后，我们探讨了不同增强方法的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经网络（CNN）对激光热成像数据中的点焊连接质量进行分类的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统点焊质量分类方法因测试材料复杂性和敏感性而效率低下，需更高效可靠的检测技术。
AI.method: 基于点焊物理特性分析激光热成像强度随时间的变化，设计数据过滤器生成训练集，利用CNN分类并比较模型性能，同时探索数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在焊接质量分类任务中达到超过95%的准确率，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: CNN方法在点焊质量分类中表现优异，数据增强技术对模型性能有显著影响。

authors_text: Jakob J. Hollenstein,Erwan Renaudo,Matteo Saveriano,Justus Piater
title: Improving the Exploration of Deep Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Domains using Planning for Policy Search
title_zh: 使用策略搜索规划改进连续域中深度强化学习的探索
abstract: Local policy search is performed by most Deep Reinforcement Learning (D-RL) methods, which increases the risk of getting trapped in a local minimum. Furthermore, the availability of a simulation model is not fully exploited in D-RL even in simulation-based training, which potentially decreases efficiency. To better exploit simulation models in policy search, we propose to integrate a kinodynamic planner in the exploration strategy and to learn a control policy in an offline fashion from the generated environment interactions. We call the resulting model-based reinforcement learning method PPS (Planning for Policy Search). We compare PPS with state-of-the-art D-RL methods in typical RL settings including underactuated systems. The comparison shows that PPS, guided by the kinodynamic planner, collects data from a wider region of the state space. This generates training data that helps PPS discover better policies.
summary: Local policy search is performed by most Deep Reinforcement Learning (D-RL) methods, which increases the risk of getting trapped in a local minimum. Furthermore, the availability of a simulation model is not fully exploited in D-RL even in simulation-based training, which potentially decreases efficiency. To better exploit simulation models in policy search, we propose to integrate a kinodynamic planner in the exploration strategy and to learn a control policy in an offline fashion from the generated environment interactions. We call the resulting model-based reinforcement learning method PPS (Planning for Policy Search). We compare PPS with state-of-the-art D-RL methods in typical RL settings including underactuated systems. The comparison shows that PPS, guided by the kinodynamic planner, collects data from a wider region of the state space. This generates training data that helps PPS discover better policies.
abstract_zh: 局部策略搜索由大多数深度强化学习（D-RL）方法执行，这增加了陷入局部最小值的风险。此外，即使在基于模拟的训练中，D-RL 中也没有充分利用模拟模型的可用性，这可能会降低效率。为了更好地利用策略搜索中的模拟模型，我们建议在探索策略中集成运动动力学规划器，并从生成的环境交互中以离线方式学习控制策略。我们将由此产生的基于模型的强化学习方法称为 PPS（策略搜索规划）。我们在典型的 RL 设置（包括欠驱动系统）中将 PPS 与最先进的 D-RL 方法进行比较。比较表明，PPS 在运动动力学规划器的指导下，从状态空间的更广泛区域收集数据。这会生成帮助 PPS 发现更好策略的训练数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于规划的策略搜索方法（PPS），通过整合运动学规划器改进深度强化学习在连续领域的探索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法易陷入局部最优，且未能充分利用模拟模型，导致训练效率低下。
AI.method: 将运动学规划器嵌入探索策略，离线学习控制策略并利用生成的环境交互数据进行训练。
AI.result: PPS在状态空间中收集更广泛的数据，有效发现更优策略，优于现有深度强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: PPS通过结合规划与策略搜索，充分利用模拟模型提升探索效率，为连续域强化学习提供新思路。

Hollenstein,Erwan Renaudo,Matteo Saveriano,Justus Piater cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Unsupervised Learning of Disentangled Speech Content and Style Representation
title_zh: 解开语音内容和风格表示的无监督学习
abstract: We present an approach for unsupervised learning of speech representation disentangling contents and styles. Our model consists of: (1) a local encoder that captures per-frame information; (2) a global encoder that captures per-utterance information; and (3) a conditional decoder that reconstructs speech given local and global latent variables. Our experiments show that (1) the local latent variables encode speech contents, as reconstructed speech can be recognized by ASR with low word error rates (WER), even with a different global encoding; (2) the global latent variables encode speaker style, as reconstructed speech shares speaker identity with the source utterance of the global encoding. Additionally, we demonstrate an useful application from our pre-trained model, where we can train a speaker recognition model from the global latent variables and achieve high accuracy by fine-tuning with as few data as one label per speaker.
summary: We present an approach for unsupervised learning of speech representation disentangling contents and styles. Our model consists of: (1) a local encoder that captures per-frame information; (2) a global encoder that captures per-utterance information; and (3) a conditional decoder that reconstructs speech given local and global latent variables. Our experiments show that (1) the local latent variables encode speech contents, as reconstructed speech can be recognized by ASR with low word error rates (WER), even with a different global encoding; (2) the global latent variables encode speaker style, as reconstructed speech shares speaker identity with the source utterance of the global encoding. Additionally, we demonstrate an useful application from our pre-trained model, where we can train a speaker recognition model from the global latent variables and achieve high accuracy by fine-tuning with as few data as one label per speaker.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种语音表示的无监督学习方法，以解开内容和风格的束缚。我们的模型包括：（1）捕获每帧信息的本地编码器； (2) 捕获每个话语信息的全局编码器； (3) 条件解码器，在给定局部和全局潜在变量的情况下重构语音。我们的实验表明：(1) 局部潜在变量对语音内容进行编码，即使使用不同的全局编码，重构的语音也可以通过 ASR 进行识别，并且单词错误率 (WER) 较低； (2) 全局潜变量对说话者风格进行编码，因为重构的语音与全局编码的源话语共享说话者身份。此外，我们还展示了预训练模型的一个有用应用，我们可以根据全局潜在变量训练说话人识别模型，并通过对每个说话人一个标签的数据进行微调来实现高精度。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督学习方法，将语音内容和风格解耦，通过局部和全局编码器以及条件解码器实现。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据且难以分离内容与风格，本文旨在无监督条件下实现解耦，提升语音处理任务的灵活性和效果。
AI.method: 模型包含局部编码器（捕捉帧级信息）、全局编码器（捕捉utterance级信息）和条件解码器（联合重建语音），通过联合学习分离内容（局部变量）和风格（全局变量）。
AI.result: 实验表明局部变量可被ASR识别（低WER），全局变量保留说话人身份；应用中仅需少量数据微调即可实现高精度说话人识别。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在无监督条件下成功解耦语音内容与风格，为语音处理任务提供了灵活的表示，并在说话人识别中展现了高效性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种无监督学习方法，将语音内容和风格解耦，通过局部和全局编码器以及条件解码器实现。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据且难以分离内容与风格，本文旨在无监督条件下实现解耦，提升语音处理任务的灵活性和效果。
ai_content.method: 模型包含局部编码器（捕捉帧级信息）、全局编码器（捕捉utterance级信息）和条件解码器（联合重建语音），通过联合学习分离内容（局部变量）和风格（全局变量）。
ai_content.result: 实验表明局部变量可被ASR识别（低WER），全局变量保留说话人身份；应用中仅需少量数据微调即可实现高精度说话人识别。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在无监督条件下成功解耦语音内容与风格，为语音处理任务提供了灵活的表示，并在说话人识别中展现了高效性。

search_text: Unsupervised Learning of Disentangled Speech Content and Style Representation 解开语音内容和风格表示的无监督学习 We present an approach for unsupervised learning of speech representation disentangling contents and styles. Our model consists of: (1) a local encoder that captures per-frame information; (2) a global encoder that captures per-utterance information; and (3) a conditional decoder that reconstructs speech given local and global latent variables. Our experiments show that (1) the local latent variables encode speech contents, as reconstructed speech can be recognized by ASR with low word error rates (WER), even with a different global encoding; (2) the global latent variables encode speaker style, as reconstructed speech shares speaker identity with the source utterance of the global encoding. Additionally, we demonstrate an useful application from our pre-trained model, where we can train a speaker recognition model from the global latent variables and achieve high accuracy by fine-tuning with as few data as one label per speaker. 我们提出了一种语音表示的无监督学习方法，以解开内容和风格的束缚。我们的模型包括：（1）捕获每帧信息的本地编码器； (2) 捕获每个话语信息的全局编码器； (3) 条件解码器，在给定局部和全局潜在变量的情况下重构语音。我们的实验表明：(1) 局部潜在变量对语音内容进行编码，即使使用不同的全局编码，重构的语音也可以通过 ASR 进行识别，并且单词错误率 (WER) 较低； (2) 全局潜变量对说话者风格进行编码，因为重构的语音与全局编码的源话语共享说话者身份。此外，我们还展示了预训练模型的一个有用应用，我们可以根据全局潜在变量训练说话人识别模型，并通过对每个说话人一个标签的数据进行微调来实现高精度。 提出一种无监督学习方法，将语音内容和风格解耦，通过局部和全局编码器以及条件解码器实现。 Andros Tjandra,Ruoming Pang,Yu Zhang,Shigeki Karita cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Sreyas Mohan,Ramon Manzorro,Joshua L. Vincent,Binh Tang,Dev Yashpal Sheth,Eero P. Simoncelli,David S. Matteson,Peter A. Crozier,Carlos Fernandez-Granda
title: Deep Denoising For Scientific Discovery: A Case Study In Electron Microscopy
title_zh: 科学发现的深度去噪：电子显微镜案例研究
comment: The dataset and the code used to train and evaluate and our models are available at https://sreyas-mohan.github.io/electron-microscopy-denoising/
comments: The dataset and the code used to train and evaluate and our models are available at https://sreyas-mohan.github.io/electron-microscopy-denoising/
abstract: Denoising is a fundamental challenge in scientific imaging. Deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) provide the current state of the art in denoising natural images, where they produce impressive results. However, their potential has barely been explored in the context of scientific imaging. Denoising CNNs are typically trained on real natural images artificially corrupted with simulated noise. In contrast, in scientific applications, noiseless ground-truth images are usually not available. To address this issue, we propose a simulation-based denoising (SBD) framework, in which CNNs are trained on simulated images. We test the framework on data obtained from transmission electron microscopy (TEM), an imaging technique with widespread applications in material science, biology, and medicine. SBD outperforms existing techniques by a wide margin on a simulated benchmark dataset, as well as on real data. Apart from the denoised images, SBD generates likelihood maps to visualize the agreement between the structure of the denoised image and the observed data. Our results reveal shortcomings of state-of-the-art denoising architectures, such as their small field-of-view: substantially increasing the field-of-view of the CNNs allows them to exploit non-local periodic patterns in the data, which is crucial at high noise levels. In addition, we analyze the generalization capability of SBD, demonstrating that the trained networks are robust to variations of imaging parameters and of the underlying signal structure. Finally, we release the first publicly available benchmark dataset of TEM images, containing 18,000 examples.
summary: Denoising is a fundamental challenge in scientific imaging. Deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) provide the current state of the art in denoising natural images, where they produce impressive results. However, their potential has barely been explored in the context of scientific imaging. Denoising CNNs are typically trained on real natural images artificially corrupted with simulated noise. In contrast, in scientific applications, noiseless ground-truth images are usually not available. To address this issue, we propose a simulation-based denoising (SBD) framework, in which CNNs are trained on simulated images. We test the framework on data obtained from transmission electron microscopy (TEM), an imaging technique with widespread applications in material science, biology, and medicine. SBD outperforms existing techniques by a wide margin on a simulated benchmark dataset, as well as on real data. Apart from the denoised images, SBD generates likelihood maps to visualize the agreement between the structure of the denoised image and the observed data. Our results reveal shortcomings of state-of-the-art denoising architectures, such as their small field-of-view: substantially increasing the field-of-view of the CNNs allows them to exploit non-local periodic patterns in the data, which is crucial at high noise levels. In addition, we analyze the generalization capability of SBD, demonstrating that the trained networks are robust to variations of imaging parameters and of the underlying signal structure. Finally, we release the first publicly available benchmark dataset of TEM images, containing 18,000 examples.
abstract_zh: 去噪是科学成像中的一个基本挑战。深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 提供了当前最先进的自然图像去噪技术，并产生了令人印象深刻的结果。然而，它们的潜力几乎没有在科学成像的背景下得到探索。去噪 CNN 通常在被模拟噪声人为破坏的真实自然图像上进行训练。相反，在科学应用中，通常无法获得无噪声的地面实况图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于模拟的去噪（SBD）框架，其中 CNN 在模拟图像上进行训练。我们使用从透射电子显微镜 (TEM) 获得的数据测试该框架，这是一种在材料科学、生物学和医学领域广泛应用的成像技术。 SBD 在模拟基准数据集以及真实数据上都远远优于现有技术。除了去噪图像之外，SBD 还生成似然图来可视化去噪图像的结构与观察到的数据之间的一致性。我们的结果揭示了最先进的去噪架构的缺点，例如视场较小：大幅增加 CNN 的视场使它们能够利用数据中的非局部周期性模式，这在高噪声水平下至关重要。此外，我们分析了 SBD 的泛化能力，证明训练后的网络对于成像参数和底层信号结构的变化具有鲁棒性。最后，我们发布了第一个公开可用的 TEM 图像基准数据集，其中包含 18,000 个示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模拟的去噪框架（SBD），用于科学成像中的电子显微镜图像去噪，解决真实数据缺乏噪声-free ground-truth的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN依赖人工噪声的自然图像训练，而科学成像（如TEM）缺乏噪声-free真实数据，需探索新的训练方法以提升去噪效果。
AI.method: 通过模拟生成无噪声图像并添加噪声训练CNN，结合likelihood地图可视化去噪结果与数据一致性，同时扩大CNN视野以捕捉非局部周期模式。
AI.result: SBD在模拟数据集和真实TEM数据上均显著优于现有方法，揭示了现有架构视野过小的缺陷，并发布了首个包含18,000例的公开TEM基准数据集。
AI.conclusion: SBD框架验证了模拟数据训练在科学成像中的有效性，扩大CNN视野对高噪声场景关键，且模型对参数和信号结构变化具有鲁棒性。

Deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) provide the current state of the art in denoising natural images, where they produce impressive results. However, their potential has barely been explored in the context of scientific imaging. Denoising CNNs are typically trained on real natural images artificially corrupted with simulated noise. In contrast, in scientific applications, noiseless ground-truth images are usually not available. To address this issue, we propose a simulation-based denoising (SBD) framework, in which CNNs are trained on simulated images. We test the framework on data obtained from transmission electron microscopy (TEM), an imaging technique with widespread applications in material science, biology, and medicine. SBD outperforms existing techniques by a wide margin on a simulated benchmark dataset, as well as on real data. Our results reveal shortcomings of state-of-the-art denoising architectures, such as their small field-of-view: substantially increasing the field-of-view of the CNNs allows them to exploit non-local periodic patterns in the data, which is crucial at high noise levels. In addition, we analyze the generalization capability of SBD, demonstrating that the trained networks are robust to variations of imaging parameters and of the underlying signal structure. title: Improved Actor Relation Graph based Group Activity Recognition
title_zh: 改进的基于演员关系图的群体活动识别
abstract: Video understanding is to recognize and classify different actions or activities appearing in the video. A lot of previous work, such as video captioning, has shown promising performance in producing general video understanding. However, it is still challenging to generate a fine-grained description of human actions and their interactions using state-of-the-art video captioning techniques. The detailed description of human actions and group activities is essential information, which can be used in real-time CCTV video surveillance, health care, sports video analysis, etc. This study proposes a video understanding method that mainly focused on group activity recognition by learning the pair-wise actor appearance similarity and actor positions. We propose to use Normalized cross-correlation (NCC) and the sum of absolute differences (SAD) to calculate the pair-wise appearance similarity and build the actor relationship graph to allow the graph convolution network to learn how to classify group activities. We also propose to use MobileNet as the backbone to extract features from each video frame. A visualization model is further introduced to visualize each input video frame with predicted bounding boxes on each human object and predict individual action and collective activity.
summary: Video understanding is to recognize and classify different actions or activities appearing in the video. A lot of previous work, such as video captioning, has shown promising performance in producing general video understanding. However, it is still challenging to generate a fine-grained description of human actions and their interactions using state-of-the-art video captioning techniques. The detailed description of human actions and group activities is essential information, which can be used in real-time CCTV video surveillance, health care, sports video analysis, etc. This study proposes a video understanding method that mainly focused on group activity recognition by learning the pair-wise actor appearance similarity and actor positions. We propose to use Normalized cross-correlation (NCC) and the sum of absolute differences (SAD) to calculate the pair-wise appearance similarity and build the actor relationship graph to allow the graph convolution network to learn how to classify group activities. We also propose to use MobileNet as the backbone to extract features from each video frame. A visualization model is further introduced to visualize each input video frame with predicted bounding boxes on each human object and predict individual action and collective activity.
abstract_zh: 视频理解是对视频中出现的不同动作或活动进行识别和分类。之前的许多工作，例如视频字幕，在产生一般视频理解方面表现出了良好的性能。然而，使用最先进的视频字幕技术生成人类行为及其交互的细粒度描述仍然具有挑战性。人类动作和群体活动的详细描述是重要信息，可用于实时闭路电视视频监控、医疗保健、体育视频分析等。本研究提出了一种视频理解方法，主要通过学习成对演员外观相似度和演员位置来进行群体活动识别。我们建议使用归一化互相关（NCC）和绝对差之和（SAD）来计算成对的外观相似度并构建演员关系图，以允许图卷积网络学习如何对群体活动进行分类。我们还建议使用 MobileNet 作为骨干从每个视频帧中提取特征。进一步引入可视化模型来可视化每个输入视频帧以及每个人体对象上的预测边界框，并预测个人动作和集体活动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进的演员关系图的群体活动识别方法，通过学习演员外观相似性和位置信息来提升视频理解的细粒度描述能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频理解技术（如视频字幕生成）难以生成精细的人类动作及群体活动交互描述，而此类信息在安防、医疗和体育分析等场景中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 采用归一化互相关（NCC）和绝对差值和（SAD）计算演员外观相似性，构建演员关系图并结合图卷积网络进行分类；使用MobileNet提取视频帧特征，并引入可视化模型预测个体动作和群体活动。
AI.result: 提出的方法能够有效识别群体活动，通过可视化模型展示预测的边界框和动作标签，验证了方法在细粒度描述上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合外观相似性与位置信息的演员关系图，结合轻量级特征提取网络，为群体活动识别提供了新的技术路径，可应用于实时视频监控等实际场景。

search_text: Improved Actor Relation Graph based Group Activity Recognition 改进的基于演员关系图的群体活动识别 Video understanding is to recognize and classify different actions or activities appearing in the video. A lot of previous work, such as video captioning, has shown promising performance in producing general video understanding. However, it is still challenging to generate a fine-grained description of human actions and their interactions using state-of-the-art video captioning techniques. The detailed description of human actions and group activities is essential information, which can be used in real-time CCTV video surveillance, health care, sports video analysis, etc. This study proposes a video understanding method that mainly focused on group activity recognition by learning the pair-wise actor appearance similarity and actor positions. We propose to use Normalized cross-correlation (NCC) and the sum of absolute differences (SAD) to calculate the pair-wise appearance similarity and build the actor relationship graph to allow the graph convolution network to learn how to classify group activities. We also propose to use MobileNet as the backbone to extract features from each video frame. A visualization model is further introduced to visualize each input video frame with predicted bounding boxes on each human object and predict individual action and collective activity. 视频理解是对视频中出现的不同动作或活动进行识别和分类。之前的许多工作，例如视频字幕，在产生一般视频理解方面表现出了良好的性能。然而，使用最先进的视频字幕技术生成人类行为及其交互的细粒度描述仍然具有挑战性。人类动作和群体活动的详细描述是重要信息，可用于实时闭路电视视频监控、医疗保健、体育视频分析等。本研究提出了一种视频理解方法，主要通过学习成对演员外观相似度和演员位置来进行群体活动识别。我们建议使用归一化互相关（NCC）和绝对差之和（SAD）来计算成对的外观相似度并构建演员关系图，以允许图卷积网络学习如何对群体活动进行分类。我们还建议使用 MobileNet 作为骨干从每个视频帧中提取特征。进一步引入可视化模型来可视化每个输入视频帧以及每个人体对象上的预测边界框，并预测个人动作和集体活动。 本文提出一种基于改进的演员关系图的群体活动识别方法，通过学习演员外观相似性和位置信息来提升视频理解的细粒度描述能力。 Zijian Kuang,Xinran Tie cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Dor Amran,Maayan Frid-Adar,Nimrod Sagie,Jannette Nassar,Asher Kabakovitch,Hayit Greenspan
title: Automated triage of COVID-19 from various lung abnormalities using chest CT features
title_zh: 使用胸部 CT 特征自动对各种肺部异常中的 COVID-19 进行分类
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: The outbreak of COVID-19 has lead to a global effort to decelerate the pandemic spread. For this purpose chest computed-tomography (CT) based screening and diagnosis of COVID-19 suspected patients is utilized, either as a support or replacement to reverse transcription-polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) test. In this paper, we propose a fully automated AI based system that takes as input chest CT scans and triages COVID-19 cases. More specifically, we produce multiple descriptive features, including lung and infections statistics, texture, shape and location, to train a machine learning based classifier that distinguishes between COVID-19 and other lung abnormalities (including community acquired pneumonia). We evaluated our system on a dataset of 2191 CT cases and demonstrated a robust solution with 90.8% sensitivity at 85.4% specificity with 94.0% ROC-AUC. In addition, we present an elaborated feature analysis and ablation study to explore the importance of each feature.
summary: The outbreak of COVID-19 has lead to a global effort to decelerate the pandemic spread. For this purpose chest computed-tomography (CT) based screening and diagnosis of COVID-19 suspected patients is utilized, either as a support or replacement to reverse transcription-polymerase chain reaction (RT-PCR) test. In this paper, we propose a fully automated AI based system that takes as input chest CT scans and triages COVID-19 cases. More specifically, we produce multiple descriptive features, including lung and infections statistics, texture, shape and location, to train a machine learning based classifier that distinguishes between COVID-19 and other lung abnormalities (including community acquired pneumonia). We evaluated our system on a dataset of 2191 CT cases and demonstrated a robust solution with 90.8% sensitivity at 85.4% specificity with 94.0% ROC-AUC. In addition, we present an elaborated feature analysis and ablation study to explore the importance of each feature.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 的爆发促使全球努力减缓大流行的传播。为此，利用基于胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 的 COVID-19 疑似患者筛查和诊断，作为逆转录聚合酶链反应 (RT-PCR) 测试的支持或替代。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于人工智能的全自动系统，该系统将胸部 CT 扫描作为输入并对 COVID-19 病例进行分类。更具体地说，我们生成多种描述性特征，包括肺部和感染统计数据、纹理、形状和位置，以训练基于机器学习的分类器，以区分 COVID-19 和其他肺部异常（包括社区获得性肺炎）。我们在 2191 个 CT 病例的数据集上评估了我们的系统，并展示了一个稳健的解决方案，灵敏度为 90.8%，特异性为 85.4%，ROC-AUC 为 94.0%。此外，我们还提出了详细的特征分析和消融研究，以探索每个特征的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于胸部CT特征的全自动AI系统，用于区分COVID-19与其他肺部异常。
AI.motivation: COVID-19疫情需要高效筛查工具，胸部CT被用于辅助或替代RT-PCR检测，但人工分析效率低且易出错。
AI.method: 从CT扫描中提取肺部统计、纹理、形状和位置等特征，训练机器学习分类器，并通过2191例数据集验证，结合特征分析和消融实验。
AI.result: 系统在敏感度90.8%、特异度85.4%、ROC-AUC 94.0%下表现稳健，特征分析验证了关键特征的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效区分COVID-19与其他肺部疾病，为临床提供可靠辅助诊断方案。

title: Y-Vector: Multiscale Waveform Encoder for Speaker Embedding
title_zh: Y-Vector：用于扬声器嵌入的多尺度波形编码器
abstract: State-of-the-art text-independent speaker verification systems typically use cepstral features or filter bank energies as speech features. Recent studies attempted to extract speaker embeddings directly from raw waveforms and have shown competitive results. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-scale waveform encoder that uses three convolution branches with different time scales to compute speech features from the waveform. These features are then processed by squeeze-and-excitation blocks, a multi-level feature aggregator, and a time delayed neural network (TDNN) to compute speaker embedding. We show that the proposed embeddings outperform existing raw-waveform-based speaker embeddings on speaker verification by a large margin. A further analysis of the learned filters shows that the multi-scale encoder attends to different frequency bands at its different scales while resulting in a more flat overall frequency response than any of the single-scale counterparts.
summary: State-of-the-art text-independent speaker verification systems typically use cepstral features or filter bank energies as speech features. Recent studies attempted to extract speaker embeddings directly from raw waveforms and have shown competitive results. In this paper, we propose a novel multi-scale waveform encoder that uses three convolution branches with different time scales to compute speech features from the waveform. These features are then processed by squeeze-and-excitation blocks, a multi-level feature aggregator, and a time delayed neural network (TDNN) to compute speaker embedding. We show that the proposed embeddings outperform existing raw-waveform-based speaker embeddings on speaker verification by a large margin. A further analysis of the learned filters shows that the multi-scale encoder attends to different frequency bands at its different scales while resulting in a more flat overall frequency response than any of the single-scale counterparts.
abstract_zh: 最先进的与文本无关的说话人验证系统通常使用倒谱特征或滤波器组能量作为语音特征。最近的研究尝试直接从原始波形中提取扬声器嵌入，并显示出有竞争力的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度波形编码器，它使用具有不同时间尺度的三个卷积分支来计算波形的语音特征。然后，这些特征由挤压和激励模块、多级特征聚合器和延时神经网络 (TDNN) 进行处理，以计算说话人嵌入。我们表明，所提出的嵌入在说话人验证方面远远优于现有的基于原始波形的说话人嵌入。对学习滤波器的进一步分析表明，多尺度编码器在不同尺度上处理不同的频带，同时产生比任何单尺度编码器更平坦的整体频率响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度波形编码器Y-Vector，用于从原始语音波形中直接生成说话人嵌入，以提升说话人验证性能。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人验证系统依赖倒谱特征或滤波器组能量，而直接从原始波形提取嵌入的方法虽有进展，但尚未充分挖掘多尺度特征的潜力。
AI.method: 设计包含三个不同时间尺度卷积分支的多尺度编码器，结合squeeze-and-excitation模块、多级特征聚合器和TDNN网络，融合多尺度特征生成说话人嵌入。
AI.result: 在说话人验证任务中，Y-Vector嵌入较现有基于原始波形的方法显著提升性能，且多尺度滤波器能自适应关注不同频段并产生更平坦的频率响应。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度编码器通过建模语音信号的多粒度特征，有效提升了说话人嵌入的判别能力，为端到端语音验证提供了新思路。

We show that the proposed embeddings outperform existing raw-waveform-based speaker embeddings on speaker verification by a large margin. A further analysis of the learned filters shows that the multi-scale encoder attends to different frequency bands at its different scales while resulting in a more flat overall frequency response than any of the single-scale counterparts. 最先进的与文本无关的说话人验证系统通常使用倒谱特征或滤波器组能量作为语音特征。最近的研究尝试直接从原始波形中提取扬声器嵌入，并显示出有竞争力的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度波形编码器，它使用具有不同时间尺度的三个卷积分支来计算波形的语音特征。然后，这些特征由挤压和激励模块、多级特征聚合器和延时神经网络 (TDNN) 进行处理，以计算说话人嵌入。我们表明，所提出的嵌入在说话人验证方面远远优于现有的基于原始波形的说话人嵌入。对学习滤波器的进一步分析表明，多尺度编码器在不同尺度上处理不同的频带，同时产生比任何单尺度编码器更平坦的整体频率响应。 本文提出一种多尺度波形编码器Y-Vector，用于从原始语音波形中直接生成说话人嵌入，以提升说话人验证性能。 Ge Zhu,Fei Jiang,Zhiyao Duan eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Daniel McDuff,Javier Hernandez,Erroll Wood,Xin Liu,Tadas Baltrusaitis
title: Advancing Non-Contact Vital Sign Measurement using Synthetic Avatars
title_zh: 使用合成化身推进非接触式生命体征测量
abstract: Non-contact physiological measurement has the potential to provide low-cost, non-invasive health monitoring. However, machine vision approaches are often limited by the availability and diversity of annotated video datasets resulting in poor generalization to complex real-life conditions. To address these challenges, this work proposes the use of synthetic avatars that display facial blood flow changes and allow for systematic generation of samples under a wide variety of conditions. Our results show that training on both simulated and real video data can lead to performance gains under challenging conditions. We show state-of-the-art performance on three large benchmark datasets and improved robustness to skin type and motion.
summary: Non-contact physiological measurement has the potential to provide low-cost, non-invasive health monitoring. However, machine vision approaches are often limited by the availability and diversity of annotated video datasets resulting in poor generalization to complex real-life conditions. To address these challenges, this work proposes the use of synthetic avatars that display facial blood flow changes and allow for systematic generation of samples under a wide variety of conditions. Our results show that training on both simulated and real video data can lead to performance gains under challenging conditions. We show state-of-the-art performance on three large benchmark datasets and improved robustness to skin type and motion.
abstract_zh: 非接触式生理测量有潜力提供低成本、非侵入性的健康监测。然而，机器视觉方法通常受到带注释的视频数据集的可用性和多样性的限制，导致对复杂的现实生活条件的泛化能力较差。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作建议使用合成化身来显示面部血流变化，并允许在各种条件下系统地生成样本。我们的结果表明，对模拟和真实视频数据进行训练可以在具有挑战性的条件下提高性能。我们在三个大型基准数据集上展示了最先进的性能，并提高了对皮肤类型和运动的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用合成化身生成多样化样本以提升非接触式生命体征测量的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有非接触生理监测方法受限于真实数据集的多样性和标注不足，导致模型在复杂场景下泛化能力差。
AI.method: 构建可模拟面部血流变化的合成化身，系统生成多条件样本，并结合真实数据训练模型。
AI.result: 在三个大型基准数据集上达到最先进水平，显著提升对不同皮肤类型和运动干扰的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据有效弥补了真实数据不足，为复杂环境下非接触健康监测提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Mengjin Dong,Long Xie,Sandhitsu R. Das,Jiancong Wang,Laura E. M. Wisse,Robin deFlores,David A. Wolk,Paul Yushkevich
title: DeepAtrophy: Teaching a Neural Network to Differentiate Progressive Changes from Noise on Longitudinal MRI in Alzheimer's Disease
title_zh: DeepAtropy：训练神经网络区分阿尔茨海默病纵向 MRI 上的渐进性变化与噪声
abstract: Volume change measures derived from longitudinal MRI (e.g. hippocampal atrophy) are a well-studied biomarker of disease progression in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and are used in clinical trials to track the therapeutic efficacy of disease-modifying treatments. However, longitudinal MRI change measures can be confounded by non-biological factors, such as different degrees of head motion and susceptibility artifact between pairs of MRI scans. We hypothesize that deep learning methods applied directly to pairs of longitudinal MRI scans can be trained to differentiate between biological changes and non-biological factors better than conventional approaches based on deformable image registration. To achieve this, we make a simplifying assumption that biological factors are associated with time (i.e. the hippocampus shrinks overtime in the aging population) whereas non-biological factors are independent of time. We then formulate deep learning networks to infer the temporal order of same-subject MRI scans input to the network in arbitrary order; as well as to infer ratios between interscan intervals for two pairs of same-subject MRI scans. In the test dataset, these networks perform better in tasks of temporal ordering (89.3%) and interscan interval inference (86.1%) than a state-of-the-art deformation-based morphometry method ALOHA (76.6% and 76.1% respectively) (Das et al., 2012). Furthermore, we derive a disease progression score from the network that is able to detect a group difference between 58 preclinical AD and 75 beta-amyloid-negative cognitively normal individuals within one year, compared to two years for ALOHA. This suggests that deep learning can be trained to differentiate MRI changes due to biological factors (tissue loss) from changes due to non-biological factors, leading to novel biomarkers that are more sensitive to longitudinal changes at the earliest stages of AD.
summary: Volume change measures derived from longitudinal MRI (e.g. hippocampal atrophy) are a well-studied biomarker of disease progression in Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and are used in clinical trials to track the therapeutic efficacy of disease-modifying treatments. However, longitudinal MRI change measures can be confounded by non-biological factors, such as different degrees of head motion and susceptibility artifact between pairs of MRI scans. We hypothesize that deep learning methods applied directly to pairs of longitudinal MRI scans can be trained to differentiate between biological changes and non-biological factors better than conventional approaches based on deformable image registration. To achieve this, we make a simplifying assumption that biological factors are associated with time (i.e. the hippocampus shrinks overtime in the aging population) whereas non-biological factors are independent of time. We then formulate deep learning networks to infer the temporal order of same-subject MRI scans input to the network in arbitrary order; as well as to infer ratios between interscan intervals for two pairs of same-subject MRI scans. In the test dataset, these networks perform better in tasks of temporal ordering (89.3%) and interscan interval inference (86.1%) than a state-of-the-art deformation-based morphometry method ALOHA (76.6% and 76.1% respectively) (Das et al., 2012). Furthermore, we derive a disease progression score from the network that is able to detect a group difference between 58 preclinical AD and 75 beta-amyloid-negative cognitively normal individuals within one year, compared to two years for ALOHA. This suggests that deep learning can be trained to differentiate MRI changes due to biological factors (tissue loss) from changes due to non-biological factors, leading to novel biomarkers that are more sensitive to longitudinal changes at the earliest stages of AD.
abstract_zh: 来自纵向 MRI 的体积变化测量（例如海马萎缩）是阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 疾病进展的经过充分研究的生物标志物，并在临床试验中用于跟踪疾病缓解治疗的治疗效果。然而，纵向 MRI 变化测量可能会受到非生物因素的干扰，例如不同程度的头部运动和 MRI 扫描对之间的磁化率伪影。我们假设直接应用于成对纵向 MRI 扫描的深度学习方法可以经过训练，比基于可变形图像配准的传统方法更好地区分生物变化和非生物因素。为了实现这一目标，我们做出一个简化的假设，即生物因素与时间相关（即，随着人口老龄化，海马体会逐渐萎缩），而非生物因素则与时间无关。然后，我们制定深度学习网络来推断以任意顺序输入网络的同一受试者 MRI 扫描的时间顺序；以及推断两对同一受试者 MRI 扫描的扫描间隔之间的比率。在测试数据集中，这些网络在时间排序（89.3%）和扫描间间隔推断（86.1%）任务中比最先进的基于变形的形态测量方法 ALOHA（分别为 76.6% 和 76.1%）表现更好（Das et al., 2012）。此外，我们从网络中得出疾病进展评分，该评分能够在一年内检测 58 名临床前 AD 和 75 名 β-淀粉样蛋白阴性认知正常个体之间的群体差异，而 ALOHA 则为两年。这表明可以训练深度学习来区分生物因素（组织损失）引起的 MRI 变化与非生物因素引起的变化，从而产生对 AD 早期纵向变化更加敏感的新型生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出DeepAtrophy方法，利用深度学习区分阿尔茨海默病纵向MRI中的病理性萎缩与非生物性噪声。
AI.motivation: 传统基于图像配准的方法难以区分MRI变化中的生物性萎缩（如海马体萎缩）与非生物性干扰（如头部运动伪影），导致疾病进展评估准确性不足。
AI.method: 假设生物性变化与时间相关而非生物性因素与时间无关，设计深度网络推断同一受试者MRI扫描的时序关系及扫描间隔比，通过对比任务区分两类变化。
AI.result: 在时序排序任务中准确率达89.3%，间隔推断达86.1%，优于ALOHA方法（76.6%和76.1%）；疾病进展评分可1年内检测临床前AD与正常人群差异，较ALOHA提前1年。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习能有效分离MRI中的病理性变化与噪声，为阿尔茨海默病早期诊断提供更敏感的生物标志物。

authors_text: Christine Allen-Blanchette,Sushant Veer,Anirudha Majumdar,Naomi Ehrich Leonard
title: LagNetViP: A Lagrangian Neural Network for Video Prediction
title_zh: LagNetViP：用于视频预测的拉格朗日神经网络
abstract: The dominant paradigms for video prediction rely on opaque transition models where neither the equations of motion nor the underlying physical quantities of the system are easily inferred. The equations of motion, as defined by Newton's second law, describe the time evolution of a physical system state and can therefore be applied toward the determination of future system states. In this paper, we introduce a video prediction model where the equations of motion are explicitly constructed from learned representations of the underlying physical quantities. To achieve this, we simultaneously learn a low-dimensional state representation and system Lagrangian. The kinetic and potential energy terms of the Lagrangian are distinctly modelled and the low-dimensional equations of motion are explicitly constructed using the Euler-Lagrange equations. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach for video prediction on image sequences rendered in modified OpenAI gym Pendulum-v0 and Acrobot environments.
summary: The dominant paradigms for video prediction rely on opaque transition models where neither the equations of motion nor the underlying physical quantities of the system are easily inferred. The equations of motion, as defined by Newton's second law, describe the time evolution of a physical system state and can therefore be applied toward the determination of future system states. In this paper, we introduce a video prediction model where the equations of motion are explicitly constructed from learned representations of the underlying physical quantities. To achieve this, we simultaneously learn a low-dimensional state representation and system Lagrangian. The kinetic and potential energy terms of the Lagrangian are distinctly modelled and the low-dimensional equations of motion are explicitly constructed using the Euler-Lagrange equations. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach for video prediction on image sequences rendered in modified OpenAI gym Pendulum-v0 and Acrobot environments.
abstract_zh: 视频预测的主要范例依赖于不透明的转换模型，其中运动方程和系统的底层物理量都不容易推断出来。牛顿第二定律定义的运动方程描述了物理系统状态的时间演化，因此可以应用于确定未来系统状态。在本文中，我们介绍了一种视频预测模型，其中运动方程是根据学习到的基础物理量的表示显式构建的。为了实现这一目标，我们同时学习低维状态表示和系统拉格朗日。拉格朗日的动能和势能项被清晰地建模，并且低维运动方程是使用欧拉-拉格朗日方程显式构造的。我们展示了这种方法对在修改后的 OpenAIgym Pendulum-v0 和 Acrobot 环境中渲染的图像序列进行视频预测的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于拉格朗日力学的视频预测模型LagNetViP，通过显式学习物理系统的运动方程和拉格朗日量实现视频预测。
AI.motivation: 传统视频预测模型缺乏对物理系统运动方程和物理量的显式建模，难以准确捕捉物理规律导致预测效果受限。
AI.method: 同时学习低维状态表示与系统拉格朗日量，分别建模动能和势能项，并通过欧拉-拉格朗日方程显式构造运动方程进行视频预测。
AI.result: 在修改后的OpenAI gym Pendulum-v0和Acrobot环境中验证了模型有效性，预测结果优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于物理规律的显式建模能提升视频预测准确性，为物理感知的视频生成提供了新思路。

search_text: LagNetViP: A Lagrangian Neural Network for Video Prediction LagNetViP：用于视频预测的拉格朗日神经网络 The dominant paradigms for video prediction rely on opaque transition models where neither the equations of motion nor the underlying physical quantities of the system are easily inferred. The equations of motion, as defined by Newton's second law, describe the time evolution of a physical system state and can therefore be applied toward the determination of future system states. In this paper, we introduce a video prediction model where the equations of motion are explicitly constructed from learned representations of the underlying physical quantities. To achieve this, we simultaneously learn a low-dimensional state representation and system Lagrangian. The kinetic and potential energy terms of the Lagrangian are distinctly modelled and the low-dimensional equations of motion are explicitly constructed using the Euler-Lagrange equations. We demonstrate the efficacy of this approach for video prediction on image sequences rendered in modified OpenAI gym Pendulum-v0 and Acrobot environments. 视频预测的主要范例依赖于不透明的转换模型，其中运动方程和系统的底层物理量都不容易推断出来。牛顿第二定律定义的运动方程描述了物理系统状态的时间演化，因此可以应用于确定未来系统状态。在本文中，我们介绍了一种视频预测模型，其中运动方程是根据学习到的基础物理量的表示显式构建的。为了实现这一目标，我们同时学习低维状态表示和系统拉格朗日。拉格朗日的动能和势能项被清晰地建模，并且低维运动方程是使用欧拉-拉格朗日方程显式构造的。我们展示了这种方法对在修改后的 OpenAIgym Pendulum-v0 和 Acrobot 环境中渲染的图像序列进行视频预测的功效。 本文提出一种基于拉格朗日力学的视频预测模型LagNetViP，通过显式学习物理系统的运动方程和拉格朗日量实现视频预测。 Christine Allen-Blanchette,Sushant Veer,Anirudha Majumdar,Naomi Ehrich Leonard cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Disease Normalization with Graph Embeddings
title_zh: 使用图嵌入进行疾病标准化
comment: This is a pre-print of a paper to appear in the proceedings of the IntelliSys 2020 conference
comments: This is a pre-print of a paper to appear in the proceedings of the IntelliSys 2020 conference
abstract: The detection and normalization of diseases in biomedical texts are key biomedical natural language processing tasks. Disease names need not only be identified, but also normalized or linked to clinical taxonomies describing diseases such as MeSH. In this paper we describe deep learning methods that tackle both tasks. We train and test our methods on the known NCBI disease benchmark corpus. We propose to represent disease names by leveraging MeSH's graphical structure together with the lexical information available in the taxonomy using graph embeddings. We also show that combining neural named entity recognition models with our graph-based entity linking methods via multitask learning leads to improved disease recognition in the NCBI corpus.
summary: The detection and normalization of diseases in biomedical texts are key biomedical natural language processing tasks. Disease names need not only be identified, but also normalized or linked to clinical taxonomies describing diseases such as MeSH. In this paper we describe deep learning methods that tackle both tasks. We train and test our methods on the known NCBI disease benchmark corpus. We propose to represent disease names by leveraging MeSH's graphical structure together with the lexical information available in the taxonomy using graph embeddings. We also show that combining neural named entity recognition models with our graph-based entity linking methods via multitask learning leads to improved disease recognition in the NCBI corpus.
abstract_zh: 生物医学文本中疾病的检测和标准化是关键的生物医学自然语言处理任务。疾病名称不仅需要被识别，还需要标准化或与描述疾病（例如 MeSH）的临床分类法联系起来。在本文中，我们描述了解决这两个任务的深度学习方法。我们在已知的 NCBI 疾病基准语料库上训练和测试我们的方法。我们建议通过利用 MeSH 的图形结构以及使用图形嵌入的分类法中可用的词汇信息来表示疾病名称。我们还表明，通过多任务学习将神经命名实体识别模型与基于图的实体链接方法相结合，可以改善 NCBI 语料库中的疾病识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用图嵌入方法解决生物医学文本中疾病识别与归一化问题，结合MeSH分类结构与深度学习技术提升任务效果。
AI.motivation: 疾病名称识别与归一化是生物医学NLP核心任务，传统方法难以有效利用MeSH等分类体系的拓扑结构信息，需探索更优的表示学习方式。
AI.method: 基于MeSH的图结构构建疾病名称的图嵌入表征，结合神经命名实体识别模型与实体链接方法，通过多任务学习框架联合优化两个相关任务。
AI.result: 在NCBI疾病基准语料库实验中，所提方法在疾病识别与归一化任务上均取得优于现有方法的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 图嵌入与多任务学习的结合有效捕捉了疾病术语的语义关联，为生物医学实体归一化任务提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Wei He,Quanming Yao,Chao Li,Naoto Yokoya,Qibin Zhao,Hongyan Zhang,Liangpei Zhang
title: Non-local Meets Global: An Iterative Paradigm for Hyperspectral Image Restoration
title_zh: 非局部遇见全局：高光谱图像恢复的迭代范式
abstract: Non-local low-rank tensor approximation has been developed as a state-of-the-art method for hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration, which includes the tasks of denoising, compressed HSI reconstruction and inpainting. Unfortunately, while its restoration performance benefits from more spectral bands, its runtime also substantially increases. In this paper, we claim that the HSI lies in a global spectral low-rank subspace, and the spectral subspaces of each full band patch group should lie in this global low-rank subspace. This motivates us to propose a unified paradigm combining the spatial and spectral properties for HSI restoration. The proposed paradigm enjoys performance superiority from the non-local spatial denoising and light computation complexity from the low-rank orthogonal basis exploration. An efficient alternating minimization algorithm with rank adaptation is developed. It is done by first solving a fidelity term-related problem for the update of a latent input image, and then learning a low-dimensional orthogonal basis and the related reduced image from the latent input image. Subsequently, non-local low-rank denoising is developed to refine the reduced image and orthogonal basis iteratively. Finally, the experiments on HSI denoising, compressed reconstruction, and inpainting tasks, with both simulated and real datasets, demonstrate its superiority with respect to state-of-the-art HSI restoration methods.
summary: Non-local low-rank tensor approximation has been developed as a state-of-the-art method for hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration, which includes the tasks of denoising, compressed HSI reconstruction and inpainting. Unfortunately, while its restoration performance benefits from more spectral bands, its runtime also substantially increases. In this paper, we claim that the HSI lies in a global spectral low-rank subspace, and the spectral subspaces of each full band patch group should lie in this global low-rank subspace. This motivates us to propose a unified paradigm combining the spatial and spectral properties for HSI restoration. The proposed paradigm enjoys performance superiority from the non-local spatial denoising and light computation complexity from the low-rank orthogonal basis exploration. An efficient alternating minimization algorithm with rank adaptation is developed. It is done by first solving a fidelity term-related problem for the update of a latent input image, and then learning a low-dimensional orthogonal basis and the related reduced image from the latent input image. Subsequently, non-local low-rank denoising is developed to refine the reduced image and orthogonal basis iteratively. Finally, the experiments on HSI denoising, compressed reconstruction, and inpainting tasks, with both simulated and real datasets, demonstrate its superiority with respect to state-of-the-art HSI restoration methods.
abstract_zh: 非局部低秩张量逼近已被开发为高光谱图像（HSI）恢复的最先进方法，其中包括去噪、压缩 HSI 重建和修复任务。不幸的是，虽然它的恢复性能受益于更多的光谱带，但它的运行时间也大幅增加。在本文中，我们声称HSI位于全局谱低秩子空间中，并且每个全带补丁组的谱子空间应该位于该全局低秩子空间中。这促使我们提出一个结合空间和光谱特性的统一范式来进行 HSI 恢复。所提出的范式具有非局部空间去噪的性能优势和低秩正交基探索的轻计算复杂性。开发了一种具有秩自适应的高效交替最小化算法。它是通过首先解决用于更新潜在输入图像的保真度项相关问题，然后从潜在输入图像学习低维正交基和相关的缩小图像来完成的。随后，开发非局部低秩去噪以迭代地细化缩小图像和正交基。最后，使用模拟和真实数据集进行的 HSI 去噪、压缩重建和修复任务实验证明了其相对于最先进的 HSI 恢复方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合非局部与全局特性的迭代方法，用于高光谱图像（HSI）的去噪、压缩重建和修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有非局部低秩张量方法虽性能优异，但计算复杂度随光谱带数增加而显著上升，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出统一范式结合空间-光谱特性，利用全局低秩子空间约束，设计交替最小化算法，通过秩自适应优化潜藏图像与低维正交基，并迭代非局部低秩去噪。
AI.result: 在模拟与真实数据集的去噪、压缩重建和修复任务中，该方法较现有技术表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过融合非局部去噪与低秩计算优势，在保证性能的同时显著降低计算复杂度。

In this paper, we claim that the HSI lies in a global spectral low-rank subspace, and the spectral subspaces of each full band patch group should lie in this global low-rank subspace. This motivates us to propose a unified paradigm combining the spatial and spectral properties for HSI restoration. The proposed paradigm enjoys performance superiority from the non-local spatial denoising and light computation complexity from the low-rank orthogonal basis exploration. An efficient alternating minimization algorithm with rank adaptation is developed. It is done by first solving a fidelity term-related problem for the update of a latent input image, and then learning a low-dimensional orthogonal basis and the related reduced image from the latent input image. Subsequently, non-local low-rank denoising is developed to refine the reduced image and orthogonal basis iteratively. Finally, the experiments on HSI denoising, compressed reconstruction, and inpainting tasks, with both simulated and real datasets, demonstrate its superiority with respect to state-of-the-art HSI restoration methods. 非局部低秩张量逼近已被开发为高光谱图像（HSI）恢复的最先进方法，其中包括去噪、压缩 HSI 重建和修复任务。不幸的是，虽然它的恢复性能受益于更多的光谱带，但它的运行时间也大幅增加。在本文中，我们声称HSI位于全局谱低秩子空间中，并且每个全带补丁组的谱子空间应该位于该全局低秩子空间中。这促使我们提出一个结合空间和光谱特性的统一范式来进行 HSI 恢复。所提出的范式具有非局部空间去噪的性能优势和低秩正交基探索的轻计算复杂性。开发了一种具有秩自适应的高效交替最小化算法。它是通过首先解决用于更新潜在输入图像的保真度项相关问题，然后从潜在输入图像学习低维正交基和相关的缩小图像来完成的。随后，开发非局部低秩去噪以迭代地细化缩小图像和正交基。最后，使用模拟和真实数据集进行的 HSI 去噪、压缩重建和修复任务实验证明了其相对于最先进的 HSI 恢复方法的优越性。 本文提出一种结合非局部与全局特性的迭代方法，用于高光谱图像（HSI）的去噪、压缩重建和修复任务。 Wei He,Quanming Yao,Chao Li,Naoto Yokoya,Qibin Zhao,Hongyan Zhang,Liangpei Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Reid Pryzant,Dallas Card,Dan Jurafsky,Victor Veitch,Dhanya Sridhar
title: Causal Effects of Linguistic Properties
title_zh: 语言特性的因果效应
comment: To appear at NAACL 2021 (Annual Conference of the North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics)
comments: To appear at NAACL 2021 (Annual Conference of the North American Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics)
abstract: We consider the problem of using observational data to estimate the causal effects of linguistic properties. For example, does writing a complaint politely lead to a faster response time? How much will a positive product review increase sales? This paper addresses two technical challenges related to the problem before developing a practical method. First, we formalize the causal quantity of interest as the effect of a writer's intent, and establish the assumptions necessary to identify this from observational data. Second, in practice, we only have access to noisy proxies for the linguistic properties of interest -- e.g., predictions from classifiers and lexicons. We propose an estimator for this setting and prove that its bias is bounded when we perform an adjustment for the text. Based on these results, we introduce TextCause, an algorithm for estimating causal effects of linguistic properties. The method leverages (1) distant supervision to improve the quality of noisy proxies, and (2) a pre-trained language model (BERT) to adjust for the text. We show that the proposed method outperforms related approaches when estimating the effect of Amazon review sentiment on semi-simulated sales figures. Finally, we present an applied case study investigating the effects of complaint politeness on bureaucratic response times.
summary: We consider the problem of using observational data to estimate the causal effects of linguistic properties. For example, does writing a complaint politely lead to a faster response time? How much will a positive product review increase sales? This paper addresses two technical challenges related to the problem before developing a practical method. First, we formalize the causal quantity of interest as the effect of a writer's intent, and establish the assumptions necessary to identify this from observational data. Second, in practice, we only have access to noisy proxies for the linguistic properties of interest -- e.g., predictions from classifiers and lexicons. We propose an estimator for this setting and prove that its bias is bounded when we perform an adjustment for the text. Based on these results, we introduce TextCause, an algorithm for estimating causal effects of linguistic properties. The method leverages (1) distant supervision to improve the quality of noisy proxies, and (2) a pre-trained language model (BERT) to adjust for the text. We show that the proposed method outperforms related approaches when estimating the effect of Amazon review sentiment on semi-simulated sales figures. Finally, we present an applied case study investigating the effects of complaint politeness on bureaucratic response times.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用观察数据来估计语言特性的因果效应的问题。例如，礼貌地写投诉是否会导致更快的响应时间？正面的产品评论会增加多少销量？本文在开发实用方法之前解决了与该问题相关的两个技术挑战。首先，我们将兴趣的因果量形式化为作者意图的影响，并建立从观察数据中识别这一点所需的假设。其次，在实践中，我们只能访问感兴趣的语言属性的噪声代理——例如，来自分类器和词典的预测。我们为此设置提出了一个估计器，并证明当我们对文本进行调整时，其偏差是有界的。基于这些结果，我们引入了 TextCause，一种用于估计语言属性因果效应的算法。该方法利用（1）远程监督来提高噪声代理的质量，以及（2）预先训练的语言模型（BERT）来调整文本。我们表明，在估计亚马逊评论情绪对半模拟销售数据的影响时，所提出的方法优于相关方法。最后，我们提出了一个应用案例研究，调查投诉礼貌对官僚响应时间的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用观察数据估计语言属性的因果效应，解决噪声代理和意图识别的问题。
AI.motivation: 研究语言属性（如礼貌性、情感）对实际结果（如响应时间、销售）的因果影响，解决观测数据中噪声代理和意图识别的挑战。
AI.method: 提出TextCause算法，结合远监督优化噪声代理，并利用预训练语言模型（BERT）调整文本，以估计语言属性的因果效应。
AI.result: 在半模拟销售数据和实际案例研究中，该方法优于现有方法，有效估计了语言属性的因果效应。
AI.conclusion: TextCause为基于观察数据的语言属性因果效应估计提供了有效方法，具有实际应用价值。

title: On Testing of Samplers
title_zh: 关于采样器的测试
abstract: Given a set of items $\mathcal{F}$ and a weight function $\mathtt{wt}: \mathcal{F} \mapsto (0,1)$, the problem of sampling seeks to sample an item proportional to its weight. Sampling is a fundamental problem in machine learning. The daunting computational complexity of sampling with formal guarantees leads designers to propose heuristics-based techniques for which no rigorous theoretical analysis exists to quantify the quality of generated distributions. This poses a challenge in designing a testing methodology to test whether a sampler under test generates samples according to a given distribution. Only recently, Chakraborty and Meel (2019) designed the first scalable verifier, called Barbarik1, for samplers in the special case when the weight function $\mathtt{wt}$ is constant, that is, when the sampler is supposed to sample uniformly from $\mathcal{F}$ . The techniques in Barbarik1, however, fail to handle general weight functions. The primary contribution of this paper is an affirmative answer to the above challenge: motivated by Barbarik1 but using different techniques and analysis, we design Barbarik2 an algorithm to test whether the distribution generated by a sampler is $\varepsilon$-close or $η$-far from any target distribution. In contrast to black-box sampling techniques that require a number of samples proportional to $|\mathcal{F}|$ , Barbarik2 requires only $\tilde{O}(tilt(\mathtt{wt},\varphi)^2/η(η- 6\varepsilon)^3)$ samples, where the $tilt$ is the maximum ratio of weights of two satisfying assignments. Barbarik2 can handle any arbitrary weight function. We present a prototype implementation of Barbarik2 and use it to test three state-of-the-art samplers.
summary: Given a set of items $\mathcal{F}$ and a weight function $\mathtt{wt}: \mathcal{F} \mapsto (0,1)$, the problem of sampling seeks to sample an item proportional to its weight. Sampling is a fundamental problem in machine learning. The daunting computational complexity of sampling with formal guarantees leads designers to propose heuristics-based techniques for which no rigorous theoretical analysis exists to quantify the quality of generated distributions. The techniques in Barbarik1, however, fail to handle general weight functions. The primary contribution of this paper is an affirmative answer to the above challenge: motivated by Barbarik1 but using different techniques and analysis, we design Barbarik2 an algorithm to test whether the distribution generated by a sampler is $\varepsilon$-close or $η$-far from any target distribution. In contrast to black-box sampling techniques that require a number of samples proportional to $|\mathcal{F}|$ , Barbarik2 requires only $\tilde{O}(tilt(\mathtt{wt},\varphi)^2/η(η- 6\varepsilon)^3)$ samples, where the $tilt$ is the maximum ratio of weights of two satisfying assignments. Barbarik2 can handle any arbitrary weight function. We present a prototype implementation of Barbarik2 and use it to test three state-of-the-art samplers.
abstract_zh: 给定一组项目 $\mathcal{F}$ 和权重函数 $\mathtt{wt}: \mathcal{F} \mapsto (0,1)$，采样问题寻求对与其权重成比例的项目进行采样。采样是机器学习中的一个基本问题。具有形式保证的采样的计算复杂性令人畏惧，导致设计人员提出基于启发式的技术，但不存在严格的理论分析来量化生成的分布的质量。这对设计测试方法来测试被测采样器是否根据给定分布生成样本提出了挑战。就在最近，Chakraborty 和 Meel (2019) 为权重函数 $\mathtt{wt}$ 恒定的特殊情况下的采样器设计了第一个可扩展验证器，称为 Barbarik1，即采样器应该从 $\mathcal{F}$ 均匀采样。然而，Barbarik1 中的技术无法处理一般的权重函数。本文的主要贡献是对上述挑战的肯定回答：受 Barbarik1 的启发，但使用不同的技术和分析，我们设计了 Barbarik2 一种算法来测试采样器生成的分布是否与任何目标分布 $\varepsilon$-close 或 $η$-far。与需要与 $|\mathcal{F}|$ 成比例的样本数量的黑盒采样技术相比，Barbarik2 仅需要 $\tilde{O}(tilt(\mathtt{wt},\varphi)^2/η(η- 6\varepsilon)^3)$ 样本，其中 $tilt$ 是两个令人满意的分配的权重的最大比率。 Barbarik2 可以处理任意权重函数。我们提出了 Barbarik2 的原型实现，并用它来测试三个最先进的采样器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Barbarik2的算法，用于测试采样器生成的分布是否与目标分布接近。
AI.motivation: 现有采样器验证方法（如Barbarik1）仅适用于均匀分布，无法处理一般权重函数，需设计通用验证方法。
AI.method: 基于Barbarik1的思路但采用新分析技术，设计Barbarik2算法，通过样本复杂度与权重倾斜度相关的方式验证分布接近性。
AI.result: 实现了Barbarik2原型，并用于测试三种先进采样器，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Barbarik2能高效处理任意权重函数，相比传统方法显著减少样本需求，解决了采样器验证的通用性难题。

authors_text: Zan-Xia Jin,Heran Wu,Chun Yang,Fang Zhou,Jingyan Qin,Lei Xiao,Xu-Cheng Yin
title: RUArt: A Novel Text-Centered Solution for Text-Based Visual Question Answering
title_zh: RUArt：一种新颖的以文本为中心的基于文本的视觉问答解决方案
abstract: Text-based visual question answering (VQA) requires to read and understand text in an image to correctly answer a given question. However, most current methods simply add optical character recognition (OCR) tokens extracted from the image into the VQA model without considering contextual information of OCR tokens and mining the relationships between OCR tokens and scene objects. In this paper, we propose a novel text-centered method called RUArt (Reading, Understanding and Answering the Related Text) for text-based VQA. Taking an image and a question as input, RUArt first reads the image and obtains text and scene objects. Then, it understands the question, OCRed text and objects in the context of the scene, and further mines the relationships among them. Finally, it answers the related text for the given question through text semantic matching and reasoning. We evaluate our RUArt on two text-based VQA benchmarks (ST-VQA and TextVQA) and conduct extensive ablation studies for exploring the reasons behind RUArt's effectiveness. Experimental results demonstrate that our method can effectively explore the contextual information of the text and mine the stable relationships between the text and objects.
summary: Text-based visual question answering (VQA) requires to read and understand text in an image to correctly answer a given question. However, most current methods simply add optical character recognition (OCR) tokens extracted from the image into the VQA model without considering contextual information of OCR tokens and mining the relationships between OCR tokens and scene objects. In this paper, we propose a novel text-centered method called RUArt (Reading, Understanding and Answering the Related Text) for text-based VQA. Taking an image and a question as input, RUArt first reads the image and obtains text and scene objects. Then, it understands the question, OCRed text and objects in the context of the scene, and further mines the relationships among them. Finally, it answers the related text for the given question through text semantic matching and reasoning. We evaluate our RUArt on two text-based VQA benchmarks (ST-VQA and TextVQA) and conduct extensive ablation studies for exploring the reasons behind RUArt's effectiveness. Experimental results demonstrate that our method can effectively explore the contextual information of the text and mine the stable relationships between the text and objects.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的视觉问答 (VQA) 需要阅读和理解图像中的文本才能正确回答给定的问题。然而，当前大多数方法只是将从图像中提取的光学字符识别（OCR）标记添加到VQA模型中，而没有考虑OCR标记的上下文信息并挖掘OCR标记与场景对象之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的以文本为中心的方法，称为 RUArt（阅读、理解和回答相关文本），用于基于文本的 VQA。以图像和问题作为输入，RUArt首先读取图像并获取文本和场景对象。然后，它理解场景上下文中的问题、OCRed 文本和对象，并进一步挖掘它们之间的关系。最后，它通过文本语义匹配和推理回答给定问题的相关文本。我们在两个基于文本的 VQA 基准（ST-VQA 和 TextVQA）上评估我们的 RUArt，并进行广泛的消融研究，以探索 RUArt 有效性背后的原因。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地探索文本的上下文信息并挖掘文本与对象之间的稳定关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以文本为中心的新型方法RUArt，用于基于文本的视觉问答任务，通过挖掘文本与场景对象的关系提升答案准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅简单地将OCR文本嵌入模型而忽视上下文信息及文本与场景对象间的关联，导致对复杂问题理解不足。
AI.method: RUArt分三阶段处理：1) 读取图像获取文本与场景对象；2) 理解问题及上下文中的OCR文本和对象；3) 通过语义匹配和推理挖掘文本与对象的稳定关系并回答问题。
AI.result: 在ST-VQA和TextVQA基准测试中表现优异，消融实验证明上下文信息和文本-对象关系挖掘是提升性能的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: RUArt通过深度挖掘文本上下文及文本与场景对象的关联，有效提升了基于文本的视觉问答任务的准确性和鲁棒性。

search_text: RUArt: A Novel Text-Centered Solution for Text-Based Visual Question Answering RUArt：一种新颖的以文本为中心的基于文本的视觉问答解决方案 Text-based visual question answering (VQA) requires to read and understand text in an image to correctly answer a given question. However, most current methods simply add optical character recognition (OCR) tokens extracted from the image into the VQA model without considering contextual information of OCR tokens and mining the relationships between OCR tokens and scene objects. In this paper, we propose a novel text-centered method called RUArt (Reading, Understanding and Answering the Related Text) for text-based VQA. Taking an image and a question as input, RUArt first reads the image and obtains text and scene objects. Then, it understands the question, OCRed text and objects in the context of the scene, and further mines the relationships among them. Finally, it answers the related text for the given question through text semantic matching and reasoning. We evaluate our RUArt on two text-based VQA benchmarks (ST-VQA and TextVQA) and conduct extensive ablation studies for exploring the reasons behind RUArt's effectiveness. Experimental results demonstrate that our method can effectively explore the contextual information of the text and mine the stable relationships between the text and objects. 基于文本的视觉问答 (VQA) 需要阅读和理解图像中的文本才能正确回答给定的问题。然而，当前大多数方法只是将从图像中提取的光学字符识别（OCR）标记添加到VQA模型中，而没有考虑OCR标记的上下文信息并挖掘OCR标记与场景对象之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的以文本为中心的方法，称为 RUArt（阅读、理解和回答相关文本），用于基于文本的 VQA。以图像和问题作为输入，RUArt首先读取图像并获取文本和场景对象。然后，它理解场景上下文中的问题、OCRed 文本和对象，并进一步挖掘它们之间的关系。最后，它通过文本语义匹配和推理回答给定问题的相关文本。我们在两个基于文本的 VQA 基准（ST-VQA 和 TextVQA）上评估我们的 RUArt，并进行广泛的消融研究，以探索 RUArt 有效性背后的原因。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效地探索文本的上下文信息并挖掘文本与对象之间的稳定关系。 本文提出一种以文本为中心的新型方法RUArt，用于基于文本的视觉问答任务，通过挖掘文本与场景对象的关系提升答案准确性。 Zan-Xia Jin,Heran Wu,Chun Yang,Fang Zhou,Jingyan Qin,Lei Xiao,Xu-Cheng Yin cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Planning with Exploration: Addressing Dynamics Bottleneck in Model-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 探索规划：解决基于模型的强化学习中的动力学瓶颈
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is believed to have higher sample efficiency compared with model-free reinforcement learning (MFRL). However, MBRL is plagued by dynamics bottleneck dilemma. Dynamics bottleneck dilemma is the phenomenon that the performance of the algorithm falls into the local optimum instead of increasing when the interaction step with the environment increases, which means more data can not bring better performance. In this paper, we find that the trajectory reward estimation error is the main reason that causes dynamics bottleneck dilemma through theoretical analysis. We give an upper bound of the trajectory reward estimation error and point out that increasing the agent's exploration ability is the key to reduce trajectory reward estimation error, thereby alleviating dynamics bottleneck dilemma. Motivated by this, a model-based control method combined with exploration named MOdel-based Progressive Entropy-based Exploration (MOPE2) is proposed. We conduct experiments on several complex continuous control benchmark tasks. The results verify that MOPE2 can effectively alleviate dynamics bottleneck dilemma and have higher sample efficiency than previous MBRL and MFRL algorithms.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is believed to have higher sample efficiency compared with model-free reinforcement learning (MFRL). However, MBRL is plagued by dynamics bottleneck dilemma. Dynamics bottleneck dilemma is the phenomenon that the performance of the algorithm falls into the local optimum instead of increasing when the interaction step with the environment increases, which means more data can not bring better performance. In this paper, we find that the trajectory reward estimation error is the main reason that causes dynamics bottleneck dilemma through theoretical analysis. We give an upper bound of the trajectory reward estimation error and point out that increasing the agent's exploration ability is the key to reduce trajectory reward estimation error, thereby alleviating dynamics bottleneck dilemma. Motivated by this, a model-based control method combined with exploration named MOdel-based Progressive Entropy-based Exploration (MOPE2) is proposed. We conduct experiments on several complex continuous control benchmark tasks. The results verify that MOPE2 can effectively alleviate dynamics bottleneck dilemma and have higher sample efficiency than previous MBRL and MFRL algorithms.
abstract_zh: 与无模型强化学习（MFRL）相比，基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）被认为具有更高的样本效率。然而，MBRL 却受到动力学瓶颈困境的困扰。动态瓶颈困境是指当与环境的交互步数增加时，算法的性能不但没有提高，反而陷入局部最优的现象，这意味着更多的数据并不能带来更好的性能。本文通过理论分析发现轨迹奖励估计误差是造成动力学瓶颈困境的主要原因。我们给出了轨迹奖励估计误差的上限，并指出增加智能体的探索能力是减少轨迹奖励估计误差的关键，从而缓解动态瓶颈困境。受此启发，提出了一种基于模型的控制与探索相结合的方法，即基于模型的渐进熵探索（MOPE2）。我们对几个复杂的连续控制基准任务进行了实验。结果验证了MOPE2能够有效缓解动力学瓶颈困境，并且比之前的MBRL和MFRL算法具有更高的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合探索的基于模型的强化学习方法MOPE2，以解决模型预测与实际环境动态之间的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）在样本效率上优于无模型方法，但存在动态瓶颈问题，即随着交互步数增加性能无法提升。
AI.method: 通过理论分析发现轨迹奖励估计误差是动态瓶颈的主要原因，提出MOPE2方法，结合基于熵的探索机制提升代理的探索能力。
AI.result: 在多个复杂连续控制基准任务中验证，MOPE2有效缓解了动态瓶颈问题，样本效率优于现有MBRL和MFRL算法。
AI.conclusion: 增强探索能力可降低轨迹奖励估计误差，MOPE2为解决MBRL动态瓶颈问题提供了有效方案。

authors_text: Shafin Rahman,Sejuti Rahman,Omar Shahid,Md. Tahmeed Abdullah,Jubair Ahmed Sourov
title: Classifying Eye-Tracking Data Using Saliency Maps
title_zh: 使用显着图对眼动追踪数据进行分类
comment: Accepted in: International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
comments: Accepted in: International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)
abstract: A plethora of research in the literature shows how human eye fixation pattern varies depending on different factors, including genetics, age, social functioning, cognitive functioning, and so on. Analysis of these variations in visual attention has already elicited two potential research avenues: 1) determining the physiological or psychological state of the subject and 2) predicting the tasks associated with the act of viewing from the recorded eye-fixation data. To this end, this paper proposes a visual saliency based novel feature extraction method for automatic and quantitative classification of eye-tracking data, which is applicable to both of the research directions. Instead of directly extracting features from the fixation data, this method employs several well-known computational models of visual attention to predict eye fixation locations as saliency maps. Comparing the saliency amplitudes, similarity and dissimilarity of saliency maps with the corresponding eye fixations maps gives an extra dimension of information which is effectively utilized to generate discriminative features to classify the eye-tracking data. Extensive experimentation using Saliency4ASD, Age Prediction, and Visual Perceptual Task dataset show that our saliency-based feature can achieve superior performance, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin. Moreover, unlike the existing application-specific solutions, our method demonstrates performance improvement across three distinct problems from the real-life domain: Autism Spectrum Disorder screening, toddler age prediction, and human visual perceptual task classification, providing a general paradigm that utilizes the extra-information inherent in saliency maps for a more accurate classification.
summary: A plethora of research in the literature shows how human eye fixation pattern varies depending on different factors, including genetics, age, social functioning, cognitive functioning, and so on. Analysis of these variations in visual attention has already elicited two potential research avenues: 1) determining the physiological or psychological state of the subject and 2) predicting the tasks associated with the act of viewing from the recorded eye-fixation data. To this end, this paper proposes a visual saliency based novel feature extraction method for automatic and quantitative classification of eye-tracking data, which is applicable to both of the research directions. Instead of directly extracting features from the fixation data, this method employs several well-known computational models of visual attention to predict eye fixation locations as saliency maps. Comparing the saliency amplitudes, similarity and dissimilarity of saliency maps with the corresponding eye fixations maps gives an extra dimension of information which is effectively utilized to generate discriminative features to classify the eye-tracking data. Extensive experimentation using Saliency4ASD, Age Prediction, and Visual Perceptual Task dataset show that our saliency-based feature can achieve superior performance, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin. Moreover, unlike the existing application-specific solutions, our method demonstrates performance improvement across three distinct problems from the real-life domain: Autism Spectrum Disorder screening, toddler age prediction, and human visual perceptual task classification, providing a general paradigm that utilizes the extra-information inherent in saliency maps for a more accurate classification.
abstract_zh: 文献中的大量研究表明，人眼注视模式如何根据不同因素而变化，包括遗传、年龄、社会功能、认知功能等。对视觉注意力这些变化的分析已经引出了两个潜在的研究途径：1）确定受试者的生理或心理状态；2）根据记录的眼睛注视数据预测与观看行为相关的任务。为此，本文提出了一种基于视觉显着性的新型特征提取方法，用于眼动追踪数据的自动定量分类，该方法适用于这两个研究方向。该方法不是直接从注视数据中提取特征，而是采用几种众所周知的视觉注意计算模型来预测眼睛注视位置作为显着图。将显着性图的显着性幅度、相似性和不相似性与相应的眼睛注视图进行比较给出了额外的信息维度，该信息可有效地用于生成判别性特征以对眼睛跟踪数据进行分类。使用 Saliency4ASD、年龄​​预测和视觉感知任务数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们基于显着性的特征可以实现卓越的性能，大大优于以前最先进的方法。此外，与现有的特定于应用程序的解决方案不同，我们的方法展示了现实生活领域三个不同问题的性能改进：自闭症谱系障碍筛查、幼儿年龄预测和人类视觉感知任务分类，提供了一个利用显着性图中固有的额外信息进行更准确分类的通用范例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于显著性图的新型特征提取方法，用于自动分类眼动追踪数据。
AI.motivation: 人类眼动模式受多种因素影响，现有方法多为特定应用场景，缺乏通用性。需开发一种适用于生理状态判断与任务预测的通用分类方法。
AI.method: 利用计算视觉注意模型生成显著性图，通过比较显著性图与实际眼动图的幅度、相似性及差异性提取判别性特征。
AI.result: 在Saliency4ASD、年龄预测及视觉任务数据集上均优于现有方法，实现跨领域性能提升。
