search_text: Classifying Eye-Tracking Data Using Saliency Maps 使用显着图对眼动追踪数据进行分类 A plethora of research in the literature shows how human eye fixation pattern varies depending on different factors, including genetics, age, social functioning, cognitive functioning, and so on. Analysis of these variations in visual attention has already elicited two potential research avenues: 1) determining the physiological or psychological state of the subject and 2) predicting the tasks associated with the act of viewing from the recorded eye-fixation data. To this end, this paper proposes a visual saliency based novel feature extraction method for automatic and quantitative classification of eye-tracking data, which is applicable to both of the research directions. Instead of directly extracting features from the fixation data, this method employs several well-known computational models of visual attention to predict eye fixation locations as saliency maps. Comparing the saliency amplitudes, similarity and dissimilarity of saliency maps with the corresponding eye fixations maps gives an extra dimension of information which is effectively utilized to generate discriminative features to classify the eye-tracking data. Extensive experimentation using Saliency4ASD, Age Prediction, and Visual Perceptual Task dataset show that our saliency-based feature can achieve superior performance, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin. Moreover, unlike the existing application-specific solutions, our method demonstrates performance improvement across three distinct problems from the real-life domain: Autism Spectrum Disorder screening, toddler age prediction, and human visual perceptual task classification, providing a general paradigm that utilizes the extra-information inherent in saliency maps for a more accurate classification. 文献中的大量研究表明，人眼注视模式如何根据不同因素而变化，包括遗传、年龄、社会功能、认知功能等。对视觉注意力这些变化的分析已经引出了两个潜在的研究途径：1）确定受试者的生理或心理状态；2）根据记录的眼睛注视数据预测与观看行为相关的任务。为此，本文提出了一种基于视觉显着性的新型特征提取方法，用于眼动追踪数据的自动定量分类，该方法适用于这两个研究方向。该方法不是直接从注视数据中提取特征，而是采用几种众所周知的视觉注意计算模型来预测眼睛注视位置作为显着图。将显着性图的显着性幅度、相似性和不相似性与相应的眼睛注视图进行比较给出了额外的信息维度，该信息可有效地用于生成判别性特征以对眼睛跟踪数据进行分类。使用 Saliency4ASD、年龄​​预测和视觉感知任务数据集进行的广泛实验表明，我们基于显着性的特征可以实现卓越的性能，大大优于以前最先进的方法。此外，与现有的特定于应用程序的解决方案不同，我们的方法展示了现实生活领域三个不同问题的性能改进：自闭症谱系障碍筛查、幼儿年龄预测和人类视觉感知任务分类，提供了一个利用显着性图中固有的额外信息进行更准确分类的通用范例。 本文提出了一种基于显著性图的新型特征提取方法，用于自动分类眼动追踪数据。 Shafin Rahman,Sejuti Rahman,Omar Shahid,Md. Tahmeed Abdullah,Jubair Ahmed Sourov cs.CV

authors_text: Xiang Ling,Lingfei Wu,Saizhuo Wang,Gaoning Pan,Tengfei Ma,Fangli Xu,Alex X. Liu,Chunming Wu,Shouling Ji
title: Deep Graph Matching and Searching for Semantic Code Retrieval
title_zh: 语义代码检索的深度图匹配和搜索
comment: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Knowledge Discovery from Data (ACM TKDD)
comments: Accepted by ACM Transactions on Knowledge Discovery from Data (ACM TKDD)
abstract: Code retrieval is to find the code snippet from a large corpus of source code repositories that highly matches the query of natural language description. Recent work mainly uses natural language processing techniques to process both query texts (i.e., human natural language) and code snippets (i.e., machine programming language), however neglecting the deep structured features of query texts and source codes, both of which contain rich semantic information. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep graph matching and searching (DGMS) model based on graph neural networks for the task of semantic code retrieval. To this end, we first represent both natural language query texts and programming language code snippets with the unified graph-structured data, and then use the proposed graph matching and searching model to retrieve the best matching code snippet. In particular, DGMS not only captures more structural information for individual query texts or code snippets but also learns the fine-grained similarity between them by cross-attention based semantic matching operations. We evaluate the proposed DGMS model on two public code retrieval datasets with two representative programming languages (i.e., Java and Python). Experiment results demonstrate that DGMS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baseline models by a large margin on both datasets. Moreover, our extensive ablation studies systematically investigate and illustrate the impact of each part of DGMS.
summary: Code retrieval is to find the code snippet from a large corpus of source code repositories that highly matches the query of natural language description. Recent work mainly uses natural language processing techniques to process both query texts (i.e., human natural language) and code snippets (i.e., machine programming language), however neglecting the deep structured features of query texts and source codes, both of which contain rich semantic information. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep graph matching and searching (DGMS) model based on graph neural networks for the task of semantic code retrieval. To this end, we first represent both natural language query texts and programming language code snippets with the unified graph-structured data, and then use the proposed graph matching and searching model to retrieve the best matching code snippet. In particular, DGMS not only captures more structural information for individual query texts or code snippets but also learns the fine-grained similarity between them by cross-attention based semantic matching operations. We evaluate the proposed DGMS model on two public code retrieval datasets with two representative programming languages (i.e., Java and Python). Experiment results demonstrate that DGMS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baseline models by a large margin on both datasets. Moreover, our extensive ablation studies systematically investigate and illustrate the impact of each part of DGMS.
abstract_zh: 代码检索是从庞大的源代码存储库中找到与自然语言描述的查询高度匹配的代码片段。最近的工作主要使用自然语言处理技术来处理查询文本（即人类自然语言）和代码片段（即机器编程语言），然而忽略了查询文本和源代码的深层结构化特征，两者都包含丰富的语义信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于图神经网络的端到端深度图匹配和搜索（DGMS）模型，用于语义代码检索任务。为此，我们首先用统一的图结构数据表示自然语言查询文本和编程语言代码片段，然后使用所提出的图匹配和搜索模型来检索最佳匹配的代码片段。特别是，DGMS 不仅可以捕获单个查询文本或代码片段的更多结构信息，还可以通过基于交叉注意力的语义匹配操作来学习它们之间的细粒度相似性。我们使用两种代表性编程语言（即 Java 和 Python）在两个公共代码检索数据集上评估所提出的 DGMS 模型。实验结果表明，DGMS 在两个数据集上都明显优于最先进的基线模型。此外，我们广泛的消融研究系统地调查和说明了 DGMS 各个部分的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图神经网络的端到端深度图匹配与搜索模型（DGMS），用于语义代码检索任务，通过统一的图结构表示自然语言查询和代码片段，并利用跨注意力机制进行细粒度语义匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在代码检索中主要依赖自然语言处理技术，忽略了查询文本和代码片段中丰富的结构化语义信息，导致匹配效果受限。
AI.method: 将自然语言查询和编程语言代码统一表示为图结构数据，设计基于图匹配和跨注意力机制的模型，捕捉个体结构信息并学习细粒度相似性。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集（Java和Python）上显著优于现有最先进的基线模型，消融实验系统验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DGMS通过图结构建模和跨注意力匹配有效提升了语义代码检索性能，证明了结构化特征建模的重要性。

In this paper, we propose an end-to-end deep graph matching and searching (DGMS) model based on graph neural networks for the task of semantic code retrieval. In particular, DGMS not only captures more structural information for individual query texts or code snippets but also learns the fine-grained similarity between them by cross-attention based semantic matching operations. title: Abduction and Argumentation for Explainable Machine Learning: A Position Survey
title_zh: 可解释机器学习的溯因与论证：立场调查
abstract: This paper presents Abduction and Argumentation as two principled forms for reasoning, and fleshes out the fundamental role that they can play within Machine Learning. It reviews the state-of-the-art work over the past few decades on the link of these two reasoning forms with machine learning work, and from this it elaborates on how the explanation-generating role of Abduction and Argumentation makes them naturally-fitting mechanisms for the development of Explainable Machine Learning and AI systems. Abduction contributes towards this goal by facilitating learning through the transformation, preparation, and homogenization of data. Argumentation, as a conservative extension of classical deductive reasoning, offers a flexible prediction and coverage mechanism for learning -- an associated target language for learned knowledge -- that explicitly acknowledges the need to deal, in the context of learning, with uncertain, incomplete and inconsistent data that are incompatible with any classically-represented logical theory.
summary: This paper presents Abduction and Argumentation as two principled forms for reasoning, and fleshes out the fundamental role that they can play within Machine Learning. It reviews the state-of-the-art work over the past few decades on the link of these two reasoning forms with machine learning work, and from this it elaborates on how the explanation-generating role of Abduction and Argumentation makes them naturally-fitting mechanisms for the development of Explainable Machine Learning and AI systems. Abduction contributes towards this goal by facilitating learning through the transformation, preparation, and homogenization of data. Argumentation, as a conservative extension of classical deductive reasoning, offers a flexible prediction and coverage mechanism for learning -- an associated target language for learned knowledge -- that explicitly acknowledges the need to deal, in the context of learning, with uncertain, incomplete and inconsistent data that are incompatible with any classically-represented logical theory.
abstract_zh: 本文将溯因和论证作为推理的两种原则形式，并充实了它们在机器学习中可以发挥的基本作用。它回顾了过去几十年来关于这两种推理形式与机器学习工作联系的最先进的工作，并由此详细阐述了溯因和论证的解释生成作用如何使它们成为可解释机器学习和人工智能系统开发的自然契合机制。溯因通过数据的转换、准备和同质化促进学习，从而有助于实现这一目标。论证作为经典演绎推理的保守延伸，为学习提供了灵活的预测和覆盖机制——一种与所学知识相关的目标语言——明确承认需要在学习背景下处理与任何经典代表的逻辑理论不相容的不确定、不完整和不一致的数据。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了归结与论证作为可解释机器学习的推理机制，综述了二者与机器学习的关联研究。
AI.motivation: 为解决机器学习中数据不确定性、不完整性及模型可解释性不足的问题，需探索新的推理框架以增强AI系统的透明度与逻辑性。
AI.method: 通过回顾近几十年归结与论证在机器学习领域的研究进展，分析其在数据处理、知识表示及预测机制中的应用潜力。
AI.result: 归结通过数据转换与统一提升学习效率，论证则通过处理矛盾与不确定性数据，为可解释AI提供了灵活的知识表达框架。
AI.conclusion: 归结与论证作为互补的推理范式，为构建可解释机器学习系统提供了理论基础与实践路径。

motivation: 为解决机器学习中数据不确定性、不完整性及模型可解释性不足的问题，需探索新的推理框架以增强AI系统的透明度与逻辑性。
method: 通过回顾近几十年归结与论证在机器学习领域的研究进展，分析其在数据处理、知识表示及预测机制中的应用潜力。
result: 归结通过数据转换与统一提升学习效率，论证则通过处理矛盾与不确定性数据，为可解释AI提供了灵活的知识表达框架。
conclusion: 归结与论证作为互补的推理范式，为构建可解释机器学习系统提供了理论基础与实践路径。
search_text: Abduction and Argumentation for Explainable Machine Learning: A Position Survey 可解释机器学习的溯因与论证：立场调查 This paper presents Abduction and Argumentation as two principled forms for reasoning, and fleshes out the fundamental role that they can play within Machine Learning. It reviews the state-of-the-art work over the past few decades on the link of these two reasoning forms with machine learning work, and from this it elaborates on how the explanation-generating role of Abduction and Argumentation makes them naturally-fitting mechanisms for the development of Explainable Machine Learning and AI systems. Abduction contributes towards this goal by facilitating learning through the transformation, preparation, and homogenization of data. Argumentation, as a conservative extension of classical deductive reasoning, offers a flexible prediction and coverage mechanism for learning -- an associated target language for learned knowledge -- that explicitly acknowledges the need to deal, in the context of learning, with uncertain, incomplete and inconsistent data that are incompatible with any classically-represented logical theory. 本文将溯因和论证作为推理的两种原则形式，并充实了它们在机器学习中可以发挥的基本作用。它回顾了过去几十年来关于这两种推理形式与机器学习工作联系的最先进的工作，并由此详细阐述了溯因和论证的解释生成作用如何使它们成为可解释机器学习和人工智能系统开发的自然契合机制。溯因通过数据的转换、准备和同质化促进学习，从而有助于实现这一目标。论证作为经典演绎推理的保守延伸，为学习提供了灵活的预测和覆盖机制——一种与所学知识相关的目标语言——明确承认需要在学习背景下处理与任何经典代表的逻辑理论不相容的不确定、不完整和不一致的数据。 本文探讨了归结与论证作为可解释机器学习的推理机制，综述了二者与机器学习的关联研究。 Antonis Kakas,Loizos Michael cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO

authors_text: Alejandro Donaire,Luigi Villani,Fanny Ficuciello,Juan Tomassini,Bruno Siciliano
title: Force and state-feedback control for robots with non-collocated environmental and actuator forces
title_zh: 具有非并置环境力和执行器力的机器人的力和状态反馈控制
abstract: In this paper, we present an impedance control design for multi-variable linear and nonlinear robotic systems. The control design considers force and state feedback to improve the performance of the closed loop. Simultaneous feedback of forces and states allows the controller for an extra degree of freedom to approximate the desired impedance port behaviour. A numerical analysis is used to demonstrate the desired impedance closed-loop behaviour.
summary: In this paper, we present an impedance control design for multi-variable linear and nonlinear robotic systems. The control design considers force and state feedback to improve the performance of the closed loop. Simultaneous feedback of forces and states allows the controller for an extra degree of freedom to approximate the desired impedance port behaviour. A numerical analysis is used to demonstrate the desired impedance closed-loop behaviour.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了多变量线性和非线性机器人系统的阻抗控制设计。控制设计考虑力和状态反馈以提高闭环的性能。力和状态的同时反馈使控制器具有额外的自由度来近似所需的阻抗端口行为。数值分析用于演示所需的阻抗闭环行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合力和状态反馈的阻抗控制设计，用于提升多变量线性和非线性机器人系统的闭环控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在处理非共位环境力与执行器力时存在性能局限，需通过引入额外自由度优化阻抗特性以适应复杂环境交互。
AI.method: 基于阻抗控制框架，同时整合力反馈与状态反馈，通过数值分析验证闭环系统对期望阻抗行为的逼近能力。
AI.result: 数值仿真验证了所提方法能够有效实现目标阻抗特性，展示了控制策略在提升系统动态响应与环境适应性方面的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人系统提供了更灵活的控制手段，可拓展至多自由度机械臂等场景，未来需进一步研究非线性不确定性的鲁棒性问题。

title: Discriminative feature generation for classification of imbalanced data
title_zh: 用于不平衡数据分类的判别特征生成
abstract: The data imbalance problem is a frequent bottleneck in the classification performance of neural networks. In this paper, we propose a novel supervised discriminative feature generation (DFG) method for a minority class dataset. DFG is based on the modified structure of a generative adversarial network consisting of four independent networks: generator, discriminator, feature extractor, and classifier. To augment the selected discriminative features of the minority class data by adopting an attention mechanism, the generator for the class-imbalanced target task is trained, and the feature extractor and classifier are regularized using the pre-trained features from a large source data. The experimental results show that the DFG generator enhances the augmentation of the label-preserved and diverse features, and the classification results are significantly improved on the target task. The feature generation model can contribute greatly to the development of data augmentation methods through discriminative feature generation and supervised attention methods.
summary: The data imbalance problem is a frequent bottleneck in the classification performance of neural networks. In this paper, we propose a novel supervised discriminative feature generation (DFG) method for a minority class dataset. DFG is based on the modified structure of a generative adversarial network consisting of four independent networks: generator, discriminator, feature extractor, and classifier. To augment the selected discriminative features of the minority class data by adopting an attention mechanism, the generator for the class-imbalanced target task is trained, and the feature extractor and classifier are regularized using the pre-trained features from a large source data. The experimental results show that the DFG generator enhances the augmentation of the label-preserved and diverse features, and the classification results are significantly improved on the target task. The feature generation model can contribute greatly to the development of data augmentation methods through discriminative feature generation and supervised attention methods.
abstract_zh: 数据不平衡问题是神经网络分类性能的常见瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对少数类数据集的新型监督判别特征生成（DFG）方法。 DFG 基于生成对抗网络的修改结构，该网络由四个独立网络组成：生成器、鉴别器、特征提取器和分类器。为了通过采用注意力机制来增强少数类数据的选定判别性特征，训练类不平衡目标任务的生成器，并使用来自大量源数据的预训练特征对特征提取器和分类器进行正则化。实验结果表明，DFG生成器增强了标签保留和多样性特征的增强，在目标任务上分类结果得到显着改善。特征生成模型可以通过判别性特征生成和监督注意方法为数据增强方法的发展做出巨大贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的判别特征生成方法（DFG），用于解决分类任务中数据不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 数据不平衡会显著降低神经网络的分类性能，传统方法难以有效增强少数类特征。
AI.method: 构建包含生成器、判别器、特征提取器和分类器的改进GAN框架，结合注意力机制增强少数类特征，并利用预训练特征进行正则化。
AI.result: DFG方法显著提升了目标任务的分类准确率，生成的特征具有更好的标签保留性和多样性。
AI.conclusion: DFG通过判别特征生成与监督注意力机制，为数据增强方法提供了新思路，可有效应对分类不平衡问题。

title: Persian Handwritten Digit, Character and Word Recognition Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行波斯语手写数字、字符和单词识别
abstract: Digit, letter and word recognition for a particular script has various applications in todays commercial contexts. Nevertheless, only a limited number of relevant studies have dealt with Persian scripts. In this paper, deep neural networks are utilized through various DensNet architectures, as well as the Xception, are adopted, modified and further boosted through data augmentation and test time augmentation, in order to come up with an optical character recognition accounting for the particularities of the Persian language and the corresponding handwritings. Taking advantage of dividing the databases to training, validation and test sets, as well as k-fold cross validation, the comparison of the proposed method with various state-of-the-art alternatives is performed on the basis of the HODA and Sadri databases, which offer the most comprehensive collection of samples in terms of the various handwriting styles possessed by different human beings, as well as different forms each letter may take, which depend on its position within a word. On the HODA database, we achieve recognition rates of 99.72% and 89.99% for digits and characters, being 99.72%, 98.32% and 98.82% for digits, characters and words from the Sadri database, respectively.
summary: Digit, letter and word recognition for a particular script has various applications in todays commercial contexts. Nevertheless, only a limited number of relevant studies have dealt with Persian scripts. In this paper, deep neural networks are utilized through various DensNet architectures, as well as the Xception, are adopted, modified and further boosted through data augmentation and test time augmentation, in order to come up with an optical character recognition accounting for the particularities of the Persian language and the corresponding handwritings. Taking advantage of dividing the databases to training, validation and test sets, as well as k-fold cross validation, the comparison of the proposed method with various state-of-the-art alternatives is performed on the basis of the HODA and Sadri databases, which offer the most comprehensive collection of samples in terms of the various handwriting styles possessed by different human beings, as well as different forms each letter may take, which depend on its position within a word. On the HODA database, we achieve recognition rates of 99.72% and 89.99% for digits and characters, being 99.72%, 98.32% and 98.82% for digits, characters and words from the Sadri database, respectively.
abstract_zh: 特定文字的数字、字母和单词识别在当今的商业环境中具有多种应用。然而，只有有限数量的相关研究涉及波斯文字。在本文中，通过各种 DensNet 架构利用深度神经网络，并通过数据增强和测试时间增强来采用、修改和进一步增强 Xception，以提出一种考虑波斯语和相应笔迹特殊性的光学字符识别。利用将数据库划分为训练集、验证集和测试集以及 k 倍交叉验证的优势，在 HODA 和 Sadri 数据库的基础上将所提出的方法与各种最先进的替代方案进行比较，这些数据库提供了最全面的样本集合，包括不同人拥有的各种笔迹风格以及每个字母可能采取的不同形式（取决于其在单词中的位置）。在 HODA 数据库上，我们对数字和字符的识别率分别为 99.72% 和 89.99%，而在 Sadri 数据库上，我们对数字、字符和单词的识别率分别为 99.72%、98.32% 和 98.82%。

AI.tldr: 本文使用深度学习方法对波斯语手写数字、字符和单词进行识别，提出基于DenseNet和Xception架构的改进模型。
AI.motivation: 波斯语手写识别在商业场景中有重要应用，但现有研究较少且缺乏针对其语言特性和书写风格的优化方法。
AI.method: 采用DenseNet和Xception网络架构，结合数据增强与测试时增强技术，并通过k折交叉验证在HODA和Sadri数据库上进行性能评估。
AI.result: 在HODA数据库上数字识别率达99.72%、字符识别率89.99%；在Sadri数据库上数字、字符和单词识别率分别为99.72%、98.32%和98.82%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效提升了波斯语手写识别性能，验证了深度学习模型与数据增强技术的结合在复杂书写风格下的适用性。

search_text: Persian Handwritten Digit, Character and Word Recognition Using Deep Learning 使用深度学习进行波斯语手写数字、字符和单词识别 Digit, letter and word recognition for a particular script has various applications in todays commercial contexts. Nevertheless, only a limited number of relevant studies have dealt with Persian scripts. In this paper, deep neural networks are utilized through various DensNet architectures, as well as the Xception, are adopted, modified and further boosted through data augmentation and test time augmentation, in order to come up with an optical character recognition accounting for the particularities of the Persian language and the corresponding handwritings. Taking advantage of dividing the databases to training, validation and test sets, as well as k-fold cross validation, the comparison of the proposed method with various state-of-the-art alternatives is performed on the basis of the HODA and Sadri databases, which offer the most comprehensive collection of samples in terms of the various handwriting styles possessed by different human beings, as well as different forms each letter may take, which depend on its position within a word. On the HODA database, we achieve recognition rates of 99.72% and 89.99% for digits and characters, being 99.72%, 98.32% and 98.82% for digits, characters and words from the Sadri database, respectively. 特定文字的数字、字母和单词识别在当今的商业环境中具有多种应用。然而，只有有限数量的相关研究涉及波斯文字。在本文中，通过各种 DensNet 架构利用深度神经网络，并通过数据增强和测试时间增强来采用、修改和进一步增强 Xception，以提出一种考虑波斯语和相应笔迹特殊性的光学字符识别。利用将数据库划分为训练集、验证集和测试集以及 k 倍交叉验证的优势，在 HODA 和 Sadri 数据库的基础上将所提出的方法与各种最先进的替代方案进行比较，这些数据库提供了最全面的样本集合，包括不同人拥有的各种笔迹风格以及每个字母可能采取的不同形式（取决于其在单词中的位置）。在 HODA 数据库上，我们对数字和字符的识别率分别为 99.72% 和 89.99%，而在 Sadri 数据库上，我们对数字、字符和单词的识别率分别为 99.72%、98.32% 和 98.82%。 本文使用深度学习方法对波斯语手写数字、字符和单词进行识别，提出基于DenseNet和Xception架构的改进模型。 Mehdi Bonyani,Simindokht Jahangard,Morteza Daneshmand cs.CV

authors_text: Benedek Rozemberczki,Peter Englert,Amol Kapoor,Martin Blais,Bryan Perozzi
title: Pathfinder Discovery Networks for Neural Message Passing
title_zh: 用于神经消息传递的探路者发现网络
abstract: In this work we propose Pathfinder Discovery Networks (PDNs), a method for jointly learning a message passing graph over a multiplex network with a downstream semi-supervised model. PDNs inductively learn an aggregated weight for each edge, optimized to produce the best outcome for the downstream learning task. PDNs are a generalization of attention mechanisms on graphs which allow flexible construction of similarity functions between nodes, edge convolutions, and cheap multiscale mixing layers. We show that PDNs overcome weaknesses of existing methods for graph attention (e.g. Graph Attention Networks), such as the diminishing weight problem. Our experimental results demonstrate competitive predictive performance on academic node classification tasks. Additional results from a challenging suite of node classification experiments show how PDNs can learn a wider class of functions than existing baselines. We analyze the relative computational complexity of PDNs, and show that PDN runtime is not considerably higher than static-graph models. Finally, we discuss how PDNs can be used to construct an easily interpretable attention mechanism that allows users to understand information propagation in the graph.
summary: In this work we propose Pathfinder Discovery Networks (PDNs), a method for jointly learning a message passing graph over a multiplex network with a downstream semi-supervised model. PDNs inductively learn an aggregated weight for each edge, optimized to produce the best outcome for the downstream learning task. PDNs are a generalization of attention mechanisms on graphs which allow flexible construction of similarity functions between nodes, edge convolutions, and cheap multiscale mixing layers. We show that PDNs overcome weaknesses of existing methods for graph attention (e.g. Graph Attention Networks), such as the diminishing weight problem. Our experimental results demonstrate competitive predictive performance on academic node classification tasks. Additional results from a challenging suite of node classification experiments show how PDNs can learn a wider class of functions than existing baselines. We analyze the relative computational complexity of PDNs, and show that PDN runtime is not considerably higher than static-graph models. Finally, we discuss how PDNs can be used to construct an easily interpretable attention mechanism that allows users to understand information propagation in the graph.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了探路者发现网络（PDN），一种通过下游半监督模型联合学习多路网络上的消息传递图的方法。 PDN 归纳学习每个边缘的聚合权重，并进行优化以为下游学习任务产生最佳结果。 PDN 是图上注意力机制的推广，它允许灵活地构建节点、边缘卷积和廉价的多尺度混合层之间的相似函数。我们证明 PDN 克服了现有图注意力方法（例如图注意力网络）的弱点，例如权重递减问题。我们的实验结果证明了学术节点分类任务的竞争性预测性能。一系列具有挑战性的节点分类实验的其他结果表明，PDN 如何能够学习比现有基线更广泛的功能类别。我们分析了 PDN 的相对计算复杂度，结果表明 PDN 运行时间并不比静态图模型高很多。最后，我们讨论如何使用 PDN 构建易于解释的注意力机制，使用户能够理解图中的信息传播。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Pathfinder Discovery Networks (PDNs)的新方法，用于在多路网络中联合学习消息传递图与下游半监督模型，以优化节点分类任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图注意力机制（如GAT）存在权重衰减等问题，且难以灵活构建节点相似性函数与多尺度混合层，限制了模型表达能力与可解释性。
AI.method: PDNs通过归纳学习边聚合权重，结合灵活的相似性函数、边卷积与多尺度混合层，优化下游任务目标，同时保持计算效率。
AI.result: 在学术节点分类任务中，PDNs展现出与现有方法相当的预测性能，并能学习更广泛的函数类别，且运行时延接近静态图模型。
AI.conclusion: PDNs有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在保持计算效率的同时提升了模型灵活性与可解释性，适用于复杂图结构的学习任务。

authors_text: Qichuan Geng,Hong Zhang,Na Jiang,Xiaojuan Qi,Liangjun Zhang,Zhong Zhou
title: Object-aware Feature Aggregation for Video Object Detection
title_zh: 用于视频对象检测的对象感知特征聚合
abstract: We present an Object-aware Feature Aggregation (OFA) module for video object detection (VID). Our approach is motivated by the intriguing property that video-level object-aware knowledge can be employed as a powerful semantic prior to help object recognition. As a consequence, augmenting features with such prior knowledge can effectively improve the classification and localization performance. To make features get access to more content about the whole video, we first capture the object-aware knowledge of proposals and incorporate such knowledge with the well-established pair-wise contexts. With extensive experimental results on the ImageNet VID dataset, our approach demonstrates the effectiveness of object-aware knowledge with the superior performance of 83.93% and 86.09% mAP with ResNet-101 and ResNeXt-101, respectively. When further equipped with Sequence DIoU NMS, we obtain the best-reported mAP of 85.07% and 86.88% upon the paper submitted. The code to reproduce our results will be released after acceptance.
summary: We present an Object-aware Feature Aggregation (OFA) module for video object detection (VID). Our approach is motivated by the intriguing property that video-level object-aware knowledge can be employed as a powerful semantic prior to help object recognition. As a consequence, augmenting features with such prior knowledge can effectively improve the classification and localization performance. To make features get access to more content about the whole video, we first capture the object-aware knowledge of proposals and incorporate such knowledge with the well-established pair-wise contexts. With extensive experimental results on the ImageNet VID dataset, our approach demonstrates the effectiveness of object-aware knowledge with the superior performance of 83.93% and 86.09% mAP with ResNet-101 and ResNeXt-101, respectively. When further equipped with Sequence DIoU NMS, we obtain the best-reported mAP of 85.07% and 86.88% upon the paper submitted. The code to reproduce our results will be released after acceptance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于视频对象检测（VID）的对象感知特征聚合（OFA）模块。我们的方法受到一个有趣的特性的启发，即视频级对象感知知识可以用作帮助对象识别之前的强大语义。因此，利用此类先验知识增强特征可以有效提高分类和定位性能。为了使功能能够访问有关整个视频的更多内容，我们首先捕获提案的对象感知知识，并将这些知识与完善的成对上下文结合起来。通过在 ImageNet VID 数据集上的大量实验结果，我们的方法证明了对象感知知识的有效性，ResNet-101 和 ResNeXt-101 的 mAP 分别达到 83.93% 和 86.09% 的卓越性能。当进一步配备 Sequence DIoU NMS 时，我们在提交的论文中获得了 85.07% 和 86.88% 的最佳报告 mAP。重现结果的代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向视频目标检测的物体感知特征聚合模块（OFA），通过引入视频级物体感知知识提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 视频中物体的语义先验信息可作为强大的辅助线索，有助于提升目标识别与定位的准确性。
AI.method: 通过捕捉候选框的物体感知知识，并将其与传统的成对上下文信息融合，增强特征表达能力。
AI.result: 在ImageNet VID数据集上，使用ResNet-101和ResNeXt-101分别达到83.93%和86.09%的mAP，结合Sequence DIoU NMS后进一步提升至85.07%和86.88%。
AI.conclusion: 物体感知特征聚合方法有效提升了视频目标检测性能，为后续研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Keith Burghardt,Tad Hogg,Raissa M. D'Souza,Kristina Lerman,Marton Posfai
title: Origins of Algorithmic Instabilities in Crowdsourced Ranking
title_zh: 众包排名中算法不稳定的根源
abstract: Crowdsourcing systems aggregate decisions of many people to help users quickly identify high-quality options, such as the best answers to questions or interesting news stories. A long-standing issue in crowdsourcing is how option quality and human judgement heuristics interact to affect collective outcomes, such as the perceived popularity of options. We address this limitation by conducting a controlled experiment where subjects choose between two ranked options whose quality can be independently varied. We use this data to construct a model that quantifies how judgement heuristics and option quality combine when deciding between two options. The model reveals popularity-ranking can be unstable: unless the quality difference between the two options is sufficiently high, the higher quality option is not guaranteed to be eventually ranked on top. To rectify this instability, we create an algorithm that accounts for judgement heuristics to infer the best option and rank it first. This algorithm is guaranteed to be optimal if data matches the model. When the data does not match the model, however, simulations show that in practice this algorithm performs better or at least as well as popularity-based and recency-based ranking for any two-choice question. Our work suggests that algorithms relying on inference of mathematical models of user behavior can substantially improve outcomes in crowdsourcing systems.
summary: Crowdsourcing systems aggregate decisions of many people to help users quickly identify high-quality options, such as the best answers to questions or interesting news stories. A long-standing issue in crowdsourcing is how option quality and human judgement heuristics interact to affect collective outcomes, such as the perceived popularity of options. We address this limitation by conducting a controlled experiment where subjects choose between two ranked options whose quality can be independently varied. We use this data to construct a model that quantifies how judgement heuristics and option quality combine when deciding between two options. The model reveals popularity-ranking can be unstable: unless the quality difference between the two options is sufficiently high, the higher quality option is not guaranteed to be eventually ranked on top. To rectify this instability, we create an algorithm that accounts for judgement heuristics to infer the best option and rank it first. This algorithm is guaranteed to be optimal if data matches the model. When the data does not match the model, however, simulations show that in practice this algorithm performs better or at least as well as popularity-based and recency-based ranking for any two-choice question. Our work suggests that algorithms relying on inference of mathematical models of user behavior can substantially improve outcomes in crowdsourcing systems.
abstract_zh: 众包系统汇总了许多人的决策，帮助用户快速识别高质量的选项，例如问题的最佳答案或有趣的新闻报道。众包中一个长期存在的问题是选项质量和人类判断启发如何相互作用以影响集体结果，例如选项的受欢迎程度。我们通过进行一项对照实验来解决这一限制，其中受试者在两个排名选项之间进行选择，这两个选项的质量可以独立变化。我们使用这些数据构建一个模型，量化在两个选项之间做出决定时判断启发法和选项质量如何结合。该模型显示受欢迎度排名可能不稳定：除非两个选项之间的质量差异足够高，否则不能保证较高质量的选项最终排名靠前。为了纠正这种不稳定性，我们创建了一种算法，该算法考虑判断启发法来推断最佳选项并将其排名第一。如果数据与模型匹配，则保证该算法是最优的。然而，当数据与模型不匹配时，模拟表明，在实践中，该算法对于任何二选一问题的基于流行度和基于新近度的排名表现更好或至少一样好。我们的工作表明，依赖于用户行为数学模型推断的算法可以显着改善众包系统的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了众包排名中算法不稳定性产生的原因，并提出了一种基于用户判断启发式的改进算法。
AI.motivation: 众包系统中选项质量与人类判断启发式之间的相互作用可能导致集体结果不稳定，需解决如何提升排名算法鲁棒性的问题。
AI.method: 通过受控实验让被试在质量可调的两个选项间进行选择，构建量化判断启发式与选项质量结合的模型，并设计基于该模型的改进算法。
AI.result: 模型表明除非质量差异足够大，否则高质量选项未必最终排名靠前；改进算法在数据匹配模型时最优，且在实际应用中优于传统流行度或时效性排序。
AI.conclusion: 基于用户行为数学模型的推理算法能有效提升众包系统的排名稳定性与准确性。

title: Eye Tracking Data Collection Protocol for VR for Remotely Located Subjects using Blockchain and Smart Contracts
title_zh: 使用区块链和智能合约的远程受试者 VR 眼动追踪数据收集协议
comment: 2020 IEEE International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Virtual Reality (AIVR). Authors' copy, refer to the doi for more information
comments: 2020 IEEE International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Virtual Reality (AIVR). Authors' copy, refer to the doi for more information
abstract: Eye tracking data collection in the virtual reality context is typically carried out in laboratory settings, which usually limits the number of participants or consumes at least several months of research time. In addition, under laboratory settings, subjects may not behave naturally due to being recorded in an uncomfortable environment. In this work, we propose a proof-of-concept eye tracking data collection protocol and its implementation to collect eye tracking data from remotely located subjects, particularly for virtual reality using Ethereum blockchain and smart contracts. With the proposed protocol, data collectors can collect high quality eye tracking data from a large number of human subjects with heterogeneous socio-demographic characteristics. The quality and the amount of data can be helpful for various tasks in data-driven human-computer interaction and artificial intelligence.
summary: Eye tracking data collection in the virtual reality context is typically carried out in laboratory settings, which usually limits the number of participants or consumes at least several months of research time. In addition, under laboratory settings, subjects may not behave naturally due to being recorded in an uncomfortable environment. In this work, we propose a proof-of-concept eye tracking data collection protocol and its implementation to collect eye tracking data from remotely located subjects, particularly for virtual reality using Ethereum blockchain and smart contracts. With the proposed protocol, data collectors can collect high quality eye tracking data from a large number of human subjects with heterogeneous socio-demographic characteristics. The quality and the amount of data can be helpful for various tasks in data-driven human-computer interaction and artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 虚拟现实环境中的眼动追踪数据收集通常在实验室环境中进行，这通常会限制参与者的数量或消耗至少几个月的研究时间。此外，在实验室环境下，由于在不舒服的环境中进行记录，受试者可能会表现不自然。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种概念验证的眼动追踪数据收集协议及其实现，用于从远程主体收集眼动追踪数据，特别是使用以太坊区块链和智能合约的虚拟现实。通过所提出的协议，数据收集者可以从大量具有异质社会人口特征的人类受试者中收集高质量的眼动追踪数据。数据的质量和数量有助于数据驱动的人机交互和人工智能中的各种任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区块链和智能合约的远程眼动追踪数据收集协议，用于虚拟现实场景下的大规模数据采集。
AI.motivation: 传统实验室环境限制了眼动数据采集的规模和自然性，难以获取多样化的高质量数据以支持数据驱动的人机交互和人工智能研究。
AI.method: 利用以太坊区块链和智能合约技术设计去中心化数据收集协议，通过自动化合约确保数据完整性与参与者隐私，实现远程大规模数据采集。
AI.result: 成功验证了该协议的可行性，能够高效收集具有异质社会人口特征的大量高质量VR眼动数据。
AI.conclusion: 该协议为远程眼动数据采集提供了创新解决方案，有助于推动数据驱动的人机交互和AI研究发展。

authors_text: Saeed Khaki,Hieu Pham,Ye Han,Wade Kent,Lizhi Wang
title: High-Throughput Image-Based Plant Stand Count Estimation Using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行基于图像的高通量植物株数估计
abstract: The future landscape of modern farming and plant breeding is rapidly changing due to the complex needs of our society. The explosion of collectable data has started a revolution in agriculture to the point where innovation must occur. To a commercial organization, the accurate and efficient collection of information is necessary to ensure that optimal decisions are made at key points of the breeding cycle. However, due to the shear size of a breeding program and current resource limitations, the ability to collect precise data on individual plants is not possible. In particular, efficient phenotyping of crops to record its color, shape, chemical properties, disease susceptibility, etc. is severely limited due to labor requirements and, oftentimes, expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose a deep learning based approach, named DeepStand, for image-based corn stand counting at early phenological stages. The proposed method adopts a truncated VGG-16 network as a backbone feature extractor and merges multiple feature maps with different scales to make the network robust against scale variation. Our extensive computational experiments suggest that our proposed method can successfully count corn stands and out-perform other state-of-the-art methods. It is the goal of our work to be used by the larger agricultural community as a way to enable high-throughput phenotyping without the use of extensive time and labor requirements.
summary: The future landscape of modern farming and plant breeding is rapidly changing due to the complex needs of our society. The explosion of collectable data has started a revolution in agriculture to the point where innovation must occur. To a commercial organization, the accurate and efficient collection of information is necessary to ensure that optimal decisions are made at key points of the breeding cycle. However, due to the shear size of a breeding program and current resource limitations, the ability to collect precise data on individual plants is not possible. In particular, efficient phenotyping of crops to record its color, shape, chemical properties, disease susceptibility, etc. is severely limited due to labor requirements and, oftentimes, expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose a deep learning based approach, named DeepStand, for image-based corn stand counting at early phenological stages. The proposed method adopts a truncated VGG-16 network as a backbone feature extractor and merges multiple feature maps with different scales to make the network robust against scale variation. Our extensive computational experiments suggest that our proposed method can successfully count corn stands and out-perform other state-of-the-art methods. It is the goal of our work to be used by the larger agricultural community as a way to enable high-throughput phenotyping without the use of extensive time and labor requirements.
abstract_zh: 由于我们社会的复杂需求，现代农业和植物育种的未来格局正在迅速变化。可收集数据的爆炸式增长引发了农业革命，以至于必须进行创新。对于商业组织来说，准确有效的信息收集对于确保在育种周期的关键点做出最佳决策是必要的。然而，由于育种计划的规模和当前的资源限制，不可能收集单个植物的精确数据。特别是，由于劳动力需求以及通常需要的专业领域知识，对作物进行有效表型记录其颜色、形状、化学性质、疾病易感性等受到严重限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，名为 DeepStand，用于早期物候阶段基于图像的玉米林分计数。该方法采用截断的VGG-16网络作为主干特征提取器，并合并不同尺度的多个特征图，使网络对尺度变化具有鲁棒性。我们广泛的计算实验表明，我们提出的方法可以成功地计算玉米株数，并且优于其他最先进的方法。我们工作的目标是被更大的农业界用作一种无需花费大量时间和劳动力即可实现高通量表型分析的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的高通量图像化玉米植株计数方法DeepStand，用于解决农业育种中数据采集效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代农业育种需要高效精准的表型分析技术，但传统方法受限于人工操作和专家知识，难以满足大规模育种项目的高效数据采集需求。
AI.method: 采用截断的VGG-16网络作为特征提取主干，通过融合多尺度特征图增强模型对尺度变化的鲁棒性，实现玉米幼苗期的植株计数。
AI.result: 实验表明DeepStand方法在玉米植株计数任务上优于现有最先进的方法，验证了其在高通量表型分析中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为农业领域提供了无需大量人力和时间投入的高通量表型分析解决方案，有助于推动精准农业的发展。

search_text: High-Throughput Image-Based Plant Stand Count Estimation Using Convolutional Neural Networks 使用卷积神经网络进行基于图像的高通量植物株数估计 The future landscape of modern farming and plant breeding is rapidly changing due to the complex needs of our society. The explosion of collectable data has started a revolution in agriculture to the point where innovation must occur. To a commercial organization, the accurate and efficient collection of information is necessary to ensure that optimal decisions are made at key points of the breeding cycle. However, due to the shear size of a breeding program and current resource limitations, the ability to collect precise data on individual plants is not possible. In particular, efficient phenotyping of crops to record its color, shape, chemical properties, disease susceptibility, etc. is severely limited due to labor requirements and, oftentimes, expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose a deep learning based approach, named DeepStand, for image-based corn stand counting at early phenological stages. The proposed method adopts a truncated VGG-16 network as a backbone feature extractor and merges multiple feature maps with different scales to make the network robust against scale variation. Our extensive computational experiments suggest that our proposed method can successfully count corn stands and out-perform other state-of-the-art methods. It is the goal of our work to be used by the larger agricultural community as a way to enable high-throughput phenotyping without the use of extensive time and labor requirements. 由于我们社会的复杂需求，现代农业和植物育种的未来格局正在迅速变化。可收集数据的爆炸式增长引发了农业革命，以至于必须进行创新。对于商业组织来说，准确有效的信息收集对于确保在育种周期的关键点做出最佳决策是必要的。然而，由于育种计划的规模和当前的资源限制，不可能收集单个植物的精确数据。特别是，由于劳动力需求以及通常需要的专业领域知识，对作物进行有效表型记录其颜色、形状、化学性质、疾病易感性等受到严重限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的方法，名为 DeepStand，用于早期物候阶段基于图像的玉米林分计数。该方法采用截断的VGG-16网络作为主干特征提取器，并合并不同尺度的多个特征图，使网络对尺度变化具有鲁棒性。我们广泛的计算实验表明，我们提出的方法可以成功地计算玉米株数，并且优于其他最先进的方法。我们工作的目标是被更大的农业界用作一种无需花费大量时间和劳动力即可实现高通量表型分析的方法。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络的高通量图像化玉米植株计数方法DeepStand，用于解决农业育种中数据采集效率低的问题。 Saeed Khaki,Hieu Pham,Ye Han,Wade Kent,Lizhi Wang cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

title: Dynamically Tie the Right Offer to the Right Customer in Telecommunications Industry
title_zh: 动态地将正确的产品与电信行业的正确客户联系起来
comment: Published in 2011 RESEARCH COUNCIL JOURNAL, An Annual Publication From The Direct Marketing Association Research Council- https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&cad=rja&uact=8&ved=2ahUKEwiitNPbyr7sAhXyct8KHfSpDsEQFjABegQIAxAC&url=https%3A%2F%2Fthedma.org%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2011-Analytics-Journal.pdf&usg=AOvVaw1XhGZBELMr3-_HAPhysVPp
comments: Published in 2011 RESEARCH COUNCIL JOURNAL, An Annual Publication From The Direct Marketing Association Research Council- https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&rct=j&q=&esrc=s&source=web&cd=&cad=rja&uact=8&ved=2ahUKEwiitNPbyr7sAhXyct8KHfSpDsEQFjABegQIAxAC&url=https%3A%2F%2Fthedma.org%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2011-Analytics-Journal.pdf&usg=AOvVaw1XhGZBELMr3-_HAPhysVPp
abstract: For a successful business, engaging in an effective campaign is a key task for marketers. Most previous studies used various mathematical models to segment customers without considering the correlation between customer segmentation and a campaign. This work presents a conceptual model by studying the significant campaign-dependent variables of customer targeting in customer segmentation context. In this way, the processes of customer segmentation and targeting thus can be linked and solved together. The outcomes of customer segmentation of this study could be more meaningful and relevant for marketers. This investigation applies a customer life time value (LTV) model to assess the fitness between targeted customer groups and marketing strategies. To integrate customer segmentation and customer targeting, this work uses the genetic algorithm (GA) to determine the optimized marketing strategy. Later, we suggest using C&RT (Classification and Regression Tree) in SPSS PASW Modeler as the replacement to Genetic Algorithm technique to accomplish these results. We also suggest using LOSSYCOUNTING and Counting Bloom Filter to dynamically design the right and up-to-date offer to the right customer.
summary: For a successful business, engaging in an effective campaign is a key task for marketers. Most previous studies used various mathematical models to segment customers without considering the correlation between customer segmentation and a campaign. This work presents a conceptual model by studying the significant campaign-dependent variables of customer targeting in customer segmentation context. In this way, the processes of customer segmentation and targeting thus can be linked and solved together. The outcomes of customer segmentation of this study could be more meaningful and relevant for marketers. This investigation applies a customer life time value (LTV) model to assess the fitness between targeted customer groups and marketing strategies. To integrate customer segmentation and customer targeting, this work uses the genetic algorithm (GA) to determine the optimized marketing strategy. Later, we suggest using C&RT (Classification and Regression Tree) in SPSS PASW Modeler as the replacement to Genetic Algorithm technique to accomplish these results. We also suggest using LOSSYCOUNTING and Counting Bloom Filter to dynamically design the right and up-to-date offer to the right customer.
abstract_zh: 对于成功的企业来说，开展有效的营销活动是营销人员的一项关键任务。之前的大多数研究都使用各种数学模型来细分客户，而没有考虑客户细分与营销活动之间的相关性。这项工作通过研究客户细分背景下客户定位的重要的营销活动相关变量，提出了一个概念模型。这样，客户细分和定位的过程就可以联系起来并一起解决。这项研究的客户细分结果对于营销人员来说可能更有意义、更相关。本调查应用客户生命周期价值 (LTV) 模型来评估目标客户群体与营销策略之间的适合度。为了整合客户细分和客户定位，这项工作使用遗传算法（GA）来确定优化的营销策略。后来，我们建议使用 SPSS PASW Modeler 中的 C&RT（分类和回归树）作为遗传算法技术的替代来实现这些结果。我们还建议使用 LOSSYCOUNTING 和 Counting Bloom Filter 为正确的客户动态设计正确且最新的报价。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态匹配电信行业客户与优惠方案的方法，通过整合客户细分与营销策略优化。
AI.motivation: 传统客户细分方法未考虑细分结果与营销活动的关联性，导致策略匹配度不足，需更动态的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合LTV模型评估客户价值，使用遗传算法优化策略，后改用C&RT树，并引入LOSSYCOUNTING与Counting Bloom Filter实现动态匹配。
AI.result: 整合细分与目标选择流程，优化营销策略匹配度，提升客户价值评估与优惠动态设计的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为电信行业提供更精准的客户-优惠匹配框架，增强营销效果并提升客户生命周期价值。

authors_text: Zhiruo Wang,Haoyu Dong,Ran Jia,Jia Li,Zhiyi Fu,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang
title: TUTA: Tree-based Transformers for Generally Structured Table Pre-training
title_zh: TUTA：用于一般结构化表预训练的基于树的变压器
abstract: Tables are widely used with various structures to organize and present data. Recent attempts on table understanding mainly focus on relational tables, yet overlook to other common table structures. In this paper, we propose TUTA, a unified pre-training architecture for understanding generally structured tables. Noticing that understanding a table requires spatial, hierarchical, and semantic information, we enhance transformers with three novel structure-aware mechanisms. First, we devise a unified tree-based structure, called a bi-dimensional coordinate tree, to describe both the spatial and hierarchical information of generally structured tables. Upon this, we propose tree-based attention and position embedding to better capture the spatial and hierarchical information. Moreover, we devise three progressive pre-training objectives to enable representations at the token, cell, and table levels. We pre-train TUTA on a wide range of unlabeled web and spreadsheet tables and fine-tune it on two critical tasks in the field of table structure understanding: cell type classification and table type classification. Experiments show that TUTA is highly effective, achieving state-of-the-art on five widely-studied datasets.
summary: Tables are widely used with various structures to organize and present data. Recent attempts on table understanding mainly focus on relational tables, yet overlook to other common table structures. In this paper, we propose TUTA, a unified pre-training architecture for understanding generally structured tables. Noticing that understanding a table requires spatial, hierarchical, and semantic information, we enhance transformers with three novel structure-aware mechanisms. First, we devise a unified tree-based structure, called a bi-dimensional coordinate tree, to describe both the spatial and hierarchical information of generally structured tables. Upon this, we propose tree-based attention and position embedding to better capture the spatial and hierarchical information. Moreover, we devise three progressive pre-training objectives to enable representations at the token, cell, and table levels. We pre-train TUTA on a wide range of unlabeled web and spreadsheet tables and fine-tune it on two critical tasks in the field of table structure understanding: cell type classification and table type classification. Experiments show that TUTA is highly effective, achieving state-of-the-art on five widely-studied datasets.
abstract_zh: 表格广泛用于各种结构来组织和呈现数据。最近对表理解的尝试主要集中在关系表上，而忽略了其他常见的表结构。在本文中，我们提出了 TUTA，一种用于理解一般结构化表的统一预训练架构。注意到理解表格需要空间、层次和语义信息，我们通过三种新颖的结构感知机制增强了转换器。首先，我们设计了一个统一的基于树的结构，称为二维坐标树，来描述一般结构化表的空间和层次信息。在此基础上，我们提出基于树的注意力和位置嵌入，以更好地捕获空间和层次信息。此外，我们设计了三个渐进式预训练目标，以实现令牌、单元格和表级别的表示。我们在各种未标记的网络和电子表格上对 TUTA 进行预训练，并在表格结构理解领域的两个关键任务上对其进行微调：单元格类型分类和表格类型分类。实验表明 TUTA 非常有效，在五个广泛研究的数据集上达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TUTA，一种基于树结构的Transformer预训练模型，用于理解和处理一般结构表格。
AI.motivation: 现有表格理解方法主要针对关系型表格，忽略了其他常见结构，缺乏统一的预训练框架。
AI.method: 设计二维坐标树捕捉空间与层次信息，结合树注意力机制和位置编码，并提出三种层级预训练目标（token/单元格/表格级）。
AI.result: 在五个主流数据集上实现细胞类型分类和表格类型分类任务的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: TUTA通过结构感知机制有效捕捉表格多维信息，为一般结构表格理解提供新方法。

Experiments show that TUTA is highly effective, achieving state-of-the-art on five widely-studied datasets. 表格广泛用于各种结构来组织和呈现数据。最近对表理解的尝试主要集中在关系表上，而忽略了其他常见的表结构。在本文中，我们提出了 TUTA，一种用于理解一般结构化表的统一预训练架构。注意到理解表格需要空间、层次和语义信息，我们通过三种新颖的结构感知机制增强了转换器。首先，我们设计了一个统一的基于树的结构，称为二维坐标树，来描述一般结构化表的空间和层次信息。在此基础上，我们提出基于树的注意力和位置嵌入，以更好地捕获空间和层次信息。此外，我们设计了三个渐进式预训练目标，以实现令牌、单元格和表级别的表示。我们在各种未标记的网络和电子表格上对 TUTA 进行预训练，并在表格结构理解领域的两个关键任务上对其进行微调：单元格类型分类和表格类型分类。实验表明 TUTA 非常有效，在五个广泛研究的数据集上达到了最先进的水平。 本文提出TUTA，一种基于树结构的Transformer预训练模型，用于理解和处理一般结构表格。 Zhiruo Wang,Haoyu Dong,Ran Jia,Jia Li,Zhiyi Fu,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Yoshua Bengio,Prateek Gupta,Tegan Maharaj,Nasim Rahaman,Martin Weiss,Tristan Deleu,Eilif Muller,Meng Qu,Victor Schmidt,Pierre-Luc St-Charles,Hannah Alsdurf,Olexa Bilanuik,David Buckeridge,Gáetan Marceau Caron,Pierre-Luc Carrier,Joumana Ghosn,Satya Ortiz-Gagne,Chris Pal,Irina Rish,Bernhard Schölkopf,Abhinav Sharma,Jian Tang,Andrew Williams
title: Predicting Infectiousness for Proactive Contact Tracing
title_zh: 预测传染性以进行主动接触者追踪
abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has spread rapidly worldwide, overwhelming manual contact tracing in many countries and resulting in widespread lockdowns for emergency containment. Large-scale digital contact tracing (DCT) has emerged as a potential solution to resume economic and social activity while minimizing spread of the virus. Various DCT methods have been proposed, each making trade-offs between privacy, mobility restrictions, and public health. The most common approach, binary contact tracing (BCT), models infection as a binary event, informed only by an individual's test results, with corresponding binary recommendations that either all or none of the individual's contacts quarantine. BCT ignores the inherent uncertainty in contacts and the infection process, which could be used to tailor messaging to high-risk individuals, and prompt proactive testing or earlier warnings. It also does not make use of observations such as symptoms or pre-existing medical conditions, which could be used to make more accurate infectiousness predictions. In this paper, we use a recently-proposed COVID-19 epidemiological simulator to develop and test methods that can be deployed to a smartphone to locally and proactively predict an individual's infectiousness (risk of infecting others) based on their contact history and other information, while respecting strong privacy constraints. Predictions are used to provide personalized recommendations to the individual via an app, as well as to send anonymized messages to the individual's contacts, who use this information to better predict their own infectiousness, an approach we call proactive contact tracing (PCT). We find a deep-learning based PCT method which improves over BCT for equivalent average mobility, suggesting PCT could help in safe re-opening and second-wave prevention.
summary: The COVID-19 pandemic has spread rapidly worldwide, overwhelming manual contact tracing in many countries and resulting in widespread lockdowns for emergency containment. Large-scale digital contact tracing (DCT) has emerged as a potential solution to resume economic and social activity while minimizing spread of the virus. Various DCT methods have been proposed, each making trade-offs between privacy, mobility restrictions, and public health. The most common approach, binary contact tracing (BCT), models infection as a binary event, informed only by an individual's test results, with corresponding binary recommendations that either all or none of the individual's contacts quarantine. BCT ignores the inherent uncertainty in contacts and the infection process, which could be used to tailor messaging to high-risk individuals, and prompt proactive testing or earlier warnings. It also does not make use of observations such as symptoms or pre-existing medical conditions, which could be used to make more accurate infectiousness predictions. In this paper, we use a recently-proposed COVID-19 epidemiological simulator to develop and test methods that can be deployed to a smartphone to locally and proactively predict an individual's infectiousness (risk of infecting others) based on their contact history and other information, while respecting strong privacy constraints. Predictions are used to provide personalized recommendations to the individual via an app, as well as to send anonymized messages to the individual's contacts, who use this information to better predict their own infectiousness, an approach we call proactive contact tracing (PCT). We find a deep-learning based PCT method which improves over BCT for equivalent average mobility, suggesting PCT could help in safe re-opening and second-wave prevention.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 大流行已在全球范围内迅速蔓延，导致许多国家难以进行手动接触者追踪，并导致广泛封锁以进行紧急遏制。大规模数字接触者追踪（DCT）已成为恢复经济和社会活动、同时最大限度地减少病毒传播的潜在解决方案。人们已经提出了各种 DCT 方法，每种方法都在隐私、移动性限制和公共健康之间进行权衡。最常见的方法是二元接触者追踪 (BCT)，将感染建模为二元事件，仅根据个人的测试结果通知，并提供相应的二元建议，即对个人的所有接触者进行隔离或不进行隔离。 BCT 忽略了接触和感染过程中固有的不确定性，这可用于为高风险个体定制消息传递，并提示主动检测或早期警告。它还没有利用症状或既往医疗状况等观察结果，而这些观察结果可用于做出更准确的传染性预测。在本文中，我们使用最近提出的 COVID-19 流行病学模拟器来开发和测试可以部署到智能手机的方法，以根据个人的接触历史和其他信息在本地主动预测个人的传染性（感染他人的风险），同时尊重严格的隐私限制。预测用于通过应用程序向个人提供个性化建议，以及向个人的联系人发送匿名消息，他们使用这些信息来更好地预测自己的传染性，我们将这种方法称为主动接触者追踪 (PCT)。我们发现了一种基于深度学习的 PCT 方法，该方法在同等平均流动性方面比 BCT 有所改进，这表明 PCT 有助于安全重新开放和预防第二波疫情。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的隐私保护方法，通过智能手机本地预测个体传染性并主动推送匿名预警信息，以优化接触者追踪策略。
AI.motivation: 传统二元接触追踪（BCT）因忽略传染过程不确定性及个体差异，导致预警信息粗放且效率低下，难以平衡防疫与社会经济活动。
AI.method: 利用新冠流行病学模拟器开发深度学习模型，基于用户接触史、症状等数据在手机端本地预测传染性，通过匿名化消息实现主动接触追踪（PCT）。
AI.result: 深度学习PCT方法在同等平均移动性下优于BCT，可有效提升预警准确性并辅助防控第二波疫情。
AI.conclusion: PCT通过个性化推荐与匿名信息共享，能在保障隐私前提下提高接触追踪效率，为安全复工复产提供技术支撑。

title: TAMPC: A Controller for Escaping Traps in Novel Environments
title_zh: TAMPC：用于在新环境中逃脱陷阱的控制器
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures (excluding tables and algorithms), 4 tables, 4 algorithms, accepted to RA-L, preprint
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures (excluding tables and algorithms), 4 tables, 4 algorithms, accepted to RA-L, preprint
abstract: We propose an approach to online model adaptation and control in the challenging case of hybrid and discontinuous dynamics where actions may lead to difficult-to-escape "trap" states, under a given controller. We first learn dynamics for a system without traps from a randomly collected training set (since we do not know what traps will be encountered online). These "nominal" dynamics allow us to perform tasks in scenarios where the dynamics matches the training data, but when unexpected traps arise in execution, we must find a way to adapt our dynamics and control strategy and continue attempting the task. Our approach, Trap-Aware Model Predictive Control (TAMPC), is a two-level hierarchical control algorithm that reasons about traps and non-nominal dynamics to decide between goal-seeking and recovery policies. An important requirement of our method is the ability to recognize nominal dynamics even when we encounter data that is out-of-distribution w.r.t the training data. We achieve this by learning a representation for dynamics that exploits invariance in the nominal environment, thus allowing better generalization. We evaluate our method on simulated planar pushing and peg-in-hole as well as real robot peg-in-hole problems against adaptive control, reinforcement learning, trap-handling baselines, where traps arise due to unexpected obstacles that we only observe through contact. Our results show that our method outperforms the baselines on difficult tasks, and is comparable to prior trap-handling methods on easier tasks.
summary: We propose an approach to online model adaptation and control in the challenging case of hybrid and discontinuous dynamics where actions may lead to difficult-to-escape "trap" states, under a given controller. We first learn dynamics for a system without traps from a randomly collected training set (since we do not know what traps will be encountered online). These "nominal" dynamics allow us to perform tasks in scenarios where the dynamics matches the training data, but when unexpected traps arise in execution, we must find a way to adapt our dynamics and control strategy and continue attempting the task. Our approach, Trap-Aware Model Predictive Control (TAMPC), is a two-level hierarchical control algorithm that reasons about traps and non-nominal dynamics to decide between goal-seeking and recovery policies. An important requirement of our method is the ability to recognize nominal dynamics even when we encounter data that is out-of-distribution w.r.t the training data. We achieve this by learning a representation for dynamics that exploits invariance in the nominal environment, thus allowing better generalization. We evaluate our method on simulated planar pushing and peg-in-hole as well as real robot peg-in-hole problems against adaptive control, reinforcement learning, trap-handling baselines, where traps arise due to unexpected obstacles that we only observe through contact. Our results show that our method outperforms the baselines on difficult tasks, and is comparable to prior trap-handling methods on easier tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在混合和不连续动态的挑战性情况下在线模型适应和控制的方法，在给定的控制器下，动作可能导致难以逃脱的“陷阱”状态。我们首先从随机收集的训练集中学习没有陷阱的系统的动力学（因为我们不知道在线会遇到什么陷阱）。这些“标称”动态使我们能够在动态与训练数据匹配的场景中执行任务，但是当执行中出现意外陷阱时，我们必须找到一种方法来调整我们的动态和控制策略并继续尝试任务。我们的方法，陷阱感知模型预测控制（TAMPC），是一种两级分层控制算法，它对陷阱和非标称动态进行推理，以在目标寻求和恢复策略之间做出决定。我们方法的一个重要要求是即使我们遇到与训练数据不分布的数据，也能够识别标称动态。我们通过学习利用标称环境中的不变性的动态表示来实现这一点，从而实现更好的泛化。我们根据自适应控制、强化学习、陷阱处理基线评估模拟平面推动和孔洞以及真实机器人孔洞问题的方法，其中陷阱是由于我们仅通过接触观察到的意外障碍物而产生的。我们的结果表明，我们的方法在困难任务上优于基线，并且在较简单的任务上与之前的陷阱处理方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TAMPC的控制器，用于在存在意外障碍物的新型环境中逃离陷阱状态，通过在线模型适应和分层控制策略实现任务完成。
AI.motivation: 现有控制器在面对未知陷阱状态时容易陷入无法恢复的困境，尤其在动态不连续或混合系统的实际应用中存在显著局限性。
AI.method: TAMPC采用双层分层控制架构，通过学习无陷阱场景的‘名义’动力学模型，并利用环境不变性特征识别分布外数据，动态切换目标导向与恢复策略。
AI.result: 在模拟推物和真实机器人插孔任务中，TAMPC在复杂陷阱场景下优于自适应控制、强化学习等基线方法，在简单任务中表现与现有陷阱处理方法相当。
AI.conclusion: TAMPC通过动力学模型适应与分层决策机制，有效解决了新型环境中未知陷阱导致的控制失效问题，为复杂动态系统的安全控制提供了新思路。

result: 在模拟推物和真实机器人插孔任务中，TAMPC在复杂陷阱场景下优于自适应控制、强化学习等基线方法，在简单任务中表现与现有陷阱处理方法相当。
conclusion: TAMPC通过动力学模型适应与分层决策机制，有效解决了新型环境中未知陷阱导致的控制失效问题，为复杂动态系统的安全控制提供了新思路。
search_text: TAMPC: A Controller for Escaping Traps in Novel Environments TAMPC：用于在新环境中逃脱陷阱的控制器 We propose an approach to online model adaptation and control in the challenging case of hybrid and discontinuous dynamics where actions may lead to difficult-to-escape "trap" states, under a given controller. We first learn dynamics for a system without traps from a randomly collected training set (since we do not know what traps will be encountered online). These "nominal" dynamics allow us to perform tasks in scenarios where the dynamics matches the training data, but when unexpected traps arise in execution, we must find a way to adapt our dynamics and control strategy and continue attempting the task. Our approach, Trap-Aware Model Predictive Control (TAMPC), is a two-level hierarchical control algorithm that reasons about traps and non-nominal dynamics to decide between goal-seeking and recovery policies. An important requirement of our method is the ability to recognize nominal dynamics even when we encounter data that is out-of-distribution w.r.t the training data. We achieve this by learning a representation for dynamics that exploits invariance in the nominal environment, thus allowing better generalization. We evaluate our method on simulated planar pushing and peg-in-hole as well as real robot peg-in-hole problems against adaptive control, reinforcement learning, trap-handling baselines, where traps arise due to unexpected obstacles that we only observe through contact. Our results show that our method outperforms the baselines on difficult tasks, and is comparable to prior trap-handling methods on easier tasks. 我们提出了一种在混合和不连续动态的挑战性情况下在线模型适应和控制的方法，在给定的控制器下，动作可能导致难以逃脱的“陷阱”状态。我们首先从随机收集的训练集中学习没有陷阱的系统的动力学（因为我们不知道在线会遇到什么陷阱）。这些“标称”动态使我们能够在动态与训练数据匹配的场景中执行任务，但是当执行中出现意外陷阱时，我们必须找到一种方法来调整我们的动态和控制策略并继续尝试任务。我们的方法，陷阱感知模型预测控制（TAMPC），是一种两级分层控制算法，它对陷阱和非标称动态进行推理，以在目标寻求和恢复策略之间做出决定。我们方法的一个重要要求是即使我们遇到与训练数据不分布的数据，也能够识别标称动态。我们通过学习利用标称环境中的不变性的动态表示来实现这一点，从而实现更好的泛化。我们根据自适应控制、强化学习、陷阱处理基线评估模拟平面推动和孔洞以及真实机器人孔洞问题的方法，其中陷阱是由于我们仅通过接触观察到的意外障碍物而产生的。我们的结果表明，我们的方法在困难任务上优于基线，并且在较简单的任务上与之前的陷阱处理方法相当。 本文提出了一种名为TAMPC的控制器，用于在存在意外障碍物的新型环境中逃离陷阱状态，通过在线模型适应和分层控制策略实现任务完成。 Sheng Zhong,Zhenyuan Zhang,Nima Fazeli,Dmitry Berenson cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Linyi Yang,Eoin M. Kenny,Tin Lok James Ng,Yi Yang,Barry Smyth,Ruihai Dong
title: Generating Plausible Counterfactual Explanations for Deep Transformers in Financial Text Classification
title_zh: 为金融文本分类中的深度变形金刚生成合理的反事实解释
abstract: Corporate mergers and acquisitions (M&A) account for billions of dollars of investment globally every year, and offer an interesting and challenging domain for artificial intelligence. However, in these highly sensitive domains, it is crucial to not only have a highly robust and accurate model, but be able to generate useful explanations to garner a user's trust in the automated system. Regrettably, the recent research regarding eXplainable AI (XAI) in financial text classification has received little to no attention, and many current methods for generating textual-based explanations result in highly implausible explanations, which damage a user's trust in the system. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel methodology for producing plausible counterfactual explanations, whilst exploring the regularization benefits of adversarial training on language models in the domain of FinTech. Exhaustive quantitative experiments demonstrate that not only does this approach improve the model accuracy when compared to the current state-of-the-art and human performance, but it also generates counterfactual explanations which are significantly more plausible based on human trials.
summary: Corporate mergers and acquisitions (M&A) account for billions of dollars of investment globally every year, and offer an interesting and challenging domain for artificial intelligence. However, in these highly sensitive domains, it is crucial to not only have a highly robust and accurate model, but be able to generate useful explanations to garner a user's trust in the automated system. Regrettably, the recent research regarding eXplainable AI (XAI) in financial text classification has received little to no attention, and many current methods for generating textual-based explanations result in highly implausible explanations, which damage a user's trust in the system. To address these issues, this paper proposes a novel methodology for producing plausible counterfactual explanations, whilst exploring the regularization benefits of adversarial training on language models in the domain of FinTech. Exhaustive quantitative experiments demonstrate that not only does this approach improve the model accuracy when compared to the current state-of-the-art and human performance, but it also generates counterfactual explanations which are significantly more plausible based on human trials.
abstract_zh: 企业并购 (M&A) 每年在全球带来数十亿美元的投资，为人工智能提供了一个有趣且具有挑战性的领域。然而，在这些高度敏感的领域，不仅拥有高度稳健和准确的模型，而且能够生成有用的解释以赢得用户对自动化系统的信任，这一点至关重要。遗憾的是，最近关于金融文本分类中的可解释人工智能（XAI）的研究几乎没有受到关注，并且当前许多生成基于文本的解释的方法会导致非常难以置信的解释，从而损害了用户对系统的信任。为了解决这些问题，本文提出了一种新的方法来产生合理的反事实解释，同时探索金融科技领域语言模型对抗性训练的正则化好处。详尽的定量实验表明，与当前最先进的技术和人类表现相比，这种方法不仅提高了模型的准确性，而且还生成了基于人类试验的反事实解释，这些解释更加可信。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成可信反事实解释的新方法，用于金融文本分类中的深度Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 金融领域对AI模型的可解释性要求高，但现有XAI方法生成的文本解释可信度低，影响用户信任。
AI.method: 设计反事实解释生成框架，结合对抗训练的正则化优势优化语言模型。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在模型准确率上超越现有技术及人类表现，生成的反事实解释通过人类测试验证可信度显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为金融AI系统提供了兼顾准确性与可解释性的解决方案，增强了用户信任。

title: EML System Description for VoxCeleb Speaker Diarization Challenge 2020
title_zh: 2020 年 VoxCeleb 演讲者分类挑战赛的 EML 系统说明
abstract: This technical report describes the EML submission to the first VoxCeleb speaker diarization challenge. Although the aim of the challenge has been the offline processing of the signals, the submitted system is basically the EML online algorithm which decides about the speaker labels in runtime approximately every 1.2 sec. For the first phase of the challenge, only VoxCeleb2 dev dataset was used for training. The results on the provided VoxConverse dev set show much better accuracy in terms of both DER and JER compared to the offline baseline provided in the challenge. The real-time factor of the whole diarization process is about 0.01 using a single CPU machine.
summary: This technical report describes the EML submission to the first VoxCeleb speaker diarization challenge. Although the aim of the challenge has been the offline processing of the signals, the submitted system is basically the EML online algorithm which decides about the speaker labels in runtime approximately every 1.2 sec. For the first phase of the challenge, only VoxCeleb2 dev dataset was used for training. The results on the provided VoxConverse dev set show much better accuracy in terms of both DER and JER compared to the offline baseline provided in the challenge. The real-time factor of the whole diarization process is about 0.01 using a single CPU machine.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告描述了 EML 提交给第一届 VoxCeleb 演讲者分类挑战的情况。尽管挑战的目标是信号的离线处理，但提交的系统基本上是 EML 在线算法，该算法在运行时大约每 1.2 秒决定说话者标签。在挑战的第一阶段，仅使用 VoxCeleb2 开发数据集进行训练。与挑战赛中提供的离线基线相比，所提供的 VoxConverse 开发集的结果在 DER 和 JER 方面显示出更高的准确性。使用单CPU机器，整个二值化过程的实时因子约为0.01。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了EML团队在VoxCeleb说话人分割挑战赛2020中提交的在线算法系统，该系统在实时处理语音信号时实现说话人标签分配。
AI.motivation: 针对语音分割任务中实时性需求，开发可在线运行的高效算法以替代传统离线处理方案，并验证其在公开数据集上的性能优势。
AI.method: 基于EML在线算法框架，每1.2秒动态判定说话人标签，仅使用VoxCeleb2 dev数据集训练模型，通过单机CPU实现低延迟处理。
AI.result: 在VoxConverse dev数据集上，系统DER（错误率）和JER（跳跃错误率）指标均优于挑战赛提供的离线基线，实时因子达0.01。
AI.conclusion: 所提出在线算法在保持高分割精度的同时实现了显著实时性提升，为实际语音应用中的实时说话人分割提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Chaoning Zhang,Philipp Benz,Dawit Mureja Argaw,Seokju Lee,Junsik Kim,Francois Rameau,Jean-Charles Bazin,In So Kweon
title: ResNet or DenseNet? Introducing Dense Shortcuts to ResNet
title_zh: ResNet 还是 DenseNet？向 ResNet 引入密集快捷方式
abstract: ResNet or DenseNet? Nowadays, most deep learning based approaches are implemented with seminal backbone networks, among them the two arguably most famous ones are ResNet and DenseNet. Despite their competitive performance and overwhelming popularity, inherent drawbacks exist for both of them. For ResNet, the identity shortcut that stabilizes training also limits its representation capacity, while DenseNet has a higher capacity with multi-layer feature concatenation. However, the dense concatenation causes a new problem of requiring high GPU memory and more training time. Partially due to this, it is not a trivial choice between ResNet and DenseNet. This paper provides a unified perspective of dense summation to analyze them, which facilitates a better understanding of their core difference. We further propose dense weighted normalized shortcuts as a solution to the dilemma between them. Our proposed dense shortcut inherits the design philosophy of simple design in ResNet and DenseNet. On several benchmark datasets, the experimental results show that the proposed DSNet achieves significantly better results than ResNet, and achieves comparable performance as DenseNet but requiring fewer computation resources.
summary: ResNet or DenseNet? Nowadays, most deep learning based approaches are implemented with seminal backbone networks, among them the two arguably most famous ones are ResNet and DenseNet. Despite their competitive performance and overwhelming popularity, inherent drawbacks exist for both of them. For ResNet, the identity shortcut that stabilizes training also limits its representation capacity, while DenseNet has a higher capacity with multi-layer feature concatenation. However, the dense concatenation causes a new problem of requiring high GPU memory and more training time. Partially due to this, it is not a trivial choice between ResNet and DenseNet. This paper provides a unified perspective of dense summation to analyze them, which facilitates a better understanding of their core difference. We further propose dense weighted normalized shortcuts as a solution to the dilemma between them. Our proposed dense shortcut inherits the design philosophy of simple design in ResNet and DenseNet. On several benchmark datasets, the experimental results show that the proposed DSNet achieves significantly better results than ResNet, and achieves comparable performance as DenseNet but requiring fewer computation resources.
abstract_zh: ResNet 还是 DenseNet？如今，大多数基于深度学习的方法都是通过开创性的骨干网络来实现的，其中最著名的两个可以说是 ResNet 和 DenseNet。尽管它们具有竞争力的性能和压倒性的受欢迎程度，但它们都存在固有的缺点。对于ResNet来说，稳定训练的身份快捷方式也限制了其表示能力，而DenseNet通过多层特征串联具有更高的容量。然而，密集级联带来了一个新问题，即需要高 GPU 内存和更多训练时间。部分正因为如此，ResNet 和 DenseNet 之间的选择并不是一个简单的选择。本文提供了密集求和的统一视角来分析它们，有利于更好地理解它们的核心差异。我们进一步提出密集加权归一化捷径作为它们之间困境的解决方案。我们提出的密集快捷方式继承了 ResNet 和 DenseNet 中简单设计的设计理念。在几个基准数据集上，实验结果表明，所提出的 DSNet 取得了明显优于 ResNet 的结果，并且实现了与 DenseNet 相当的性能，但需要更少的计算资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合ResNet和DenseNet优势的新型网络结构DSNet，通过引入密集归一化加权捷径来解决两者各自的局限性。
AI.motivation: ResNet的恒等捷径限制了表示能力，DenseNet的密集连接导致显存消耗大且训练时间长，需在两者间寻找平衡点。
AI.method: 设计密集归一化加权捷径，继承ResNet的简洁性与DenseNet的特征复用优势，通过加权求和替代特征拼接以降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，DSNet性能显著优于ResNet，且与DenseNet性能相当但计算资源消耗更少。
AI.conclusion: DSNet有效融合了ResNet和DenseNet的核心优势，在保持高性能的同时降低了资源需求，为深度网络设计提供新思路。

search_text: ResNet or DenseNet? Introducing Dense Shortcuts to ResNet ResNet 还是 DenseNet？向 ResNet 引入密集快捷方式 ResNet or DenseNet? Nowadays, most deep learning based approaches are implemented with seminal backbone networks, among them the two arguably most famous ones are ResNet and DenseNet. Despite their competitive performance and overwhelming popularity, inherent drawbacks exist for both of them. For ResNet, the identity shortcut that stabilizes training also limits its representation capacity, while DenseNet has a higher capacity with multi-layer feature concatenation. However, the dense concatenation causes a new problem of requiring high GPU memory and more training time. Partially due to this, it is not a trivial choice between ResNet and DenseNet. This paper provides a unified perspective of dense summation to analyze them, which facilitates a better understanding of their core difference. We further propose dense weighted normalized shortcuts as a solution to the dilemma between them. Our proposed dense shortcut inherits the design philosophy of simple design in ResNet and DenseNet. On several benchmark datasets, the experimental results show that the proposed DSNet achieves significantly better results than ResNet, and achieves comparable performance as DenseNet but requiring fewer computation resources. title: CLOUD: Contrastive Learning of Unsupervised Dynamics
title_zh: 云：无监督动力学的对比学习
abstract: Developing agents that can perform complex control tasks from high dimensional observations such as pixels is challenging due to difficulties in learning dynamics efficiently. In this work, we propose to learn forward and inverse dynamics in a fully unsupervised manner via contrastive estimation. Specifically, we train a forward dynamics model and an inverse dynamics model in the feature space of states and actions with data collected from random exploration. Unlike most existing deterministic models, our energy-based model takes into account the stochastic nature of agent-environment interactions. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach across a variety of tasks including goal-directed planning and imitation from observations. Project videos and code are at https://jianrenw.github.io/cloud/.
summary: Developing agents that can perform complex control tasks from high dimensional observations such as pixels is challenging due to difficulties in learning dynamics efficiently. In this work, we propose to learn forward and inverse dynamics in a fully unsupervised manner via contrastive estimation. Specifically, we train a forward dynamics model and an inverse dynamics model in the feature space of states and actions with data collected from random exploration. Unlike most existing deterministic models, our energy-based model takes into account the stochastic nature of agent-environment interactions. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach across a variety of tasks including goal-directed planning and imitation from observations. Project videos and code are at https://jianrenw.github.io/cloud/.
abstract_zh: 由于有效学习动态的困难，开发能够从高维观察（例如像素）执行复杂控制任务的代理具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们建议通过对比估计以完全无监督的方式学习正向和逆向动力学。具体来说，我们利用随机探索收集的数据在状态和动作的特征空间中训练正向动力学模型和逆向动力学模型。与大多数现有的确定性模型不同，我们的基于能量的模型考虑了主体与环境交互的随机性。我们展示了我们的方法在各种任务中的有效性，包括目标导向的规划和观察模仿。项目视频和代码位于https://jianrenw.github.io/cloud/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督对比学习方法CLOUD，通过同时学习前向和逆向动态来解决高维观测下的复杂控制任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效学习动态模型，且多数确定性模型无法处理智能体与环境交互的随机性，导致复杂任务表现不足。
AI.method: 利用对比估计，在状态-动作特征空间中无监督训练前向/逆向动态模型，采用能量模型捕捉交互随机性，并通过随机探索数据进行训练。
AI.result: 方法在目标导向规划和模仿学习等任务中验证有效，项目视频与代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: CLOUD通过联合建模动态与随机性，为复杂控制任务提供了更鲁棒的无监督学习框架。

title: Speech enhancement aided end-to-end multi-task learning for voice activity detection
title_zh: 语音增强辅助语音活动检测的端到端多任务学习
abstract: Robust voice activity detection (VAD) is a challenging task in low signal-to-noise (SNR) environments. Recent studies show that speech enhancement is helpful to VAD, but the performance improvement is limited. To address this issue, here we propose a speech enhancement aided end-to-end multi-task model for VAD. The model has two decoders, one for speech enhancement and the other for VAD. The two decoders share the same encoder and speech separation network. Unlike the direct thought that takes two separated objectives for VAD and speech enhancement respectively, here we propose a new joint optimization objective -- VAD-masked scale-invariant source-to-distortion ratio (mSI-SDR). mSI-SDR uses VAD information to mask the output of the speech enhancement decoder in the training process. It makes the VAD and speech enhancement tasks jointly optimized not only at the shared encoder and separation network, but also at the objective level. It also satisfies real-time working requirement theoretically. Experimental results show that the multi-task method significantly outperforms its single-task VAD counterpart. Moreover, mSI-SDR outperforms SI-SDR in the same multi-task setting.
summary: Robust voice activity detection (VAD) is a challenging task in low signal-to-noise (SNR) environments. Recent studies show that speech enhancement is helpful to VAD, but the performance improvement is limited. To address this issue, here we propose a speech enhancement aided end-to-end multi-task model for VAD. The model has two decoders, one for speech enhancement and the other for VAD. The two decoders share the same encoder and speech separation network. Unlike the direct thought that takes two separated objectives for VAD and speech enhancement respectively, here we propose a new joint optimization objective -- VAD-masked scale-invariant source-to-distortion ratio (mSI-SDR). mSI-SDR uses VAD information to mask the output of the speech enhancement decoder in the training process. It makes the VAD and speech enhancement tasks jointly optimized not only at the shared encoder and separation network, but also at the objective level. It also satisfies real-time working requirement theoretically. Experimental results show that the multi-task method significantly outperforms its single-task VAD counterpart. Moreover, mSI-SDR outperforms SI-SDR in the same multi-task setting.
abstract_zh: 在低信噪比 (SNR) 环境中，鲁棒的语音活动检测 (VAD) 是一项具有挑战性的任务。最近的研究表明，语音增强对VAD有帮助，但性能提升有限。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种语音增强辅助的 VAD 端到端多任务模型。该模型有两个解码器，一个用于语音增强，另一个用于 VAD。两个解码器共享相同的编码器和语音分离网络。与VAD和语音增强分别采用两个独立目标的直接想法不同，这里我们提出了一个新的联合优化目标——VAD掩码尺度不变源失真比（mSI-SDR）。 mSI-SDR在训练过程中使用VAD信息来屏蔽语音增强解码器的输出。它使得VAD和语音增强任务不仅在共享编码器和分离网络上而且在客观层面上联合优化。理论上也满足实时工作的要求。实验结果表明，多任务方法明显优于单任务 VAD 方法。此外，在相同的多任务设置中，mSI-SDR 的性能优于 SI-SDR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语音增强的端到端多任务学习模型，用于改进语音活动检测（VAD）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强辅助VAD方法在低信噪比环境下性能提升有限，需通过联合优化VAD与语音增强任务以实现更好效果。
AI.method: 设计包含共享编码器和分离网络的双解码器结构，提出基于VAD信息的掩码尺度不变源失真比（mSI-SDR）联合优化目标。
AI.result: 多任务方法显著优于单任务VAD，且mSI-SDR在相同设置下优于传统SI-SDR指标。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化框架有效提升VAD性能，满足实时性需求，验证了任务关联性设计的合理性。

It makes the VAD and speech enhancement tasks jointly optimized not only at the shared encoder and separation network, but also at the objective level. It also satisfies real-time working requirement theoretically. Experimental results show that the multi-task method significantly outperforms its single-task VAD counterpart. Moreover, mSI-SDR outperforms SI-SDR in the same multi-task setting. 在低信噪比 (SNR) 环境中，鲁棒的语音活动检测 (VAD) 是一项具有挑战性的任务。最近的研究表明，语音增强对VAD有帮助，但性能提升有限。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种语音增强辅助的 VAD 端到端多任务模型。该模型有两个解码器，一个用于语音增强，另一个用于 VAD。两个解码器共享相同的编码器和语音分离网络。与VAD和语音增强分别采用两个独立目标的直接想法不同，这里我们提出了一个新的联合优化目标——VAD掩码尺度不变源失真比（mSI-SDR）。 mSI-SDR在训练过程中使用VAD信息来屏蔽语音增强解码器的输出。它使得VAD和语音增强任务不仅在共享编码器和分离网络上而且在客观层面上联合优化。理论上也满足实时工作的要求。实验结果表明，多任务方法明显优于单任务 VAD 方法。此外，在相同的多任务设置中，mSI-SDR 的性能优于 SI-SDR。 本文提出一种结合语音增强的端到端多任务学习模型，用于改进语音活动检测（VAD）性能。 Xu Tan,Xiao-Lei Zhang eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

title: The IDLAB VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020 System Description
title_zh: IDLAB VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 2020 系统说明
abstract: In this technical report we describe the IDLAB top-scoring submissions for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020 (VoxSRC-20) in the supervised and unsupervised speaker verification tracks. For the supervised verification tracks we trained 6 state-of-the-art ECAPA-TDNN systems and 4 Resnet34 based systems with architectural variations. On all models we apply a large margin fine-tuning strategy, which enables the training procedure to use higher margin penalties by using longer training utterances. In addition, we use quality-aware score calibration which introduces quality metrics in the calibration system to generate more consistent scores across varying levels of utterance conditions. A fusion of all systems with both enhancements applied led to the first place on the open and closed supervised verification tracks. The unsupervised system is trained through contrastive learning. Subsequent pseudo-label generation by iterative clustering of the training embeddings allows the use of supervised techniques. This procedure led to the winning submission on the unsupervised track, and its performance is closing in on supervised training.
summary: In this technical report we describe the IDLAB top-scoring submissions for the VoxCeleb Speaker Recognition Challenge 2020 (VoxSRC-20) in the supervised and unsupervised speaker verification tracks. For the supervised verification tracks we trained 6 state-of-the-art ECAPA-TDNN systems and 4 Resnet34 based systems with architectural variations. On all models we apply a large margin fine-tuning strategy, which enables the training procedure to use higher margin penalties by using longer training utterances. In addition, we use quality-aware score calibration which introduces quality metrics in the calibration system to generate more consistent scores across varying levels of utterance conditions. A fusion of all systems with both enhancements applied led to the first place on the open and closed supervised verification tracks. The unsupervised system is trained through contrastive learning. Subsequent pseudo-label generation by iterative clustering of the training embeddings allows the use of supervised techniques. This procedure led to the winning submission on the unsupervised track, and its performance is closing in on supervised training.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们描述了 IDLAB 在 2020 年 VoxCeleb 说话人识别挑战赛 (VoxSRC-20) 监督和无监督说话人验证赛道中得分最高的提交内容。对于监督验证轨道，我们训练了 6 个最先进的 ECAPA-TDNN 系统和 4 个具有架构变化的基于 Resnet34 的系统。在所有模型上，我们应用了大边距微调策略，这使得训练过程能够通过使用更长的训练话语来使用更高的边距惩罚。此外，我们使用质量感知分数校准，在校准系统中引入质量指标，以在不同级别的话语条件下生成更一致的分数。所有系统的融合以及两种增强功能的应用导致了开放式和封闭式监督验证轨道上的第一名。无监督系统通过对比学习进行训练。通过训练嵌入的迭代聚类生成的后续伪标签允许使用监督技术。这个过程导致了在无监督赛道上的获胜提交，并且其表现接近有监督训练。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了IDLAB在VoxCeleb 2020说话人识别挑战赛中监督和非监督验证赛道的系统设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过优化模型结构和训练策略提升说话人验证的准确率，特别是在不同语音条件下的鲁棒性，以及探索非监督学习的有效性。
AI.method: 采用ECAPA-TDNN和ResNet34架构，结合大边距微调与质量感知得分校准；非监督方法通过对比学习生成伪标签，结合聚类迭代实现半监督学习。
AI.result: 在监督和非监督赛道均获得第一名，非监督方法性能接近监督训练水平。
AI.conclusion: 证明了优化模型结构与训练策略的有效性，非监督方法在减少依赖标注数据的同时接近监督性能，为未来研究提供方向。
