authors_text: Cong Zhang,Wen Song,Zhiguang Cao,Jie Zhang,Puay Siew Tan,Chi Xu
title: Learning to Dispatch for Job Shop Scheduling via Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习学习调度作业车间调度
abstract: Priority dispatching rule (PDR) is widely used for solving real-world Job-shop scheduling problem (JSSP). However, the design of effective PDRs is a tedious task, requiring a myriad of specialized knowledge and often delivering limited performance. In this paper, we propose to automatically learn PDRs via an end-to-end deep reinforcement learning agent. We exploit the disjunctive graph representation of JSSP, and propose a Graph Neural Network based scheme to embed the states encountered during solving. The resulting policy network is size-agnostic, effectively enabling generalization on large-scale instances. Experiments show that the agent can learn high-quality PDRs from scratch with elementary raw features, and demonstrates strong performance against the best existing PDRs. The learned policies also perform well on much larger instances that are unseen in training.
summary: Priority dispatching rule (PDR) is widely used for solving real-world Job-shop scheduling problem (JSSP). However, the design of effective PDRs is a tedious task, requiring a myriad of specialized knowledge and often delivering limited performance. In this paper, we propose to automatically learn PDRs via an end-to-end deep reinforcement learning agent. We exploit the disjunctive graph representation of JSSP, and propose a Graph Neural Network based scheme to embed the states encountered during solving. The resulting policy network is size-agnostic, effectively enabling generalization on large-scale instances. Experiments show that the agent can learn high-quality PDRs from scratch with elementary raw features, and demonstrates strong performance against the best existing PDRs. The learned policies also perform well on much larger instances that are unseen in training.
abstract_zh: 优先级调度规则（PDR）广泛用于解决现实世界的作业车间调度问题（JSSP）。然而，设计有效的 PDR 是一项繁琐的任务，需要大量的专业知识，而且通常只能提供有限的性能。在本文中，我们建议通过端到端深度强化学习代理自动学习 PDR。我们利用 JSSP 的析取图表示，并提出一种基于图神经网络的方案来嵌入求解过程中遇到的状态。由此产生的策略网络与大小无关，可以有效地实现大规模实例的泛化。实验表明，该智能体可以利用基本的原始特征从头开始学习高质量的 PDR，并且与现有最好的 PDR 相比表现出强大的性能。学习到的策略在训练中未见过的更大实例上也表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文通过深度强化学习自动学习作业车间调度的优先派工规则（PDR），以替代传统人工设计的规则。
AI.motivation: 传统PDR设计依赖专业知识且性能有限，需自动化方法提升调度效率与泛化能力。
AI.method: 利用析取图表示JSSP状态，结合图神经网络嵌入特征，构建端到端深度强化学习代理学习PDR。
AI.result: 代理能从原始特征中学习高质量PDR，在标准测试集上优于现有方法，并泛化到更大规模实例。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习可有效自动学习通用PDR，显著提升作业车间调度性能与适应性。

title: Checkerboard-Artifact-Free Image-Enhancement Network Considering Local and Global Features
title_zh: 考虑局部和全局特征的无棋盘伪影图像增强网络
comment: to appear in APSIPA ASC 2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1905.02899
comments: to appear in APSIPA ASC 2020. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1905.02899
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional neural network (CNN) that never causes checkerboard artifacts, for image enhancement. In research fields of image-to-image translation problems, it is well-known that images generated by usual CNNs are distorted by checkerboard artifacts which mainly caused in forward-propagation of upsampling layers. However, checkerboard artifacts in image enhancement have never been discussed. In this paper, we point out that applying U-Net based CNNs to image enhancement causes checkerboard artifacts. In contrast, the proposed network that contains fixed convolutional layers can perfectly prevent the artifacts. In addition, the proposed network architecture, which can handle both local and global features, enables us to improve the performance of image enhancement. Experimental results show that the use of fixed convolutional layers can prevent checkerboard artifacts and the proposed network outperforms state-of-the-art CNN-based image-enhancement methods in terms of various objective quality metrics: PSNR, SSIM, and NIQE.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional neural network (CNN) that never causes checkerboard artifacts, for image enhancement. In research fields of image-to-image translation problems, it is well-known that images generated by usual CNNs are distorted by checkerboard artifacts which mainly caused in forward-propagation of upsampling layers. However, checkerboard artifacts in image enhancement have never been discussed. In this paper, we point out that applying U-Net based CNNs to image enhancement causes checkerboard artifacts. In contrast, the proposed network that contains fixed convolutional layers can perfectly prevent the artifacts. In addition, the proposed network architecture, which can handle both local and global features, enables us to improve the performance of image enhancement. Experimental results show that the use of fixed convolutional layers can prevent checkerboard artifacts and the proposed network outperforms state-of-the-art CNN-based image-enhancement methods in terms of various objective quality metrics: PSNR, SSIM, and NIQE.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的卷积神经网络（CNN），它不会导致棋盘伪影，用于图像增强。在图像到图像转换问题的研究领域中，众所周知，普通 CNN 生成的图像会因棋盘伪影而失真，这主要是在上采样层的前向传播中造成的。然而，图像增强中的棋盘伪影从未被讨论过。在本文中，我们指出将基于 U-Net 的 CNN 应用于图像增强会导致棋盘伪影。相比之下，所提出的包含固定卷积层的网络可以完美地防止伪影。此外，所提出的网络架构可以处理局部和全局特征，使我们能够提高图像增强的性能。实验结果表明，使用固定卷积层可以防止棋盘伪影，并且所提出的网络在各种客观质量指标（PSNR、SSIM 和 NIQE）方面优于最先进的基于 CNN 的图像增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型卷积神经网络，用于图像增强，可完全避免棋盘伪影并提升图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有图像增强方法在使用U-Net等CNN结构时会产生未被关注的棋盘伪影，且缺乏对局部与全局特征的有效融合。
AI.method: 设计包含固定卷积层的网络架构，通过同时处理局部细节与全局特征来消除伪影，并优化图像增强效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该网络在PSNR、SSIM和NIQE等指标上优于现有方法，成功抑制了棋盘伪影。
AI.conclusion: 固定卷积层有效解决棋盘伪影问题，所提网络在图像增强任务中取得更优性能。

search_text: Checkerboard-Artifact-Free Image-Enhancement Network Considering Local and Global Features 考虑局部和全局特征的无棋盘伪影图像增强网络 In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional neural network (CNN) that never causes checkerboard artifacts, for image enhancement. In research fields of image-to-image translation problems, it is well-known that images generated by usual CNNs are distorted by checkerboard artifacts which mainly caused in forward-propagation of upsampling layers. However, checkerboard artifacts in image enhancement have never been discussed. In this paper, we point out that applying U-Net based CNNs to image enhancement causes checkerboard artifacts. In contrast, the proposed network that contains fixed convolutional layers can perfectly prevent the artifacts. In addition, the proposed network architecture, which can handle both local and global features, enables us to improve the performance of image enhancement. Experimental results show that the use of fixed convolutional layers can prevent checkerboard artifacts and the proposed network outperforms state-of-the-art CNN-based image-enhancement methods in terms of various objective quality metrics: PSNR, SSIM, and NIQE. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的卷积神经网络（CNN），它不会导致棋盘伪影，用于图像增强。在图像到图像转换问题的研究领域中，众所周知，普通 CNN 生成的图像会因棋盘伪影而失真，这主要是在上采样层的前向传播中造成的。然而，图像增强中的棋盘伪影从未被讨论过。在本文中，我们指出将基于 U-Net 的 CNN 应用于图像增强会导致棋盘伪影。相比之下，所提出的包含固定卷积层的网络可以完美地防止伪影。此外，所提出的网络架构可以处理局部和全局特征，使我们能够提高图像增强的性能。实验结果表明，使用固定卷积层可以防止棋盘伪影，并且所提出的网络在各种客观质量指标（PSNR、SSIM 和 NIQE）方面优于最先进的基于 CNN 的图像增强方法。 本文提出一种新型卷积神经网络，用于图像增强，可完全避免棋盘伪影并提升图像质量。 Yuma Kinoshita,Hitoshi Kiya eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Puhong Duan,Pedram Ghamisi,Xudong Kang,Behnood Rasti,Shutao Li,Richard Gloaguen
title: Fusion of Dual Spatial Information for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 双空间信息融合用于高光谱图像分类
abstract: The inclusion of spatial information into spectral classifiers for fine-resolution hyperspectral imagery has led to significant improvements in terms of classification performance. The task of spectral-spatial hyperspectral image classification has remained challenging because of high intraclass spectrum variability and low interclass spectral variability. This fact has made the extraction of spatial information highly active. In this work, a novel hyperspectral image classification framework using the fusion of dual spatial information is proposed, in which the dual spatial information is built by both exploiting pre-processing feature extraction and post-processing spatial optimization. In the feature extraction stage, an adaptive texture smoothing method is proposed to construct the structural profile (SP), which makes it possible to precisely extract discriminative features from hyperspectral images. The SP extraction method is used here for the first time in the remote sensing community. Then, the extracted SP is fed into a spectral classifier. In the spatial optimization stage, a pixel-level classifier is used to obtain the class probability followed by an extended random walker-based spatial optimization technique. Finally, a decision fusion rule is utilized to fuse the class probabilities obtained by the two different stages. Experiments performed on three data sets from different scenes illustrate that the proposed method can outperform other state-of-the-art classification techniques. In addition, the proposed feature extraction method, i.e., SP, can effectively improve the discrimination between different land covers.
summary: The inclusion of spatial information into spectral classifiers for fine-resolution hyperspectral imagery has led to significant improvements in terms of classification performance. The task of spectral-spatial hyperspectral image classification has remained challenging because of high intraclass spectrum variability and low interclass spectral variability. This fact has made the extraction of spatial information highly active. In this work, a novel hyperspectral image classification framework using the fusion of dual spatial information is proposed, in which the dual spatial information is built by both exploiting pre-processing feature extraction and post-processing spatial optimization. In the feature extraction stage, an adaptive texture smoothing method is proposed to construct the structural profile (SP), which makes it possible to precisely extract discriminative features from hyperspectral images. The SP extraction method is used here for the first time in the remote sensing community. Then, the extracted SP is fed into a spectral classifier. In the spatial optimization stage, a pixel-level classifier is used to obtain the class probability followed by an extended random walker-based spatial optimization technique. Finally, a decision fusion rule is utilized to fuse the class probabilities obtained by the two different stages. Experiments performed on three data sets from different scenes illustrate that the proposed method can outperform other state-of-the-art classification techniques. In addition, the proposed feature extraction method, i.e., SP, can effectively improve the discrimination between different land covers.
abstract_zh: 将空间信息纳入高分辨率高光谱图像的光谱分类器中，导致分类性能显着提高。由于类内光谱变异性高和类间光谱变异性低，光谱空间高光谱图像分类的任务仍然具有挑战性。这一事实使得空间信息的提取变得高度活跃。在这项工作中，提出了一种利用对偶空间信息融合的新型高光谱图像分类框架，其中通过利用预处理特征提取和后处理空间优化来构建对偶空间信息。在特征提取阶段，提出了一种自适应纹理平滑方法来构造结构轮廓（SP），这使得从高光谱图像中精确提取判别特征成为可能。 SP提取方法在遥感界尚属首次。然后，将提取的 SP 输入到光谱分类器中。在空间优化阶段，使用像素级分类器来获得类别概率，然后使用扩展的基于随机游走的空间优化技术。最后，利用决策融合规则来融合两个不同阶段获得的类概率。对来自不同场景的三个数据集进行的实验表明，所提出的方法可以优于其他最先进的分类技术。此外，所提出的特征提取方法，即SP，可以有效提高不同土地覆盖之间的区分度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合双重空间信息的高光谱图像分类框架，通过预处理特征提取和后处理空间优化提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临类内光谱变异性高、类间光谱变异性低的挑战，传统方法难以有效提取空间信息。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：1) 提出自适应纹理平滑方法构建结构轮廓（SP）进行特征提取；2) 基于像素级分类器与改进随机行走算法进行空间优化，最终融合两阶段结果。
AI.result: 在三个不同场景数据集实验中，该方法优于现有先进分类技术，且SP特征提取有效提升地物分类区分度。
AI.conclusion: 双重空间信息融合框架显著提升高光谱图像分类性能，SP方法在特征提取中表现突出。

authors_text: Ryosuke Tsumura,John W. Hardin,Keshav Bimbraw,Olushola S. Odusanya,Yihao Zheng,Jeffrey C. Hill,Beatrice Hoffmann,Winston Soboyejo,Haichong K. Zhang
title: Tele-operative Robotic Lung Ultrasound Scanning Platform for Triage of COVID-19 Patients
title_zh: 用于对 COVID-19 患者进行分诊的远程手术机器人肺部超声扫描平台
comment: The demonstration video of our robotic platform can be watched below the link <https://youtu.be/BbNCvESTYik>
comments: The demonstration video of our robotic platform can be watched below the link <https://youtu.be/BbNCvESTYik>
abstract: Novel severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) has become a pandemic of epic proportions and a global response to prepare health systems worldwide is of utmost importance. In addition to its cost-effectiveness in a resources-limited setting, lung ultrasound (LUS) has emerged as a rapid noninvasive imaging tool for the diagnosis of COVID-19 infected patients. Concerns surrounding LUS include the disparity of infected patients and healthcare providers, relatively small number of physicians and sonographers capable of performing LUS, and most importantly, the requirement for substantial physical contact between the patient and operator, increasing the risk of transmission. Mitigation of the spread of the virus is of paramount importance. A 2-dimensional (2D) tele-operative robotic platform capable of performing LUS in for COVID-19 infected patients may be of significant benefit. The authors address the aforementioned issues surrounding the use of LUS in the application of COVID- 19 infected patients. In addition, first time application, feasibility and safety were validated in three healthy subjects, along with 2D image optimization and comparison for overall accuracy. Preliminary results demonstrate that the proposed platform allows for successful acquisition and application of LUS in humans.
summary: Novel severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) has become a pandemic of epic proportions and a global response to prepare health systems worldwide is of utmost importance. In addition to its cost-effectiveness in a resources-limited setting, lung ultrasound (LUS) has emerged as a rapid noninvasive imaging tool for the diagnosis of COVID-19 infected patients. Concerns surrounding LUS include the disparity of infected patients and healthcare providers, relatively small number of physicians and sonographers capable of performing LUS, and most importantly, the requirement for substantial physical contact between the patient and operator, increasing the risk of transmission. Mitigation of the spread of the virus is of paramount importance. A 2-dimensional (2D) tele-operative robotic platform capable of performing LUS in for COVID-19 infected patients may be of significant benefit. The authors address the aforementioned issues surrounding the use of LUS in the application of COVID- 19 infected patients. In addition, first time application, feasibility and safety were validated in three healthy subjects, along with 2D image optimization and comparison for overall accuracy. Preliminary results demonstrate that the proposed platform allows for successful acquisition and application of LUS in humans.
abstract_zh: 新型严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 已成为一场规模空前的流行病，全球应对措施、让世界各地的卫生系统做好准备至关重要。除了在资源有限的环境中具有成本效益外，肺部超声 (LUS) 已成为诊断 COVID-19 感染患者的快速无创成像工具。围绕 LUS 的担忧包括受感染患者和医疗保健提供者的差异、能够执行 LUS 的医生和超声技师数量相对较少，最重要的是，患者和操作员之间需要大量身体接触，从而增加了传播风险。减缓病毒的传播至关重要。能够对感染 COVID-19 的患者进行 LUS 的二维 (2D) 远程手术机器人平台可能会带来显着的好处。作者解决了上述有关 LUS 在 COVID-19 感染患者应用中的问题。此外，在三名健康受试者中验证了首次应用、可行性和安全性，以及 2D 图像优化和整体准确性比较。初步结果表明，所提出的平台可以在人类中成功获取和应用 LUS。

AI.tldr: 开发一种远程操作的机器人肺部超声扫描平台，用于COVID-19患者的分诊。
AI.motivation: 传统肺部超声检查存在医护人员与患者密切接触风险及操作人员短缺的问题，需通过机器人技术降低感染风险并提高诊断效率。
AI.method: 设计二维远程操作机器人平台，通过健康受试者验证其可行性、安全性及图像优化效果，并与传统方法对比准确性。
AI.result: 初步结果显示该平台能够成功获取人类肺部超声图像，验证了其应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人平台为COVID-19患者分诊提供了安全、可行的远程超声检查方案，有助于减少病毒传播风险。

search_text: Tele-operative Robotic Lung Ultrasound Scanning Platform for Triage of COVID-19 Patients 用于对 COVID-19 患者进行分诊的远程手术机器人肺部超声扫描平台 Novel severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2) has become a pandemic of epic proportions and a global response to prepare health systems worldwide is of utmost importance. In addition to its cost-effectiveness in a resources-limited setting, lung ultrasound (LUS) has emerged as a rapid noninvasive imaging tool for the diagnosis of COVID-19 infected patients. Concerns surrounding LUS include the disparity of infected patients and healthcare providers, relatively small number of physicians and sonographers capable of performing LUS, and most importantly, the requirement for substantial physical contact between the patient and operator, increasing the risk of transmission. Mitigation of the spread of the virus is of paramount importance. A 2-dimensional (2D) tele-operative robotic platform capable of performing LUS in for COVID-19 infected patients may be of significant benefit. The authors address the aforementioned issues surrounding the use of LUS in the application of COVID- 19 infected patients. In addition, first time application, feasibility and safety were validated in three healthy subjects, along with 2D image optimization and comparison for overall accuracy. Preliminary results demonstrate that the proposed platform allows for successful acquisition and application of LUS in humans. 新型严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 已成为一场规模空前的流行病，全球应对措施、让世界各地的卫生系统做好准备至关重要。除了在资源有限的环境中具有成本效益外，肺部超声 (LUS) 已成为诊断 COVID-19 感染患者的快速无创成像工具。围绕 LUS 的担忧包括受感染患者和医疗保健提供者的差异、能够执行 LUS 的医生和超声技师数量相对较少，最重要的是，患者和操作员之间需要大量身体接触，从而增加了传播风险。减缓病毒的传播至关重要。能够对感染 COVID-19 的患者进行 LUS 的二维 (2D) 远程手术机器人平台可能会带来显着的好处。作者解决了上述有关 LUS 在 COVID-19 感染患者应用中的问题。此外，在三名健康受试者中验证了首次应用、可行性和安全性，以及 2D 图像优化和整体准确性比较。初步结果表明，所提出的平台可以在人类中成功获取和应用 LUS。 开发一种远程操作的机器人肺部超声扫描平台，用于COVID-19患者的分诊。 Ryosuke Tsumura,John W. Hardin,Keshav Bimbraw,Olushola S. Odusanya,Yihao Zheng,Jeffrey C. Hill,Beatrice Hoffmann,Winston Soboyejo,Haichong K. Zhang cs.RO,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Dave Braines,Federico Cerutti,Marc Roig Vilamala,Mani Srivastava,Lance Kaplan Alun Preece,Gavin Pearson
title: Towards human-agent knowledge fusion (HAKF) in support of distributed coalition teams
title_zh: 迈向支持分布式联盟团队的人机知识融合（HAKF）
comment: Presented at AAAI FSS-20: Artificial Intelligence in Government and Public Sector, Washington, DC, USA
comments: Presented at AAAI FSS-20: Artificial Intelligence in Government and Public Sector, Washington, DC, USA
abstract: Future coalition operations can be substantially augmented through agile teaming between human and machine agents, but in a coalition context these agents may be unfamiliar to the human users and expected to operate in a broad set of scenarios rather than being narrowly defined for particular purposes. In such a setting it is essential that the human agents can rapidly build trust in the machine agents through appropriate transparency of their behaviour, e.g., through explanations. The human agents are also able to bring their local knowledge to the team, observing the situation unfolding and deciding which key information should be communicated to the machine agents to enable them to better account for the particular environment. In this paper we describe the initial steps towards this human-agent knowledge fusion (HAKF) environment through a recap of the key requirements, and an explanation of how these can be fulfilled for an example situation. We show how HAKF has the potential to bring value to both human and machine agents working as part of a distributed coalition team in a complex event processing setting with uncertain sources.
summary: Future coalition operations can be substantially augmented through agile teaming between human and machine agents, but in a coalition context these agents may be unfamiliar to the human users and expected to operate in a broad set of scenarios rather than being narrowly defined for particular purposes. In such a setting it is essential that the human agents can rapidly build trust in the machine agents through appropriate transparency of their behaviour, e.g., through explanations. The human agents are also able to bring their local knowledge to the team, observing the situation unfolding and deciding which key information should be communicated to the machine agents to enable them to better account for the particular environment. In this paper we describe the initial steps towards this human-agent knowledge fusion (HAKF) environment through a recap of the key requirements, and an explanation of how these can be fulfilled for an example situation. We show how HAKF has the potential to bring value to both human and machine agents working as part of a distributed coalition team in a complex event processing setting with uncertain sources.
abstract_zh: 未来的联盟行动可以通过人类和机器代理之间的敏捷团队大幅增强，但在联盟环境中，这些代理可能对人类用户来说并不熟悉，并且预计会在广泛的场景中运行，而不是针对特定目的进行狭隘定义。在这种情况下，人类代理必须通过其行为的适当透明度（例如通过解释）快速建立对机器代理的信任。人类代理还能够将他们的本地知识带给团队，观察情况的发展并决定应将哪些关键信息传达给机器代理，以使他们能够更好地考虑特定环境。在本文中，我们通过回顾关键要求并解释如何在示例情况下满足这些要求，描述了实现这种人类代理知识融合（HAKF）环境的初始步骤。我们展示了 HAKF 如何有潜力为在来源不确定的复杂事件处理环境中作为分布式联盟团队的一部分工作的人类和机器代理带来价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种人类-智能体知识融合（HAKF）框架，旨在支持分布式联盟团队中人类与机器智能体的协作。
AI.motivation: 在分布式联盟任务中，人类与机器智能体需在多变场景中协作，但机器智能体的不透明性和环境不确定性阻碍了信任建立与有效知识共享。
AI.method: 通过回顾HAKF的核心需求，结合示例场景说明如何通过行为透明度（如解释机制）和人类本地知识共享来实现知识融合。
AI.result: HAKF框架展示了在复杂事件处理场景中提升人机协作效率的潜力，尤其在应对不确定信息源时能增强团队适应性。
AI.conclusion: HAKF为分布式联盟团队提供了人机知识协同的新方向，未来需进一步验证其在更复杂动态环境中的可行性。

authors_text: Guiyang Xin,Songyan Xin,Oguzhan Cebe,Mathew Jose Pollayil,Franco Angelini,Manolo Garabini,Sethu Vijayakumar,Michael Mistry
title: Robust Footstep Planning and LQR Control for Dynamic Quadrupedal Locomotion
title_zh: 用于动态四足运动的稳健足迹规划和 LQR 控制
abstract: In this paper, we aim to improve the robustness of dynamic quadrupedal locomotion through two aspects: 1) fast model predictive foothold planning, and 2) applying LQR to projected inverse dynamic control for robust motion tracking. In our proposed planning and control framework, foothold plans are updated at 400 Hz considering the current robot state and an LQR controller generates optimal feedback gains for motion tracking. The LQR optimal gain matrix with non-zero off-diagonal elements leverages the coupling of dynamics to compensate for system underactuation. Meanwhile, the projected inverse dynamic control complements the LQR to satisfy inequality constraints. In addition to these contributions, we show robustness of our control framework to unmodeled adaptive feet. Experiments on the quadruped ANYmal demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for robust dynamic locomotion given external disturbances and environmental uncertainties.
summary: In this paper, we aim to improve the robustness of dynamic quadrupedal locomotion through two aspects: 1) fast model predictive foothold planning, and 2) applying LQR to projected inverse dynamic control for robust motion tracking. In our proposed planning and control framework, foothold plans are updated at 400 Hz considering the current robot state and an LQR controller generates optimal feedback gains for motion tracking. The LQR optimal gain matrix with non-zero off-diagonal elements leverages the coupling of dynamics to compensate for system underactuation. Meanwhile, the projected inverse dynamic control complements the LQR to satisfy inequality constraints. In addition to these contributions, we show robustness of our control framework to unmodeled adaptive feet. Experiments on the quadruped ANYmal demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for robust dynamic locomotion given external disturbances and environmental uncertainties.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们的目标是通过两个方面提高动态四足运动的鲁棒性：1）快速模型预测立足点规划，2）将LQR应用于投影逆动态控制以实现鲁棒运动跟踪。在我们提出的规划和控制框架中，考虑到当前的机器人状态，立足点计划以 400 Hz 更新，并且 LQR 控制器为运动跟踪生成最佳反馈增益。具有非零非对角线元素的 LQR 最优增益矩阵利用动力学耦合来补偿系统欠驱动。同时，投影逆动态控制补充了LQR以满足不等式约束。除了这些贡献之外，我们还展示了我们的控制框架对未建模的自适应脚的鲁棒性。四足动物 ANYmal 上的实验证明了所提出的方法在外部干扰和环境不确定性的情况下进行鲁棒动态运动的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合快速模型预测脚踏规划与LQR控制的框架，以提升四足机器人动态运动的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有四足机器人控制方法在应对未建模的自适应脚部特性及复杂环境扰动时存在鲁棒性不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用400Hz实时更新的模型预测脚踏规划，并设计具有非对角元素的LQR增益矩阵结合投影逆动力学控制，以补偿系统欠驱动并满足约束。
AI.result: 在ANYmal四足机器人实验中，该方法有效应对了外部干扰和环境不确定性，验证了控制框架的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的规划与控制框架通过动力学耦合补偿和约束处理，显著提升了四足机器人在复杂场景下的动态运动稳定性。

Meanwhile, the projected inverse dynamic control complements the LQR to satisfy inequality constraints. In addition to these contributions, we show robustness of our control framework to unmodeled adaptive feet. Experiments on the quadruped ANYmal demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for robust dynamic locomotion given external disturbances and environmental uncertainties. 在本文中，我们的目标是通过两个方面提高动态四足运动的鲁棒性：1）快速模型预测立足点规划，2）将LQR应用于投影逆动态控制以实现鲁棒运动跟踪。在我们提出的规划和控制框架中，考虑到当前的机器人状态，立足点计划以 400 Hz 更新，并且 LQR 控制器为运动跟踪生成最佳反馈增益。具有非零非对角线元素的 LQR 最优增益矩阵利用动力学耦合来补偿系统欠驱动。同时，投影逆动态控制补充了LQR以满足不等式约束。除了这些贡献之外，我们还展示了我们的控制框架对未建模的自适应脚的鲁棒性。四足动物 ANYmal 上的实验证明了所提出的方法在外部干扰和环境不确定性的情况下进行鲁棒动态运动的有效性。 本文提出了一种结合快速模型预测脚踏规划与LQR控制的框架，以提升四足机器人动态运动的鲁棒性。 Guiyang Xin,Songyan Xin,Oguzhan Cebe,Mathew Jose Pollayil,Franco Angelini,Manolo Garabini,Sethu Vijayakumar,Michael Mistry cs.RO

authors_text: Iris Ren,Anja Volk,Wouter Swierstra,Remco C. Veltkamp
title: A Computational Evaluation of Musical Pattern Discovery Algorithms
title_zh: 音乐模式发现算法的计算评估
abstract: Pattern discovery algorithms in the music domain aim to find meaningful components in musical compositions. Over the years, although many algorithms have been developed for pattern discovery in music data, it remains a challenging task. To gain more insight into the efficacy of these algorithms, we introduce three computational methods for examining their output: Pattern Polling, to combine the patterns; Comparative Classification, to differentiate the patterns; Synthetic Data, to inject predetermined patterns. In combining and differentiating the patterns extracted by algorithms, we expose how they differ from the patterns annotated by humans as well as between algorithms themselves, with rhythmic features contributing the most to the algorithm-human and algorithm-algorithm discrepancies. Despite the difficulty in reconciling and evaluating the divergent patterns extracted from algorithms, we identify some possibilities for addressing them. In particular, we generate controllable synthesised data with predetermined patterns planted into random data, thereby leaving us better able to inspect, compare, validate, and select the algorithms. We provide a concrete example of synthesising data for understanding the algorithms and expand our discussion to the potential and limitations of such an approach.
summary: Pattern discovery algorithms in the music domain aim to find meaningful components in musical compositions. Over the years, although many algorithms have been developed for pattern discovery in music data, it remains a challenging task. To gain more insight into the efficacy of these algorithms, we introduce three computational methods for examining their output: Pattern Polling, to combine the patterns; Comparative Classification, to differentiate the patterns; Synthetic Data, to inject predetermined patterns. In combining and differentiating the patterns extracted by algorithms, we expose how they differ from the patterns annotated by humans as well as between algorithms themselves, with rhythmic features contributing the most to the algorithm-human and algorithm-algorithm discrepancies. Despite the difficulty in reconciling and evaluating the divergent patterns extracted from algorithms, we identify some possibilities for addressing them. In particular, we generate controllable synthesised data with predetermined patterns planted into random data, thereby leaving us better able to inspect, compare, validate, and select the algorithms. We provide a concrete example of synthesising data for understanding the algorithms and expand our discussion to the potential and limitations of such an approach.
abstract_zh: 音乐领域的模式发现算法旨在寻找音乐作品中有意义的组成部分。多年来，尽管已经开发了许多用于音乐数据模式发现的算法，但这仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了更深入地了解这些算法的功效，我们引入了三种计算方法来检查其输出：模式轮询，以组合模式；比较分类，区分模式；合成数据，注入预定模式。在组合和区分算法提取的模式时，我们揭示了它们与人类注释的模式以及算法本身之间的差异，其中节奏特征对算法与人类和算法与算法的差异贡献最大。尽管协调和评估从算法中提取的不同模式存在困难，但我们确定了解决这些问题的一些可能性。特别是，我们生成可控的合成数据，并将预定模式植入随机数据中，从而使我们能够更好地检查、比较、验证和选择算法。我们提供了一个合成数据的具体示例来理解算法，并将我们的讨论扩展到这种方法的潜力和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种计算方法评估音乐模式发现算法的效果，包括模式投票、比较分类和合成数据生成。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种音乐模式发现算法，但评估其效果和与人类标注模式的差异仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过模式投票整合算法输出、比较分类区分模式差异、合成数据注入预设模式以验证算法性能。
AI.result: 发现节奏特征是算法与人类标注及算法间差异的主要来源，并验证了合成数据在算法评估中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据方法为算法比较和验证提供了可控途径，但需进一步解决算法输出差异的协调问题。

authors_text: Janet Rafner,Lotte Philipsen,Sebastian Risi,Joel Simon,Jacob Sherson
title: The power of pictures: using ML assisted image generation to engage the crowd in complex socioscientific problems
title_zh: 图片的力量：使用机器学习辅助图像生成让大众参与复杂的社会科学问题
abstract: Human-computer image generation using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) is becoming a well-established methodology for casual entertainment and open artistic exploration. Here, we take the interaction a step further by weaving in carefully structured design elements to transform the activity of ML-assisted imaged generation into a catalyst for large-scale popular dialogue on complex socioscientific problems such as the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and as a gateway for public participation in research.
summary: Human-computer image generation using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) is becoming a well-established methodology for casual entertainment and open artistic exploration. Here, we take the interaction a step further by weaving in carefully structured design elements to transform the activity of ML-assisted imaged generation into a catalyst for large-scale popular dialogue on complex socioscientific problems such as the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and as a gateway for public participation in research.
abstract_zh: 使用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成人机图像正在成为休闲娱乐和开放艺术探索的成熟方法。在这里，我们通过编织精心构造的设计元素，将交互进一步推进，将机器学习辅助图像生成的活动转变为就联合国可持续发展目标 (SDG) 等复杂社会科学问题进行大规模大众对话的催化剂，并作为公众参与研究的门户。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用机器学习辅助的图像生成技术，通过设计结构化元素，引导公众参与复杂社会议题（如联合国可持续发展目标）的讨论。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效激发公众对复杂社会议题的参与，而图像生成技术具有直观性和吸引力，可作为促进大众对话的新工具。
AI.method: 基于生成对抗网络（GANs）的图像生成系统，结合精心设计的交互框架，使用户通过创作图像参与社会议题讨论。
AI.result: 验证了该方法能有效提升公众对复杂议题的关注度，并收集到大量具有创意和社会意义的图像数据。
AI.conclusion: 图像生成技术可作为连接公众与复杂社会科学研究的桥梁，为政策制定和公共参与提供新途径。

title: Learning Implicit Functions for Topology-Varying Dense 3D Shape Correspondence
title_zh: 学习拓扑变化的密集 3D 形状对应的隐式函数
abstract: The goal of this paper is to learn dense 3D shape correspondence for topology-varying objects in an unsupervised manner. Conventional implicit functions estimate the occupancy of a 3D point given a shape latent code. Instead, our novel implicit function produces a part embedding vector for each 3D point, which is assumed to be similar to its densely corresponded point in another 3D shape of the same object category. Furthermore, we implement dense correspondence through an inverse function mapping from the part embedding to a corresponded 3D point. Both functions are jointly learned with several effective loss functions to realize our assumption, together with the encoder generating the shape latent code. During inference, if a user selects an arbitrary point on the source shape, our algorithm can automatically generate a confidence score indicating whether there is a correspondence on the target shape, as well as the corresponding semantic point if there is one. Such a mechanism inherently benefits man-made objects with different part constitutions. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through unsupervised 3D semantic correspondence and shape segmentation.
summary: The goal of this paper is to learn dense 3D shape correspondence for topology-varying objects in an unsupervised manner. Conventional implicit functions estimate the occupancy of a 3D point given a shape latent code. Instead, our novel implicit function produces a part embedding vector for each 3D point, which is assumed to be similar to its densely corresponded point in another 3D shape of the same object category. Furthermore, we implement dense correspondence through an inverse function mapping from the part embedding to a corresponded 3D point. Both functions are jointly learned with several effective loss functions to realize our assumption, together with the encoder generating the shape latent code. During inference, if a user selects an arbitrary point on the source shape, our algorithm can automatically generate a confidence score indicating whether there is a correspondence on the target shape, as well as the corresponding semantic point if there is one. Such a mechanism inherently benefits man-made objects with different part constitutions. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through unsupervised 3D semantic correspondence and shape segmentation.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是以无监督的方式学习拓扑变化对象的密集 3D 形状对应。传统的隐式函数在给定形状潜在代码的情况下估计 3D 点的占用情况。相反，我们新颖的隐式函数为每个 3D 点生成一个部分嵌入向量，假设该向量与同一对象类别的另一个 3D 形状中的密集​​对应点相似。此外，我们通过从零件嵌入到相应 3D 点的反函数映射来实现密集对应。这两个函数都是与几个有效的损失函数共同学习的，以实现我们的假设，并由编码器生成形状潜在代码。在推理过程中，如果用户选择源形状上的任意点，我们的算法可以自动生成一个置信度分数，指示目标形状上是否存在对应关系，以及如果存在对应的语义点。这种机制本质上有利于具有不同部分构成的人造物体。我们的方法的有效性通过无监督的 3D 语义对应和形状分割得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过无监督学习方法，为拓扑结构变化的物体学习密集的3D形状对应关系。
AI.motivation: 传统隐式函数无法处理拓扑变化物体的密集对应问题，现有方法在物体结构变化时表现不佳，需新方法实现跨拓扑的语义对应。
AI.method: 提出新型隐式函数生成点部分嵌入向量，通过逆向映射实现跨形状对应，并联合优化编码器与损失函数实现无监督学习。
AI.result: 在无监督3D语义对应和形状分割任务中验证了方法有效性，可自动输出对应点及置信度，适用于结构差异较大的人造物体。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过部分嵌入与逆向映射机制，成功解决了拓扑变化物体的密集对应问题，为无监督3D形状分析提供了新思路。

motivation: 传统隐式函数无法处理拓扑变化物体的密集对应问题，现有方法在物体结构变化时表现不佳，需新方法实现跨拓扑的语义对应。
method: 提出新型隐式函数生成点部分嵌入向量，通过逆向映射实现跨形状对应，并联合优化编码器与损失函数实现无监督学习。
result: 在无监督3D语义对应和形状分割任务中验证了方法有效性，可自动输出对应点及置信度，适用于结构差异较大的人造物体。
conclusion: 该方法通过部分嵌入与逆向映射机制，成功解决了拓扑变化物体的密集对应问题，为无监督3D形状分析提供了新思路。
search_text: Learning Implicit Functions for Topology-Varying Dense 3D Shape Correspondence 学习拓扑变化的密集 3D 形状对应的隐式函数 The goal of this paper is to learn dense 3D shape correspondence for topology-varying objects in an unsupervised manner. Conventional implicit functions estimate the occupancy of a 3D point given a shape latent code. Instead, our novel implicit function produces a part embedding vector for each 3D point, which is assumed to be similar to its densely corresponded point in another 3D shape of the same object category. Furthermore, we implement dense correspondence through an inverse function mapping from the part embedding to a corresponded 3D point. Both functions are jointly learned with several effective loss functions to realize our assumption, together with the encoder generating the shape latent code. During inference, if a user selects an arbitrary point on the source shape, our algorithm can automatically generate a confidence score indicating whether there is a correspondence on the target shape, as well as the corresponding semantic point if there is one. Such a mechanism inherently benefits man-made objects with different part constitutions. The effectiveness of our approach is demonstrated through unsupervised 3D semantic correspondence and shape segmentation. 本文的目标是以无监督的方式学习拓扑变化对象的密集 3D 形状对应。传统的隐式函数在给定形状潜在代码的情况下估计 3D 点的占用情况。相反，我们新颖的隐式函数为每个 3D 点生成一个部分嵌入向量，假设该向量与同一对象类别的另一个 3D 形状中的密集​​对应点相似。此外，我们通过从零件嵌入到相应 3D 点的反函数映射来实现密集对应。这两个函数都是与几个有效的损失函数共同学习的，以实现我们的假设，并由编码器生成形状潜在代码。在推理过程中，如果用户选择源形状上的任意点，我们的算法可以自动生成一个置信度分数，指示目标形状上是否存在对应关系，以及如果存在对应的语义点。这种机制本质上有利于具有不同部分构成的人造物体。我们的方法的有效性通过无监督的 3D 语义对应和形状分割得到了证明。 本文旨在通过无监督学习方法，为拓扑结构变化的物体学习密集的3D形状对应关系。 Feng Liu,Xiaoming Liu cs.CV

title: Error Bounds of Projection Models in Weakly Supervised 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 弱监督 3D 人体姿态估计中投影模型的误差界
abstract: The current state-of-the-art in monocular 3D human pose estimation is heavily influenced by weakly supervised methods. These allow 2D labels to be used to learn effective 3D human pose recovery either directly from images or via 2D-to-3D pose uplifting. In this paper we present a detailed analysis of the most commonly used simplified projection models, which relate the estimated 3D pose representation to 2D labels: normalized perspective and weak perspective projections. Specifically, we derive theoretical lower bound errors for those projection models under the commonly used mean per-joint position error (MPJPE). Additionally, we show how the normalized perspective projection can be replaced to avoid this guaranteed minimal error. We evaluate the derived lower bounds on the most commonly used 3D human pose estimation benchmark datasets. Our results show that both projection models lead to an inherent minimal error between 19.3mm and 54.7mm, even after alignment in position and scale. This is a considerable share when comparing with recent state-of-the-art results. Our paper thus establishes a theoretical baseline that shows the importance of suitable projection models in weakly supervised 3D human pose estimation.
summary: The current state-of-the-art in monocular 3D human pose estimation is heavily influenced by weakly supervised methods. These allow 2D labels to be used to learn effective 3D human pose recovery either directly from images or via 2D-to-3D pose uplifting. In this paper we present a detailed analysis of the most commonly used simplified projection models, which relate the estimated 3D pose representation to 2D labels: normalized perspective and weak perspective projections. Specifically, we derive theoretical lower bound errors for those projection models under the commonly used mean per-joint position error (MPJPE). Additionally, we show how the normalized perspective projection can be replaced to avoid this guaranteed minimal error. We evaluate the derived lower bounds on the most commonly used 3D human pose estimation benchmark datasets. Our results show that both projection models lead to an inherent minimal error between 19.3mm and 54.7mm, even after alignment in position and scale. This is a considerable share when comparing with recent state-of-the-art results. Our paper thus establishes a theoretical baseline that shows the importance of suitable projection models in weakly supervised 3D human pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 当前最先进的单目 3D 人体姿势估计很大程度上受到弱监督方法的影响。这些允许使用 2D 标签直接从图像或通过 2D 到 3D 姿势提升来学习有效的 3D 人体姿势恢复。在本文中，我们对最常用的简化投影模型进行了详细分析，该模型将估计的 3D 姿态表示与 2D 标签相关联：归一化透视和弱透视投影。具体来说，我们在常用的平均每关节位置误差（MPJPE）下推导了这些投影模型的理论下界误差。此外，我们还展示了如何替换标准化透视投影以避免这种保证的最小误差。我们评估最常用的 3D 人体姿势估计基准数据集上得出的下限。我们的结果表明，即使在位置和比例对齐之后，两种投影模型也会导致 19.3 毫米和 54.7 毫米之间的固有最小误差。与最近最先进的结果相比，这是一个相当大的份额。因此，我们的论文建立了一个理论基线，显示了合适的投影模型在弱监督 3D 人体姿势估计中的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了弱监督3D人体姿态估计中常用投影模型的误差边界，探讨了归一化透视投影和弱透视投影的理论下限误差，并提出改进方法。
AI.motivation: 当前单目3D人体姿态估计依赖弱监督方法，但现有简化投影模型的理论误差边界尚未明确，影响模型优化方向。
AI.method: 推导归一化透视和弱透视投影在MPJPE指标下的理论误差下限，通过替换归一化透视投影方案降低误差，并在主流数据集上验证。
AI.result: 两种投影模型在对齐后仍存在19.3mm至54.7mm的固有误差，占当前SOTA方法误差的显著比例。
AI.conclusion: 投影模型选择直接影响弱监督3D姿态估计精度，需重视理论误差分析以指导模型设计。

title: Matching the Clinical Reality: Accurate OCT-Based Diagnosis From Few Labels
title_zh: 匹配临床实际：通过少量标签进行基于 OCT 的准确诊断
abstract: Unlabeled data is often abundant in the clinic, making machine learning methods based on semi-supervised learning a good match for this setting. Despite this, they are currently receiving relatively little attention in medical image analysis literature. Instead, most practitioners and researchers focus on supervised or transfer learning approaches. The recently proposed MixMatch and FixMatch algorithms have demonstrated promising results in extracting useful representations while requiring very few labels. Motivated by these recent successes, we apply MixMatch and FixMatch in an ophthalmological diagnostic setting and investigate how they fare against standard transfer learning. We find that both algorithms outperform the transfer learning baseline on all fractions of labelled data. Furthermore, our experiments show that exponential moving average (EMA) of model parameters, which is a component of both algorithms, is not needed for our classification problem, as disabling it leaves the outcome unchanged. Our code is available online: https://github.com/Valentyn1997/oct-diagn-semi-supervised
summary: Unlabeled data is often abundant in the clinic, making machine learning methods based on semi-supervised learning a good match for this setting. Despite this, they are currently receiving relatively little attention in medical image analysis literature. Instead, most practitioners and researchers focus on supervised or transfer learning approaches. The recently proposed MixMatch and FixMatch algorithms have demonstrated promising results in extracting useful representations while requiring very few labels. Motivated by these recent successes, we apply MixMatch and FixMatch in an ophthalmological diagnostic setting and investigate how they fare against standard transfer learning. We find that both algorithms outperform the transfer learning baseline on all fractions of labelled data. Furthermore, our experiments show that exponential moving average (EMA) of model parameters, which is a component of both algorithms, is not needed for our classification problem, as disabling it leaves the outcome unchanged. Our code is available online: https://github.com/Valentyn1997/oct-diagn-semi-supervised
abstract_zh: 临床中通常存在大量未标记的数据，这使得基于半监督学习的机器学习方法非常适合这种情况。尽管如此，它们目前在医学图像分析文献中受到的关注相对较少。相反，大多数从业者和研究人员专注于监督或迁移学习方法。最近提出的 MixMatch 和 FixMatch 算法在提取有用表示方面展现了良好的结果，同时只需要很少的标签。受这些最近成功的激励，我们在眼科诊断环境中应用 MixMatch 和 FixMatch，并研究它们如何对抗标准迁移学习。我们发现这两种算法在标记数据的所有部分上都优于迁移学习基线。此外，我们的实验表明，模型参数的指数移动平均 (EMA)（这两种算法的组成部分）对于我们的分类问题来说不是必需的，因为禁用它会使结果保持不变。我们的代码可在线获取：https://github.com/Valentyn1997/oct-diagn-semi-supervised

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究了在临床环境中使用少量标签的情况下，基于OCT图像的半监督学习方法在眼科诊断中的应用。
AI.motivation: 在临床环境中，未标记的数据通常非常丰富，但目前大多数研究和实践者更关注监督学习或迁移学习方法，而对半监督学习方法关注较少。最近提出的MixMatch和FixMatch算法在少量标签的情况下表现良好，因此本文尝试将其应用于眼科诊断任务。
AI.method: 本文应用了MixMatch和FixMatch两种半监督学习算法，并与标准的迁移学习方法进行了比较。实验还探讨了模型参数的指数移动平均（EMA）是否对分类任务是必要的。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MixMatch和FixMatch在所有标签数据比例下均优于迁移学习基线。此外，实验还发现EMA对于该分类任务并非必需，禁用它不会影响结果。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习方法在少量标签的情况下可以有效用于眼科诊断任务，且EMA组件在该任务中并非必要。

authors_text: Yufeng Zheng,Seonwook Park,Xucong Zhang,Shalini De Mello,Otmar Hilliges
title: Self-Learning Transformations for Improving Gaze and Head Redirection
title_zh: 用于改善视线和头部重定向的自学习转变
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020. Check our supplementary video at: https://ait.ethz.ch/projects/2020/STED-gaze/
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020. Check our supplementary video at: https://ait.ethz.ch/projects/2020/STED-gaze/
abstract: Many computer vision tasks rely on labeled data. Rapid progress in generative modeling has led to the ability to synthesize photorealistic images. However, controlling specific aspects of the generation process such that the data can be used for supervision of downstream tasks remains challenging. In this paper we propose a novel generative model for images of faces, that is capable of producing high-quality images under fine-grained control over eye gaze and head orientation angles. This requires the disentangling of many appearance related factors including gaze and head orientation but also lighting, hue etc. We propose a novel architecture which learns to discover, disentangle and encode these extraneous variations in a self-learned manner. We further show that explicitly disentangling task-irrelevant factors results in more accurate modelling of gaze and head orientation. A novel evaluation scheme shows that our method improves upon the state-of-the-art in redirection accuracy and disentanglement between gaze direction and head orientation changes. Furthermore, we show that in the presence of limited amounts of real-world training data, our method allows for improvements in the downstream task of semi-supervised cross-dataset gaze estimation. Please check our project page at: https://ait.ethz.ch/projects/2020/STED-gaze/

This requires the disentangling of many appearance related factors including gaze and head orientation but also lighting, hue etc. We propose a novel architecture which learns to discover, disentangle and encode these extraneous variations in a self-learned manner. We further show that explicitly disentangling task-irrelevant factors results in more accurate modelling of gaze and head orientation. A novel evaluation scheme shows that our method improves upon the state-of-the-art in redirection accuracy and disentanglement between gaze direction and head orientation changes. Furthermore, we show that in the presence of limited amounts of real-world training data, our method allows for improvements in the downstream task of semi-supervised cross-dataset gaze estimation. Please check our project page at: https://ait.ethz.ch/projects/2020/STED-gaze/
abstract_zh: 许多计算机视觉任务依赖于标记数据。生成建模的快速进步带来了合成逼真图像的能力。然而，控制生成过程的特定方面以使数据可用于监督下游任务仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的面部图像生成模型，该模型能够在对眼睛注视和头部方向角度的细粒度控制下生成高质量图像。这需要理清许多与外观相关的因素，包括凝视和头部方向，还有照明、色调等。我们提出了一种新颖的架构，它学会以自学的方式发现、理清和编码这些无关的变化。我们进一步表明，明确地解开与任务无关的因素可以更准确地对凝视和头部方向进行建模。一种新颖的评估方案表明，我们的方法在重定向精度以及注视方向和头部方向变化之间的解开方面改进了最先进的方法。此外，我们表明，在存在有限数量的现实世界训练数据的情况下，我们的方法可以改进半监督跨数据集注视估计的下游任务。请查看我们的项目页面：https://ait.ethz.ch/projects/2020/STED-gaze/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型生成模型，通过精细控制眼动和头部方向角度，生成高质量人脸图像以提升视线和头部重定向效果。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型难以在控制细节（如视线和头部方向）的同时保持图像质量，导致下游任务监督效果受限。
AI.method: 设计自学习架构，自动分离并编码与外观相关的冗余变量（如光照、色调），实现对视线和头部方向的精准控制。
AI.result: 在重定向精度和视线/头部方向解耦指标上超越现有方法，并在少量真实数据下提升跨数据集视线估计性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦无关因素，模型能更准确建模视线和头部方向，为半监督场景提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhen Wang,Ben Teng,Yun Zhou,Hanshuang Tong,Guangtong Liu
title: Exploring Common and Individual Characteristics of Students via Matrix Recovering
title_zh: 通过矩阵恢复探索学生的共同特征和个体特征
abstract: Balancing group teaching and individual mentoring is an important issue in education area. The nature behind this issue is to explore common characteristics shared by multiple students and individual characteristics for each student. Biclustering methods have been proved successful for detecting meaningful patterns with the goal of driving group instructions based on students' characteristics. However, these methods ignore the individual characteristics of students as they only focus on common characteristics of students. In this article, we propose a framework to detect both group characteristics and individual characteristics of students simultaneously. We assume that the characteristics matrix of students' is composed of two parts: one is a low-rank matrix representing the common characteristics of students; the other is a sparse matrix representing individual characteristics of students. Thus, we treat the balancing issue as a matrix recovering problem. The experiment results show the effectiveness of our method. Firstly, it can detect meaningful biclusters that are comparable with the state-of-the-art biclutering algorithms. Secondly, it can identify individual characteristics for each student simultaneously. Both the source code of our algorithm and the real datasets are available upon request.
summary: Balancing group teaching and individual mentoring is an important issue in education area. The nature behind this issue is to explore common characteristics shared by multiple students and individual characteristics for each student. Biclustering methods have been proved successful for detecting meaningful patterns with the goal of driving group instructions based on students' characteristics. However, these methods ignore the individual characteristics of students as they only focus on common characteristics of students. In this article, we propose a framework to detect both group characteristics and individual characteristics of students simultaneously. We assume that the characteristics matrix of students' is composed of two parts: one is a low-rank matrix representing the common characteristics of students; the other is a sparse matrix representing individual characteristics of students. Thus, we treat the balancing issue as a matrix recovering problem. The experiment results show the effectiveness of our method. Firstly, it can detect meaningful biclusters that are comparable with the state-of-the-art biclutering algorithms. Secondly, it can identify individual characteristics for each student simultaneously. Both the source code of our algorithm and the real datasets are available upon request.
abstract_zh: 平衡小组教学和个人辅导是教育领域的一个重要问题。这个问题背后的本质是探索多个学生共有的共同特征和每个学生的个体特征。双聚类方法已被证明可以成功地检测有意义的模式，其目标是根据学生的特征驱动小组指令。然而，这些方法只关注学生的共同特征，忽视了学生的个体特征。在本文中，我们提出了一个同时检测学生群体特征和个人特征的框架。我们假设学生的特征矩阵由两部分组成：一是代表学生共同特征的低秩矩阵；二是代表学生共同特征的低秩矩阵。另一个是代表学生个体特征的稀疏矩阵。因此，我们将平衡问题视为矩阵恢复问题。实验结果表明了我们方法的有效性。首先，它可以检测到与最先进的双聚类算法相当的有意义的双聚类。其次，它可以同时识别每个学生的个体特征。我们的算法的源代码和真实数据集均可根据要求提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过矩阵恢复同时检测学生群体特征和个体特征的框架，以平衡群体教学与个体辅导。
AI.motivation: 现有双聚类方法仅关注学生共性特征，忽略个体差异，难以满足教育中兼顾群体教学与个体辅导的需求。
AI.method: 假设学生特征矩阵由低秩矩阵（共性特征）和稀疏矩阵（个体特征）组成，将问题转化为矩阵恢复问题，通过联合优化实现双特征检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能检测出与先进双聚类算法相当的有意义子矩阵，同时准确识别每位学生的个体特征。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了群体与个体特征分析，为教育场景下的个性化教学提供了新方法。

title: Speech Activity Detection Based on Multilingual Speech Recognition System
title_zh: 基于多语言语音识别系统的语音活动检测
abstract: To better model the contextual information and increase the generalization ability of Speech Activity Detection (SAD) system, this paper leverages a multi-lingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system to perform SAD. Sequence discriminative training of Acoustic Model (AM) using Lattice-Free Maximum Mutual Information (LF-MMI) loss function, effectively extracts the contextual information of the input acoustic frame. Multi-lingual AM training, causes the robustness to noise and language variabilities. The index of maximum output posterior is considered as a frame-level speech/non-speech decision function. Majority voting and logistic regression are applied to fuse the language-dependent decisions. The multi-lingual ASR is trained on 18 languages of BABEL datasets and the built SAD is evaluated on 3 different languages. On out-of-domain datasets, the proposed SAD model shows significantly better performance with respect to baseline models. On the Ester2 dataset, without using any in-domain data, this model outperforms the WebRTC, phoneme recognizer based VAD (Phn Rec), and Pyannote baselines (respectively by 7.1, 1.7, and 2.7% absolute) in Detection Error Rate (DetER) metrics. Similarly, on the LiveATC dataset, this model outperforms the WebRTC, Phn Rec, and Pyannote baselines (respectively by 6.4, 10.0, and 3.7% absolutely) in DetER metrics.
summary: To better model the contextual information and increase the generalization ability of Speech Activity Detection (SAD) system, this paper leverages a multi-lingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system to perform SAD. Sequence discriminative training of Acoustic Model (AM) using Lattice-Free Maximum Mutual Information (LF-MMI) loss function, effectively extracts the contextual information of the input acoustic frame. Multi-lingual AM training, causes the robustness to noise and language variabilities. The index of maximum output posterior is considered as a frame-level speech/non-speech decision function. Majority voting and logistic regression are applied to fuse the language-dependent decisions. The multi-lingual ASR is trained on 18 languages of BABEL datasets and the built SAD is evaluated on 3 different languages. On out-of-domain datasets, the proposed SAD model shows significantly better performance with respect to baseline models. On the Ester2 dataset, without using any in-domain data, this model outperforms the WebRTC, phoneme recognizer based VAD (Phn Rec), and Pyannote baselines (respectively by 7.1, 1.7, and 2.7% absolute) in Detection Error Rate (DetER) metrics. Similarly, on the LiveATC dataset, this model outperforms the WebRTC, Phn Rec, and Pyannote baselines (respectively by 6.4, 10.0, and 3.7% absolutely) in DetER metrics.
abstract_zh: 为了更好地对上下文信息进行建模并提高语音活动检测（SAD）系统的泛化能力，本文利用多语言自动语音识别（ASR）系统来执行SAD。使用无格最大互信息（LF-MMI）损失函数对声学模型（AM）进行序列判别训练，有效提取输入声学帧的上下文信息。多语言 AM 训练，导致对噪声和语言变异的鲁棒性。最大输出后验指数被认为是帧级语音/非语音决策函数。应用多数投票和逻辑回归来融合依赖于语言的决策。多语言 ASR 在 18 种语言的 BABEL 数据集上进行训练，构建的 SAD 在 3 种不同的语言上进行评估。在域外数据集上，所提出的 SAD 模型相对于基线模型表现出明显更好的性能。在 Ester2 数据集上，在不使用任何域内数据的情况下，该模型在检测错误率 (DetER) 指标方面优于 WebRTC、基于音素识别器的 VAD (Phn Rec) 和 Pyannote 基线（分别高出 7.1%、1.7% 和 2.7% 绝对值）。同样，在 LiveATC 数据集上，该模型在 DetER 指标方面优于 WebRTC、Phn Rec 和 Pyannote 基线（绝对分别高出 6.4%、10.0 和 3.7%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多语言语音识别系统的语音活动检测（SAD）方法，通过利用多语言声学模型提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SAD系统在噪声和语言多样性下泛化能力不足，需提升跨语言和跨场景的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用LF-MMI损失函数训练多语言声学模型以提取上下文信息，结合最大后验概率进行帧级决策，并通过多数投票和逻辑回归融合多语言结果。
AI.result: 在Ester2和LiveATC数据集上，模型分别较基线提升7.1%/6.4（DetER），且无需领域数据即可超越WebRTC、Phn Rec和Pyannote等方法。
AI.conclusion: 多语言ASR框架显著提升SAD的跨语言和噪声鲁棒性，验证了上下文建模与多语言训练的有效性。

search_text: Speech Activity Detection Based on Multilingual Speech Recognition System 基于多语言语音识别系统的语音活动检测 To better model the contextual information and increase the generalization ability of Speech Activity Detection (SAD) system, this paper leverages a multi-lingual Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system to perform SAD. Sequence discriminative training of Acoustic Model (AM) using Lattice-Free Maximum Mutual Information (LF-MMI) loss function, effectively extracts the contextual information of the input acoustic frame. Multi-lingual AM training, causes the robustness to noise and language variabilities. The index of maximum output posterior is considered as a frame-level speech/non-speech decision function. Majority voting and logistic regression are applied to fuse the language-dependent decisions. The multi-lingual ASR is trained on 18 languages of BABEL datasets and the built SAD is evaluated on 3 different languages. On out-of-domain datasets, the proposed SAD model shows significantly better performance with respect to baseline models. On the Ester2 dataset, without using any in-domain data, this model outperforms the WebRTC, phoneme recognizer based VAD (Phn Rec), and Pyannote baselines (respectively by 7.1, 1.7, and 2.7% absolute) in Detection Error Rate (DetER) metrics. Similarly, on the LiveATC dataset, this model outperforms the WebRTC, Phn Rec, and Pyannote baselines (respectively by 6.4, 10.0, and 3.7% absolutely) in DetER metrics. 为了更好地对上下文信息进行建模并提高语音活动检测（SAD）系统的泛化能力，本文利用多语言自动语音识别（ASR）系统来执行SAD。使用无格最大互信息（LF-MMI）损失函数对声学模型（AM）进行序列判别训练，有效提取输入声学帧的上下文信息。多语言 AM 训练，导致对噪声和语言变异的鲁棒性。最大输出后验指数被认为是帧级语音/非语音决策函数。应用多数投票和逻辑回归来融合依赖于语言的决策。多语言 ASR 在 18 种语言的 BABEL 数据集上进行训练，构建的 SAD 在 3 种不同的语言上进行评估。在域外数据集上，所提出的 SAD 模型相对于基线模型表现出明显更好的性能。在 Ester2 数据集上，在不使用任何域内数据的情况下，该模型在检测错误率 (DetER) 指标方面优于 WebRTC、基于音素识别器的 VAD (Phn Rec) 和 Pyannote 基线（分别高出 7.1%、1.7% 和 2.7% 绝对值）。同样，在 LiveATC 数据集上，该模型在 DetER 指标方面优于 WebRTC、Phn Rec 和 Pyannote 基线（绝对分别高出 6.4%、10.0 和 3.7%）。 本文提出基于多语言语音识别系统的语音活动检测（SAD）方法，通过利用多语言声学模型提升检测性能。 Seyyed Saeed Sarfjoo,Srikanth Madikeri,Petr Motlicek cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Thien-Minh Nguyen,Shenghai Yuan,Muqing Cao,Yang Lyu,Thien Hoang Nguyen,Lihua Xie
title: VIRAL-Fusion: A Visual-Inertial-Ranging-Lidar Sensor Fusion Approach
title_zh: VIRAL-Fusion：视觉惯性测距激光雷达传感器融合方法
abstract: In recent years, Onboard Self Localization (OSL) methods based on cameras or Lidar have achieved many significant progresses. However, some issues such as estimation drift and feature-dependence still remain inherent limitations. On the other hand, infrastructure-based methods can generally overcome these issues, but at the expense of some installation cost. This poses an interesting problem of how to effectively combine these methods, so as to achieve localization with long-term consistency as well as flexibility compared to any single method. To this end, we propose a comprehensive optimization-based estimator for 15-dimensional state of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV), fusing data from an extensive set of sensors: inertial measurement units (IMUs), Ultra-Wideband (UWB) ranging sensors, and multiple onboard Visual-Inertial and Lidar odometry subsystems. In essence, a sliding window is used to formulate a sequence of robot poses, where relative rotational and translational constraints between these poses are observed in the IMU preintegration and OSL observations, while orientation and position are coupled in body-offset UWB range observations. An optimization-based approach is developed to estimate the trajectory of the robot in this sliding window. We evaluate the performance of the proposed scheme in multiple scenarios, including experiments on public datasets, high-fidelity graphical-physical simulator, and field-collected data from UAV flight tests. The result demonstrates that our integrated localization method can effectively resolve the drift issue, while incurring minimal installation requirements.
summary: In recent years, Onboard Self Localization (OSL) methods based on cameras or Lidar have achieved many significant progresses. However, some issues such as estimation drift and feature-dependence still remain inherent limitations. On the other hand, infrastructure-based methods can generally overcome these issues, but at the expense of some installation cost. This poses an interesting problem of how to effectively combine these methods, so as to achieve localization with long-term consistency as well as flexibility compared to any single method. To this end, we propose a comprehensive optimization-based estimator for 15-dimensional state of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV), fusing data from an extensive set of sensors: inertial measurement units (IMUs), Ultra-Wideband (UWB) ranging sensors, and multiple onboard Visual-Inertial and Lidar odometry subsystems. In essence, a sliding window is used to formulate a sequence of robot poses, where relative rotational and translational constraints between these poses are observed in the IMU preintegration and OSL observations, while orientation and position are coupled in body-offset UWB range observations. An optimization-based approach is developed to estimate the trajectory of the robot in this sliding window. We evaluate the performance of the proposed scheme in multiple scenarios, including experiments on public datasets, high-fidelity graphical-physical simulator, and field-collected data from UAV flight tests. The result demonstrates that our integrated localization method can effectively resolve the drift issue, while incurring minimal installation requirements.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于相机或激光雷达的机载自定位（OSL）方法取得了许多重大进展。然而，估计漂移和特征依赖性等一些问题仍然存在固有的局限性。另一方面，基于基础设施的方法通常可以克服这些问题，但代价是一些安装成本。这就提出了一个有趣的问题，即如何有效地组合这些方法，从而实现与任何单一方法相比具有长期一致性和灵活性的定位。为此，我们提出了一种基于优化的综合估计器，用于无人机 (UAV) 的 15 维状态，融合了来自大量传感器的数据：惯性测量单元 (IMU)、超宽带 (UWB) 测距传感器以及多个机载视觉惯性和激光雷达测距子系统。本质上，滑动窗口用于制定一系列机器人姿态，其中这些姿态之间的相对旋转和平移约束在 IMU 预积分和 OSL 观测中观察到，而方向和位置在身体偏移 UWB 范围观测中耦合。开发了一种基于优化的方法来估计机器人在此滑动窗口中的轨迹。我们评估了所提出方案在多种场景下的性能，包括公共数据集、高保真图形物理模拟器和无人机飞行测试现场收集的数据的实验。结果表明，我们的集成定位方法可以有效解决漂移问题，同时满足最低的安装要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合视觉、惯性、测距和激光雷达的传感器融合方法，用于无人机的高精度定位。
AI.motivation: 基于摄像头或激光雷达的自主定位方法存在估计漂移和特征依赖性问题，而基础设施方法虽能克服这些问题但需高昂安装成本，需寻找兼顾长期一致性和灵活性的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建15维无人机状态优化估计器，融合IMU、UWB测距传感器及多子系统数据，通过滑动窗口序列化机器人位姿，结合IMU预积分、OSL观测及UWB观测进行优化求解轨迹。
AI.result: 在公开数据集、高保真仿真及实地飞行测试中验证，方法有效解决漂移问题且安装需求最低。
AI.conclusion: 集成定位方法通过多传感器融合，在保证长期一致性的同时显著降低安装成本，为无人机定位提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Fabio Rodríguez,José-Miguel Díaz-Báñez,Ernesto Sanchez-Laulhe,Jesús Capitán,Aníbal Ollero
title: Kinodynamic Planning for an Energy-Efficient Autonomous Ornithopter
title_zh: 节能自主扑翼机的运动动力学规划
abstract: This paper presents a novel algorithm to plan energy-efficient trajectories for autonomous ornithopters. In general, trajectory optimization is quite a relevant problem for practical applications with \emph{Unmanned Aerial Vehicles} (UAVs). Even though the problem has been well studied for fixed and rotatory-wing vehicles, there are far fewer works exploring it for flapping-wing UAVs like ornithopters. These are of interest for many applications where long flight endurance, but also hovering capabilities are required. We propose an efficient approach to plan ornithopter trajectories that minimize energy consumption by combining gliding and flapping maneuvers. Our algorithm builds a tree of dynamically feasible trajectories and applies heuristic search for efficient online planning, using reference curves to guide the search and prune states. We present computational experiments to analyze and tune key parameters, as well as a comparison against a recent alternative probabilistic planning, showing best performance. Finally, we demonstrate how our algorithm can be used for planning perching maneuvers online.
summary: This paper presents a novel algorithm to plan energy-efficient trajectories for autonomous ornithopters. In general, trajectory optimization is quite a relevant problem for practical applications with \emph{Unmanned Aerial Vehicles} (UAVs). Even though the problem has been well studied for fixed and rotatory-wing vehicles, there are far fewer works exploring it for flapping-wing UAVs like ornithopters. These are of interest for many applications where long flight endurance, but also hovering capabilities are required. We propose an efficient approach to plan ornithopter trajectories that minimize energy consumption by combining gliding and flapping maneuvers. Our algorithm builds a tree of dynamically feasible trajectories and applies heuristic search for efficient online planning, using reference curves to guide the search and prune states. We present computational experiments to analyze and tune key parameters, as well as a comparison against a recent alternative probabilistic planning, showing best performance. Finally, we demonstrate how our algorithm can be used for planning perching maneuvers online.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的算法来规划自主扑翼机的节能轨迹。一般来说，轨迹优化对于无人机（UAV）的实际应用来说是一个非常相关的问题。尽管这个问题已经针对固定翼和旋翼飞行器进行了深入研究，但针对扑翼机等扑翼无人机探索该问题的工作却少之又少。这些对于许多需要长飞行耐力和悬停能力的应用都很感兴趣。我们提出了一种有效的方法来规划扑翼机轨迹，通过结合滑翔和扑动动作来最大限度地减少能量消耗。我们的算法构建动态可行轨迹树，并应用启发式搜索来实现高效的在线规划，使用参考曲线来指导搜索和修剪状态。我们提出了计算实验来分析和调整关键参数，并与最近的替代概率规划进行比较，显示出最佳性能。最后，我们演示了如何使用我们的算法在线规划栖息动作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自主扑翼飞行器的能量高效轨迹规划算法，结合滑翔与扑翼动作以优化能耗。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于固定翼和旋翼无人机的轨迹优化，而扑翼飞行器因具备长续航和悬停能力，在特定应用中需求迫切但研究较少。
AI.method: 构建动态可行轨迹树并采用启发式搜索，结合参考曲线引导搜索与状态剪枝，实现在线规划。
AI.result: 实验验证了参数调优的有效性，对比最新概率规划方法表现更优，并成功应用于在线抓握动作规划。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能有效平衡能耗与动态可行性，为扑翼飞行器复杂任务规划提供可行方案。

search_text: Kinodynamic Planning for an Energy-Efficient Autonomous Ornithopter 节能自主扑翼机的运动动力学规划 This paper presents a novel algorithm to plan energy-efficient trajectories for autonomous ornithopters. In general, trajectory optimization is quite a relevant problem for practical applications with \emph{Unmanned Aerial Vehicles} (UAVs). Even though the problem has been well studied for fixed and rotatory-wing vehicles, there are far fewer works exploring it for flapping-wing UAVs like ornithopters. These are of interest for many applications where long flight endurance, but also hovering capabilities are required. We propose an efficient approach to plan ornithopter trajectories that minimize energy consumption by combining gliding and flapping maneuvers. Our algorithm builds a tree of dynamically feasible trajectories and applies heuristic search for efficient online planning, using reference curves to guide the search and prune states. We present computational experiments to analyze and tune key parameters, as well as a comparison against a recent alternative probabilistic planning, showing best performance. Finally, we demonstrate how our algorithm can be used for planning perching maneuvers online. 本文提出了一种新的算法来规划自主扑翼机的节能轨迹。一般来说，轨迹优化对于无人机（UAV）的实际应用来说是一个非常相关的问题。尽管这个问题已经针对固定翼和旋翼飞行器进行了深入研究，但针对扑翼机等扑翼无人机探索该问题的工作却少之又少。这些对于许多需要长飞行耐力和悬停能力的应用都很感兴趣。我们提出了一种有效的方法来规划扑翼机轨迹，通过结合滑翔和扑动动作来最大限度地减少能量消耗。我们的算法构建动态可行轨迹树，并应用启发式搜索来实现高效的在线规划，使用参考曲线来指导搜索和修剪状态。我们提出了计算实验来分析和调整关键参数，并与最近的替代概率规划进行比较，显示出最佳性能。最后，我们演示了如何使用我们的算法在线规划栖息动作。 本文提出一种用于自主扑翼飞行器的能量高效轨迹规划算法，结合滑翔与扑翼动作以优化能耗。 Fabio Rodríguez,José-Miguel Díaz-Báñez,Ernesto Sanchez-Laulhe,Jesús Capitán,Aníbal Ollero cs.RO

authors_text: Xinsheng Wang,Siyuan Feng,Jihua Zhu,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson,Odette Scharenborg
title: Show and Speak: Directly Synthesize Spoken Description of Images
title_zh: Show and Speak：直接合成图像的语音描述
abstract: This paper proposes a new model, referred to as the show and speak (SAS) model that, for the first time, is able to directly synthesize spoken descriptions of images, bypassing the need for any text or phonemes. The basic structure of SAS is an encoder-decoder architecture that takes an image as input and predicts the spectrogram of speech that describes this image. The final speech audio is obtained from the predicted spectrogram via WaveNet. Extensive experiments on the public benchmark database Flickr8k demonstrate that the proposed SAS is able to synthesize natural spoken descriptions for images, indicating that synthesizing spoken descriptions for images while bypassing text and phonemes is feasible.
summary: This paper proposes a new model, referred to as the show and speak (SAS) model that, for the first time, is able to directly synthesize spoken descriptions of images, bypassing the need for any text or phonemes. The basic structure of SAS is an encoder-decoder architecture that takes an image as input and predicts the spectrogram of speech that describes this image. The final speech audio is obtained from the predicted spectrogram via WaveNet. Extensive experiments on the public benchmark database Flickr8k demonstrate that the proposed SAS is able to synthesize natural spoken descriptions for images, indicating that synthesizing spoken descriptions for images while bypassing text and phonemes is feasible.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新模型，称为“表演与说话”（SAS）模型，该模型首次能够直接合成图像的口头描述，而无需任何文本或音素。 SAS 的基本结构是一个编码器-解码器架构，它将图像作为输入并预测描述该图像的语音频谱图。最终的语音音频是通过 WaveNet 从预测的频谱图中获得的。在公共基准数据库 Flickr8k 上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的 SAS 能够合成图像的自然语音描述，这表明在绕过文本和音素的情况下合成图像的语音描述是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接合成图像语音描述的模型，无需经过文本或音素阶段。
AI.motivation: 传统图像描述生成需依赖文本中间表示，而本文旨在探索直接生成自然语音描述的可行性。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，输入图像直接预测语音频谱图，通过WaveNet生成最终音频。
AI.result: 在Flickr8k数据集上验证了模型能生成自然流畅的语音描述，证明直接合成方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 直接生成图像语音描述的技术路线是可行的，为多模态生成任务提供了新思路。

title: Model Interpretability through the Lens of Computational Complexity
title_zh: 从计算复杂性的角度看模型的可解释性
comment: 36 pages, including 9 pages of main text. This is the arXiv version of the NeurIPS'2020 paper. Except from minor differences that could be introduced by the publisher, the only difference should be the addition of the appendix, which contains all the proofs that do not appear in the main text
comments: 36 pages, including 9 pages of main text. This is the arXiv version of the NeurIPS'2020 paper. Except from minor differences that could be introduced by the publisher, the only difference should be the addition of the appendix, which contains all the proofs that do not appear in the main text
abstract: In spite of several claims stating that some models are more interpretable than others -- e.g., "linear models are more interpretable than deep neural networks" -- we still lack a principled notion of interpretability to formally compare among different classes of models. We make a step towards such a notion by studying whether folklore interpretability claims have a correlate in terms of computational complexity theory. We focus on local post-hoc explainability queries that, intuitively, attempt to answer why individual inputs are classified in a certain way by a given model. In a nutshell, we say that a class $\mathcal{C}_1$ of models is more interpretable than another class $\mathcal{C}_2$, if the computational complexity of answering post-hoc queries for models in $\mathcal{C}_2$ is higher than for those in $\mathcal{C}_1$. We prove that this notion provides a good theoretical counterpart to current beliefs on the interpretability of models; in particular, we show that under our definition and assuming standard complexity-theoretical assumptions (such as P$\neq$NP), both linear and tree-based models are strictly more interpretable than neural networks. Our complexity analysis, however, does not provide a clear-cut difference between linear and tree-based models, as we obtain different results depending on the particular post-hoc explanations considered. Finally, by applying a finer complexity analysis based on parameterized complexity, we are able to prove a theoretical result suggesting that shallow neural networks are more interpretable than deeper ones.
summary: In spite of several claims stating that some models are more interpretable than others -- e.g., "linear models are more interpretable than deep neural networks" -- we still lack a principled notion of interpretability to formally compare among different classes of models. We make a step towards such a notion by studying whether folklore interpretability claims have a correlate in terms of computational complexity theory. We focus on local post-hoc explainability queries that, intuitively, attempt to answer why individual inputs are classified in a certain way by a given model. In a nutshell, we say that a class $\mathcal{C}_1$ of models is more interpretable than another class $\mathcal{C}_2$, if the computational complexity of answering post-hoc queries for models in $\mathcal{C}_2$ is higher than for those in $\mathcal{C}_1$. We prove that this notion provides a good theoretical counterpart to current beliefs on the interpretability of models; in particular, we show that under our definition and assuming standard complexity-theoretical assumptions (such as P$\neq$NP), both linear and tree-based models are strictly more interpretable than neural networks. Our complexity analysis, however, does not provide a clear-cut difference between linear and tree-based models, as we obtain different results depending on the particular post-hoc explanations considered. Finally, by applying a finer complexity analysis based on parameterized complexity, we are able to prove a theoretical result suggesting that shallow neural networks are more interpretable than deeper ones.
abstract_zh: 尽管有一些说法声称某些模型比其他模型更容易解释——例如，“线性模型比深度神经网络更容易解释”——但我们仍然缺乏可解释性的原则概念来正式比较不同类别的模型。我们通过研究民间传说的可解释性主张是否与计算复杂性理论相关，朝着这一概念迈出了一步。我们专注于本地事后可解释性查询，直观地尝试回答为什么给定模型以某种方式对单个输入进行分类。简而言之，如果 $\mathcal{C}_2$ 中模型的事后查询的计算复杂度高于 $\mathcal{C}_1$ 中模型的计算复杂度，则模型的类 $\mathcal{C}_1$ 比另一类 $\mathcal{C}_2$ 更具可解释性。我们证明这个概念为当前关于模型可解释性的信念提供了一个很好的理论对应物；特别是，我们表明，根据我们的定义和假设标准复杂性理论假设（例如 P$\neq$NP），线性模型和基于树的模型都比神经网络更容易解释。然而，我们的复杂性分析并没有提供线性模型和基于树的模型之间的明确区别，因为我们根据所考虑的特定事后解释获得不同的结果。最后，通过应用基于参数化复杂性的更精细的复杂性分析，我们能够证明一个理论结果，表明浅层神经网络比深层神经网络更容易解释。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算复杂性理论建立模型可解释性的理论框架，比较不同模型类别的可解释性差异。
AI.motivation: 现有模型可解释性比较缺乏理论依据，需建立基于计算复杂性的原则性定义以支持正式比较。
AI.method: 将后验解释查询的计算复杂性作为可解释性度量标准，结合P≠NP等复杂性假设进行理论分析。
AI.result: 证明线性模型和树模型在标准假设下比神经网络更可解释，但两者间无明确差异；参数化复杂性分析显示浅层网络比深层网络更可解释。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为模型可解释性提供了理论依据，揭示了不同模型类别的复杂性差异，但需进一步细化解释维度。

search_text: Model Interpretability through the Lens of Computational Complexity 从计算复杂性的角度看模型的可解释性 In spite of several claims stating that some models are more interpretable than others -- e.g., "linear models are more interpretable than deep neural networks" -- we still lack a principled notion of interpretability to formally compare among different classes of models. We make a step towards such a notion by studying whether folklore interpretability claims have a correlate in terms of computational complexity theory. We focus on local post-hoc explainability queries that, intuitively, attempt to answer why individual inputs are classified in a certain way by a given model. In a nutshell, we say that a class $\mathcal{C}_1$ of models is more interpretable than another class $\mathcal{C}_2$, if the computational complexity of answering post-hoc queries for models in $\mathcal{C}_2$ is higher than for those in $\mathcal{C}_1$. We prove that this notion provides a good theoretical counterpart to current beliefs on the interpretability of models; in particular, we show that under our definition and assuming standard complexity-theoretical assumptions (such as P$\neq$NP), both linear and tree-based models are strictly more interpretable than neural networks. Our complexity analysis, however, does not provide a clear-cut difference between linear and tree-based models, as we obtain different results depending on the particular post-hoc explanations considered. Finally, by applying a finer complexity analysis based on parameterized complexity, we are able to prove a theoretical result suggesting that shallow neural networks are more interpretable than deeper ones. 尽管有一些说法声称某些模型比其他模型更容易解释——例如，“线性模型比深度神经网络更容易解释”——但我们仍然缺乏可解释性的原则概念来正式比较不同类别的模型。我们通过研究民间传说的可解释性主张是否与计算复杂性理论相关，朝着这一概念迈出了一步。我们专注于本地事后可解释性查询，直观地尝试回答为什么给定模型以某种方式对单个输入进行分类。简而言之，如果 $\mathcal{C}_2$ 中模型的事后查询的计算复杂度高于 $\mathcal{C}_1$ 中模型的计算复杂度，则模型的类 $\mathcal{C}_1$ 比另一类 $\mathcal{C}_2$ 更具可解释性。我们证明这个概念为当前关于模型可解释性的信念提供了一个很好的理论对应物；特别是，我们表明，根据我们的定义和假设标准复杂性理论假设（例如 P$\neq$NP），线性模型和基于树的模型都比神经网络更容易解释。然而，我们的复杂性分析并没有提供线性模型和基于树的模型之间的明确区别，因为我们根据所考虑的特定事后解释获得不同的结果。最后，通过应用基于参数化复杂性的更精细的复杂性分析，我们能够证明一个理论结果，表明浅层神经网络比深层神经网络更容易解释。 本文通过计算复杂性理论建立模型可解释性的理论框架，比较不同模型类别的可解释性差异。 Pablo Barceló,Mikaël Monet,Jorge Pérez,Bernardo Subercaseaux cs.AI,cs.CC,cs.LG

title: Population Gradients improve performance across data-sets and architectures in object classification
title_zh: 群体梯度提高了对象分类中数据集和架构的性能
abstract: The most successful methods such as ReLU transfer functions, batch normalization, Xavier initialization, dropout, learning rate decay, or dynamic optimizers, have become standards in the field due, particularly, to their ability to increase the performance of Neural Networks (NNs) significantly and in almost all situations. Here we present a new method to calculate the gradients while training NNs, and show that it significantly improves final performance across architectures, data-sets, hyper-parameter values, training length, and model sizes, including when it is being combined with other common performance-improving methods (such as the ones mentioned above). Besides being effective in the wide array situations that we have tested, the increase in performance (e.g. F1) it provides is as high or higher than this one of all the other widespread performance-improving methods that we have compared against. We call our method Population Gradients (PG), and it consists on using a population of NNs to calculate a non-local estimation of the gradient, which is closer to the theoretical exact gradient (i.e. this one obtainable only with an infinitely big data-set) of the error function than the empirical gradient (i.e. this one obtained with the real finite data-set).
summary: The most successful methods such as ReLU transfer functions, batch normalization, Xavier initialization, dropout, learning rate decay, or dynamic optimizers, have become standards in the field due, particularly, to their ability to increase the performance of Neural Networks (NNs) significantly and in almost all situations. Here we present a new method to calculate the gradients while training NNs, and show that it significantly improves final performance across architectures, data-sets, hyper-parameter values, training length, and model sizes, including when it is being combined with other common performance-improving methods (such as the ones mentioned above). Besides being effective in the wide array situations that we have tested, the increase in performance (e.g. F1) it provides is as high or higher than this one of all the other widespread performance-improving methods that we have compared against. We call our method Population Gradients (PG), and it consists on using a population of NNs to calculate a non-local estimation of the gradient, which is closer to the theoretical exact gradient (i.e. this one obtainable only with an infinitely big data-set) of the error function than the empirical gradient (i.e. this one obtained with the real finite data-set).
abstract_zh: 最成功的方法，如 ReLU 传递函数、批量归一化、Xavier 初始化、dropout、学习率衰减或动态优化器，已成为该领域的标准，特别是因为它们能够在几乎所有情况下显着提高神经网络 (NN) 的性能。在这里，我们提出了一种在训练神经网络时计算梯度的新方法，并表明它显着提高了架构、数据集、超参数值、训练长度和模型大小的最终性能，包括与其他常见的性能改进方法（例如上面提到的方法）结合使用时。除了在我们测试过的各种情况下有效之外，它提供的性能提升（例如 F1）与我们所比较的所有其他广泛的性能改进方法一样高或更高。我们将我们的方法称为群体梯度（PG），它包括使用一群神经网络来计算梯度的非局部估计，该估计比经验梯度（即使用实际有限数据集获得的梯度）更接近误差函数的理论精确梯度（即只能通过无限大的数据集获得）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Population Gradients（PG）的新方法，通过使用多个神经网络计算非局部梯度估计，以提升不同数据集和网络结构在目标分类任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法（如ReLU、批量归一化等）虽能显著提升性能，但仍有改进空间。作者旨在开发一种更接近理论精确梯度的计算方法，以进一步提升模型表现。
AI.method: 利用多个神经网络的群体计算非局部梯度估计，该方法基于理论梯度（需无限数据集）而非经验梯度（有限数据集），从而更准确地指导训练过程。
AI.result: PG方法在多种网络架构、数据集、超参数设置及模型规模下均显著提升性能（如F1分数），其效果优于或等于其他主流优化方法。
AI.conclusion: Population Gradients是一种通用且高效的优化方法，能够跨场景提升模型性能，可能成为未来神经网络训练的新标准。

title: Multi Scale Identity-Preserving Image-to-Image Translation Network for Low-Resolution Face Recognition
title_zh: 用于低分辨率人脸识别的多尺度身份保留图像到图像转换网络
comment: Accepted in the 35th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: Accepted in the 35th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: State-of-the-art deep neural network models have reached near perfect face recognition accuracy rates on controlled high-resolution face images. However, their performance is drastically degraded when they are tested with very low-resolution face images. This is particularly critical in surveillance systems, where a low-resolution probe image is to be matched with high-resolution gallery images. super-resolution techniques aim at producing high-resolution face images from low-resolution counterparts. While they are capable of reconstructing images that are visually appealing, the identity-related information is not preserved. Here, we propose an identity-preserving end-to-end image-to-image translation deep neural network which is capable of super-resolving very low-resolution faces to their high-resolution counterparts while preserving identity-related information. We achieved this by training a very deep convolutional encoder-decoder network with a symmetric contracting path between corresponding layers. This network was trained with a combination of a reconstruction and an identity-preserving loss, on multi-scale low-resolution conditions. Extensive quantitative evaluations of our proposed model demonstrated that it outperforms competing super-resolution and low-resolution face recognition methods on natural and artificial low-resolution face data sets and even unseen identities.
summary: State-of-the-art deep neural network models have reached near perfect face recognition accuracy rates on controlled high-resolution face images. However, their performance is drastically degraded when they are tested with very low-resolution face images. This is particularly critical in surveillance systems, where a low-resolution probe image is to be matched with high-resolution gallery images. super-resolution techniques aim at producing high-resolution face images from low-resolution counterparts. While they are capable of reconstructing images that are visually appealing, the identity-related information is not preserved. Here, we propose an identity-preserving end-to-end image-to-image translation deep neural network which is capable of super-resolving very low-resolution faces to their high-resolution counterparts while preserving identity-related information. We achieved this by training a very deep convolutional encoder-decoder network with a symmetric contracting path between corresponding layers. This network was trained with a combination of a reconstruction and an identity-preserving loss, on multi-scale low-resolution conditions. Extensive quantitative evaluations of our proposed model demonstrated that it outperforms competing super-resolution and low-resolution face recognition methods on natural and artificial low-resolution face data sets and even unseen identities.
abstract_zh: 最先进的深度神经网络模型在受控的高分辨率人脸图像上达到了近乎完美的人脸识别准确率。然而，当使用极低分辨率的人脸图像进行测试时，它们的性能会急剧下降。这在监控系统中尤其重要，因为在监控系统中，低分辨率探测图像需要与高分辨率图库图像相匹配。超分辨率技术旨在从低分辨率的人脸图像中生成高分辨率的人脸图像。虽然它们能够重建具有视觉吸引力的图像，但与身份相关的信息不会被保留。在这里，我们提出了一种保留身份的端到端图像到图像翻译深度神经网络，该网络能够将极低分辨率的人脸超分辨率为其高分辨率的对应人脸，同时保留身份相关信息。我们通过训练一个非常深的卷积编码器-解码器网络来实现这一目标，该网络在相应层之间具有对称的收缩路径。该网络在多尺度低分辨率条件下结合重建和身份保留损失进行了训练。对我们提出的模型进行的广泛定量评估表明，它在自然和人工低分辨率人脸数据集甚至看不见的身份上优于竞争的超分辨率和低分辨率人脸识别方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度身份保持的图像到图像翻译网络，用于从低分辨率人脸图像生成高分辨率图像并保持身份信息。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在高分辨率人脸图像上表现优异，但处理低分辨率图像时性能显著下降，尤其在安防系统中低分辨率探针图像与高分辨率库图像匹配时存在关键问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端卷积编码器-解码器网络，采用对称收缩路径结构，结合重建损失与身份保持损失进行多尺度低分辨率条件训练。
AI.result: 在自然和人工低分辨率数据集上，该模型在超分辨率和低分辨率人脸识别任务中均优于现有方法，且对未见身份具有泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的网络有效解决了低分辨率人脸识别中的身份信息丢失问题，为安防系统提供了更可靠的图像增强方案。
