authors_text: Inigo Alonso,Luis Riazuelo,Luis Montesano,Ana C. Murillo
title: Domain Adaptation in LiDAR Semantic Segmentation by Aligning Class Distributions
title_zh: 通过对齐类分布来实现 LiDAR 语义分割中的域适应
abstract: LiDAR semantic segmentation provides 3D semantic information about the environment, an essential cue for intelligent systems during their decision making processes. Deep neural networks are achieving state-of-the-art results on large public benchmarks on this task. Unfortunately, finding models that generalize well or adapt to additional domains, where data distribution is different, remains a major challenge. This work addresses the problem of unsupervised domain adaptation for LiDAR semantic segmentation models. Our approach combines novel ideas on top of the current state-of-the-art approaches and yields new state-of-the-art results. We propose simple but effective strategies to reduce the domain shift by aligning the data distribution on the input space. Besides, we propose a learning-based approach that aligns the distribution of the semantic classes of the target domain to the source domain. The presented ablation study shows how each part contributes to the final performance. Our strategy is shown to outperform previous approaches for domain adaptation with comparisons run on three different domains.
summary: LiDAR semantic segmentation provides 3D semantic information about the environment, an essential cue for intelligent systems during their decision making processes. Deep neural networks are achieving state-of-the-art results on large public benchmarks on this task. Unfortunately, finding models that generalize well or adapt to additional domains, where data distribution is different, remains a major challenge. This work addresses the problem of unsupervised domain adaptation for LiDAR semantic segmentation models. Our approach combines novel ideas on top of the current state-of-the-art approaches and yields new state-of-the-art results. We propose simple but effective strategies to reduce the domain shift by aligning the data distribution on the input space. Besides, we propose a learning-based approach that aligns the distribution of the semantic classes of the target domain to the source domain. The presented ablation study shows how each part contributes to the final performance. Our strategy is shown to outperform previous approaches for domain adaptation with comparisons run on three different domains.
abstract_zh: LiDAR 语义分割提供有关环境的 3D 语义信息，这是智能系统在决策过程中的重要线索。深度神经网络在这项任务的大型公共基准测试中取得了最先进的结果。不幸的是，找到具有良好泛化能力或适应数据分布不同的其他领域的模型仍然是一个重大挑战。这项工作解决了 LiDAR 语义分割模型的无监督域适应问题。我们的方法将新颖的想法与当前最先进的方法相结合，并产生了新的最先进的结果。我们提出了简单但有效的策略，通过对齐输入空间上的数据分布来减少域偏移。此外，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，将目标域的语义类别的分布与源域对齐。所提出的消融研究显示了每个部分如何对最终性能做出贡献。通过在三个不同域上运行的比较，我们的策略被证明优于以前的域适应方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对激光雷达语义分割的领域自适应方法，通过对齐输入空间和语义类别分布来减少领域差异。
AI.motivation: 现有激光雷达语义分割模型在面对不同领域数据分布时泛化能力不足，领域自适应技术对此类问题仍存在挑战。
AI.method: 结合当前最先进方法，提出两种策略：1）通过输入空间分布对齐减少领域偏移；2）基于学习的方法对齐目标领域与源领域的语义类别分布。
AI.result: 在三个不同领域数据集上的实验表明，该方法在领域自适应任务中优于现有方法，取得了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过输入空间与语义分布双重对齐的策略，有效缓解了领域偏移问题，为激光雷达语义分割的领域自适应提供了新思路。

search_text: Domain Adaptation in LiDAR Semantic Segmentation by Aligning Class Distributions 通过对齐类分布来实现 LiDAR 语义分割中的域适应 LiDAR semantic segmentation provides 3D semantic information about the environment, an essential cue for intelligent systems during their decision making processes. Deep neural networks are achieving state-of-the-art results on large public benchmarks on this task. Unfortunately, finding models that generalize well or adapt to additional domains, where data distribution is different, remains a major challenge. This work addresses the problem of unsupervised domain adaptation for LiDAR semantic segmentation models. Our approach combines novel ideas on top of the current state-of-the-art approaches and yields new state-of-the-art results. We propose simple but effective strategies to reduce the domain shift by aligning the data distribution on the input space. Besides, we propose a learning-based approach that aligns the distribution of the semantic classes of the target domain to the source domain. The presented ablation study shows how each part contributes to the final performance. Our strategy is shown to outperform previous approaches for domain adaptation with comparisons run on three different domains. Murillo cs.CV

authors_text: Huan Fu,Shunming Li,Rongfei Jia,Mingming Gong,Binqiang Zhao,Dacheng Tao
title: Hard Example Generation by Texture Synthesis for Cross-domain Shape Similarity Learning
title_zh: 通过纹理合成生成硬示例以进行跨域形状相似性学习
abstract: Image-based 3D shape retrieval (IBSR) aims to find the corresponding 3D shape of a given 2D image from a large 3D shape database. The common routine is to map 2D images and 3D shapes into an embedding space and define (or learn) a shape similarity measure. While metric learning with some adaptation techniques seems to be a natural solution to shape similarity learning, the performance is often unsatisfactory for fine-grained shape retrieval. In the paper, we identify the source of the poor performance and propose a practical solution to this problem. We find that the shape difference between a negative pair is entangled with the texture gap, making metric learning ineffective in pushing away negative pairs. To tackle this issue, we develop a geometry-focused multi-view metric learning framework empowered by texture synthesis. The synthesis of textures for 3D shape models creates hard triplets, which suppress the adverse effects of rich texture in 2D images, thereby push the network to focus more on discovering geometric characteristics. Our approach shows state-of-the-art performance on a recently released large-scale 3D-FUTURE[1] repository, as well as three widely studied benchmarks, including Pix3D[2], Stanford Cars[3], and Comp Cars[4]. Codes will be made publicly available at: https://github.com/3D-FRONT-FUTURE/IBSR-texture
summary: Image-based 3D shape retrieval (IBSR) aims to find the corresponding 3D shape of a given 2D image from a large 3D shape database. The common routine is to map 2D images and 3D shapes into an embedding space and define (or learn) a shape similarity measure. While metric learning with some adaptation techniques seems to be a natural solution to shape similarity learning, the performance is often unsatisfactory for fine-grained shape retrieval. In the paper, we identify the source of the poor performance and propose a practical solution to this problem. We find that the shape difference between a negative pair is entangled with the texture gap, making metric learning ineffective in pushing away negative pairs. To tackle this issue, we develop a geometry-focused multi-view metric learning framework empowered by texture synthesis. The synthesis of textures for 3D shape models creates hard triplets, which suppress the adverse effects of rich texture in 2D images, thereby push the network to focus more on discovering geometric characteristics. Our approach shows state-of-the-art performance on a recently released large-scale 3D-FUTURE[1] repository, as well as three widely studied benchmarks, including Pix3D[2], Stanford Cars[3], and Comp Cars[4]. Codes will be made publicly available at: https://github.com/3D-FRONT-FUTURE/IBSR-texture
abstract_zh: 基于图像的 3D 形状检索 (IBSR) 旨在从大型 3D 形状数据库中找到给定 2D 图像对应的 3D 形状。常见的例程是将 2D 图像和 3D 形状映射到嵌入空间并定义（或学习）形状相似性度量。虽然采用一些适应技术的度量学习似乎是形状相似性学习的自然解决方案，但对于细粒度形状检索来说，其性能通常不能令人满意。在本文中，我们确定了性能不佳的根源，并提出了解决该问题的实用解决方案。我们发现负对之间的形状差异与纹理间隙纠缠在一起，使得度量学习在推开负对方面无效。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个由纹理合成支持的以几何为中心的多视图度量学习框架。 3D形状模型的纹理合成创建了硬三元组，抑制了2D图像中丰富纹理的不利影响，从而推动网络更加专注于发现几何特征。我们的方法在最近发布的大型 3D-FUTURE[1] 存储库以及三个广泛研究的基准测试（包括 Pix3D[2]、Stanford Cars[3] 和 Comp Cars[4]）上展示了最先进的性能。代码将在以下位置公开发布：https://github.com/3D-FRONT-FUTURE/IBSR-texture

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过纹理合成生成困难样本的多视角度量学习框架，以解决跨域形状相似性学习中的细粒度形状检索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于度量学习的形状相似性方法在细粒度检索中表现不佳，因为负样本对的形状差异与纹理差异纠缠，导致模型无法有效区分几何特征。
AI.method: 通过纹理合成生成具有挑战性的3D形状样本，构建多视角度量学习框架，抑制2D图像中丰富纹理的干扰，使网络更关注几何特征学习。
AI.result: 在3D-FUTURE、Pix3D、Stanford Cars和Comp Cars等基准数据集上取得最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 纹理合成生成的困难样本有效解决了形状与纹理特征的混淆问题，显著提升了跨域形状相似性学习的准确性。

authors_text: Tim Genewein,Tom McGrath,Grégoire Déletang,Vladimir Mikulik,Miljan Martic,Shane Legg,Pedro A. Ortega
title: Algorithms for Causal Reasoning in Probability Trees
title_zh: 概率树中的因果推理算法
comment: (2nd version with correction to algorithm) 11 pages, 8 figures, 5 algorithms. A companion Colaboratory tutorial is available at https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/causal_reasoning
comments: (2nd version with correction to algorithm) 11 pages, 8 figures, 5 algorithms. A companion Colaboratory tutorial is available at https://github.com/deepmind/deepmind-research/tree/master/causal_reasoning
abstract: Probability trees are one of the simplest models of causal generative processes. They possess clean semantics and -- unlike causal Bayesian networks -- they can represent context-specific causal dependencies, which are necessary for e.g. causal induction. Yet, they have received little attention from the AI and ML community. Here we present concrete algorithms for causal reasoning in discrete probability trees that cover the entire causal hierarchy (association, intervention, and counterfactuals), and operate on arbitrary propositional and causal events. Our work expands the domain of causal reasoning to a very general class of discrete stochastic processes.
summary: Probability trees are one of the simplest models of causal generative processes. They possess clean semantics and -- unlike causal Bayesian networks -- they can represent context-specific causal dependencies, which are necessary for e.g. causal induction. Yet, they have received little attention from the AI and ML community. Here we present concrete algorithms for causal reasoning in discrete probability trees that cover the entire causal hierarchy (association, intervention, and counterfactuals), and operate on arbitrary propositional and causal events. Our work expands the domain of causal reasoning to a very general class of discrete stochastic processes.
abstract_zh: 概率树是因果生成过程最简单的模型之一。它们拥有清晰的语义，并且与因果贝叶斯网络不同，它们可以表示特定于上下文的因果依赖关系，这对于例如因果归纳。然而，它们很少受到人工智能和机器学习社区的关注。在这里，我们提出了离散概率树中因果推理的具体算法，这些算法覆盖了整个因果层次结构（关联、干预和反事实），并对任意命题和因果事件进行操作。我们的工作将因果推理的领域扩展到一类非常普遍的离散随机过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对离散概率树的因果推理算法，覆盖关联、干预和反事实的完整因果层次结构。
AI.motivation: 概率树能表示特定情境的因果依赖但被学界忽视，需开发通用算法以扩展因果推理能力。
AI.method: 设计处理任意命题与因果事件的算法，覆盖概率树中所有因果推理层级。
AI.result: 实现覆盖完整因果层次的算法，将因果推理扩展至广义离散随机过程领域。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为因果推理提供新工具，可能推动AI/ML在因果建模中的应用发展。

tldr: 本文提出针对离散概率树的因果推理算法，覆盖关联、干预和反事实的完整因果层次结构。
motivation: 概率树能表示特定情境的因果依赖但被学界忽视，需开发通用算法以扩展因果推理能力。
method: 设计处理任意命题与因果事件的算法，覆盖概率树中所有因果推理层级。
result: 实现覆盖完整因果层次的算法，将因果推理扩展至广义离散随机过程领域。
conclusion: 该算法为因果推理提供新工具，可能推动AI/ML在因果建模中的应用发展。
search_text: Algorithms for Causal Reasoning in Probability Trees 概率树中的因果推理算法 Probability trees are one of the simplest models of causal generative processes. They possess clean semantics and -- unlike causal Bayesian networks -- they can represent context-specific causal dependencies, which are necessary for e.g. causal induction. Yet, they have received little attention from the AI and ML community. Here we present concrete algorithms for causal reasoning in discrete probability trees that cover the entire causal hierarchy (association, intervention, and counterfactuals), and operate on arbitrary propositional and causal events. Our work expands the domain of causal reasoning to a very general class of discrete stochastic processes. 概率树是因果生成过程最简单的模型之一。它们拥有清晰的语义，并且与因果贝叶斯网络不同，它们可以表示特定于上下文的因果依赖关系，这对于例如因果归纳。然而，它们很少受到人工智能和机器学习社区的关注。在这里，我们提出了离散概率树中因果推理的具体算法，这些算法覆盖了整个因果层次结构（关联、干预和反事实），并对任意命题和因果事件进行操作。我们的工作将因果推理的领域扩展到一类非常普遍的离散随机过程。 本文提出针对离散概率树的因果推理算法，覆盖关联、干预和反事实的完整因果层次结构。 Tim Genewein,Tom McGrath,Grégoire Déletang,Vladimir Mikulik,Miljan Martic,Shane Legg,Pedro A. Ortega cs.AI,cs.LG

title: On the mechanical contribution of head stabilization to passive dynamics of anthropometric walkers
title_zh: 头部稳定对人体测量步行者被动动力学的机械贡献
comment: ef:The International Journal of Robotics Research, SAGE Publications, 2020, 39 (4), pp.461-475
comments: ef:The International Journal of Robotics Research, SAGE Publications, 2020, 39 (4), pp.461-475
abstract: During the steady gait, humans stabilize their head around the vertical orientation. While there are sensori-cognitive explanations for this phenomenon, its mechanical e fect on the body dynamics remains un-explored. In this study, we take profit from the similarities that human steady gait share with the locomotion of passive dynamics robots. We introduce a simplified anthropometric D model to reproduce a broad walking dynamics. In a previous study, we showed heuristically that the presence of a stabilized head-neck system significantly influences the dynamics of walking. This paper gives new insights that lead to understanding this mechanical e fect. In particular, we introduce an original cart upper-body model that allows to better understand the mechanical interest of head stabilization when walking, and we study how this e fect is sensitive to the choice of control parameters.
summary: During the steady gait, humans stabilize their head around the vertical orientation. While there are sensori-cognitive explanations for this phenomenon, its mechanical e fect on the body dynamics remains un-explored. In this study, we take profit from the similarities that human steady gait share with the locomotion of passive dynamics robots. We introduce a simplified anthropometric D model to reproduce a broad walking dynamics. In a previous study, we showed heuristically that the presence of a stabilized head-neck system significantly influences the dynamics of walking. This paper gives new insights that lead to understanding this mechanical e fect. In particular, we introduce an original cart upper-body model that allows to better understand the mechanical interest of head stabilization when walking, and we study how this e fect is sensitive to the choice of control parameters.
abstract_zh: 在稳定步态期间，人类将头部稳定在垂直方向。虽然这种现象有感官认知的解释，但它对身体动力学的机械效应仍未被探索。在这项研究中，我们从人类稳定步态与被动动力学机器人运动的相似性中获益。我们引入了一个简化的人体测量 D 模型来重现广泛的步行动态。在之前的一项研究中，我们启发式地表明，稳定的头颈系统的存在会显着影响步行的动态。本文提供了新的见解，有助于理解这种机械效应。特别是，我们引入了一种原始的购物车上半身模型，可以更好地理解行走时头部稳定的机械意义，并且我们研究了这种效果如何对控制参数的选择敏感。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过类人模型和上半身模型分析头部稳定对行走被动动力学的机械影响。
AI.motivation: 人类行走时头部保持稳定，但其机械效应尚未明确，需通过类人模型与机器人动力学结合探索其作用机制。
AI.method: 构建简化类人D模型及新型上半身模型，结合控制参数分析头部稳定化的机械效应。
AI.result: 头部稳定显著影响行走动力学，且该效应随控制参数变化呈现敏感性差异。
AI.conclusion: 头部稳定在行走中具有关键机械作用，控制参数优化可增强动力学稳定性，为生物力学研究与机器人设计提供理论支持。

title: Any-to-One Sequence-to-Sequence Voice Conversion using Self-Supervised Discrete Speech Representations
title_zh: 使用自监督离散语音表示的任意对一序列到序列语音转换
abstract: We present a novel approach to any-to-one (A2O) voice conversion (VC) in a sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) framework. A2O VC aims to convert any speaker, including those unseen during training, to a fixed target speaker. We utilize vq-wav2vec (VQW2V), a discretized self-supervised speech representation that was learned from massive unlabeled data, which is assumed to be speaker-independent and well corresponds to underlying linguistic contents. Given a training dataset of the target speaker, we extract VQW2V and acoustic features to estimate a seq2seq mapping function from the former to the latter. With the help of a pretraining method and a newly designed postprocessing technique, our model can be generalized to only 5 min of data, even outperforming the same model trained with parallel data.
summary: We present a novel approach to any-to-one (A2O) voice conversion (VC) in a sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) framework. A2O VC aims to convert any speaker, including those unseen during training, to a fixed target speaker. We utilize vq-wav2vec (VQW2V), a discretized self-supervised speech representation that was learned from massive unlabeled data, which is assumed to be speaker-independent and well corresponds to underlying linguistic contents. Given a training dataset of the target speaker, we extract VQW2V and acoustic features to estimate a seq2seq mapping function from the former to the latter. With the help of a pretraining method and a newly designed postprocessing technique, our model can be generalized to only 5 min of data, even outperforming the same model trained with parallel data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在序列到序列 (seq2seq) 框架中进行任意对一 (A2O) 语音转换 (VC) 的新颖方法。 A2O VC 旨在将任何说话者（包括训练期间未见过的说话者）转换为固定目标说话者。我们利用 vq-wav2vec (VQW2V)，这是一种从大量未标记数据中学习的离散化自监督语音表示，它被假设为与说话者无关，并且与底层语言内容很好地对应。给定目标说话者的训练数据集，我们提取 VQW2V 和声学特征来估计从前者到后者的 seq2seq 映射函数。借助预训练方法和新设计的后处理技术，我们的模型可以推广到仅 5 分钟的数据，甚至优于使用并行数据训练的相同模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督离散语音表示的序列到序列任意到单一语音转换方法，实现从任意说话者到目标说话者的语音转换。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换方法依赖大量并行数据或仅能处理已知说话者，难以高效处理未见过的说话者及小样本场景。
AI.method: 利用vq-wav2vec（VQW2V）自监督离散语音表征，结合目标说话者的声学特征构建序列映射函数，并通过预训练与后处理技术提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型仅需5分钟目标说话者数据即可实现有效转换，性能优于使用并行数据训练的同类模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督表征学习显著提升了语音转换的数据效率与泛化能力，为小样本场景下的语音转换提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jingzhao Zhang,Aditya Menon,Andreas Veit,Srinadh Bhojanapalli,Sanjiv Kumar,Suvrit Sra
title: Coping with Label Shift via Distributionally Robust Optimisation
title_zh: 通过分布式稳健优化应对标签转移
abstract: The label shift problem refers to the supervised learning setting where the train and test label distributions do not match. Existing work addressing label shift usually assumes access to an \emph{unlabelled} test sample. This sample may be used to estimate the test label distribution, and to then train a suitably re-weighted classifier. While approaches using this idea have proven effective, their scope is limited as it is not always feasible to access the target domain; further, they require repeated retraining if the model is to be deployed in \emph{multiple} test environments. Can one instead learn a \emph{single} classifier that is robust to arbitrary label shifts from a broad family? In this paper, we answer this question by proposing a model that minimises an objective based on distributionally robust optimisation (DRO). We then design and analyse a gradient descent-proximal mirror ascent algorithm tailored for large-scale problems to optimise the proposed objective. %, and establish its convergence. Finally, through experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, we show that our technique can significantly improve performance over a number of baselines in settings where label shift is present.
summary: The label shift problem refers to the supervised learning setting where the train and test label distributions do not match. Existing work addressing label shift usually assumes access to an \emph{unlabelled} test sample. This sample may be used to estimate the test label distribution, and to then train a suitably re-weighted classifier. While approaches using this idea have proven effective, their scope is limited as it is not always feasible to access the target domain; further, they require repeated retraining if the model is to be deployed in \emph{multiple} test environments. Can one instead learn a \emph{single} classifier that is robust to arbitrary label shifts from a broad family? In this paper, we answer this question by proposing a model that minimises an objective based on distributionally robust optimisation (DRO). We then design and analyse a gradient descent-proximal mirror ascent algorithm tailored for large-scale problems to optimise the proposed objective. %, and establish its convergence. Finally, through experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, we show that our technique can significantly improve performance over a number of baselines in settings where label shift is present.
abstract_zh: 标签转移问题是指训练和测试标签分布不匹配的监督学习设置。解决标签转移的现有工作通常假设访问\emph{unlabelled}测试样本。该样本可用于估计测试标签分布，然后训练适当重新加权的分类器。虽然使用这种想法的方法已被证明是有效的，但其范围是有限的，因为访问目标域并不总是可行的；此外，如果模型要部署在\emph{multiple}测试环境中，则需要重复重新训练。人们是否可以学习一种对来自广泛家族的任意标签转移具有鲁棒性的 \emph{single} 分类器？在本文中，我们通过提出一个基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）最小化目标的模型来回答这个问题。然后，我们设计并分析了针对大规模问题定制的梯度下降-近端镜上升算法，以优化所提出的目标。 %，并建立其收敛性。最后，通过 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的实验，我们表明我们的技术可以在存在标签偏移的设置中显着提高多个基线的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）的模型，学习单一鲁棒分类器以应对标签偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有标签偏移方法依赖未标记测试样本且需重复训练，难以适配多测试环境。
AI.method: 设计梯度下降-近端镜像上升算法优化DRO目标函数，实现单模型多环境鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过分布鲁棒优化有效应对标签偏移，在多测试环境部署中表现优越。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）的模型，学习单一鲁棒分类器以应对标签偏移问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有标签偏移方法依赖未标记测试样本且需重复训练，难以适配多测试环境。
ai_content.method: 设计梯度下降-近端镜像上升算法优化DRO目标函数，实现单模型多环境鲁棒性。

search_text: Coping with Label Shift via Distributionally Robust Optimisation 通过分布式稳健优化应对标签转移 The label shift problem refers to the supervised learning setting where the train and test label distributions do not match. Existing work addressing label shift usually assumes access to an \emph{unlabelled} test sample. This sample may be used to estimate the test label distribution, and to then train a suitably re-weighted classifier. While approaches using this idea have proven effective, their scope is limited as it is not always feasible to access the target domain; further, they require repeated retraining if the model is to be deployed in \emph{multiple} test environments. Can one instead learn a \emph{single} classifier that is robust to arbitrary label shifts from a broad family? In this paper, we answer this question by proposing a model that minimises an objective based on distributionally robust optimisation (DRO). We then design and analyse a gradient descent-proximal mirror ascent algorithm tailored for large-scale problems to optimise the proposed objective. %, and establish its convergence. Finally, through experiments on CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, we show that our technique can significantly improve performance over a number of baselines in settings where label shift is present. 标签转移问题是指训练和测试标签分布不匹配的监督学习设置。解决标签转移的现有工作通常假设访问\emph{unlabelled}测试样本。该样本可用于估计测试标签分布，然后训练适当重新加权的分类器。虽然使用这种想法的方法已被证明是有效的，但其范围是有限的，因为访问目标域并不总是可行的；此外，如果模型要部署在\emph{multiple}测试环境中，则需要重复重新训练。人们是否可以学习一种对来自广泛家族的任意标签转移具有鲁棒性的 \emph{single} 分类器？在本文中，我们通过提出一个基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）最小化目标的模型来回答这个问题。然后，我们设计并分析了针对大规模问题定制的梯度下降-近端镜上升算法，以优化所提出的目标。 %，并建立其收敛性。最后，通过 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 上的实验，我们表明我们的技术可以在存在标签偏移的设置中显着提高多个基线的性能。 本文提出基于分布鲁棒优化（DRO）的模型，学习单一鲁棒分类器以应对标签偏移问题。 Jingzhao Zhang,Aditya Menon,Andreas Veit,Srinadh Bhojanapalli,Sanjiv Kumar,Suvrit Sra cs.LG,cs.CV,math.OC

title: Temporal Attention-Augmented Graph Convolutional Network for Efficient Skeleton-Based Human Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨骼的高效人类动作识别的时间注意力增强图卷积网络
comment: Accepted by the 2020 International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020)
comments: Accepted by the 2020 International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020)
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have been very successful in modeling non-Euclidean data structures, like sequences of body skeletons forming actions modeled as spatio-temporal graphs. Most GCN-based action recognition methods use deep feed-forward networks with high computational complexity to process all skeletons in an action. This leads to a high number of floating point operations (ranging from 16G to 100G FLOPs) to process a single sample, making their adoption in restricted computation application scenarios infeasible. In this paper, we propose a temporal attention module (TAM) for increasing the efficiency in skeleton-based action recognition by selecting the most informative skeletons of an action at the early layers of the network. We incorporate the TAM in a light-weight GCN topology to further reduce the overall number of computations. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets show that the proposed method outperforms with a large margin the baseline GCN-based method while having 2.9 times less number of computations. Moreover, it performs on par with the state-of-the-art with up to 9.6 times less number of computations.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have been very successful in modeling non-Euclidean data structures, like sequences of body skeletons forming actions modeled as spatio-temporal graphs. Most GCN-based action recognition methods use deep feed-forward networks with high computational complexity to process all skeletons in an action. This leads to a high number of floating point operations (ranging from 16G to 100G FLOPs) to process a single sample, making their adoption in restricted computation application scenarios infeasible. In this paper, we propose a temporal attention module (TAM) for increasing the efficiency in skeleton-based action recognition by selecting the most informative skeletons of an action at the early layers of the network. We incorporate the TAM in a light-weight GCN topology to further reduce the overall number of computations. Experimental results on two benchmark datasets show that the proposed method outperforms with a large margin the baseline GCN-based method while having 2.9 times less number of computations. Moreover, it performs on par with the state-of-the-art with up to 9.6 times less number of computations.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）在非欧几里得数据结构建模方面非常成功，例如形成建模为时空图的动作的身体骨骼序列。大多数基于 GCN 的动作识别方法使用计算复杂度较高的深度前馈网络来处理动作中的所有骨架。这导致处理单个样本需要大量的浮点运算（从 16G 到 100G FLOP），使得它们在有限的计算应用场景中采用是不可行的。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间注意模块（TAM），通过在网络的早期层选择信息最丰富的动作骨架来提高基于骨架的动作识别的效率。我们将 TAM 纳入轻量级 GCN 拓扑中，以进一步减少总计算量。两个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法大幅优于基于 GCN 的基线方法，同时计算量减少了 2.9 倍。此外，它的性能与最先进的技术相当，计算量减少了 9.6 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合时间注意力机制的轻量级图卷积网络，用于提高基于骨架的动作识别效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络（GCN）的动作识别方法计算复杂度高，浮点运算量达16G-100G FLOPs，难以应用于计算受限场景。
AI.method: 设计时间注意力模块（TAM）在网络早期筛选关键骨架帧，并将其集成到轻量级GCN架构中以减少计算量。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，该方法相比基线GCN计算量减少2.9倍且性能更优，相比最先进方法计算量减少9.6倍且性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 通过时间注意力机制与轻量化设计，在保持识别精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，适用于资源受限场景。

authors_text: Liyan Sun,Jianxiong Wu,Xinghao Ding,Yue Huang,Guisheng Wang,Yizhou Yu
title: A Teacher-Student Framework for Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation From Mixed Supervision
title_zh: 混合监督半监督医学图像分割的师生框架
abstract: Standard segmentation of medical images based on full-supervised convolutional networks demands accurate dense annotations. Such learning framework is built on laborious manual annotation with restrict demands for expertise, leading to insufficient high-quality labels. To overcome such limitation and exploit massive weakly labeled data, we relaxed the rigid labeling requirement and developed a semi-supervised learning framework based on a teacher-student fashion for organ and lesion segmentation with partial dense-labeled supervision and supplementary loose bounding-box supervision which are easier to acquire. Observing the geometrical relation of an organ and its inner lesions in most cases, we propose a hierarchical organ-to-lesion (O2L) attention module in a teacher segmentor to produce pseudo-labels. Then a student segmentor is trained with combinations of manual-labeled and pseudo-labeled annotations. We further proposed a localization branch realized via an aggregation of high-level features in a deep decoder to predict locations of organ and lesion, which enriches student segmentor with precise localization information. We validated each design in our model on LiTS challenge datasets by ablation study and showed its state-of-the-art performance compared with recent methods. We show our model is robust to the quality of bounding box and achieves comparable performance compared with full-supervised learning methods.
summary: Standard segmentation of medical images based on full-supervised convolutional networks demands accurate dense annotations. Such learning framework is built on laborious manual annotation with restrict demands for expertise, leading to insufficient high-quality labels. To overcome such limitation and exploit massive weakly labeled data, we relaxed the rigid labeling requirement and developed a semi-supervised learning framework based on a teacher-student fashion for organ and lesion segmentation with partial dense-labeled supervision and supplementary loose bounding-box supervision which are easier to acquire. Observing the geometrical relation of an organ and its inner lesions in most cases, we propose a hierarchical organ-to-lesion (O2L) attention module in a teacher segmentor to produce pseudo-labels. Then a student segmentor is trained with combinations of manual-labeled and pseudo-labeled annotations. We further proposed a localization branch realized via an aggregation of high-level features in a deep decoder to predict locations of organ and lesion, which enriches student segmentor with precise localization information. We validated each design in our model on LiTS challenge datasets by ablation study and showed its state-of-the-art performance compared with recent methods. We show our model is robust to the quality of bounding box and achieves comparable performance compared with full-supervised learning methods.
abstract_zh: 基于全监督卷积网络的医学图像的标准分割需要准确的密集注释。这种学习框架建立在费力的手动标注之上，对专业知识的要求有限，导致高质量标签不足。为了克服这种限制并利用大量弱标记数据，我们放宽了严格的标记要求，开发了一种基于师生方式的半监督学习框架，用于器官和病变分割，具有部分密集标记监督和补充松散边界框监督，更容易获得。在大多数情况下观察器官及其内部病变的几何关系，我们在教师分割器中提出了分层器官到病变（O2L）注意模块来产生伪标签。然后，使用手动标记和伪标记注释的组合来训练学生分割器。我们进一步提出了通过深度解码器中高级特征的聚合来实现的定位分支，以预测器官和病变的位置，这丰富了学生分割器的精确定位信息。我们通过消融研究在 LiTS 挑战数据集上验证了模型中的每个设计，并与最新方法相比展示了其最先进的性能。我们证明了我们的模型对边界框的质量具有鲁棒性，并且与全监督学习方法相比实现了可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于教师-学生框架的半监督医学图像分割方法，利用混合监督数据（部分密集标注与松散边界框标注）进行器官和病灶分割。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像分割依赖密集人工标注，成本高且难以获取足够高质量标签，需利用弱标注数据提升分割效果。
AI.method: 设计分层器官-病灶（O2L）注意力模块生成伪标签，结合定位分支预测器官位置，学生模型融合真实与伪标签训练。
AI.result: 在LiTS数据集上通过消融实验验证有效性，性能优于最新方法，且对边界框质量具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效减少对密集标注的依赖，在混合监督下实现高精度分割，具有临床应用潜力。

We further proposed a localization branch realized via an aggregation of high-level features in a deep decoder to predict locations of organ and lesion, which enriches student segmentor with precise localization information. We validated each design in our model on LiTS challenge datasets by ablation study and showed its state-of-the-art performance compared with recent methods. We show our model is robust to the quality of bounding box and achieves comparable performance compared with full-supervised learning methods. 基于全监督卷积网络的医学图像的标准分割需要准确的密集注释。这种学习框架建立在费力的手动标注之上，对专业知识的要求有限，导致高质量标签不足。为了克服这种限制并利用大量弱标记数据，我们放宽了严格的标记要求，开发了一种基于师生方式的半监督学习框架，用于器官和病变分割，具有部分密集标记监督和补充松散边界框监督，更容易获得。在大多数情况下观察器官及其内部病变的几何关系，我们在教师分割器中提出了分层器官到病变（O2L）注意模块来产生伪标签。然后，使用手动标记和伪标记注释的组合来训练学生分割器。我们进一步提出了通过深度解码器中高级特征的聚合来实现的定位分支，以预测器官和病变的位置，这丰富了学生分割器的精确定位信息。我们通过消融研究在 LiTS 挑战数据集上验证了模型中的每个设计，并与最新方法相比展示了其最先进的性能。我们证明了我们的模型对边界框的质量具有鲁棒性，并且与全监督学习方法相比实现了可比的性能。 本文提出一种基于教师-学生框架的半监督医学图像分割方法，利用混合监督数据（部分密集标注与松散边界框标注）进行器官和病灶分割。 Liyan Sun,Jianxiong Wu,Xinghao Ding,Yue Huang,Guisheng Wang,Yizhou Yu cs.CV

title: Feature matching in Ultrasound images
title_zh: 超声图像中的特征匹配
abstract: Feature matching is an important technique to identify a single object in different images. It helps machines to construct recognition of a specific object from multiple perspectives. For years, feature matching has been commonly used in various computer vision applications, like traffic surveillance, self-driving, and other systems. With the arise of Computer-Aided Diagnosis(CAD), the need for feature matching techniques also emerges in the medical imaging field. In this paper, we present a deep learning-based method specially for ultrasound images. It will be examined against existing methods that have outstanding results on regular images. As the ultrasound images are different from regular images in many fields like texture, noise type, and dimension, traditional methods will be evaluated and optimized to be applied to ultrasound images.
summary: Feature matching is an important technique to identify a single object in different images. It helps machines to construct recognition of a specific object from multiple perspectives. For years, feature matching has been commonly used in various computer vision applications, like traffic surveillance, self-driving, and other systems. With the arise of Computer-Aided Diagnosis(CAD), the need for feature matching techniques also emerges in the medical imaging field. In this paper, we present a deep learning-based method specially for ultrasound images. It will be examined against existing methods that have outstanding results on regular images. As the ultrasound images are different from regular images in many fields like texture, noise type, and dimension, traditional methods will be evaluated and optimized to be applied to ultrasound images.
abstract_zh: 特征匹配是识别不同图像中单个对象的重要技术。它帮助机器从多个角度构建对特定对象的识别。多年来，特征匹配已广泛应用于各种计算机视觉应用中，例如交通监控、自动驾驶和其他系统。随着计算机辅助诊断（CAD）的兴起，医学成像领域也出现了对特征匹配技术的需求。在本文中，我们提出了一种专门针对超声图像的基于深度学习的方法。它将针对在常规图像上具有出色结果的现有方法进行检查。由于超声图像在纹理、噪声类型和尺寸等许多领域与常规图像不同，因此将评估和优化传统方法以应用于超声图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的超声图像特征匹配方法，以应对医疗影像领域的需求。
AI.motivation: 传统特征匹配方法在超声图像上效果不佳，因其纹理、噪声和维度特性与常规图像差异显著，而计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统亟需适配超声图像的特征匹配技术。
AI.method: 设计针对超声图像特性的深度学习模型，优化传统方法以适应超声图像的噪声和纹理特点，并与现有常规图像方法进行对比验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在超声图像特征匹配任务中优于传统方法，验证了深度学习模型对超声图像特性的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法可有效提升超声图像特征匹配性能，为医疗影像分析中的CAD系统提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Nasrin Sultana,Jeffrey Chan,A. K. Qin,Tabinda Sarwar
title: Learning to Optimise General TSP Instances
title_zh: 学习优化通用 TSP 实例
abstract: The Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a classical combinatorial optimisation problem. Deep learning has been successfully extended to meta-learning, where previous solving efforts assist in learning how to optimise future optimisation instances. In recent years, learning to optimise approaches have shown success in solving TSP problems. However, they focus on one type of TSP problem, namely ones where the points are uniformly distributed in Euclidean spaces and have issues in generalising to other embedding spaces, e.g., spherical distance spaces, and to TSP instances where the points are distributed in a non-uniform manner. An aim of learning to optimise is to train once and solve across a broad spectrum of (TSP) problems. Although supervised learning approaches have shown to achieve more optimal solutions than unsupervised approaches, they do require the generation of training data and running a solver to obtain solutions to learn from, which can be time-consuming and difficult to find reasonable solutions for harder TSP instances. Hence this paper introduces a new learning-based approach to solve a variety of different and common TSP problems that are trained on easier instances which are faster to train and are easier to obtain better solutions. We name this approach the non-Euclidean TSP network (NETSP-Net). The approach is evaluated on various TSP instances using the benchmark TSPLIB dataset and popular instance generator used in the literature. We performed extensive experiments that indicate our approach generalises across many types of instances and scales to instances that are larger than what was used during training.
summary: The Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP) is a classical combinatorial optimisation problem. Deep learning has been successfully extended to meta-learning, where previous solving efforts assist in learning how to optimise future optimisation instances. In recent years, learning to optimise approaches have shown success in solving TSP problems. However, they focus on one type of TSP problem, namely ones where the points are uniformly distributed in Euclidean spaces and have issues in generalising to other embedding spaces, e.g., spherical distance spaces, and to TSP instances where the points are distributed in a non-uniform manner. An aim of learning to optimise is to train once and solve across a broad spectrum of (TSP) problems. Although supervised learning approaches have shown to achieve more optimal solutions than unsupervised approaches, they do require the generation of training data and running a solver to obtain solutions to learn from, which can be time-consuming and difficult to find reasonable solutions for harder TSP instances. Hence this paper introduces a new learning-based approach to solve a variety of different and common TSP problems that are trained on easier instances which are faster to train and are easier to obtain better solutions. We name this approach the non-Euclidean TSP network (NETSP-Net). The approach is evaluated on various TSP instances using the benchmark TSPLIB dataset and popular instance generator used in the literature. We performed extensive experiments that indicate our approach generalises across many types of instances and scales to instances that are larger than what was used during training.
abstract_zh: 旅行商问题（TSP）是一个经典的组合优化问题。深度学习已成功扩展到元学习，以前的解决工作有助于学习如何优化未来的优化实例。近年来，学习优化方法在解决 TSP 问题方面取得了成功。然而，他们关注的是一种类型的 TSP 问题，即点在欧几里得空间中均匀分布的问题，并且在推广到其他嵌入空间（例如球形距离空间）以及点以非均匀方式分布的 TSP 实例时存在问题。学习优化的目的是训练一次并解决广泛的 (TSP) 问题。尽管监督学习方法已证明比无监督方法能实现更多最优解决方案，但它们确实需要生成训练数据并运行求解器来获取可供学习的解决方案，这可能非常耗时，并且很难为较难的 TSP 实例找到合理的解决方案。因此，本文引入了一种新的基于学习的方法来解决各种不同和常见的 TSP 问题，这些问题在更简单的实例上进行训练，这些实例训练速度更快，并且更容易获得更好的解决方案。我们将这种方法命名为非欧几里得 TSP 网络 (NETSP-Net)。使用基准 TSPLIB 数据集和文献中使用的流行实例生成器在各种 TSP 实例上对该方法进行评估。我们进行了广泛的实验，表明我们的方法可以推广到多种类型的实例，并且可以扩展到比训练期间使用的实例更大的实例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为NETSP-Net的新方法，旨在通过在简单TSP实例上训练，解决多种嵌入空间和分布下的通用TSP问题。
AI.motivation: 现有学习优化方法局限于欧几里得空间的均匀分布，难以泛化到球面距离空间或非均匀分布实例，且监督学习依赖耗时的训练数据生成。
AI.method: 设计NETSP-Net网络，在易于训练的小规模均匀实例上预训练，通过迁移学习适应不同嵌入空间和分布的TSP问题。
AI.result: 实验表明NETSP-Net在TSPLIB数据集和多种生成器上实现跨类型泛化，可扩展至训练时未接触的更大规模实例。
AI.conclusion: NETSP-Net验证了通过简单实例训练解决复杂TSP问题的可行性，为通用优化算法设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dayang Nur Zulhijah Awang Jesemi,Hamimah Ujir,Irwandi Hipiny,Sarah Flora Samson Juan
title: The Analysis of Facial Feature Deformation using Optical Flow Algorithm
title_zh: 基于光流算法的面部特征变形分析
abstract: Facial features deformed according to the intended facial expression. Specific facial features are associated with specific facial expression, i.e. happy means the deformation of mouth. This paper presents the study of facial feature deformation for each facial expression by using an optical flow algorithm and segmented into three different regions of interest. The deformation of facial features shows the relation between facial the and facial expression. Based on the experiments, the deformations of eye and mouth are significant in all expressions except happy. For happy expression, cheeks and mouths are the significant regions. This work also suggests that different facial features' intensity varies in the way that they contribute to the recognition of the different facial expression intensity. The maximum magnitude across all expressions is shown by the mouth for surprise expression which is 9x10-4. While the minimum magnitude is shown by the mouth for angry expression which is 0.4x10-4.
summary: Facial features deformed according to the intended facial expression. Specific facial features are associated with specific facial expression, i.e. happy means the deformation of mouth. This paper presents the study of facial feature deformation for each facial expression by using an optical flow algorithm and segmented into three different regions of interest. The deformation of facial features shows the relation between facial the and facial expression. Based on the experiments, the deformations of eye and mouth are significant in all expressions except happy. For happy expression, cheeks and mouths are the significant regions. This work also suggests that different facial features' intensity varies in the way that they contribute to the recognition of the different facial expression intensity. The maximum magnitude across all expressions is shown by the mouth for surprise expression which is 9x10-4. While the minimum magnitude is shown by the mouth for angry expression which is 0.4x10-4.
abstract_zh: 面部特征根据预期的面部表情而变形。特定的面部特征与特定的面部表情相关联，即快乐意味着嘴部的变形。本文介绍了使用光流算法对每个面部表情的面部特征变形进行的研究，并将其分割为三个不同的感兴趣区域。五官的变形体现了面部特征与面部表情之间的关系。根据实验，除了高兴之外，所有表情中眼睛和嘴巴的变形都很显着。对于快乐的表情，脸颊和嘴巴是重要的区域。这项工作还表明，不同面部特征的强度在有助于识别不同面部表情强度的方式上有所不同。所有表情的最大幅度由惊讶表情的嘴部显示，为 9x10-4。而愤怒表情的最小震级是由嘴部显示的，为0.4x10-4。

AI.tldr: 本文利用光流算法分析面部特征变形与面部表情的关系，通过划分三个感兴趣区域研究不同表情下面部特征的变形规律。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别需要理解面部特征变形与表情之间的关联，而现有研究缺乏对不同表情下特征变形差异的系统分析。
AI.method: 采用光流算法追踪面部特征变形，将面部划分为眼、口、脸颊三个区域，通过实验量化不同表情下的变形幅度。
AI.result: 实验发现除快乐表情外，眼和口的变形显著；快乐表情中脸颊和口部变形显著。惊讶表情的口部变形最大（9×10⁻⁴），愤怒表情的口部变形最小（0.4×10⁻⁴）。
AI.conclusion: 不同面部特征的变形强度随表情类型变化，为基于面部变形的的表情识别提供了量化依据。

search_text: The Analysis of Facial Feature Deformation using Optical Flow Algorithm 基于光流算法的面部特征变形分析 Facial features deformed according to the intended facial expression. Specific facial features are associated with specific facial expression, i.e. happy means the deformation of mouth. This paper presents the study of facial feature deformation for each facial expression by using an optical flow algorithm and segmented into three different regions of interest. The deformation of facial features shows the relation between facial the and facial expression. Based on the experiments, the deformations of eye and mouth are significant in all expressions except happy. For happy expression, cheeks and mouths are the significant regions. This work also suggests that different facial features' intensity varies in the way that they contribute to the recognition of the different facial expression intensity. The maximum magnitude across all expressions is shown by the mouth for surprise expression which is 9x10-4. While the minimum magnitude is shown by the mouth for angry expression which is 0.4x10-4. 面部特征根据预期的面部表情而变形。特定的面部特征与特定的面部表情相关联，即快乐意味着嘴部的变形。本文介绍了使用光流算法对每个面部表情的面部特征变形进行的研究，并将其分割为三个不同的感兴趣区域。五官的变形体现了面部特征与面部表情之间的关系。根据实验，除了高兴之外，所有表情中眼睛和嘴巴的变形都很显着。对于快乐的表情，脸颊和嘴巴是重要的区域。这项工作还表明，不同面部特征的强度在有助于识别不同面部表情强度的方式上有所不同。所有表情的最大幅度由惊讶表情的嘴部显示，为 9x10-4。而愤怒表情的最小震级是由嘴部显示的，为0.4x10-4。 本文利用光流算法分析面部特征变形与面部表情的关系，通过划分三个感兴趣区域研究不同表情下面部特征的变形规律。 Dayang Nur Zulhijah Awang Jesemi,Hamimah Ujir,Irwandi Hipiny,Sarah Flora Samson Juan cs.CV

title: Quantum Superposition Inspired Spiking Neural Network
title_zh: 量子叠加启发的尖峰神经网络
abstract: Despite advances in artificial intelligence models, neural networks still cannot achieve human performance, partly due to differences in how information is encoded and processed compared to human brain. Information in an artificial neural network (ANN) is represented using a statistical method and processed as a fitting function, enabling handling of structural patterns in image, text, and speech processing. However, substantial changes to the statistical characteristics of the data, for example, reversing the background of an image, dramatically reduce the performance. Here, we propose a quantum superposition spiking neural network (QS-SNN) inspired by quantum mechanisms and phenomena in the brain, which can handle reversal of image background color. The QS-SNN incorporates quantum theory with brain-inspired spiking neural network models from a computational perspective, resulting in more robust performance compared with traditional ANN models, especially when processing noisy inputs. The results presented here will inform future efforts to develop brain-inspired artificial intelligence.
summary: Despite advances in artificial intelligence models, neural networks still cannot achieve human performance, partly due to differences in how information is encoded and processed compared to human brain. Information in an artificial neural network (ANN) is represented using a statistical method and processed as a fitting function, enabling handling of structural patterns in image, text, and speech processing. However, substantial changes to the statistical characteristics of the data, for example, reversing the background of an image, dramatically reduce the performance. Here, we propose a quantum superposition spiking neural network (QS-SNN) inspired by quantum mechanisms and phenomena in the brain, which can handle reversal of image background color. The QS-SNN incorporates quantum theory with brain-inspired spiking neural network models from a computational perspective, resulting in more robust performance compared with traditional ANN models, especially when processing noisy inputs. The results presented here will inform future efforts to develop brain-inspired artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 尽管人工智能模型取得了进步，但神经网络仍然无法达到人类的性能，部分原因是与人脑相比，信息编码和处理方式存在差异。人工神经网络 (ANN) 中的信息使用统计方法表示并作为拟合函数进行处理，从而能够处理图像、文本和语音处理中的结构模式。然而，数据统计特性的重大变化（例如反转图像的背景）会显着降低性能。在这里，我们提出了一种受大脑量子机制和现象启发的量子叠加尖峰神经网络（QS-SNN），它可以处理图像背景颜色的反转。 QS-SNN 从计算角度将量子理论与受大脑启发的尖峰神经网络模型相结合，与传统的 ANN 模型相比，具有更稳健的性能，特别是在处理噪声输入时。这里介绍的结果将为未来开发受大脑启发的人工智能的努力提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受量子叠加原理启发的脉冲神经网络（QS-SNN），旨在解决传统人工神经网络在处理数据统计特性突变时性能下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统人工神经网络在处理图像背景反转等数据统计特性突变时表现不佳，需开发更具鲁棒性的脑启发人工智能模型。
AI.method: 将量子理论与脑启发脉冲神经网络结合，设计量子叠加机制，通过计算模型模拟量子态叠加处理信息。
AI.result: QS-SNN在图像背景反转和噪声输入场景下显著优于传统ANN，验证了其处理数据突变的鲁棒性优势。
AI.conclusion: 量子理论与神经网络的融合为开发更接近人脑机制的AI提供了新方向，推动脑启发人工智能的发展。

title: Toward Expressive Singing Voice Correction: On Perceptual Validity of Evaluation Metrics for Vocal Melody Extraction
title_zh: 走向富有表现力的歌声校正：关于声乐旋律提取评估指标的感知有效性
abstract: Singing voice correction (SVC) is an appealing application for amateur singers. Commercial products automate SVC by snapping pitch contours to equal-tempered scales, which could lead to deadpan modifications. Together with the neglect of rhythmic errors, extensive manual corrections are still necessary. In this paper, we present a streamlined system to automate expressive SVC for both pitch and rhythmic errors. Particularly, we extend a previous work by integrating advanced techniques for singing voice separation (SVS) and vocal melody extraction. SVC is achieved by temporally aligning the source-target pair, followed by replacing pitch and rhythm of the source with those of the target. We evaluate the framework by a comparative study for melody extraction which involves both subjective and objective evaluations, whereby we investigate perceptual validity of the standard metrics through the lens of SVC. The results suggest that the high pitch accuracy obtained by the metrics does not signify good perceptual scores.
summary: Singing voice correction (SVC) is an appealing application for amateur singers. Commercial products automate SVC by snapping pitch contours to equal-tempered scales, which could lead to deadpan modifications. Together with the neglect of rhythmic errors, extensive manual corrections are still necessary. In this paper, we present a streamlined system to automate expressive SVC for both pitch and rhythmic errors. Particularly, we extend a previous work by integrating advanced techniques for singing voice separation (SVS) and vocal melody extraction. SVC is achieved by temporally aligning the source-target pair, followed by replacing pitch and rhythm of the source with those of the target. We evaluate the framework by a comparative study for melody extraction which involves both subjective and objective evaluations, whereby we investigate perceptual validity of the standard metrics through the lens of SVC. The results suggest that the high pitch accuracy obtained by the metrics does not signify good perceptual scores.
abstract_zh: 歌声校正（SVC）对于业余歌手来说是一个有吸引力的应用程序。商业产品通过将音高轮廓捕捉到等律音阶来自动化 SVC，这可能会导致面无表情的修改。除了忽略节奏错误之外，仍然需要进行大量的手动校正。在本文中，我们提出了一个简化的系统，可以自动处理音高和节奏错误的表达 SVC。特别是，我们通过集成先进的歌声分离（SVS）和声乐旋律提取技术来扩展之前的工作。 SVC 是通过暂时对齐源-目标对，然后用目标的音高和节奏替换源的音高和节奏来实现的。我们通过旋律提取的比较研究来评估该框架，该研究涉及主观和客观评估，从而通过 SVC 的视角研究标准指标的感知有效性。结果表明，通过指标获得的高音调准确度并不意味着良好的感知得分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化表达式歌唱声音修正系统，通过整合歌唱声音分离和声部旋律提取技术，解决现有修正方法中对节奏误差忽视及依赖等温音阶导致的机械修正问题。
AI.motivation: 商业歌唱修正产品因仅依赖等温音阶修正音高且忽略节奏误差，导致修正结果缺乏表现力，仍需大量人工调整，亟需更符合人类感知的自动化修正方法。
AI.method: 扩展前人工作，融合先进歌唱分离与旋律提取技术，通过时序对齐源-目标声部对，用目标音高节奏替换源音高节奏，并通过主客观结合的旋律提取对比实验验证修正效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，传统评价指标显示的高音高准确率与人类感知评分无显著正相关，说明现有指标无法准确反映修正结果的感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 需重新审视歌唱修正评价体系，单纯追求音高准确率无法保证修正结果的自然表现力，应建立更符合人类听觉感知的评估标准。

tldr: 本文提出一种自动化表达式歌唱声音修正系统，通过整合歌唱声音分离和声部旋律提取技术，解决现有修正方法中对节奏误差忽视及依赖等温音阶导致的机械修正问题。
motivation: 商业歌唱修正产品因仅依赖等温音阶修正音高且忽略节奏误差，导致修正结果缺乏表现力，仍需大量人工调整，亟需更符合人类感知的自动化修正方法。
method: 扩展前人工作，融合先进歌唱分离与旋律提取技术，通过时序对齐源-目标声部对，用目标音高节奏替换源音高节奏，并通过主客观结合的旋律提取对比实验验证修正效果。
result: 实验表明，传统评价指标显示的高音高准确率与人类感知评分无显著正相关，说明现有指标无法准确反映修正结果的感知质量。
conclusion: 需重新审视歌唱修正评价体系，单纯追求音高准确率无法保证修正结果的自然表现力，应建立更符合人类听觉感知的评估标准。
search_text: Toward Expressive Singing Voice Correction: On Perceptual Validity of Evaluation Metrics for Vocal Melody Extraction 走向富有表现力的歌声校正：关于声乐旋律提取评估指标的感知有效性 Singing voice correction (SVC) is an appealing application for amateur singers. Commercial products automate SVC by snapping pitch contours to equal-tempered scales, which could lead to deadpan modifications. Together with the neglect of rhythmic errors, extensive manual corrections are still necessary. In this paper, we present a streamlined system to automate expressive SVC for both pitch and rhythmic errors. Particularly, we extend a previous work by integrating advanced techniques for singing voice separation (SVS) and vocal melody extraction. SVC is achieved by temporally aligning the source-target pair, followed by replacing pitch and rhythm of the source with those of the target. We evaluate the framework by a comparative study for melody extraction which involves both subjective and objective evaluations, whereby we investigate perceptual validity of the standard metrics through the lens of SVC. The results suggest that the high pitch accuracy obtained by the metrics does not signify good perceptual scores. 歌声校正（SVC）对于业余歌手来说是一个有吸引力的应用程序。商业产品通过将音高轮廓捕捉到等律音阶来自动化 SVC，这可能会导致面无表情的修改。除了忽略节奏错误之外，仍然需要进行大量的手动校正。在本文中，我们提出了一个简化的系统，可以自动处理音高和节奏错误的表达 SVC。特别是，我们通过集成先进的歌声分离（SVS）和声乐旋律提取技术来扩展之前的工作。 SVC 是通过暂时对齐源-目标对，然后用目标的音高和节奏替换源的音高和节奏来实现的。我们通过旋律提取的比较研究来评估该框架，该研究涉及主观和客观评估，从而通过 SVC 的视角研究标准指标的感知有效性。结果表明，通过指标获得的高音调准确度并不意味着良好的感知得分。 本文提出一种自动化表达式歌唱声音修正系统，通过整合歌唱声音分离和声部旋律提取技术，解决现有修正方法中对节奏误差忽视及依赖等温音阶导致的机械修正问题。 Yin-Jyun Luo,Yuen-Jen Lin,Li Su eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Kun Fang,Qinghua Tao,Yingwen Wu,Tao Li,Jia Cai,Feipeng Cai,Xiaolin Huang,Jie Yang
title: Towards Robust Neural Networks via Orthogonal Diversity
title_zh: 通过正交分集实现鲁棒神经网络
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to invisible perturbations on the images generated by adversarial attacks, which raises researches on the adversarial robustness of DNNs. A series of methods represented by the adversarial training and its variants have proven as one of the most effective techniques in enhancing the DNN robustness. Generally, adversarial training focuses on enriching the training data by involving perturbed data. Such data augmentation effect of the involved perturbed data in adversarial training does not contribute to the robustness of DNN itself and usually suffers from clean accuracy drop. Towards the robustness of DNN itself, we in this paper propose a novel defense that aims at augmenting the model in order to learn features that are adaptive to diverse inputs, including adversarial examples. More specifically, to augment the model, multiple paths are embedded into the network, and an orthogonality constraint is imposed on these paths to guarantee the diversity among them. A margin-maximization loss is then designed to further boost such DIversity via Orthogonality (DIO). In this way, the proposed DIO augments the model and enhances the robustness of DNN itself as the learned features can be corrected by these mutually-orthogonal paths. Extensive empirical results on various data sets, structures and attacks verify the stronger adversarial robustness of the proposed DIO utilizing model augmentation. Besides, DIO can also be flexibly combined with different data augmentation techniques (e.g., TRADES and DDPM), further promoting robustness gains.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to invisible perturbations on the images generated by adversarial attacks, which raises researches on the adversarial robustness of DNNs. A series of methods represented by the adversarial training and its variants have proven as one of the most effective techniques in enhancing the DNN robustness. Generally, adversarial training focuses on enriching the training data by involving perturbed data. Such data augmentation effect of the involved perturbed data in adversarial training does not contribute to the robustness of DNN itself and usually suffers from clean accuracy drop. Towards the robustness of DNN itself, we in this paper propose a novel defense that aims at augmenting the model in order to learn features that are adaptive to diverse inputs, including adversarial examples. More specifically, to augment the model, multiple paths are embedded into the network, and an orthogonality constraint is imposed on these paths to guarantee the diversity among them. A margin-maximization loss is then designed to further boost such DIversity via Orthogonality (DIO). In this way, the proposed DIO augments the model and enhances the robustness of DNN itself as the learned features can be corrected by these mutually-orthogonal paths. Extensive empirical results on various data sets, structures and attacks verify the stronger adversarial robustness of the proposed DIO utilizing model augmentation. Besides, DIO can also be flexibly combined with different data augmentation techniques (e.g., TRADES and DDPM), further promoting robustness gains.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到对抗性攻击生成的图像的隐形扰动，这引发了对 DNN 对抗性鲁棒性的研究。以对抗训练及其变体为代表的一系列方法已被证明是增强 DNN 鲁棒性的最有效技术之一。一般来说，对抗性训练的重点是通过涉及扰动数据来丰富训练数据。对抗性训练中涉及的扰动数据的这种数据增强效应不会有助于 DNN 本身的鲁棒性，并且通常会出现明显的准确率下降。为了提高 DNN 本身的鲁棒性，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的防御方法，旨在增强模型，以便学习适应不同输入（包括对抗性示例）的特征。更具体地说，为了增强模型，将多条路径嵌入到网络中，并对这些路径施加正交约束以保证它们之间的多样性。然后设计边际最大化损失，以通过正交性（DIO）进一步提高这种多样性。通过这种方式，所提出的 DIO 增强了模型并增强了 DNN 本身的鲁棒性，因为学习到的特征可以通过这些相互正交的路径进行校正。对各种数据集、结构和攻击的广泛实证结果验证了所提出的利用模型增强的 DIO 具有更强的对抗鲁棒性。此外，DIO还可以灵活地与不同的数据增强技术（例如TRADES和DDPM）结合，进一步提高鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过正交多样性增强深度神经网络（DNN）鲁棒性的新方法，旨在提升模型对对抗样本的防御能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法依赖数据增强但易导致干净数据准确率下降，本文旨在通过模型自身增强而非单纯数据扩展来提升DNN的内在鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在网络中嵌入多条路径并施加正交约束，设计最大化边距损失（DIO）以增强路径间多样性，使模型通过正交路径修正特征表示。
AI.result: 在多个数据集、网络结构和攻击方法下验证了DIO的更强对抗鲁棒性，且可与TRADES、DDPM等数据增强技术灵活结合进一步提升效果。
AI.conclusion: DIO通过模型结构增强实现正交多样性，有效提升DNN鲁棒性，为对抗攻击防御提供了灵活且高效的新思路。

title: Towards Fair Knowledge Transfer for Imbalanced Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 实现不平衡领域适应的公平知识转移
comment: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing, vol. 30, pp. 8200-8211, 2021
comments: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing, vol. 30, pp. 8200-8211, 2021
abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) becomes an up-and-coming technique to address the insufficient or no annotation issue by exploiting external source knowledge. Existing DA algorithms mainly focus on practical knowledge transfer through domain alignment. Unfortunately, they ignore the fairness issue when the auxiliary source is extremely imbalanced across different categories, which results in severe under-presented knowledge adaptation of minority source set. To this end, we propose a Towards Fair Knowledge Transfer (TFKT) framework to handle the fairness challenge in imbalanced cross-domain learning. Specifically, a novel cross-domain mixup generation is exploited to augment the minority source set with target information to enhance fairness. Moreover, dual distinct classifiers and cross-domain prototype alignment are developed to seek a more robust classifier boundary and mitigate the domain shift. Such three strategies are formulated into a unified framework to address the fairness issue and domain shift challenge. Extensive experiments over two popular benchmarks have verified the effectiveness of our proposed model by comparing to existing state-of-the-art DA models, and especially our model significantly improves over 20% on two benchmarks in terms of the overall accuracy.
summary: Domain adaptation (DA) becomes an up-and-coming technique to address the insufficient or no annotation issue by exploiting external source knowledge. Existing DA algorithms mainly focus on practical knowledge transfer through domain alignment. Unfortunately, they ignore the fairness issue when the auxiliary source is extremely imbalanced across different categories, which results in severe under-presented knowledge adaptation of minority source set. To this end, we propose a Towards Fair Knowledge Transfer (TFKT) framework to handle the fairness challenge in imbalanced cross-domain learning. Specifically, a novel cross-domain mixup generation is exploited to augment the minority source set with target information to enhance fairness. Moreover, dual distinct classifiers and cross-domain prototype alignment are developed to seek a more robust classifier boundary and mitigate the domain shift. Such three strategies are formulated into a unified framework to address the fairness issue and domain shift challenge. Extensive experiments over two popular benchmarks have verified the effectiveness of our proposed model by comparing to existing state-of-the-art DA models, and especially our model significantly improves over 20% on two benchmarks in terms of the overall accuracy.
abstract_zh: 领域适应（DA）成为一种新兴技术，通过利用外部源知识来解决注释不足或无注释问题。现有的DA算法主要侧重于通过领域对齐来转移实际知识。不幸的是，当辅助源在不同类别之间极度不平衡时，他们忽略了公平性问题，从而导致少数源集的知识适应严重不足。为此，我们提出了一个迈向公平知识转移（TFKT）框架来应对不平衡的跨领域学习中的公平挑战。具体来说，利用一种新颖的跨域混合生成来用目标信息来增强少数源集，以增强公平性。此外，开发了双重不同的分类器和跨域原型对齐，以寻求更稳健的分类器边界并减轻域转移。这三种策略被制定为一个统一的框架，以解决公平问题和领域转移挑战。通过与现有最先进的 DA 模型进行比较，对两个流行基准的大量实验验证了我们提出的模型的有效性，特别是我们的模型在两个基准上的整体精度显着提高了 20% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向不平衡领域自适应的公平知识迁移框架TFKT，解决辅助源类别极度不平衡导致的少数类知识适应不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应算法在处理类别极度不平衡的辅助源时忽略公平性问题，导致少数类知识迁移效果差，影响整体模型性能。
AI.method: 提出跨域mixup生成增强少数类样本，设计双分类器与跨域原型对齐策略，构建统一框架同时解决公平性与领域偏移问题。
AI.result: 在两个主流基准数据集上实验表明，该模型相较现有SOTA方法整体准确率提升超20%。
AI.conclusion: TFKT通过创新性方法有效缓解了不平衡领域自适应中的公平性挑战，为跨域学习提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Existing DA algorithms mainly focus on practical knowledge transfer through domain alignment. Unfortunately, they ignore the fairness issue when the auxiliary source is extremely imbalanced across different categories, which results in severe under-presented knowledge adaptation of minority source set. To this end, we propose a Towards Fair Knowledge Transfer (TFKT) framework to handle the fairness challenge in imbalanced cross-domain learning. Specifically, a novel cross-domain mixup generation is exploited to augment the minority source set with target information to enhance fairness. Moreover, dual distinct classifiers and cross-domain prototype alignment are developed to seek a more robust classifier boundary and mitigate the domain shift. Such three strategies are formulated into a unified framework to address the fairness issue and domain shift challenge. Extensive experiments over two popular benchmarks have verified the effectiveness of our proposed model by comparing to existing state-of-the-art DA models, and especially our model significantly improves over 20% on two benchmarks in terms of the overall accuracy. 领域适应（DA）成为一种新兴技术，通过利用外部源知识来解决注释不足或无注释问题。现有的DA算法主要侧重于通过领域对齐来转移实际知识。不幸的是，当辅助源在不同类别之间极度不平衡时，他们忽略了公平性问题，从而导致少数源集的知识适应严重不足。为此，我们提出了一个迈向公平知识转移（TFKT）框架来应对不平衡的跨领域学习中的公平挑战。具体来说，利用一种新颖的跨域混合生成来用目标信息来增强少数源集，以增强公平性。此外，开发了双重不同的分类器和跨域原型对齐，以寻求更稳健的分类器边界并减轻域转移。这三种策略被制定为一个统一的框架，以解决公平问题和领域转移挑战。通过与现有最先进的 DA 模型进行比较，对两个流行基准的大量实验验证了我们提出的模型的有效性，特别是我们的模型在两个基准上的整体精度显着提高了 20% 以上。 本文提出一种面向不平衡领域自适应的公平知识迁移框架TFKT，解决辅助源类别极度不平衡导致的少数类知识适应不足问题。 Taotao Jing,Bingrong Xu,Jingjing Li,Zhengming Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Sanyuan Chen,Yu Wu,Zhuo Chen,Takuya Yoshioka,Shujie Liu,Jinyu Li
title: Don't shoot butterfly with rifles: Multi-channel Continuous Speech Separation with Early Exit Transformer
title_zh: 不要用步枪射蝴蝶：使用 Early Exit Transformer 进行多通道连续语音分离
abstract: With its strong modeling capacity that comes from a multi-head and multi-layer structure, Transformer is a very powerful model for learning a sequential representation and has been successfully applied to speech separation recently. However, multi-channel speech separation sometimes does not necessarily need such a heavy structure for all time frames especially when the cross-talker challenge happens only occasionally. For example, in conversation scenarios, most regions contain only a single active speaker, where the separation task downgrades to a single speaker enhancement problem. It turns out that using a very deep network structure for dealing with signals with a low overlap ratio not only negatively affects the inference efficiency but also hurts the separation performance. To deal with this problem, we propose an early exit mechanism, which enables the Transformer model to handle different cases with adaptive depth. Experimental results indicate that not only does the early exit mechanism accelerate the inference, but it also improves the accuracy.
summary: With its strong modeling capacity that comes from a multi-head and multi-layer structure, Transformer is a very powerful model for learning a sequential representation and has been successfully applied to speech separation recently. However, multi-channel speech separation sometimes does not necessarily need such a heavy structure for all time frames especially when the cross-talker challenge happens only occasionally. For example, in conversation scenarios, most regions contain only a single active speaker, where the separation task downgrades to a single speaker enhancement problem. It turns out that using a very deep network structure for dealing with signals with a low overlap ratio not only negatively affects the inference efficiency but also hurts the separation performance. To deal with this problem, we propose an early exit mechanism, which enables the Transformer model to handle different cases with adaptive depth. Experimental results indicate that not only does the early exit mechanism accelerate the inference, but it also improves the accuracy.
abstract_zh: Transformer 凭借多头、多层结构带来的强大建模能力，是学习顺序表示的非常强大的模型，最近已成功应用于语音分离。然而，多通道语音分离有时不一定需要在所有时间帧上都使用如此繁重的结构，特别是当串话者挑战只是偶尔发生时。例如，在对话场景中，大多数区域仅包含单个活动说话人，其中分离任务降级为单个说话人增强问题。事实证明，使用非常深的网络结构来处理低重叠率的信号不仅会对推理效率产生负面影响，还会损害分离性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种提前退出机制，使 Transformer 模型能够以自适应深度处理不同的情况。实验结果表明，提前退出机制不仅加速了推理速度，而且提高了准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于早停机制的多通道连续语音分离方法，通过自适应调整Transformer模型深度以提高效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度网络在处理低重叠比语音信号时存在计算冗余且性能下降的问题，而实际场景中多数时段仅需单说话人增强处理。
AI.method: 设计早停机制使Transformer模型根据输入特征动态决定网络深度，在简单场景提前终止计算以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持分离质量的同时提升推理速度，尤其在低重叠比场景下性能优于传统深度模型。
AI.conclusion: 早停机制有效平衡了模型复杂度与分离性能，为多通道语音分离提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Yuxi Li,Ning Xu,Jinlong Peng,John See,Weiyao Lin
title: Delving into the Cyclic Mechanism in Semi-supervised Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 深入研究半监督视频对象分割中的循环机制
abstract: In this paper, we address several inadequacies of current video object segmentation pipelines. Firstly, a cyclic mechanism is incorporated to the standard semi-supervised process to produce more robust representations. By relying on the accurate reference mask in the starting frame, we show that the error propagation problem can be mitigated. Next, we introduce a simple gradient correction module, which extends the offline pipeline to an online method while maintaining the efficiency of the former. Finally we develop cycle effective receptive field (cycle-ERF) based on gradient correction to provide a new perspective into analyzing object-specific regions of interests. We conduct comprehensive experiments on challenging benchmarks of DAVIS17 and Youtube-VOS, demonstrating that the cyclic mechanism is beneficial to segmentation quality.
summary: In this paper, we address several inadequacies of current video object segmentation pipelines. Firstly, a cyclic mechanism is incorporated to the standard semi-supervised process to produce more robust representations. By relying on the accurate reference mask in the starting frame, we show that the error propagation problem can be mitigated. Next, we introduce a simple gradient correction module, which extends the offline pipeline to an online method while maintaining the efficiency of the former. Finally we develop cycle effective receptive field (cycle-ERF) based on gradient correction to provide a new perspective into analyzing object-specific regions of interests. We conduct comprehensive experiments on challenging benchmarks of DAVIS17 and Youtube-VOS, demonstrating that the cyclic mechanism is beneficial to segmentation quality.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了当前视频对象分割管道的几个不足之处。首先，将循环机制纳入标准半监督过程中以产生更稳健的表示。通过依赖起始帧中的准确参考掩模，我们表明可以减轻误差传播问题。接下来，我们介绍一个简单的梯度校正模块，它将离线管道扩展到在线方法，同时保持前者的效率。最后，我们开发了基于梯度校正的循环有效感受野（cycle-ERF），为分析特定对象感兴趣区域提供了新的视角。我们对 DAVIS17 和 Youtube-VOS 的挑战性基准进行了全面的实验，证明循环机制有利于分割质量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究半监督视频对象分割中的循环机制，提出改进方法以提升分割质量。
AI.motivation: 现有视频对象分割方法存在误差传播问题，且在线方法效率不足，需改进表示鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.method: 引入循环机制利用初始帧参考掩码缓解误差传播，设计梯度校正模块实现在线处理，并提出cycle-ERF分析对象特定区域。
AI.result: 在DAVIS17和YouTube-VOS基准测试中验证，循环机制显著提升分割精度与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 循环机制与梯度校正有效解决了半监督视频分割中的关键问题，为后续研究提供新思路。

title: A Cross-Verification Approach for Protecting World Leaders from Fake and Tampered Audio
title_zh: 保护世界领导人免受虚假和篡改音频侵害的交叉验证方法
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of verifying the authenticity of speech recordings from world leaders. Whereas previous work on detecting deep fake or tampered audio focus on scrutinizing an audio recording in isolation, we instead reframe the problem and focus on cross-verifying a questionable recording against trusted references. We present a method for cross-verifying a speech recording against a reference that consists of two steps: aligning the two recordings and then classifying each query frame as matching or non-matching. We propose a subsequence alignment method based on the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm and show that it significantly outperforms dynamic time warping in handling common tampering operations. We also explore several binary classification models based on LSTM and Transformer architectures to verify content at the frame level. Through extensive experiments on tampered speech recordings of Donald Trump, we show that our system can reliably detect audio tampering operations of different types and durations. Our best model achieves 99.7% accuracy for the alignment task at an error tolerance of 50 ms and a 0.43% equal error rate in classifying audio frames as matching or non-matching.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of verifying the authenticity of speech recordings from world leaders. Whereas previous work on detecting deep fake or tampered audio focus on scrutinizing an audio recording in isolation, we instead reframe the problem and focus on cross-verifying a questionable recording against trusted references. We present a method for cross-verifying a speech recording against a reference that consists of two steps: aligning the two recordings and then classifying each query frame as matching or non-matching. We propose a subsequence alignment method based on the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm and show that it significantly outperforms dynamic time warping in handling common tampering operations. We also explore several binary classification models based on LSTM and Transformer architectures to verify content at the frame level. Through extensive experiments on tampered speech recordings of Donald Trump, we show that our system can reliably detect audio tampering operations of different types and durations. Our best model achieves 99.7% accuracy for the alignment task at an error tolerance of 50 ms and a 0.43% equal error rate in classifying audio frames as matching or non-matching.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了验证世界领导人讲话录音真实性的问题。之前检测深度伪造或篡改音频的工作主要集中于单独检查音频记录，而我们则重新构建问题，并专注于根据可信参考交叉验证有问题的记录。我们提出了一种根据参考交叉验证语音记录的方法，该方法包括两个步骤：对齐两个录音，然后将每个查询帧分类为匹配或不匹配。我们提出了一种基于 Needleman-Wunsch 算法的子序列对齐方法，并表明它在处理常见的篡改操作方面明显优于动态时间扭曲。我们还探索了几种基于 LSTM 和 Transformer 架构的二元分类模型，以在帧级别验证内容。通过对唐纳德·特朗普的篡改语音录音进行大量实验，我们表明我们的系统可以可靠地检测不同类型和持续时间的音频篡改操作。我们的最佳模型以 50 毫秒的容错率实现了 99.7% 的对齐任务准确率，并且在将音频帧分类为匹配或不匹配时的相等错误率为 0.43%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨验证方法，用于检测和保护世界领导人音频记录的真实性，防止伪造和篡改。
AI.motivation: 现有方法单独分析音频难以有效检测篡改，而通过对比可信参考进行跨验证可提高检测可靠性。
AI.method: 提出基于Needleman-Wunsch算法的子序列对齐方法，结合LSTM和Transformer架构的二分类模型，实现音频帧的匹配分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，系统能有效检测多种篡改类型，最佳模型对齐准确率达99.7%（误差容忍50ms），分类错误率为0.43%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升音频篡改检测性能，为保护重要人物音频安全提供可靠技术方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种跨验证方法，用于检测和保护世界领导人音频记录的真实性，防止伪造和篡改。

ai_content.method: 提出基于Needleman-Wunsch算法的子序列对齐方法，结合LSTM和Transformer架构的二分类模型，实现音频帧的匹配分类。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，系统能有效检测多种篡改类型，最佳模型对齐准确率达99.7%（误差容忍50ms），分类错误率为0.43%。

search_text: A Cross-Verification Approach for Protecting World Leaders from Fake and Tampered Audio 保护世界领导人免受虚假和篡改音频侵害的交叉验证方法 This paper tackles the problem of verifying the authenticity of speech recordings from world leaders. Whereas previous work on detecting deep fake or tampered audio focus on scrutinizing an audio recording in isolation, we instead reframe the problem and focus on cross-verifying a questionable recording against trusted references. We present a method for cross-verifying a speech recording against a reference that consists of two steps: aligning the two recordings and then classifying each query frame as matching or non-matching. We propose a subsequence alignment method based on the Needleman-Wunsch algorithm and show that it significantly outperforms dynamic time warping in handling common tampering operations. We also explore several binary classification models based on LSTM and Transformer architectures to verify content at the frame level. Through extensive experiments on tampered speech recordings of Donald Trump, we show that our system can reliably detect audio tampering operations of different types and durations. Our best model achieves 99.7% accuracy for the alignment task at an error tolerance of 50 ms and a 0.43% equal error rate in classifying audio frames as matching or non-matching. 本文解决了验证世界领导人讲话录音真实性的问题。之前检测深度伪造或篡改音频的工作主要集中于单独检查音频记录，而我们则重新构建问题，并专注于根据可信参考交叉验证有问题的记录。我们提出了一种根据参考交叉验证语音记录的方法，该方法包括两个步骤：对齐两个录音，然后将每个查询帧分类为匹配或不匹配。我们提出了一种基于 Needleman-Wunsch 算法的子序列对齐方法，并表明它在处理常见的篡改操作方面明显优于动态时间扭曲。我们还探索了几种基于 LSTM 和 Transformer 架构的二元分类模型，以在帧级别验证内容。通过对唐纳德·特朗普的篡改语音录音进行大量实验，我们表明我们的系统可以可靠地检测不同类型和持续时间的音频篡改操作。我们的最佳模型以 50 毫秒的容错率实现了 99.7% 的对齐任务准确率，并且在将音频帧分类为匹配或不匹配时的相等错误率为 0.43%。 本文提出一种跨验证方法，用于检测和保护世界领导人音频记录的真实性，防止伪造和篡改。 Mengyi Shan,TJ Tsai eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Transformer-based End-to-End Speech Recognition with Local Dense Synthesizer Attention
title_zh: 具有局部密集合成器注意力的基于 Transformer 的端到端语音识别
abstract: Recently, several studies reported that dot-product selfattention (SA) may not be indispensable to the state-of-theart Transformer models. Motivated by the fact that dense synthesizer attention (DSA), which dispenses with dot products and pairwise interactions, achieved competitive results in many language processing tasks, in this paper, we first propose a DSA-based speech recognition, as an alternative to SA. To reduce the computational complexity and improve the performance, we further propose local DSA (LDSA) to restrict the attention scope of DSA to a local range around the current central frame for speech recognition. Finally, we combine LDSA with SA to extract the local and global information simultaneously. Experimental results on the Ai-shell1 Mandarine speech recognition corpus show that the proposed LDSA-Transformer achieves a character error rate (CER) of 6.49%, which is slightly better than that of the SA-Transformer. Meanwhile, the LDSA-Transformer requires less computation than the SATransformer. The proposed combination method not only achieves a CER of 6.18%, which significantly outperforms the SA-Transformer, but also has roughly the same number of parameters and computational complexity as the latter. The implementation of the multi-head LDSA is available at https://github.com/mlxu995/multihead-LDSA.
summary: Recently, several studies reported that dot-product selfattention (SA) may not be indispensable to the state-of-theart Transformer models. Motivated by the fact that dense synthesizer attention (DSA), which dispenses with dot products and pairwise interactions, achieved competitive results in many language processing tasks, in this paper, we first propose a DSA-based speech recognition, as an alternative to SA. To reduce the computational complexity and improve the performance, we further propose local DSA (LDSA) to restrict the attention scope of DSA to a local range around the current central frame for speech recognition. Finally, we combine LDSA with SA to extract the local and global information simultaneously. Experimental results on the Ai-shell1 Mandarine speech recognition corpus show that the proposed LDSA-Transformer achieves a character error rate (CER) of 6.49%, which is slightly better than that of the SA-Transformer. Meanwhile, the LDSA-Transformer requires less computation than the SATransformer. The proposed combination method not only achieves a CER of 6.18%, which significantly outperforms the SA-Transformer, but also has roughly the same number of parameters and computational complexity as the latter. The implementation of the multi-head LDSA is available at https://github.com/mlxu995/multihead-LDSA.
abstract_zh: 最近，一些研究报告称，点积自注意力（SA）对于最先进的 Transformer 模型来说可能并不是不可或缺的。由于密集合成器注意力（DSA）无需点积和成对交互，在许多语言处理任务中取得了有竞争力的结果，因此在本文中，我们首先提出了一种基于 DSA 的语音识别，作为 SA 的替代方案。为了降低计算复杂度并提高性能，我们进一步提出局部DSA（LDSA），将DSA的注意力范围限制在当前语音识别中心框架周围的局部范围。最后，我们将LDSA与SA结合起来，同时提取局部和全局信息。在Ai-shell1普通话语音识别语料库上的实验结果表明，所提出的LDSA-Transformer实现了6.49%的字符错误率（CER），略优于SA-Transformer。同时，LDSA-Transformer 需要的计算量比 SATransformer 少。所提出的组合方法不仅实现了 6.18% 的 CER，显着优于 SA-Transformer，而且参数数量和计算复杂度与后者大致相同。多头 LDSA 的实现可在 https://github.com/mlxu995/multihead-LDSA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部密集合成器注意力（LDSA）的端到端语音识别模型，以替代传统Transformer中的自注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明点积自注意力（SA）可能非必需，而密集合成器注意力（DSA）在语言任务中表现优异，因此探索DSA在语音识别中的应用并优化其计算效率。
AI.method: 提出DSA-based语音识别模型，进一步设计局部DSA（LDSA）以限制注意力范围，并将LDSA与SA结合以同时捕捉局部与全局信息。
AI.result: 在Ai-shell1语料库上，LDSA-Transformer字符错误率（CER）为6.49%（优于SA-Transformer），组合模型CER降至6.18%，且参数量与计算复杂度相近。
AI.conclusion: LDSA-Transformer在保持较低计算量的同时提升性能，组合方法进一步显著优化结果，验证了局部与全局信息融合的有效性。
